name: Theme
description: The #Theme covers or fills the #Location.  This FE most frequently occurs in a PP Complement headed by with or in.

description: It is the object or area that the #Theme fills or covers.  This frame element generally occurs as the External Argument.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity (often a food item) that absorbs heat.

description: The object that directly supplies heat to the #Entity.

name: Place

description: A substance through which heat is absorbed by the #Entity.

description: Any description of the cooking event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Temperature
description: The temperature that the #Entity stays at, resulting in change.

name: Duration
description: The length of time that the #Entity is exposed to heat.

name: Collection
description: The #Collection whose #Quantity is under consideration.

name: Quantity

name: Agent
description: The conscious entity, generally a person, that performs the intentional act that fulfills the #Goal.

name: Goal
description:
The state or action that the #Agent has wished to participate in.

<ex>Iraq had <t>achieved</t> <fex name="goa">its programme objective of producing nuclear weapons</fex> . </ex>

name: Means
description:
An intentional action performed by the #Agent that lets them accomplish their #Goal. 

<ex>Can you , too , <t>achieve</t> omniscience <fex name="Mns">by calling on the power of God</fex> ?</ex>

name: Instrument
description:
An entity directed by the #Agent that allows them to achieve their #Goal.

<ex><fex name="Ins">With a simple hammer and saw</fex> , you can <t>accomplish</t> almost anything !</ex>

name: Place
description:
This FE identifies the place where the #Agent achieves their #Goal.

<ex>She had already <t>achieved</t> that feat <fex name="Place">in Burma</fex> .</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the time when the #Agent achieves their #Goal.

<ex><fex name="Time">By 1700</fex> , our forces will have <t>achieved</t> total victory .</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully). 

<ex>Perhaps you <t>achieved</t> perfection <fex name="man">too quickly</fex> .</ex>

name: Duration
description: The length of time that it takes for #Goal to be accomplished.

name: Part

name: Time_of_creation

name: Agent

The individual who tries to interact with the #Target.

<ex><fex name="Agent">The mailman</fex> is very <t>exact</t> about addresses -- he has to be .</ex>

name: Degree

Expected or actual deviation from the #Target_value.

<ex>For this they would need a thermometer <t>accurate</t> <fex name="Deviation">to within a microkelvin</fex>. </ex>

description: The #Targeted is the entity located in an indirectly accessible location relative to the #Agent.

name: Instrument
description: The object manipulated by the #Agent in order to interact with the #Targeted.

name: Target_location
description: The location that the #Agent wishes to ready the #Instrument to access.

name: Activity
description: The #Activity is undertaken by the #Agent and is directed towards the #Targeted or #Target_location.

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the #Means by which the aiming is achieved.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the #Agent takes aim.

name: Place
description: The place where the #Agent aims at the #Targeted.

name: Manner
description:
Any generalized description of the details of the event in terms of comparison to another event or what would be expected of the details given some state of the #Agent.

<ex>She took <fex name="Manner">careful</fex> <t>aim</t> before shooting .</ex>

name: Purpose
description: The reason for which the #Agent attempts to interact with the #Targeted.

name: Alignment_match
description: A region of space oriented the same as the #Ground.

name: Ground
description: An entity whose location and orientation is relatively well-known and which, thus, can serve as a land-mark to identify the #Alignment_match and #Alignment_mismatch regions.

name: Alignment_mismatch
description: A region oriented approximately perpendicular to the #Ground.

name: fe_Alérgenos_Alérgeno
description: fe_Alérgenos_Alérgeno

name: fe_Alérgenos_Origem
description: fe_Alérgenos_Origem

name: fe_Alérgenos_Descritor
description: fe_Alérgenos_Descritor

name: Alliance
description: The entity of which the individuals are #Members.

name: Members
description: The persons or groups belonging to the #Alliance.

name: Member_1
description: That group or individual which has joined the #Alliance which is grammatically more prominent when the #Members are presented separately.

name: Member_2
description: That group or individual which has joined the #Alliance which is grammatically less  prominent when the #Members are presented separately.

name: Purpose
description: The reason for which an #Alliance is formed.

name: Period_of_existence
description: The interval during which the #Alliance exists.

name: Situation
description:
Something that may happen in the future, or at least whose factual status is unresolved. This is often tagged in a second FE layer and generally contains the target.

<ex><fex name="Agent">You</fex> have a <t>chance</t> <fex name="Situation">at life</fex>.</ex>

name: Agent
description:
An individual involved in the #Event.

"<fex name="Agent">You</fex> have a <t>choice</t>."

name: Salient_entity
description:
An entity intimately involved in the #Event.

<ex><fex name="Agent">You</fex> have one <t>choice</t> to make <fex name="Salient_entity">for him</fex>.</ex>

name: Number_of_possibilities
description: The number of different future #Events under consideration.  <ex>There are <fex name="Number_of_possibilities">two</fex> <t>possibilities</t>.</ex>

name: Profiled_alternative
description: A situation that cannot be true at the same time as the #Contrasting_alternative.

name: Contrasting_alternative
description: A situation that cannot be true at the same time as the #Profiled_alternative.

name: Parts
description: The entities that merge to form a single #Whole.

name: Whole
description: The single, undifferentiated entity that is the result of the amalgamation.

name: Part_1
description: The prominent entity that combines with #Part_2 to form a #Whole.

name: Part_2
description: The less focussed-upon entity that the #Part_1 merges with.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the thoroughness of the mixing job, i.e. to what degree the resulting #Whole is undifferentiated.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).  In this frame, it is also deemed to include modification indicating the speed of the event.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Parts become amalgamated into a #Whole.

name: Place
description: The location at which the amalgamation occurs.

name: Recipient
description: The #Recipient indicates the entity that ends up in possession of the #Mass_theme.

name: Mass_theme
description: The collection of objects that ends up in the #Recipient's possession.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the location that the #Mass_theme formerly occupied.  Persons that begin in possession of the #Mass_theme may metonymically stand in for the #Source.

name: Place
description: The #Place denotes where the #Mass_theme is acquired.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Means
description: The #Means is the action of the #Recipient which results in their possession of the #Mass_theme.

name: Manner
description: A description of the Amassing which is not covered by more specific FEs.  It includes such specifications as comparisons to other events (similarly), rates of acquisition (slowly), and descriptions of the #Recipient which also influence the action (eagerly).

name: Duration
description: It describes the length of time over which amassing occurs.

name: Circumstances
description: Some specification of the circumstances under which amassing occurs.

name: Place
description: The #Place where  it is a certain #Temperature .

name: Attribute
description: The temperature feature of the weather.

name: Temperature
description: A quantity or other characterization of the #Temperature of the environment.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Temperature from the norm.

name: Time
description: The #Time during which an ambient environment has a particular #Temperature.

name: Weather
description: The meteorological conditions which determine the ambient temperature of a locale.

name: Ammunition
description: This FE identifies the #Ammunition that is designed to have a particular #Use.

name: Use
description: The use for which a piece of ammunition is intended.

name: Creator
description: An individual or individuals that bring the #Ammunition into existence.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which an #Ammunition comes into existence.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to an #Ammunition.

name: Type
description: An indication of the subtype of #Ammunition.

name: Material
description: Any indication of what makes up the #Ammunition, including components, ingredients, etc.

name: Weapon
description:
The weapon that the #Ammunition is used in.

<ex><t>Ammo</t> <fex name="Weapon">for an AK-47</fex> was found in the bedroom .</ex>
<ex><fex name="Weapon">Shotgun</fex> <t>shells</t>, unlike simple balls, cannot be reused .</ex>

name: Value
description: The value of an attribute.

name: Attribute
description: The scalar property of a concrete or abstract entity.

name: Numbers
description: A set of numbers that add up to the #Value.

name: Time_span
description: The span of time when the #Attribute has the #Value.

name: Animal
description: The living organism belonging to the kingdom Animalia.

name: Descriptor
description: A characterization of the #Animal not covered by another frame element.

name: Origin
description: The location from which the #Animal originated.

name: Characteristic
description: A quality of the #Animal.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer is the person or sentient entity that experiences or feels the emotions.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the general area in which the emotion occurs.  It indicates a range of possible #Stimulus.

name: Stimulus
description: The #Stimulus is the person, event, or state of affairs that evokes the emotional response in the #Experiencer.

name: Expressor
description: The body part, gesture, or other expression of the #Experiencer that reflects his or her emotional state.  They describe a presentation of the experience or emotion denoted by the adjective or noun.

name: State
description: The #State is the abstract noun that describes a more lasting experience by the #Experiencer.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Experiencer s emotion deviates from the norm for the emotion.

name: Parameter
description: The #Parameter is a domain in which the #Experiencer experiences the #Stimulus.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the way in which the #Experiencer experiences the #Stimulus which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>).  #Manner may also describe a state of the #Experiencer that affects the details of the emotional experience.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Experiencer, #Expressor, or #State can be described as having said emotion.

name: Convict
description: The #Convict is the individual convicted of the crime who may make an appeal on her or his behalf.

name: Representative
description: The #Representative applies to a higher court on behalf of the #Convict.

name: Decision
description: The #Decision is the ruling handed down by the first court.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which a #Convict or #Representative appeals.

name: Name
description: The name of the person referred to by a #Title.

name: Title
description: How a person is referred to within an Institution, often denoting their rank or status. The #Title is always marked on the target.

name: Context
description: The language, region, or domain in which the #Title applies.

name: Type
description: The sub-type of the #Title.

name: Appliance
description: A device or machine, mainly electrical, developed to perform a specific task.

name: Constituent_parts
description: Salient parts that make up the #Appliance.

name: Creator
description: An individual or individuals that bring the #Appliance into existence.

name: Description
description: Specific features of an #Appliance.

name: Material
description: Any indication of what makes up the #Appliance, including components, ingredients, etc.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to an #Appliance.

name: Origin
description: It is the place where the #Appliance came from.

name: Place
description: It is where the #Appliance is located.

name: Quantity
description: It is the amount of appliances.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which an #Appliance comes into existence.

name: Type
description: An indication of the subtype of #Appliance.

name: Use
description: The #Use for which the #Appliance was intended.

name: Cook
description: The #Cook applies heat to the #Food.

name: Heating_instrument
description: The entity that  directly supplies heat to the #Food.

name: Food
description: #Food is the entity to which heat is applied by the #Cook.

name: Temperature_setting
description: The #Temperature_setting of the #Heating_instrument for the #Food.

name: Container
description: The #Container holds the #Food to which heat is applied.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the heat application  occurs.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the heat application occurs.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which heat is applied to #Food.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which an intentional act is performed.

name: Duration
description: #Duration is the amount of #Time that heat is applied to the #Food.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which heat application occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the cooking event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Cook that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Selector
description: The #Selector is responsible for the appointment of the new official.  Typically, it occurs as the External Argument of verbs.

name: Role
description: Frequently, the #Official is referred to only by his/her role. However, the #Role can be expressed separately from the leader, usually as either a secondary predicate or in a PP Complement (headed by <m>as</m>).

name: Function
description: The #Function is the purpose the #Official will fufill.

name: Body
description: A group of individuals who are elected or appointed to perform some function, and to which the #Official is assigned.

name: Apointee
description: The #Appointee is a person appointed to a recognized position.

name: Appointee
description: The #Appointee is a person appointed to a recognized position.

name: Degree
description: It indicates the #Degree to which an event occurs.

name: Manner
description: It is used for the #Manner of performing an action.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which  the #Selector accomplishes the designation of the #Official.

name: Time
description: When the designation of the official takes place.

name: Place
description: Where the appointment takes place.

name: Part
description: A  #Part of a larger architectural unit, the  #Whole.

name: Whole
description: An architectural unit which includes the #Part.

name: Descriptor
description: A property relating to the  #Part.

name: Orientation
description: This is a property of the  #Part that situates  the  #Part within the #Whole.

name: Material
description: Any indication of what makes up the #Part, including components, ingredients, etc.

name: Creator
description: The Individual  who creates the #Part.

name: Term1
description: <def-root>The grammatically more prominent number in an arithmetic operation.</def-root>

name: Term2
description: <def-root>The grammatically less prominent number in an arithmetic operation.</def-root>

name: Terms
description: Two more or elements of a commutative arithmetic operation. This frame element may be represented as #Term1 and #Term2.

name: Terms
description: Two more or elements of a commutative arithmetic operation. This frame element may be represented as #Term1 and #Term2.

name: Term1
description: <def-root>The grammatically more prominent number involved in a commutative operation.</def-root>

name: Term2
description: <def-root>The grammatically less prominent number involved in commutative operation.</def-root>

name: Term_1
description: #Term_1 is the first operand in the non-commutative arithmetic that is modified by #Term_2 (e.g. subtracted or divided by #Term_2).

name: Term_2
description: #Term_2 is the second operand of the non-commutative arithmetic which modifies #Term_1 (e.g. subtracts from or divides #Term_1).

name: Armor
description: The #Armor prevents the #Asset from coming to harm.

name: Danger
description: An object or situation that could damage the #Asset.

name: Asset
description: Something desirable which might be lost or damaged and which is protected by #Armor.

name: Material
description: The #Material which the #Armor is primarily made of.

name: Subregion
description: The place on the #Asset covered by the #Armor.

name: Defendant
description: The #Defendant is charged with a crime by a #Judge.

name: Judge
description: The #Judge is the head of the court where the arraignment occurs.

name: Charges
description: #Charges is the crime with which the #Defendant is charged.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the arraignment occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the arraignment occurs.

name: Duration
description: The length of time that the arraignment takes.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the arraignment which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (openly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Judge that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Agent
description: The person who causes the #Theme to be in a particular #Configuration.

name: Theme
description: An entity that consists of  parts which can be put into a configuration relative to each other and/or relative to their environment.

name: Configuration
description: A state that holds of the #Theme or a relation that holds among the constituent parts of the #Theme as a result of the arranging action.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the arranging takes place.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the arranging action which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). With agentive use, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent  that also affect the action ( eagerly, carefully).

name: Location
description: The place in which the #Theme is put into a #Configuration.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Agent is trying to bring about by changing the #Configuration of the #Theme.

name: Means
description: An action performed by the #Agent in order to arrange the #Theme.

name: Charges
description: #Charges identifies a category within the legal system; it is the crime with which the #Suspect is charged.<ex>The police <t>arrested</t> Harry <fex name="Chrg">on charges of manslaughter</fex>.</ex>

name: Authorities
description: The #Authorities charge the #Suspect with commiting a crime, and take him/her into custody.<ex><fex name="Authorities">The police</fex> <t>arrested</t> Harry on charges of manslaughter.</ex>

name: Suspect
description: The #Suspect is taken into custody, under suspicion of having committed a crime.<ex>The police <t>arrested</t> <fex name="Suspect">Harry</fex> on charges of manslaughter.</ex>

name: Offense
description:
#Offense identifies the ordinary language use of the reason for which a #Suspect is arrested. 
<ex>They arrested Harry <fex name="Offense">for shoplifting</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the arrest occurs.<ex>The police <t>arrested</t> Harry <fex name="Place">in front of his house</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time when the arrest occurs.
<ex>The police <t>arrested</t> Harry <fex name="Time">on Wednesday afternoon</fex>.</ex>

name: Type
description:
This FE indicates the subtype of arrest under which the #Suspect is placed.
<ex>The police placed Harry under <fex name="Type">house</fex> <t>arrest</t>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any description of the arresting event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Authorities that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the #Means by which #Authorities arrest a #Suspect.

name: Purpose
description:
This FE identifies the purpose for which #Authorities arrest a #Suspect.
<ex>The police <t>arrested</t> Harry <fex name="Purpose">to get him off the street</fex>.</ex>

name: Source_of_legal_authority
description:
The #Source_of_legal_authority describe the law which grants the power of arrest to the #Authorities.
<ex><fex name="Authorities">The policeman</fex> <t>arrested</t> <fex name="Suspect">him</fex> <fex name="Source_of_legal_authority">under the "suspected loitering with intent" power</fex>.</ex>

name: Destination
description: A locale where the #Tourist arrives. The place where the trip ends.

name: Means_of_transportation
description: The means of transportation used by the #Tourist to reach the #Destination.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group that reaches the locale where the touristic activity is going to happen.

name: Luggage
description: The personal belongings the #Tourist, generally, carries to the #Destination, such as clothes, shoes and other accessories.

name: Duration
description: How long the stay at the #Destination chosen for touring lasts.

name: Purpose
description: Something the #Tourist intends to achieve by arriving at the #Destination.

name: Place
description: The location of the #Tourist when it is not specified by the #Destination.

name: Manner
description: Characteristics that determine the state of the #Tourist when arriving to the intended #Destination or details that specify how the arrival occured.

name: Means
description: Actions or means that enable the #Tourist to arrive at the #Destination where the touristic activity is supposed to happen.

name: Origin
description: The location from which the #Tourist departed.  Starting point of the trip.

name: Time
description: When the #Tourist arrives at the planned #Location for or tourism.

name: Path
description: The #Path traveled by the #Tourist so as to arrive at the #Destination.

name: Speed
description: The #Tourist's speed with which he arrived at the #Destination.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group that arrives at the place where the touristic activity will take place.

name: Destination
description: Location where the #Tourist arrives at. The end point of the displacement.

name: Means_of_transportation
description: The means of transportation used by the #Tourist to come to #Destination.

name: Place
description: Any locative information that is not specified by the #Destination.

name: Purpose
description: Some specific action that the #Tourist intends to achieve by arriving at the #Destination.

name: Source
description: The #Tourist source location. It is the start point of displacement.

name: Means
description: Actions or means that enable the #Tourist to come to the #Destination.

name: Manner
description: Features that determine the status of the #Tourist upon arriving at the #Destination or details that specify how the arrival happened.

name: Time
description: When the #Tourist arrives at #Destination.

name: Speed
description: How fast the #Tourist arrives at the #Destination.

name: Path
description: The route through which the #Tourist arrives at the #Destination.

name: Quantity
description: How many tourists arrive at the destination.

name: Depictive
description: Some feature of the #Tourist or of the #Destination.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group that arrives at the #Lodge.

name: Lodge
description: Where #Tourist stays during the visit.

name: Means_of_transportation
description: The means of transportation used by the #Tourist to get to #Lodge.

name: Path
description: The route through which the #Tourist arrives at the #Lodge.

name: Manner
description: Details of the arrival at the #Lodge in order to specify the status of the #Tourist and / or how this action happened itself.

name: Means
description: Actions or means that enable the arrival of #Tourist at the #Lodge.

name: Speed
description: How fast the #Tourist arrives at the #Lodge.

name: Time
description: The time in which the #Tourist arrives at the #Lodge.

name: Source
description: Location of the #Tourist before she arrives.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose the #Tourist wants to achieve by arriving at the #Lodge.

name: Place
description: Additional information about where the #Tourist arrives.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the object that moves. It may be an entity that moves under its own power, but it need not be.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is any expression that tells where the #Theme ends up, or would end up, as a result of the motion.

name: Source
description: The #Source is any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion. While #Source expressions are possible in this frame, they are relatively infrequent.  If present, they often express a general direction from which a #Theme moves, rather than a landmark away from which it moves.

name: Path
description: The #Path is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal.  In this frame, #Path expressions almost always have a via-sense.

name: Manner
description: A #Manner expression  describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion.  Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which a #Theme arrives.

name: Mode_of_transportation
description: The #Mode_of_transportation expresses how the motion of the #Theme is effected, by its body or by a vehicle which holds and conveys the #Theme.   Vehicles can move in any way and in any medium.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when arriving occurs.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the arriving event occurs.

name: Offense
description: The illegal setting of fire to destroy something.

name: Perpetrator
description: The #Perpetrator sets fire to a building in order to gain some benefit from so doing.

name: Victim
description: It identifies the enity that is negatively effected by the arson.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which an event occurs

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which an action is performed.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which arson is committed.

name: Purpose
description: The action that the #Perpetrator is trying to accomplish with the arson Event.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of time that a state holds or a process is ongoing.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the arson occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the arson occurs.

name: Artifact
description: It identifies the entity or substance that is designed to have a particular #Use. This can refer to physical artifacts, like a mug or computer monitor, or a digital artifact, such as a website or document.

name: Use
description: The use for which an artifact is intended.

name: Component
description: An entity that is a part of an #Artifact and serves a distinct #Function.

name: Artifact
description: A deliberately made entity which fulfilling a purpose, whose complete form is composed of more than one #Component.

name: Function
description: The role or purpose of the #Component as it pertains to the #Artifact.

name: Material
description: The type of matter that the #Component comprises.

name: Creator
description: The entity who creates the #Component.

name: Time_of_creation
description: When the #Component was created.

name: Entity
description:
The #Entity that is being evaluated in terms of whether it is an instance of the #Reference_category.

<ex><fex name="ent">The bomb found at the US Embassy in Berlin</fex> <m>was</m> <t>fake</t>.</ex>

name: Reference_category
description: The type relative to which the #Entity is evaluated.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Entity seems to belong (or not, if so specified by the lexical unit) to the category of the #Reference_category is clear. Typically, this frame element is realized as an end-of-scale expression.

name: Artist
description: A person who creates an #Artwork with a particular recognizable #Form.

name: Artwork
description: A created artifact that is created by an #Artist and has a unique #Form as perceived by some judge.

name: Form
description: The #Form is a style that characterizes an #Artwork (or an #Artist, metonymically) and can be recognized by a judge. This FE is usually incorporated into the target for nouns in this frame.

name: Time
description: A description of when the #Artwork was created.

name: Descriptor
description: A characterization of the #Form that the #Artwork resembles.

name: Individuals
description: The #Individuals are self-movers who intentionally assemble together.

name: Group
description: The #Group describes the resulting formation of the #Individuals.

name: Party_1
description: #Party_1 is the grammatically more prominent participant in the assembling event.  It can refer to either a single individual or a larger party separate from #Party_2 previous to the assembling.

name: Party_2
description: A grammatically less prominent participant in the assembling event.  It can refer to either a single individual or a larger party separate from #Party_1 previous to the assembling.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the assembling which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of the #Individuals or #Group that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, eagerly, carefully).

name: Place
description: Where the assembling occurs.

name: Means
description: The #Means descibes the way in which the #Individuals accomplish the assembling.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the assembling occurs.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Group plans to engage in upon assembly.

name: Assessor
description: The sentient entity that evaluates the #Phenomenon.

name: Phenomenon
description: The entity whose #Value according to a #Feature is being measured.

name: Feature
description: The type of property or feature that the #Phenomenon is being judged on.

name: Method
description: An event or procedure that allows the #Assessor to evaluate the #Phenomenon.

name: Medium
description: It is the physical entity or channel used by the #Assessor to make the assessment.

name: Manner
description: Any secondary effect of the action or characterization of the #Assessor which saliently affects the character of the assessment.

name: Means
description: The means by which assessment occurs.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Assessor makes the assessment.

name: Purpose
description: The goal that the #Assessor hopes to accomplish by assessing the #Phenomenon.

name: Place
description: The location where the assessing takes place.

name: Station
description: The locale where the Entity is supposed to be.It is typically the designation of the nouns of Locale-derived frames.

name: Responsible_party
description: The #Responsible_party is tasked with remaining at the #Station to perform a #Task.

name: Relative_location
description: A place that the #Station is located with respect to.

name: Task
description: The activity that is carried out at the #Station.

name: Benefited_party
description: The #Benefited_party receives a benefit from the action of the #Helper.

name: Helper
description: The #Helper performs some action that benefits the #Benefited_party.

name: Goal
description: The desirable state of affairs that the #Benefited_party is involved in and which is enabled by the #Helper.

name: Focal_entity
description: It identifies a #Focal_entity involved in achieving the #Goal.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the Assistance occurs.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the Assistance occurs.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which a #Helper assists a #Benefited_party.

name: Means

name: Purpose

name: Protagonist_1
description:
The profiled participant in a reciprocal event, encoded as the subject of an active-form sentence or as a by-PP in a passive. 
<ex>"<fex name="Protagonist_1">You</fex> can t <t>argue</t> politics with foreigners," sighed the policeman.</ex>

name: Protagonist_2
description:
The participant involved (subordinately) with #Protagonist_1 in a reciprocal event.  It is generally coded in a with-PP. 
<ex>We have been <t>arguing</t> the point <fex name="Protagonist_2">with the inspector at claims branch</fex> for many many months and we just seem to go round in circles.</ex>

name: Athlete

name: Agent

name: Wrong

name: Amends
description: It marks expressions that indicate what the #Agent does to compensate for the #Wrong that was committed.

name: Degree
description: It marks expressions that indicate the #Degree to which #Amends made are adequate for atoning the #Wrong.

name: Purpose
description: The situation that the #Agent hopes to bring about by atoning.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the atonement which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of the #Agent that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Time

name: Place

name: Agent
description: The #Agent manipulates an object. #Agent typically refers to animate beings, but is also extended to mechanical and other inanimate objects.  It is most frequently expressed as the external argument of verbs.

name: Item
description: It identifies the #Item that the #Agent attaches to the #Goal.

name: Goal
description: It identifies the location to which an #Item is attached.

name: Connector
description: The #Connector forms the bond that maintains the #Item or #Items in a fixed position; it is usually expressed in a with-PP.

name: Items
description: It identifies the plural #Items that are tied together, resulting in their mutual attachment.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an #Agent intentionally affects an #Item or #Items.

name: Manner

name: Place

name: Purpose

name: Time

name: Instrument
description: It identifies the #Instrument with which an #Agent attaches an #Item or #Items.  Typically, it transmits the force applied by the #Agent, and is not left behind as a participant in the resultant Being_attached frame.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the #Item ends up attached.

name: Victim
description: It is the being or entity that is injured by the #Assailant's attack.

name: Assailant
description: The person (or other self-directed entity) that is attempting physical harm to the #Victim.

name: Weapon
description: An entity used by the #Assailant to cause damage to the #Victim.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Assailant that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Assailant that accomplishes the assault.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Assailant makes an assault on the #Victim.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which an #Assailant attacks the #Victim.

name: Source
description: The starting-point of the motion of the #Assailant or projectiles of the #Assailant as they move toward the the #Place that the #Victim is occupying in the attack.  In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion. With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Path
description: The #Path refers to (a part of) the ground over which the #Assailant travels.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time that the attack lasts.

name: Direction
description: It is used for expressions that indicate motion along a line from the deictic center towards a reference point (which may be implicit) that is neither the goal of motion nor a landmark along the way.

name: Time
description: Moment of the match in which the attack happens.

name: Seeker
description: The #Seeker is the agent hoping to obtain #Food.

name: Food
description: It is the sought-out item by the #Seeker.

name: Ground
description: This is the entity to which the #Seeker pays attention. It is referred to as #Ground because it serves as the background or context for the #Food.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument is used by the #Seeker as a tool to help obtain #Food. (This tool is not limited to typical artifacts and can be hands, arms, and other atypical hunting and fishing instruments.)

name: Duration
description: For what length of time the #Seeker attempted to obtain #Food.

description: The individual or group who attends the #Event.

name: Place
description: Where the #Event happens.

name: Depictive
description: Some characteristic of the #Event or of the #Tourist.

name: Duration

name: Purpose

name: Manner

name: Means

name: Means_of_transportation
description: The means of transportation used by the #Tourist to attend the #Event.

name: Ground
description: The sensory field or subset of a sensory field that the #Perceiver is attending to.

name: Degree
description: The amount of attention that the #Perceiver is paying to the #Figure or #Ground.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of a #Perceiver that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Address_term
description: It identifies the #Address_term as used to get someone's attention, and may be a proper name.

name: Interjection
description: It identifies the attention getting element.

name: Cognizer
description: The person whose #Attitude about a #State_of_affairs is being expressed.

name: Attitude
description: The outlook or viewpoint expressed by the #Cognizer.

name: State_of_affairs
description: An event, topic, or situation about which the #Cognizer has an #Attitude.

name: Degree
description: The degree of the #Attitude description.

name: Time

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group interested in enjoying either an #Attraction or a #Place.

name: Attraction
description: Usually, it is a place that brings people from different origins interested in enjoying its features. It generally presents an either historically or socially recognized value, which is related to some natural or built feature of the place.

name: Place
description: The #Place in which the #Attraction is located.

name: Time
description: When the tourist activity takes place.

name: Duration
description: How long the tourist activity lasts.

name: Purpose
description: A specific action that the #Tourist wants to accomplish with the tourist activity, such as leisure or rest, for example.

name: Means
description: Actions or means that make the tourist activity possible in a given location.

name: Manner
description: Details of the tourist activity in order to specify how it happened.

name: Source
description: Starting point of the #Tourist s trip. Usually, it is the place where the #Tourist lives and to which s/he will return after visting the tourist location.

name: Depictive
description: Specific characteristics of the #Attraction or #Place.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group interested in enjoying either an #Attraction or a #Place.

name: Attraction
description: Usually, it is a place that brings people from different origins interested in enjoying its features. It generally presents an either historically or socially recognized value, which is related to some natural or built feature of the place. Sometimes, the benefits can be considered themselves attractive to the #Tourist.

name: Place
description: Geographical space visited by the #Tourist. It can both contain the #Attraction or be itself attractive.

name: Purpose
description: A specific action that the #Tourist wants to accomplish with the tourist activity, such as leisure or rest, for example.

name: Reason
description: The reason why the #Place or the #Attraction are interesting for tourists.

name: Duration
description: How long the tourist activity lasts.

name: Frequency
description: How frequently an #Attraction or a #Place are visited by tourists or how often a #Tourist engages in a given activity during the stay.

name: Means
description: Actions or means that make the #Tourist s activity possible in a given location.

name: Source
description: Starting point of the #Tourist s trip. Usually, it is the place where the #Tourist lives and to which s/he will return after visiting the tourist location.

name: Manner
description: Details of the tourist activity in the sense of specifying the way it occurred.

name: Depictive
description: Specific characteristics of the #Attraction or #Place.

name: Time
description: When the activity takes place.

name: Quantity
description: It specifies the number of attractions.

name: Type
description: The kind of attraction.

name: Proposition
description: The information attributed to the #Speaker or #Text.

name: Speaker
description: A sentient entity that has communicated the information encoded by the #Proposition.

name: Text
description: A written or verbal collection of statements, which imparts the information of the #Proposition.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity for which a particular #Attribute is appropriate and under consideration.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of an #Entity which is under discussion.

name: Value
description: A quantity or other characterization of the #Entity s state with respect to the #Attribute.

name: Agent
description: The person or organization with more influence or power.

name: Theme
description: The person or organization with less influence or power.

name: Domain
description: A description of the area in which an #Agent can affect a #Theme.

name: Source
description: A principle factor which gave the #Agent greater power or influence over the #Theme.

name: Descriptor
description: It describes the #Agent's influence or power in some way. #Descriptors are typically adjectives modifying nominal targets.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent avoids an #Undesirable_situation.

name: Undesirable_situation
description: It identifies the situation that the #Agent avoids.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the avoiding occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the avoiding occurs.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the #Purpose avoiding occurs.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which avoiding occurs.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which avoiding occurs.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which avoiding occurs.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer is the person whose awareness of phenomena is at question. With a target verb or adjective the #Cognizer is generally expressed as an External Argument with the #Content expressed as an Object or Complement.

name: Content
description: The #Content is the object of the #Cognizer s awareness. #Content can be expressed as a direct object or in a PP Complement.

name: Topic
description: Some verbs in this frame allow a #Topic to be expressed in about-PPs.

name: Expressor
description: It is the body part that reveals the #Cognizer's state to the observer.

name: Evidence
description: The source of awareness or knowledge which can be expressed in a PP Complement.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which an event occurs.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the #Cognizer knows or thinks something.

name: Role
description: It is the category within which an element of the #Content is considered.

name: Time
description: The time interval during which the #Cognizer is aware of the #Content.

name: Phenomenon
description: The #Phenomenon is the entity that evokes a cognitive reaction for the #Experiencer.

name: Experiencer
description: The person or other sentient being that experiences the cognitive impact brought about by the #Phenomenon.

name: Circumstances
description: The physical or abstract #Circumstances that contextualize the understanding of the #Phenomenon.

name: Frequency
description: The #Frequency with with the #Experiencer experiences the #Phenomenon.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Phenomenon becomes clear to the #Experiencer.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Experiencer comes to believe the #Phenomenon is the case.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer is the person whose awareness of the #Content is at issue.

name: Content
description: The object of the #Cognizer s awareness.

name: Expressor
description: A body part that reveals the #Cognizer's relation to the #Content.

name: Topic
description: The #Content may be understood as pertaining to a #Topic.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the state of awareness holds.

name: Evidence
description: The #Cognizer's source of awareness about the #Content.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the #Cognizer knows or thinks something.

name: Role
description: The category within which the #Content is known.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Cognizer has awareness (or lack thereof) of the #Content.

name: Content
description: The fact or idea which the #Cognizer is aware of.

name: Role
description: The category whose applicability to the #Content is known.

description: The #Cognizer is the person who has (or lacks) awareness of the #Content.

description: The degree to which the state of awareness holds.

name: Accused
description: At the time of bail setting, the #Accused is held without bail/bond, released on his/her own recognizance, or required to give the Court  a specific amount of money for bail.

name: Judge
description: The #Judge, as head of  the Court, determines the #Accused's bail.

name: Status
description: It identifies the decision made with regard to bail. The possible statuses are without bail, on one's own recognizance, or a specific amount of money required for bail.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the bail setting occurs.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the bail setting occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the bail setting which is not covered by more specific FEs, including, secondary effects (openly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an Judge that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: The method used by the #Judge to set the bail.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which the #Judge sets bail.

name: Trajector
description: The entity whose status or location is (generally) unknown, and whose status or location is established by examining the #Profiled_region.

name: Landmark
description: The entity, generally presupposed, whose status or location is known or knowable and which thus serves as a basis for understanding the status or location of the #Trajector by locating it in a #Profiled_region which has a particular relation to the #Landmark.

name: Profiled_region
description: The region which has a particular shape, orientation, size, and location (literal or metaphorical) with respect to the #Landmark.  The shape of the #Profiled_region is virtually always incorporated in the target.  This shaped region usually includes the location of the #Landmark.

name: Weapon
description: The destructive device that the #Protagonist has with them.

name: Protagonist
description: The individual that possesses a #Weapon.

name: Degree
description: The amount of #Weapons that the #Protagonist has (relative to some standard).

name: Place
description: The location where a #Protagonist carries a #Weapon.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Protagonist carries a #Weapon.

name: Winner
description: The individual or individuals who beat the #Loser.

name: Loser
description: The individual or individuals that get beat by the #Winner.

name: Score
description: A quantity whereby progress is measured during the game, and #Rank and #Prizes are awarded to the #Winner afterward.

name: Margin
description: The amount by which the #Winner's and #Loser's #Scores differ.

name: Rank
description: The rank (according to #Score) that a #Winner achieves.

name: Prize
description: A socially and/or monetarily significant entity which is given to a #Winner according to #Score or #Rank.

name: Means
description: An action of the #Winner or #Loser that makes the beating event possible.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Winner or #Loser which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of a #Winner or #Loser that also affect their action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Time
description: When the #Winner has victory over the #Loser.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Winner has victory against the #Loser.

name: Venue
description: It is for the named venue of a competition, particularly when the place has been built for the purpose of a competition.

name: Degree
description: A qualitative measure of how much the #Winner beat the #Loser.

name: Competition
description: The event in which the  #Competition competes.

name: Entity

name: Final_quality
description: A description of a characteristic of the #Entity after the change.

name: Final_category
description: The category that the #Entity ends up in after the change. Typically, this entails taking on a number of new characteristics.

name: Place
description:
<def-root>Where the change takes place.

<ex>He always <t>became</t> uncomforatable <fex name="Place">in bars</fex> .</ex></def-root>

name: Time
description:
<def-root>>When the change occurs.

<ex><fex name="tim">By 1945</fex> he had <t>become</t> uncertain of the advisability of anyone having such a weapon.</ex></def-root>

description: It indicates the general field within which the #Phenomenon is found.

name: Instrument
description: The #Cognizer uses an #Instrument to (enable themselves to) become aware of the #Phenomenon.  In some cases, the #Instrument may appear in subject position.

name: Ground
description: The #Ground is the background or context against which a #Cognizer becomes aware of a #Phenomenon. It is normally expressed by a locative PP.

name: State
description: It indicates the state or situation of the #Phenomenon at the time when the #Cognizer becomes aware of it.  It is normally expressed by a Predicate expression.

name: Evidence
description: The #Evidence is some fact that allows the #Cognizer to become aware of something. It is normally expressed with PP.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which becoming aware is occurring.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which becoming aware occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the #Cognizer becomes aware of the #Phenomenon.

name: Purpose
description: The goal that the #Cognizer has in mind, which they believe to be accomplishable by finding the #Phenomenon.

name: New_member
description:
The #New_member becomes a member of a (socially-defined) #Group.

<ex>Have <fex name="new">you</fex> <t>signed</t> <t>up</t> for the new Medicare Prescription program?</ex>

name: Group
description:
The #Group is a socially-constructed entity composed of members.
<ex>Please <t>join</t> <fex name="gro">our club</fex>! <fex name="New_member">CNI</fex></ex>

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the place where the joining occurs.

name: Purpose
description:
This FE identifies the purpose for which the #New_member joins the #Group.

<ex>In 1714 he <t>enlisted</t> in the Venetian army <fex name="Purp">to fight against the Moslem Turks.</fex></ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the time when the #New_member joins the #Group.

<ex>An avid skier myself, I ventured to Aspen and <t>enrolled</t> in Nevin s school <fex name="Time">last winter</fex> to see what all the fuss was about.</ex>

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the Means by which the #New_member becomes part of the group.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a #New_member that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Item
description: This FE identifies the #Item that detaches from the #Source.

name: Source
description: #Source identifies the location to which an #Item was attached before getting detached.

name: Items
description:
This FE identifies the plural #Items that are becoming detached from each other, resulting in their separation.


Notice that when the FE #Items occurs, neither #Item nor #Source can occur.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the detaching event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the #Item  becomes detached.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the #Item becomes detached from the #Source.

name: Degree

name: Entity
description: The #Entity is the thing that loses moisture and becomes dry.

name: Degree
description: The intensity with which the #Entity becomes dry.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Entity becomes dry.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Entity becomes dry.

name: Time
description: When the #Entity becomes dry.

name: Whole
description:
The #Whole is a single entity or an aggregate of entities which separates into #Parts.

<ex><fex name="Whole">Metalworkers  union</fex> to <t>split</t> into regional divisions</ex>

name: Parts
description:
This refers collectively to the Parts resulting from separation of a Whole:

<ex>These daughter chromosomes then begin to <t>separate</t> <fex name="Parts">from each other</fex>, each moving away from the metaphase plate and toward one of the two spindle pole regions.</ex>
<ex>Watch as they <t>split</t> <fex name="Parts">into many differently-shaped bits</fex>.</ex>

name: Part_1
description:
Part-1 is the first of two Parts mentioned.

<ex>Initially, <fex name="Part_1">the front part</fex> <t>separated</t> from the rest of the body.</ex>

name: Part_2
description:
Part_2 is the second of two Parts mentioned. This is usually a PP Complement. 

<ex>Initially the front <t>split</t> <fex name="Part_2">from the rest of the body</fex></ex>

name: Criterion
description:
This frame element expresses a property of the Parts or components of the Whole which correlates with the separation. Criterion is typically expressed as a PP headed by <ment>by</ment>, or as a complex PP of the form <ment>on the basis of</ment>.... 
<ex>Particles will therefore only <t>separate</t> <fex name="Crit">on the basis of contact angle</fex> as long as their mass is between an upper and lower critical value.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Means
description:
An intermediate action or event that enables the separation.

<ex>Explore how cells <t>divide</t> <fex name="Mns">by undergoing mitosis</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time when the separation occurs.

<ex>However it is believed they <t>separated</t> <fex name="Time">at least 2 if not 3 million years ago</fex>.</ex>.

name: Place
description:
Where the separation occurs.

<ex>The two parts likely <t>separated</t> <fex name="Place">above the Atlantic</fex>.</ex>

name: Speaker
description: The #Speaker has previously been speaking but has now stopped.

name: Expressor
description: The #Expressor is the #Speaker's voice or other communicative noise emitted by the #Speaker.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the subject which the #Speaker had been speaking about.

name: Place
description: The #Place is the location where the becoming silent occurs.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the becoming silent occurs.

name: Entity
description: The thing that the #Perceiver is able to see or recognize.

name: Perceiver
description: The person who is able to see the #Entity. This FE is often null-instantiated as it is deprofiled in this scene.

name: Manner
description: A description of how the #Entity becomes visible that is not covered by more specific FEs.

name: Place
description: The physical location in which the #Entity becomes visible.

name: Time
description: A temporal description of the event of the #Entity becoming visible.

description: Item

description: Style

name: Material
description: Identifica o #Material da #Peça.

description: Creation_mode

name: Sub-região
description: Identifica uma parte da #Peça.

name: Creation_time
description: Creation_time

name: Artist
description:
The #Artist works off-stage to help make the #Production.
<ex><fex name="Artist">John Williams</fex> <t>composed</t> the soundtrack to Star Wars.</ex>

name: Production
description:
The #Production is the final product put out by the off-stage (and on-stage) participants.
<ex>Ralph Smith <t>produced</t> <fex name="Prod">the off-Broadway hit "Why Is My Name Ralph?"</fex>.</ex>

name: Type
description:
An #Artist may be categorizedy by #Type.
<ex><fex name="Type">Hollywood</fex> <t>director</t></ex>
<ex><fex name="Type">independent</fex> <t>film-maker</t></ex>

name: Distributor
description:
Often (especially with film or television) the #Production is advertised and transmitted to the audience by the #Distributor.
<ex>Even desperate producers would never <t>produce</t> a film <fex name="Dist">for that television station</fex>.</ex>

name: Studio
description:
This FE indicates the particular orgainzaion that makes the #Production.
<ex>The latest performance <t>produced</t> <fex name="Studio">by The Umbrella Thesbians</fex> was a major hit in France.</ex>
<ex>First layer: <fex name="Studio">New Line Cinema</fex> <t>produces</t> several films each year.</ex>
<ex>Second layer: <fex name="Artist">New Line Cinema</fex> <t>produces</t> several films each year.</ex>

name: Medium
description:
This FE indicates the #Medium in which a particular #Artist works or a #Production is made.
<ex>He <t>produces</t> <fex name="Medium">for television</fex></ex>
<ex>She is a <fex name="Medium">theatre</fex> <t>director</t>.</ex>

name: Performer
description:
In screen performances, the #Performer is filmed as he or she acts out a role with respect to the larger #Production
<ex>This particular scene was <t>shot</t> <fex name="Perf">with a local choir and dancers</fex>.</ex>

name: Score
description: The music which may be performed in the performance of the #Production, either in isolation or accompanying actions and speech.

name: Scene
description: A #Scene is a sub-part of a larger production.  In film, scenes are sometimes recorded independently, and later edited into the final movie.

name: Time
description:
This FE indicates the time when the #Production is made.
<ex>Silence of the Lambs was <t>filmed</t> <fex name="Time">in 1991</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
This FE indicates the location of production.
<ex>The documentary was <t>shot</t> <fex name="Place">on location</fex>.</ex>

name: Nationality
description:
This FE indicates the #Nationality, ethnicity, or primary working location of the #Artist.
<ex>Several <fex name="Nationality">Canadian</fex> <t>directors</t> have received attention from critics in recent years.</ex>
<ex><fex name="Nationality">Local</fex> <t>film-makers</t> often collaborate for larger efforts.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The #Purpose for which an #Artist works on a #Production.
<ex>I <t>produced</t> this film <fex name="Purpose">to let people know what I went through as a child</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Artist creates the #Production.

name: Activity
description: It identifies the name of the ongoing #Activity in which an #Agent engages.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent engages in an ongoing #Activity.

name: Salient_entity
description: An entity acted upon by the #Agent.

name: Role
description: It identifies the role filled by the #Agent which is saliently associated with an #Activity.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the amount of #Time for which an #Activity is ongoing.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the  #Activity is pursued.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the #Purpose for which an #Agent is engaged in an ongoing #Activity.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the #Activity is pursued.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Activity which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that  affect the action (presumptuously, deliberately).

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Agent or #Salient_entity is active.

name: Connector
description:
#Connector identifies the instrument used to attach and is usually expressed in a <ment>with</ment>-PP.

<ex>The tarp is  <t>tied</t> down <fex name="Conn">with a rope</fex>.</ex>

name: Item
description:
#Item identifies the entity that comes to be attached to the #Goal.

<ex><fex name="Item">A handle</fex>  was <t>affixed</t> to the door.</ex>

name: Items
description:
#Items identifies the plural items that are tied together, resulting in their mutual attachment.

<ex><fex name="Items">The boats</fex> remained <t>tied</t> together.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
#Goal identifies the location to which the #Item(s) is attached.

<ex>The boat remained <t>anchored</t> <fex name="Goal">to the coastline</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which an #Item is in an attached state to a #Goal, or two #Items are attached to each other.

<ex>The tiny stick  was <t>fastened</t> <fex name="Manner">tightly</fex> to his wrist.</ex>

name: Asset
description: Something judged to be desirable or valuable which might be lost or damaged.

name: Harmful_event
description: An action that may occur or a state which may hold which could result in the loss of or damage to the #Asset.

name: Dangerous_entity
description: A concrete or abstract entity which may come to cause the loss of, or damage to the #Asset either due to its participation in a #Harmful_event.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing the deviation of the actual level of security from the expected value given the #Asset and the state indicated by the target itself.

name: Place
description: A particular location in which the #Asset is secure. Frequently, it is to be inferred that the characteristics of the location protect the #Asset from a potential #Harmful_event.

name: Time
description: The time period during which the #Asset enjoys  the specified level of security from a #Harmful_event.

name: Protagonist
description:
The entity that is not sleeping.

<ex><fex name="pro">She</fex> was <t>awake</t> through the whole football game.</ex>

name: Duration
description: This FE identifies the #Duration of time for which the #Protagonist is awake.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the #Protagonist is awake.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Protagonist being awake which is not covered by more specific FEs including secondary effects (quietly, noisily), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Child
description: It identifies the new self-motile creature.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the birth occurs, generally expressed as a date or a year.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Child enters the world.

name: Relatives
description: The individuals that the #Child is related to, including the male and female individuals that come together to produce a #Child (the parents), as well those who are related to them by birth or marriage.

name: Depictive
description: The state of the #Child as it enters the world.

name: Means
description: The way in which the #Child leaves the womb; this FE is typically only filled by phrases such as by natural birth or by Caesarian.

name: Item
description: Item

name: Degree
description: Degree

name: Subregion
description: Subregion

name: Trajector
description: The entity which is to be located with respect to the #Landmark.

name: Landmark
description: The container which serves as a reference point for the #Trajector which is surrounded by it.

name: Profiled_region
description: The interior region of the #Landmark, within which the #Trajector is to be found.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Trajector is contained within the #Landmark.

name: Item
description: It identifies the entity that is detached from a #Source.

name: Items
description: It identifies the plural items that are detached from each other.

name: Source
description: It identifies the location from which the #Item(s) is detached.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which an #Item is in an detached state relative to a #Source, or two #Items are detached from each other.

name: Item
description: The #Item exists in a state of dryness.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the #Item is dry.

name: Employee
description: The #Employee is obligated to perform a #Task in order to receive #Compensation.

name: Employer
description: The #Employer gives #Compensation to an #Employee.

name: Place_of_employment
description:
This FE identifies the #Place_of_employment of the #Employee.

<ex>The undocumented foreigners were <t>working</t> <fex name="Place_of_employment">at the organic farm</fex>.</ex>

name: Position
description:
The label given to a particular type of employment.


<ex>Louise <t>works</t> <fex name="Posit">as an engineer</fex>.</ex>

name: Task
description: The #Employee is obligated to perform the #Task to recieve #Compensation from the #Employer .  <ex>My dad <t>works</t> <fex name="Task">building houses.</fex></ex>

name: Field
description: It identifies the #Field in which one works.

name: Compensation
description: The #Compensation is the payment that the #Employee receives for performing a #Task.

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which an #Employee works for an #Employer.

<ex> Last weekend, the commercial TV station Nova broadcast testimonies of young Czechs
who have <t>worked</t> <fex name="Mnr">illegally</fex> for America s largest retailer, Wal-Mart.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time period during which an #Employee  works for an #Employer.

<ex><fex name="Time">From 2000-2001</fex>, Mr. Eckhardt <t>clerked</t> for The Honorable Jerry A. Funk,
United States Bankruptcy Judge, Middle District of Florida.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
This FE identifies the amount of #Time for which the #Employee continues being employed.

<ex>She <t>worked</t> <fex name="Dur">for 10 years</fex> in private and hospital practice and 19 years in teaching and administration.</ex>

name: Rank
description: It is the position in a hierarchy that an #Employee occupies within the organization of the #Employer.

name: Type
description:
This FE identifies the #Type of the profession.

<ex>He s harkening back to a time before Bush became president and he had a <fex name="Type">white collar</fex> <t>job</t> and wore a suit.</ex>

name: Contract_basis
description:
The #Contract_basis describes the conditions of employment with respect to permanency, hours per time period, or payment basis.

<ex>As much as possible, however, do not attempt to run a full-time business in addition to holding a <fex name="CB">full-time</fex> <t>job</t> .</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location where the #Employee works.

<ex>Most people <t>work</t> <fex name="pla">in the city</fex>.</ex>

name: Experiencer
description: Experiencer

name: Body_part
description: Body_part

name: Degree
description: Degree

name: Prisoner
description: The #Prisoner is held in custody as a punishment for having committed a crime.

name: Prison
description: The facility where the #Prisoner is held.

name: Authorities
description: The #Authorities hold the #Prisoner in custody.

name: Crime
description: The crime of which the #Prisoner is guilty, resulting in imprisonment.

name: Place
description: It identifies the general #Place where the #Prisoner is held captive.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Prisoner is in prison.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the state of being imprisoned which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of time for which the #Prisoner remains in jail.

name: Whole
description: The #Whole is the larger entity that includes the #Part.

name: Part
description: The #Part is either a subset or a constituent part of the #Whole.

name: Theme
description: The entity which is confined.

name: Holding_location
description: The area within which the #Theme is confined.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent prevents the #Theme from moving.

name: Place
description: It identifies the general #Place where the #Theme is held captive.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Theme is held captive.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the state of being captive which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Theme.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of time for which the #Theme remains in captivity.

name: Cause
description: An inanimate force which causes the #Theme in be unable to move.

name: Item
description: This is the entity which is is an instance of a particular #Category.

name: Category
description: It expresses a general type or class of which the #Item is considered an instance.

name: Criteria
description: It expresses properties of the #Item which is used as a basis for categorization. #Criteria are the general dimensions along which #Items can potentially differ from one another and hence, fall into different #Categories.

name: Cognizer
description: The person who performs an act of categorization.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which an #Item (metaphorically) is construed as being in a #Category.

name: Means
description: An act or state of affairs by which the #Item (perhaps metaphorically) is interpreted as being in a #Category.

name: Time
description: It marks expressions that indicate when a certain Categorization holds.

name: Controlling_entity
description: A thing or person whose behavior controls a #Dependent_entity, #Dependent_situation, or #Dependent_variable.

name: Dependent_entity
description: An entity, usually a thing, that is influenced in its behavior by a #Controlling_entity.

name: Dependent_situation
description: A situation whose temporal or other characteristics are influenced by a #Controlling_entity.

name: Dependent_variable
description: A scalar variable, whose value depends on the behavior of a #Controlling_entity.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Controlling_entity affects the #Dependent_entity.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the controlling occurs.

name: Place
description: The location at which the controlling occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Controlling_entity that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Binding_principle
description:
The #Binding_principle is the law, contract, principle, or other (set of) obligations that is (or is not) operational.

<ex>Once <fex name="bin_pri">the treaty</fex> is in <t>effect</t>, US port authorities and the Coast Guard will monitor compliance by checking any yacht 79 feet or longer.</ex>

name: Duration
description: The length of time for which the #Binding_principle is or is not in effect.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Binding_principle is in effect.

name: Place
description: The #Place at which the #Binding_principle is or is not operational.

name: Obligated_party
description: The individual or group who is obligated to follow the #Binding_principle.

name: Device
description: The #Device or machine that is in or out of operation.

name: Time
description: The #Time when a #Device is in or out of operation.

name: Place
description: The #Place in which the #Device is or is not operating.

name: Duration
description: It denotes the length of time from the beginning of a continuous situation (the one denoted by the target) to its end.

name: Theme
description: An entity which is at a particular Location

name: Location
description: A salient entity that the #Theme is located with respect to.

name: Place
description: The location (generally presumed to be known to the interlocutor) with respect to which the location of the #Theme can be understood.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Theme is at the #Location.

name: Name
description:
#Name identifies the linguistic expression used to refer to Entities.

<ex>My <t>name</t> is <fex name="Name">Bond</fex>.</ex>

name: Entity
description:
The #Entity is the person the speaker intends to refer to by using a particular name.

<ex><fex name="Entity">You</fex> have an unusual <t>surname</t>.</ex>

name: Language
description:
#Language is used for a person or thing to whose name the #Name of the #Entity is taken or in honor of.

<ex><fex name="Lang">Spanish and Indian</fex> <t>names</t> were precedents to other non-English-sounding names.</ex>

name: Type
description:
The FE #Type denotes sub-type of names.

<ex>My <fex name="Type">given</fex> <t>name</t> used to be John.</ex>

name: Context
description:
The context is the region or domain in which the name applies.

<ex>The <fex name="con">Spanish</fex> <t>name</t> <fex name="Name"> Juan </fex> begins with an English  w .</ex>

name: Dependent
description: The state-of-affairs which cannot hold without the #Requirement.

name: Requirement
description: The entity or state-of-affairs that must be present or obtain in order for the #Dependent to obtain.

name: Required_entity
description: An entity that has to be present for the #Dependent state of affairs to obtain

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Dependent depends on the presence of the #Requirement.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Requirement is necessary for the #Dependent.

name: Place
description:
#Place denotes a location in which the specified relation between #Requirement and #Dependent holds.

<ex><fex name="pla">In the US</fex>, the political clout of big city mayors is <t>necessary</t> to put this on the national agenda.</ex>

name: Dependent_individual
description:
The individual who needs to have the Required_entity or for the Requirement state of affairs to obtain.

<ex> We ask you to obtain for us all that is <t>necessary</t> <fex name="dep">for us</fex>.</ex>

name: Responsible_party
description:
The person who must perform the #Duty.
<ex><fex name="Resp">Everyone</fex> <t>should</t> vote.</ex>

name: Duty
description:
The action that the #Responsible_party is obligated to perform.
<ex>I <t> ve</t> <t>got</t> <t>to</t><fex name="Duty"> get to the other side of the bridge</fex>.</ex>

name: Consequence
description: The #Consequence will result if the #Duty is not performed.

name: Time
description:
