The time interval during which the Responsibly_party is obligated to fulfill the Duty.


<ex><fex name="Time">At that time</fex> men were <t>obligated</t> to marry women from their own community.</ex>

name: Place
description:
A location in which the #Responsible_party has a specified #Duty .

<ex>I almost forgot to tell you that <fex name="pla">in Sweden</fex> we are <t>obligated</t> to spend atleast 7.5 months in the army for training.</ex>

name: Duty
description:
The action that the #Responsible_party is obligated to perform.


<ex><fex name="dut">Getting a shot against yellow fever</fex> is <t>obligatory</t> for travellers to Benin. </ex>

name: Responsible_party
description:
The person who must perform the #Duty.

<ex>The use of TM software is <t>obligatory</t> <fex name="res">for every freelance translator working on projects for our company</fex>.</ex>

name: Consequence
description:
The #Consequence will result if the #Duty is not performed.

<ex>Attendance of the 341 meeting of creditors is <t>mandatory</t> <fex name="cons">or you will not receive your discharge</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time interval during which the #Duty is mandatory.

<ex><fex name="tim">These days</fex>, wearing a seat-belt is <t>mandatory</t>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
A location in which the #Duty  obtains.

<ex>Gymnasium is not <t>obligatory</t> <fex name="pla">in Sweden</fex>, but nearly everyone attends gymnasium</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The positive consequence of the #Duty being fulfilled.

<ex>Not acting as a savior is compulsory <fex name="pur">to avoid misunderstanding and loss of confidence in partnership, which many American investors, particularly African Americans, may experience</fex>.</ex>

name: Object
description: The entity with an understood purpose.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Artifact exceeds or falls short of the minimum requirements for being operational.

name: Mother
description: It refers to the parent who is physically pregnant.

name: Father
description: It refers to a parent who contributed to the conception of a child but is not physically carrying a child.

name: Parents
description: It refers to the collective body expecting or carrying a child.

name: Offspring
description: It refers to the conceived offspring borne by the #Parents.

name: Duration
description: It refers to the length of time the #Parents have been pregnant.

name: Behavior
description: The #Behavior is the state of affairs or action of the social actor that is regarded as suspcious.

name: Social_actor
description: An individual that is suspected of wrongdoing because of the #Behavior.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity metonymically stands in for a #Behavior that saliently involves the #Entity.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Behavior is suspicious.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Phenomenon
description: Something that is profiled in the mind of the #Cognizer as being related to mental #Endeavors.

name: Endeavor
description: A cognitive action (eg discussion, decision) performed by the #Cognizer to which the #Phenomenon is connected in some way.

name: Cognizer
description: A participant in the mental #Endeavor to which the #Phenomenon is related. This frame element is often null-instantiated and may be inferred from the #Endeavor.

name: Degree
description: A description of how related the #Phenomenon is to the #Endeavor.

name: Specification
description:
The knowledge or situation that mediates the relevance of the #Phenomenon to the #Endeavor.

<ex><fex name="Specification">How</fex> does Assad  s family dynamic play into his intransigence ?</ex>

name: Patient
description: The #Patient is the organic matter that has decayed.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which rotting has occurred.

name: Entity
description:
The #Entity whose meeting or falling short of pre-conditions is assessed.

<ex><fex name="Entity">Little Tommy</fex> was not <t>up</t> <t>to</t> getting out of bed.</ex>

name: Activity
description:
The #Activity that the #Entity may participate in.

<ex>He was a very meek and shy person, and always felt that he was not <t>equal</t> <fex name="act">to the task set before him</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The extent to which the #Entity exceeds or falls short of the minimum requirements for participating in the #Activity.

<ex>Blind parents are <fex name="Deg">very much</fex> <t>up</t> <t>to</t> driving their kids to soccer practice.</ex>

name: Item
description: The #Item takes up the #Liquid through its pores.

name: Liquid
description: The #Liquid is a fluid or gas that permeates the #Item.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the #Item is wet.

name: Assailant
description: The #Assailant is a group of armed forces (or, metonymically, their commander or the organization they represent) that encircles, surrounds, or otherwise cuts off the Beseiged in an attempt to force surrender.

name: Victim
description: The #Victim is the fortification or geopolitical entity that is being attacked.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Assailant that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Assailant that accomplishes the assault.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Assailant makes an assault on the #Victim.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which an #Assailant attacks the #Victim.

name: Source
description: The starting-point of the motion of the #Assailant or projectiles of the #Assailant as they move toward the the #Place that the #Victim is occupying in the attack.  In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion.  With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Assailant attacks the #Victim.

name: Weapon
description: An entity used by the #Assailant to cause damage to the #Victim.

name: Path
description: The #Path refers to (a part of) the ground over which the #Assailant travels.

name: Duration
description: The length of time that the #Victim is under attack from the #Assailant.

name: Standard
description: It is the entity that is located closest to the end of the scale evoked by some #Variable.

name: Variable
description: The #Variable is a property that evokes a scale along which the #Standard is located closest to one extreme in  comparison to its #Competitors.

name: Competitors
description: It denotes the entities that are exceeded by the #Standard with regard to the #Variable.

name: Domain
description: The spatial or temporal context in which the #Standard is not matched by any #Competitors.

name: Party_1
description: The individual or individuals that form the more prominent (i.e. agentive) party of the agreement, as compared with #Party_2. That is, #Party_1 is generally encoded as the External Argument of verbs, and peripheral FEs that do not make reference to the event itself generally make reference to #Party_1. Thus #Manner is construed to be that of #Party_1, not necessarily that of #Party_2 or the group of #Parties as a whole.

name: Party_2
description: The semantically (and grammatically) less prominent participant (or group of participants) in the agreement. It is generally encoded within a prepositional phrase (e.g. headed by with).

name: Obligation
description: An expression of the commitment of the #Parties .

name: Topic
description: It is a description of the domain covered by the agreement.

name: Parties
description: The group of individuals portrayed as equally involved in having an agreement.

name: Medium
description: As with other frames in the Communication domain, the #Medium of communication may be expressed. #Medium is the physical entity or channel used to record or negotiate the #Obligation.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where an agreement was made.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the agreement was made.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the agreement not specified by the other FEs, including particularly salient characteristics of the parties.

name: Cognizers
description: It marks constituents that express the set of #Cognizers whose similarity of opinion is at issue.

name: Cognizer_1
description: When there is an asymmetry, #Cognizer_1 is the individual characterized by their similarity in opinion to #Cognizer_2, whose opinion is assumed to be known.  #Cognizer_1 is often an external argument.

name: Cognizer_2
description: When the #Cognizers are expressed separately, #Cognizer_2 is the one whose opinion is assumed to be known; it serves as a basis for establishing the opinion of #Cognizer_1.

name: Question
description: It denotes an implicit question in response to which the #Cognizers give their #Opinions, which are then assessed for their similarity.  The #Question may concern the identitiy of a particular entity or it may be of the yes/no-type.

name: Opinion
description: A state of affairs believed by the #Cognizers.

name: Topic
description: A phenomenon that the #Cognizers are considering with respect to their #Opinion.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Cognizers are similar in their #Opinions.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the #Cognizers are in agreement or disagreement.

name: Place
description: It is the general area in which the #Cognizers are in agreement or disagreement.

name: Manner
description: It is for descriptions of the agreement state not covered by more specific FEs, especially characterizations of the state as a whole or of one of the #Cognizers or #Cognizer_1.

name: Protagonist
description: It identifies the #Protagonist who is prepared to undertake some action in response to a #Danger.

name: Activity
description: The action that the #Protagonist is prepared to do.

name: Danger
description: A dangerous event or situation which the #Protagonist is aware of and is ready to respond to.

name: Dangerous_entity
description: An entity of which the #Protagonist is aware and which poses a danger.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Protagonist is on alert to the potential #Danger.

name: Duration
description: The length of time that the #Protagonist remains ready to perform the #Activity.

name: Total
description: The complex multi-part entity of which a constituent #Part is specified.

name: Part
description: A subset of the #Total.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the inclusion event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the subset relation holds.

name: Place
description: The #Place at which the subset relation holds.

name: Source_symbol
description: A symbol or set of symbols representing the #Content in the #Source_representation format.

name: Source_representation
description: The representation system in which the #Content pre-exists.

name: Target_symbol
description: A symbol or set of symbols representing the #Content in the #Target_representation format.

name: Target_representation
description: The representation system within which the #Target_symbol is equivalent in its signification to the #Source_symbol within the #Source_representation system.

name: Content
description: The information that is meant to be represented by the #Source_symbol and #Target_symbol.

name: Time
description: The period of time during which the translation equivalence holds.

name: Equivalence
description: An assessment of how equivalent the #Source_representation and the #Target_representation are.

name: Medium
description: A text in which the #Target_symbol is used to render the #Content of a #Source_symbol.

name: Debtor
description: The person (or organization) that owes the #owed_party.

name: Goods
description: It is anything (including labor or time, for example) which is exchanged for #money in a transaction.

name: Money
description: It is the thing given in exchange for #Goods in a transaction, or as recompense for the #Bad_action.

name: Rate
description: In some cases, price or payment is described per unit of #Goods.

name: Owed_party
description: The #Owed_party expects a specific amount of #Money from the #Debtor, either because the #Debtor received #Goods or because the #Debtor performed a #Bad_action against the #Owed_party.

name: Billing_authority
description: The individual who communicates to the #Debtor the #Money that they owe.

name: Bad_action
description: An earlier action by the #debtor causing harm (directly or indirectly) to the #owed_party, for which the #owed_party expects compensation, and therefore bills the #debtor.

name: Means
description: The means by which the billing occurs.

name: Unit
description: It is any unit in which #Goods or services can be measured.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which an intentional act is performed.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the billing event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). it may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Owed_party that affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Payment_status
description: It describes the relation between the invoice and the associated payment: unpaid, paid, overdue, etc.

name: Locale
description: It identifies a stable bounded area, and is typically the designation of the nouns of Locale-derived frames.

name: Constituent_parts
description: #Constituent_parts make up a #Locale.

name: Container_possessor
description: #Container_possessor is the location of which the #Locale is a part.

name: Formational_cause
description: #Formational_cause brings about the features of the #Locale. This FE is also used for words that indicate no salient formation.

name: Name
description: It indicates the #Names of #Locales.

name: Relative_location
description: #Relative_location identifies a place in respect to which a #Locale is located.

name: Descriptor
description: Any description, characteristic, or property of the #Locale which is not covered by more specific FEs.

name: Rank
description: The #Rank is the taxonomic category to which the #Member belongs.  It is also always the target-denoting noun.

name: Member
description: The living organism which belongs to the expressed #Rank.

name: Subtype
description: The subtype of the #Rank.

name: Property
description: A property of the #Member of the #Rank.

name: Organism
description: An organism that has naturally occurring biological processes and functions.

name: Descriptor
description: Any characterization of the #Organism not covered by other FEs.

name: Origin
description: The location from which the #Organism originated.

name: Eating_habit
description: Eating_habit

name: Biological_entity
description: Biological_entity

name: Descriptor
description: Descriptor

name: Systemic_effect
description: The biological entity that is affected by the #Trigger.

name: Trigger
description: The force that brings about the change in the #Systemic_effect.

name: Place
description: Location where the #Systemic_effect takes place.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer receives the biological signal and possesses the internal experience which is a reaction to the physical signal.

name: Expressor
description: It is used for a gesture, expression, or body part indicating that the #Experiencer is feeling a certain urge.

name: State
description: It identifies the #Experiencer s state of being.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the extent to which the #Experiencer receives the biological signal.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the #Experiencer feels the biological signal. #Time may also allow inference about the #Explication for the biological urge.

name: Place
description: It identifies the  #Place is where the #Experiencer feels the biological signal.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the amount of time for which the #Experiencer feels the urge.

name: Parameter
description: It is the particular biological realm in which the #Experiencer feels the urge.

name: Offspring
description: The living being that is produced by the #Parents.

name: Mother
description: The female being that produces the #Offspring.

name: Father
description: The male being that aids in the production of the #Offspring.

name: Parents
description: The #Mother and #Father collectively.

name: Time
description: The time when the birth of the #Offspring takes place.

name: Place
description: The place where the #Offspring is born.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the birthing event takes place.

name: Traveller
description: The #Traveller is the entity which boards the #Vehicle.

name: Vehicle
description: The #Vehicle is the intended means of conveyance of the #Traveller.

name: Source
description: Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion outside of or off the #Vehicle expresses the frame element #Source.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner describes a property of the motion not related to its trajectory.

name: Path
description: The #Path describes the trajectory of the #Traveller's motion onto the #Vehicle.

name: Time
description: When the boarding of the #Vehicle takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Traveller boards the vehicle.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Traveller boards the #Vehicle.

name: Decoration
description: It is the decorative item that adorns the body.

name: Body_location
description: It identifies the location on the body where the decoration takes place.

name: Decorated_individual
description: This is the individual whose body is decorated.

name: Decoration_descriptor
description: It identifies a descriptor of the #Decoration.

name: Picture
description: This is the frame element that describes what shape the #Decoration represents.

name: Use
description: It identifies the #Use to which a body decoration is put.

name: Type
description: It designates different kinds of body decorations.

name: Individual
description: It identifies the individual (or individuals) being described.

name: Figure
description: It identifies the #Figure or form being described by the target.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which a body has a particular characteristic.

name: Individual
description: It identifies the #Individual (or individuals) being described.

name: Figure
description: It identifies the #Figure or form being described by the target.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the body description applies.

name: Body_mark
description:
This FE identifies  the #Body_mark.

<ex>Mark has a cancerous <fex name="Body_mark"><t>mole</t></fex> on his back.</ex>

name: Possessor
description:
This Frame Element denotes the #Possessor of the #Body_mark.

<ex><fex name="Poss">Mark</fex> has a cancerous <t>mole</t> on his back.</ex>

name: Attachment
description:
The #Attachment is the larger body part to which the #Body_mark is attached, or of which it is a part.
<ex>Mark has a cancerous <t>mole</t> <fex name="Attachment">on his back</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The <t>warts</t> <fex name="Attachment">of her left hand</fex> shocked everyone.</ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
This Frame Element is used for a characteristic or description of the #Body_mark. it identifies a modifier of its head noun. 

<ex>Mark has a <fex name="Desc">cancerous</fex> <t>mole</t> on his back.</ex>

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is the event that brings about the presence of the #Body_mark.

name: Type
description:
A specific kind of the particular #Body_mark.

<ex>Well, looks like you got a <fex name="typ">plantar</fex> <t>wart</t> on your palm there.</ex>

name: Constituents
description: Salient constituents that make up the #Body_mark.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent uses some part of his/her body to perform the action.

name: Body_part
description: With some verbs in this frame, the #Body_part involved in the action is specified by the meaning of the verb and cannot be expressed separately. With others, the #Body_part is specified by the verb but can optionally be expressed separately, although its presence is generally redundant. A few verbs have a default #Body_part which need not be expressed, but can be overridden by the expression of some other #Body_part.

name: Source
description: It is the place from which the #Body_part is moved.

name: Path
description: It identifies the trajectory of motion of the #Body_part without specifying a start or end point.

name: Goal
description: It is any expression that identifies the endpoint of movement.

name: Area
description: It identifies any expression describing a region in which the motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular and not to consist of a single linear path.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the body movement occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the body movement occurs.

name: Cognate_event
description: It identifies the event noun of the verb.

name: Duration
description: The period of time during which the movement of a #Body_part occurs.

name: Place
description: The location within which the movement of a #Body_part takes place.

name: Possessor
description: It denotes the #Possessor of the #Body_part.

name: Body_part
description: It is the #Body_part.

name: Descriptor
description: This Frame Element is used for a characteristic or description of the #Body_part. Note that #Descriptor is not an FE of the same character as other FEs.  Specifically, rather than filling a slot, it identifies a modifier of its head noun.

name: Subregion
description: It identifies  the #Subregion of the #Body_part referred to by the target.

name: Orientational_location
description: It describes the location of the #Body_part with respect to the inherent orientation of the body (or the larger body part) the #Body_part is attached to.

name: Attachment
description: The #Attachment is the larger body part  to which the body part is attached.

name: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Substância
description: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Substância

name: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Parte_do_corpo
description: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Parte_do_corpo

name: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Constituintes
description: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Constituintes

name: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Descritor
description: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Descritor

name: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Finalidade_inerente
description: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Finalidade_inerente

name: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Tipo
description: fe_Substâncias_corporais_Tipo

name: Financial_instrument
description: The bond, insurance, or debt security which a #Holder buys from an #Issuer.

name: Time
description: When the #Financial_instrument reaches maturity.

name: Issuer
description: The entity which is obligated to pay the #Holder after the #Financial_instrument matures.

name: Holder
description: The entity which owns the #Financial_instrument and is owed money from the #Issuer.

name: Value
description: What the #Financial_instrument is worth after maturity.

name: Principle
description: The amount that the #Holder originally paid to own the #Financial_instrument.

name: Interest
description: The growth rate on the #Principle that results in the final #Value of the #Financial_instrument.

name: Borrower
description: The person who receives the #Theme from the #Lender for a #Duration.

name: Lender
description: The person or institution who gives the #Theme to the #Borrower for a #Duration.

name: Theme
description: The object that the #Borrower receives from the #Lender for a #Duration.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which the #Borrower has possession of the #Theme.

name: Purpose
description: The aim of the #Borrower which they believe will be accomplished by possessing the #Theme.

name: Time
description: When the borrowing event occurs.

name: Means_of_transfer
description: The means by which the transfer of the #Theme took place.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Borrower gets the #Theme from the #Lender.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Borrower gains possession of the #Theme from the #Lender.

name: Agent
description: The conscious entity, generally a person, that performs the intentional act that affects the #Theme.

name: Instrument
description: An entity directed by the #Agent that interacts with an #Theme to accomplish the action indicated by the target.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the entity that undergoes a change of state or location, or that is acted upon in such a way as to cause a change of state or location.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer is the sentient entity that is affected by some #Stimulus.

name: Proposition
description: A state of affairs or a partial concept pertinent to a fuller, implied state of affairs.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the location the #Theme occupies initially before its change of location.

name: Path
description: The #Path refers to (a part of) the ground over which the #Theme travels  or to a landmark by which the #Theme travels.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is the location the #Theme ends up in.

name: State
description: A state of affairs which is pertinent to some entity in the event.

name: Beneficiary
description: The person for whom an action is done.

name: Stimulus
description: The #Stimulus is the person, event, or state of affairs that evokes the emotional response in the #Experiencer.

name: Cause
description: The event or state of affairs (or, metonymically, a participant in such) without which the event or state of affairs denoted by the target would not hold.

name: Equiv1
description: An entity which is a (superordinate) match for #Equiv2 in actual identity, part/whole relationship, possession relationship, or role/filler relationship.

name: Equiv2
description: An entity which is a (subordinate) match for #Equiv1 in actual identity, possession relationship, part/whole relationship, or role/filler relationship.

name: Actor
description: The individual who participates in an action along with others, bringing it about collectively.

name: Type
description: An inherent quality of an event.

name: Location
description: This FE identifies the place where the #Agent performs an act, or in general where the event takes place.

name: Reason
description: A state of affairs that the #Agent is responding to in performing the action.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs or a state holds.

name: Temporal
description:
<def-root>This FE identifies the time when the event occurs, or its duration.

<ex>A radioactive cloud <t>drifted</t> across Britain <fex name="Tem">after the fire at the Windscale nuclear factory</fex>.</ex></def-root>

name: Result
description: The entity or state of affairs in existence after an event.

name: Manner
description: Any description of an event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Boundary
description: The region which is between the #Entities or between the #Entity and empty space.

name: Entity
description: The entity that has a #Boundary.

name: Entities
description: The joint construal of both #Entities next to the #Boundary.

name: Relative_location
description: The relative location of the boundary in respect to the #Entity or #Entities.

name: Bounded_area
description: It identifies a stable #Bounded_area.  It typically serves as the denotation of nouns.

name: Constituent_parts
description: It identifies the salient #Constituent_parts that make up a bounded area.

name: Relative_location
description: The #Relative_location identifies the place in respect to which a bounded area is located.

name: Name
description: It is used for the #Name of a bounded area.

name: Owner
description: It identifies the #Owner, generally a person, of the bounded area.

name: Formational_cause
description: It identifies the #Formational_cause (action or agent) that brings about the features of the bounded area.

name: Type
description: An indication of which kind of #Bounded_area the entity is.

name: Interior
description: A region of space located inside a #Ground.

name: Ground
description: An entity whose location is relatively well-known and which, thus, can serve as a land-mark to identify the #Interior, #Surface, #Boundary, or #Exterior regions.

name: Surface
description: The region located outside of, but in contact with, the #Ground.

name: Boundary
description: The region associated with the boundary of the #Ground.

name: Exterior
description: The region which is not located inside or in contact with the #Ground.

name: Speaker
description: The #Speaker is the person who produces a message about a #Topic.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is a positively judged entity or state of affairs with which the #Speaker is associated and about which they talk.

name: Medium
description: It is the physical entity or channel used by the #Speaker to transmit the statement.

name: Message
description: A description of the state of affairs that redounds to the #Speaker's credit.

name: Expressor
description: It is the body part or action that conveys the feeling of pride of the #Speaker.

name: Addressee
description: The #Addressee is the person to whom the #Speaker communicated a message.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of the Speaker that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly).

name: Means
description: An act whereby the #Speaker makes a boastful statement.

name: Time
description: The time when the statement is made.

name: Place
description: It specifies the place where the statement takes place.

name: Occasion
description: The Occasion is the reason a public statement is given.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs.

name: Whole
description: The #Whole goes into #Pieces which were not (necessarily) definable subparts prior to breaking.

name: Pieces
description: The #Pieces result from the breaking apart of the #Whole.

name: Criterion
description: It expresses a property of the parts or components of the #Whole which correlates with the locations (e.g.) of fragmentation on the #Whole.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event or participants not covered by more specific Frame Elements.

name: Time
description: The time at which the breaking apart takes place.

name: Place
description: The location at which the breaking apart takes place.

name: Means
description: An action, event, or state that enables the event of breaking apart.

name: Subpart
description: The part of the #Whole that is conceived as being broken or taken off from the remaining part of the whole.

name: Whole
description: The piece that is presented in a less prominent position, and which is the landmark or remaining whole from which #Sub_part breaks off.

name: Criterion
description: It expresses a property of the Parts or components of the #Whole which correlates with the locations (e.g.) of fragmentation on the #Whole.

name: Time
description: The time at which the breaking off of the #Sub_part happens.

name: Place
description: The location at which the breaking off occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event or participants not covered by more specific Frame Elements.

name: Means
description: An action, event, or state that enables the event of breaking off.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the individual who ends the confinement or captivity of the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the person or object in motion released by the #Agent.

name: Location_of_confinement
description: The location to which the #Theme's motion was formerly inhibited.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the release which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: The action of the #Agent which brings about the release.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose identifies the purpose for which the #Agent release the #Theme.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Theme ceases to be confined.

name: Time
description: The #Time identifies when the #Agent release the #Theme .

name: Agent
description: The #Agent s breathing causes the motion of the #Air.

name: Air
description: It is the substance that the #Agent causes to move.

name: Goal
description: This FE identifies the point at which the #Air ends up as a result of the motion. <ex>Lee <t>breathed</t> <fex name="Goal">into Ann s mouth</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which an #Agent breathes.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means of breathing.

name: Source
description: It identifies the starting point of the #Air.

name: Path
description: It identifies the #Path of the motion through locations after leaving the #Source and before reaching the #Goal.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the degree to which an #Agent is breathing.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the breathing occurs.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of time that an #Agent breathes.

name: Distance
description: The #Distance that the #Air travels.

name: Instrument
description: An entity that allows the #Agent to breathe, either a natural part (the lungs, say) or a device (like a respirator).

name: Time
description: The time at which breathing occurs.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by breathing in the specified manner.

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent is a sentient being who physically controls the movement of the #Theme via the carrier, accompanying the #Theme.
<ex><fex name="Agent">Karl</fex> <t>carried</t> the books across the campus to the library.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
#Goal identifies the endpoint of the path.  

<ex>Karl <t>carried</t> the books <fex name="goa">to the library</fex>.</ex>

name: Source
description:
#Source indicates the beginning of the path along which the #Theme travels.  

<ex>Karl <t>hauled</t> the books <fex name="sou">from the library</fex>  to the office.</ex>

name: Path
description:
Path along which carrying occurs.
<ex>Karl <t>carried</t> the books <fex name="Path">across the campus</fex>.</ex>

name: Theme
description:
The objects being carried.
<ex>Karl <t>toted</t> <fex name="Theme">the books</fex> to the car.</ex>

name: Area
description: #Area is used for descriprion of a general area in which the carrying action takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular or not to consist of a single, linear path.

name: Carrier
description:
The #Carrier provides support for the #Theme.  Movement of the #Carrier results in movement of the #Theme.
<ex><fex name="Car">The boat</fex> <t>ferried</t> the troops across the river.</ex>

name: Constant_location
description:
The #Constant_location expresses the location of the #Theme relative to the #Carrier.  This relationship holds for the entire length of the carrying event.

<ex>Karl <t>took</t> the books to the library <fex name="CL">in his car</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Karl <t>carried</t> the books to the library <fex name="CL">in his arms</fex>.</ex>

name: Distance
description: This FE identifies the #Distance the #Theme is carried.

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the #Manner  in which the #Carrier or #Agent carries the #Theme .

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which the carrying or transporting occurs.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Carrier or #Agent carries the #Theme . <ex>We had to <t>carry</t> the heavy weights all the way to the top of the hill<fex name="Pps">to show our strength</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The actions the #Agent takes to move the #Theme.
<ex>The books were <t>taken</t> to the library <fex name="Mns">by helicopter deliveries</fex>.</ex>
<ex>I <t>haul</t> books <fex name="Mns">by putting them on top of my head</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place is the general area that serves as a setting for the specific motion of the #Agent and #Theme (with #Source, #Path, or #Goal).  
<ex><fex name="Place">Even in such a small port</fex>, these boats would <t>transport</t> many tons of trade-goods in to shore annually.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time in which the carrying event takes place.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent builds a #Created_entity.

name: Components
description: It identifies the #Components that form the #Created_entity.

name: Created_entity
description: It identifies the entity that is created in the act of building.

name: Instrument
description: It identifies the #Instrument(s) with which an #Agent builds a #Created_entity.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the building occurs.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the #Purpose for which an intentional act is performed.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the building occurs.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an #Agent builds a #Created_entity.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which an #Agent builds a #Created_entity.

name: Building
description: The entity built by the #Creator which has some #Function.

name: Function
description: The use for which the #Building is intended.

name: Type
description: An indication of the subtype of #Building, including architectural style.

name: Place
description: The building's location.

name: Relative_location
description: A place that a #Building is located with respect to.

name: Building_part
description:
<def-root>The place or area specified inside a structure.  The <fen>Building_part</fen> of the <fen>Whole</fen>.
<ex>She works in the cancer <fex name="Building_part"><t>ward</t></fex> of the local hospital.</ex></def-root>

name: Whole
description: The entirety of a building whose #Part is discussed.

name: Use
description: This FE identifies the purpose for which the #Part was constructed.

name: Place
description: This FE describes where the #Part is located inside the #Building or the #Locale.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent performs an action incorrectly.

name: Patient
description: It is the entity affected by the #Agent's bungling of an #Action.

name: Action
description: It identifies the #Action that the #Agent performs incorrectly.

name: Topic
description:
<def-root>A general description of what the <fen>Agent</fen> habitually bungles.
<ex>The Austro-Hungarian Empire had a long history of <fex name="Topic">military</fex> <t>screw-ups</t>.</ex></def-root>

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which a bungling event occurs.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the #Agent bungles.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an #Agent bungles.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the bungling occurs.

name: Instrument
description: It identifies the #Instrument with which an #Agent bungles.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the bungling occurs.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent intentionally buries the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the object that is buried.

name: Goal
description: It is the location where the #Theme ends up.

name: Cause
description: A non-animate force which buries the #Theme.

name: Source
description: It is the initial location of the #Theme, before it is buried.

name: Path
description: Any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal expresses the frame element #Path.

name: Manner
description: Any expression which describes a property of the placing action which is not directly related to the trajectory of the #Theme s motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Means
description: The #Means is an act whereby the #Agent achieves the burying of the #Theme.

name: Place
description: It indicates where the burying occurs.

name: Time
description: It is when the burying occurs.

name: Area
description: It is the general area where the #Theme is buried.

name: Distance
description: It is any expression which characterizes the extent of motion of the theme into the ground.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which burying occurs.

name: Business
description: It identifies the company or establishment. This may be the target itself or the #Business_Name if it is an appositive not set off with commas (i.e. restrictive).

name: Product
description: It is the product or service provided by the business.

name: Proprietor
description: It is the owner or chief participant in the business.

name: Descriptor
description: It indicates other characteristics of the business besides its #Product and #Proprietor.

name: Place
description: It is the #Place in which the business is located.

name: Business_name
description: The name of the #Business when it appears in an appositive set off by commas (non-restrictive).

name: Service_provider
description: When a #Business is described in terms of the professionals who work to produce the product or service, use #Service_provider.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity is rendered unable to continue its regular operations.

name: Time
description: The #Time of the failure.

name: Place
description: The #Place of the failing entity.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner describes the way in which the #Entity failed.

name: Cache
description: It denotes the #Cache of #Resources.

name: Resource
description: The goods or commodity that is being stored in a #Cache.

name: Use
description: The future #Use for the #Resource.

name: Possessor
description: The entity that possesses the #Cache.

name: Relative_time
description: #Relative_time is used for the word or words that locate the time with respect to an identifiable reference point.

name: Whole
description:
#Whole is used for the larger unit of which the target word names a part.

<ex>Jo fled in the early <t>morning</t> <fex name="Whole">of  Sunday December 15</fex>.</ex>

name: Unit
description: The calendric unit that is denoted. LUs in this frame all denote the #Unit.

name: Name
description: #Name is used for the name of a day (month, etc.).  Note that only the word (or words) that is the name is (are) tagged, not the target word.

name: Count
description: The number of intervals of the specified type.

name: Speaker
description: The #Speaker produces the #Message, the truth or sincerity of which is at issue.

name: Message
description: It is the communicative content whose truth or sincerity is at issue.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the subject matter to which the #Message pertains.

name: Medium
description: It is the physical or abstract setting in which the #Message is conveyed.

name: Addressee
description: It is the person to whom the #Message is communicated.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which a communication is candid--some are more candid than others.

name: Manner
description: It indicates the manner of candidness.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity whose meeting or falling short of pre-conditions is assessed.

name: Event
description: The #Event that the #Entity may participate in.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Entity exceeds or falls short of the minimum requirements for participating in the #Event.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Entity is capable of the #Event.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity whose ability to contain items is assessed.

name: Theme
description: The #Entity has the ability to contain the #Theme, often expressed with a quantity.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Entity exceeds or falls short of the minimum requirements for holding the items.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Entity has or had a certain capacity.

name: Stock
description: The investment that a #Shareholder makes into a business, differing from property and assets.

name: Type
description: The the kind of #Stock, of which there are two: preferred or common.  Holders of preferred stock are entitled to the first dividend that a company pays out, while holders of common stock are granted voting rights in corporate decisions.

name: Shareholder
description: The creditor that has invested into a business by purchasing some #Type of its #Stock.

name: Issuer
description: The entity that issues its #Stock to the #Shareholder.

name: Amount
description: The #Amount is the number of shares, though any measure prase will suffice.

name: Number
description: This FE identifies the #Number.

name: Entity
description: It identifies the #Entity enumerated by the #Number.

name: Unit
description:
A #Unit expresses some quantification of some property of an entity, event, or situation by providing a base value of the property combined with a #Number expressing how the current value for the property relates to the #Unit.

She's not even SIX years old yet!

As units that specify a quantity property, numbers themselves can be used as Units.

THREE dozen eggs makes eighteen standard omelettes .

name: Unit
description:
A #Unit expresses some quantification of some property of an entity, event, or situation by providing a base value of the property combined with a #Number expressing how the current value for the property relates to the #Unit.  

<ex>She's not even <t>six</t> <fex name="Unit">years</fex> old yet!</ex>

As units that specify a quantity property, numbers themselves can be used as #Units.

<ex><t>Three</t> <fex name="Unit">dozen</fex> eggs makes eighteen standard omelettes .</ex>

name: Precision
description:
This FE identifies the #Precision to which an #Entity approximates a #Number.

About THIRTY cases are known.

In the case where a number is modified by a #Multiplier, we have found it more plausible that phrases expressing #Precision modify the main number (thus "million" in the first example, not "two"):

JP has almost two MILLION dollars.

There are just over six BILLION people in the world today.

name: Multiplier
description: How many times larger the group of #Entities is than the base #Number.

name: Composite_number
description:
The total number of instances of the #Entity. This FE should be used when more basic number expressions are used together to form a #Composite_number whose value is the sum of the constituent numbers. It is annotated on a second FE layer. For cases where a number is used to multiply another number, use #Multiplier.

She found six HUNDRED and twelve errors in the manuscript.

Four score and SEVEN years ago , I wasn't even born.

THIRTY seven senators refused to vote.

name: Distributor
description: The #Distributor maintains a store of #Goods for the purpose of selling or otherwise distributing them.

name: Goods
description: The #Goods are kept on hand and distributed by the #Distributor.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Distributor carries the #Goods.

name: Place
description: The #Place indicates where the carrying of #Goods occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the storing of goods which is not covered by more specific FEs, including general descriptions comparing events (the same way) and salient characteristics of a #Distributor that also affect the action (deliberately, carefully).

name: Duration
description: It indicates the length of time that the #Distributor carries the #Goods.

name: Undesirable_event
description: The undesirable event which occurs.

name: Patient
description: The entity that experiences the #Undesirable_Event.

name: Place
description: Where the #Undesirable_Event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the #Undesirable_Event occurs.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action.

name: Cause
description: The cause of the #Undesirable_Event.

name: Fire
description: The total material currently involved in combustion, including both the parts of the #Fuel currently undergoing chemical alteration and the partially ionized gas that results from this process.

name: Fuel
description: The entity that is begins to undergo rapid chemical alteration leading to damage or destruction.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the #Fire begins to burn.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the #Fire begins to burn.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Fire event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Cognizer
description: This is the person who performs an act of categorization. Typically, this frame element is expressed as an External Argument.

name: Item
description: This is the entity which is construed or treated by the #Cognizer as being an instance of a particular #Category. Typically, the #Item is expressed as an Object.

name: Category
description: This frame element expresses a general type or class of which the #Item is considered an instance. Typically, it is expressed in a prepositional phrase.

name: Criteria
description: This frame element expresses properties of the #Item which is used as a basis for categorization. #Criteria are the general dimensions along which #Items can potentially differ from one another and hence, fall into different #Categorys.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action.

name: Means
description: An act whereby the #Cognizer categorizes.

name: Time
description: It marks expressions that indicate when a certain Categorization was made.

name: Affected
description: Agents in a joint or reciprocal action.

name: Actor
description: An entity which participates in a #Cause, perhaps volitionally and perhaps not.

name: Cause
description: A force, process, or event that produces an effect.

name: Effect
description: A positive or negative evaluation of the phenomenon.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any holistic description of the event, including overall depictions (the same way) and descriptions pertaining to the #Actor's influence on the character of the event (eagerly, quietly).

name: Means
description: An action through which the #Actor or #Cause accomplishes the action indicated by the target.

name: Cause
description: An animate or inanimate entity, a force, or event that produces an effect. Volitionality is not a necessary characteristic of #Causes.

name: Effect
description: The #Effect is the event which results from the #Cause.

name: Averted_situation
description: The situation that would be the case if the #Cause event did not occur or the #Cause state were not the case.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Cause occurs and #Effect takes place or the #Averted_situation does not occur as expected.

name: Place
description: The location at which at which the #Cause occurs and #Effect takes place or the #Averted_situation does not occur as expected.

name: Benefactor
description: The #Benefactor is the person or thing that gives an advantage to the #Beneficiary.

name: Beneficiary
description: The #Beneficiary is person or thing that receives an advantage from the #Benefactor.

name: Beneficial_situation
description: The #Beneficial_situation is the item or action that is given to or done for the #Beneficiary by the #Benefactor. A change of possession can, but does not have to occur.

name: Benefitted_situation
description:
The situation that is better off than it would be without the #Beneficial_situation.

<ex>The presence of a younger voices greatly <t>benefitted</t> <fex name="Benefitted_situation">the discussion</fex> .</ex>
<ex>We focused on liberty to the <t>detriment</t> <fex name="Benefitted_situation">of order</fex> .</ex>

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Beneficiary gains an advantage from the #Benefactor.

name: Domain
description: The #Domain describes the type of advantage that is conferred.

name: Time
description: The point in time when the beneficial or detrimental event occurs.

name: Place
description: The location where the beneficial or detrimental situation occurs.

name: Manner
description:
Any description of an aspect of the event that is interpreted as holistically affecting the event.

<ex>She <fex name="Manner">sneeringly</fex> <t>benefitted</t> only her own class .</ex>

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person causing a bodily experience in the #Experiencer.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer is the being or entity whose experience changes.

name: Body_part
description: The #Body_part identifies the location on the #Experiencer's body where the bodily experience takes place.

name: Cause
description: The #Cause marks expressions that indicate some non-intentional, typically non-human, force that affects the #Experiencer's #Body_part.

name: Degree
description: It is the degree to which the #Experiencer s bodily experience is affected.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the action indicated by the target.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the bodily experience is caused.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the experience-causing event occurs.

name: Instrument
description: It is any object manipulated by the #Agent to cause the experience.

name: Agent
description: The sentient entity that affects a change in the #Entity.

name: Initial_category
description: The category of which the #Entity is a member before the #Agent causes a change.

name: Final_category
description: The category that the #Entity belongs to after it has undergone the change.

name: Final_value
description: The value that the #Attribute assumes as a result of the change that the #Entity is caused to undergo.

name: Initial_value
description: The value that the #Attribute has before the change takes place.

name: Entity
description: The abstract or concrete thing or situation that the #Agent causes to change.

name: Attribute
description: A characteristic of the #Entity for which a value can be assigned or determined by calculation, measurement , or observation.

name: Cause
description: An event that causes a change in the #Entity.

name: Time
description: The time at which the change of the #Entity is caused.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the  event causing the change of the Entity which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the Agent that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by effecting a change in the #Entity.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Agent (or event resulting from the #Cause) that produces a change in the #Entity.

name: Place
description: The location where the change of the #Entity is caused.

name: fe_place_cause_change
description: fe_place_cause_change

name: Patient
description: It is the entity that undergoes a change.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent causes the change of consistency in the #Patient.

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is the non-#Agent which brings about the change in the #Patient.

name: Degree
description: It is the #Degree to which the #Patient changes consistency.

name: Initial_state
description: This is the original state of the #Patient.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Patient s consistency is changed.

name: Place
description: Where the the #Patient changes consistency.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed at which the change of consistency occurs.

name: Time
description: When the #Patient changes consistency.

name: Instrument
description: It identifies the #Instrument with which the #Agent changes the consistency of the #Patient.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the #Agent changes the consistency of the #Patient.

name: Change_agent
description: The #Change_agent is the substance used to change the consistency of the #Patient.

name: Container
description: It marks expressions that indicate a #Container in which the #Patient is changing consistency.

name: Hot_cold_source
description: The #Hot_cold_source is the source of the heat or coolness.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent causes the #Patient to change phase.

name: Patient
description: The #Patient undergoes a change of phase brought about by the #Agent.

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is the non-#Agent which brings about the change in the #Patient.

name: Instrument
description: It identifies the Instrument with which the #Agent intentionally affects the #Patient.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the Manner in which the #Agent intentionally affects the #Patient.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the #Agent intentionally affects the #Patient

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where change of phase occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time at which the change of phase occurs.

name: Degree
description: It is the #Degree to which the #Agent changes the phase of the #Patient.

name: Initial_state
description: This is the original state of the #Patient.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed at which the change of phase occurs.

name: Container
description: It identifies the #Container that holds the #Patient whose phase is being changed.

name: Duration
description: The length of time for which the #Agent changes the phase of the #Patient.

name: Medium
description: The #Medium is the substance which surrounds the #Patient and facilitates its phase change.

name: Hot_cold_source
description: The #Hot_cold_source is the source of the heat or cool.

name: Agent
description: The person who causes an entity (Item) to change its position on a scale with respect to some property (Variable).

name: Attribute
description: The scale along which the #Item ranges in value.

name: Item
description: The entity whose position along a scale is being changed.

name: Cause
description: The force that causes the change.

name: Difference
description: The distance between the original value (Value_1) and the final value (Value_2) of the entity on the scale (Variable).

name: Value_1
description: The initial value of the entity (#Item) along the scale.

name: Value_2
description: The final position on the scale that the entity (#Item) assumes.

name: Path
description: Any expression that says something about the movement of the entity (Item) along the scale between its initial (Value_1) and its final position (Value_2).

name: Speed
description: The rate at which the entity's position on the scale changes.

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Agent that brings about the change in the position of the #Item on the scale.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Agent changing the value of an #Attribute which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Place
description: The location where the #Agent changes the value of an #Attribute.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent fortifies the #Patient.

name: Patient
description: The #Patient is the entity that is being made stronger.

name: Cause
description: An event which causes the #Patient to become stronger.

name: Means
description: An act performed by an #Agent that enables them to act upon the #Patient.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Agent makes the #Patient stronger.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Agent fortifies the #Patient.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person who s action s cause an emotion in the #Experiencer.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer feels an emotion as caused by the #Agent.

name: Event
description: The #Event is the occasion or happening that evokes emotions in the #Experiencer. This #Event occurs as the direct result of a sentient being's actions.

name: Degree
description: It selects some gradable attribute and modifies the expected value for it.

name: Instrument
description: The tool used by the #Agent to cause an emotion in the #Experiencer.

name: Means
description: An act performed by an #Agent that enables them to act upon the #Experiencer.

name: Manner
description: In what way the #Agent causes an emotion in the #Experiencer.

name: Time
description: When the #Agent causes emotion in the #Experiencer.

name: Medium
description: It is the physical or abstract setting in which the #Agent causes the #Experiencer to feel an emotion.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Agent causes the #Experiencer to feel the emotion.

name: Agent
description: With some words in this frame, an #Agent who causes the change in size of the #Item may be present.

name: Item
description: The #Item is frequently the External Argument of verbs or the NP Object if an #Agent is expressed.

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is a non-human entity which brings about the change in size.

name: Initial_size
description: It is rarely expressed without #Result_size also being explicit.

name: Result_size

With agentive uses, it may indicate salient characteristics of an Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Agent

name: Theme
description: It is generally an NP Object.

name: Source

name: Path

name: Goal
description: It is the point at which the #Theme ends up as a result of the motion.

name: Final_number

name: Final_state

description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).  It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Sleeper ends up awake.

name: Entity
description: Concrete or abstract entity that does not exist after the event.

name: Place
description: This is the #Place where the new #Entity ceases to exist.

name: Time
description: It identifies the Time when a new #Entity ceases to be.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Entity disappears.

name: Degree
description: The completeness of the disappearance of the #Entity.

name: Type
description: It indicates if the ceremony is opening, closing or delivery of medals.

name: Ceremony
description: One of the instances of an olympic ceremony.

name: Frequency
description: How often the event occurs.

name: Duration
description: How long is the event.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Manner
description: The way the event occurs.

name: Time
description: When the event takes place.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer is the person whose certainty or uncertainty is at issue.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the entity that a #Cognizer has a certain/uncertain belief about.

name: Content
description: The #Content denotes the mental content that the #Cognizer is certain or uncertain about.

name: Expressor
description: The #Expressor is the body part or action by a body part that conveys the mental state of  the #Cognizer.

name: Degree
description: It indicates the #Degree to which the #Cognizer is certain or uncertain.

name: Manner
description: It denotes the manner of the certainty or uncertainty.

name: Event
description: Event

name: Agent
description: The #Agent blocks access to the #Useful_location.

name: Useful_location
description: The #Useful_location is the place the Theme is headed towards and the #Agent has changed the accessibility of.

name: Portal
description: The #Agent may regulate access to the #Useful_location by regulating access to a #Portal, including a part of the portal that could block potential #Themes, such as doors or gates.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is headed towards, or has an intention or tendency to heard towards, the #Useful_location, but is potentially blocked due to actions of the #Agent.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Useful_location is or is not accessible.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An action carried out by the #Agent to bring about the change in accessibility.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Agent changes the accessibility of the #Useful_location.

name: Place
description: The general place where the blocking or allowing of access occurs.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which the Agent changes the accessibility of the #Useful_location

name: Instrument
description: The #Agent uses the #Instrument to block access, often by placing the #Instrument such that it cannot be traversed.

name: Theme
description:
This is the object which moves. In many sentences this FE will be expressed as something which moves under its own power. However, this FE is not <ment>required</ment> to be an animate mover, so it is different from a self-mover.

<ex>At that point <fex name="Thm">the truck in front of me</fex> <t>turned</t> right into the huge ditch/field that separates the interstate from the access road.</ex>

name: Direction
description:
The new direction in which the #Theme continues its motion.

<ex>Eventually, though, I backtracked to Kel Tole and <m>hung</m> a <t><fex name="dir">left</fex></t> toward Kilgal Tole.</ex>

name: Source
description:
Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion expresses the frame element #Source. 

<ex>One of those ugly landcuisers <t>cut</t> left <fex name="Src">from the opposite lane</fex> in moving traffic.</ex>

name: Path
description:
Any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal (see below) expresses the frame element #Path, excluding directional expressions.

<ex>They <t>turned</t> right <fex name="Path">through another gate</fex> into a courtyard opening.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
Any expression which indicates where the #Theme ends up as a result of the change of direction. 

<ex>Finally, where the road begins to climb steeply, <t>cut</t> right <fex name="Goal">onto a small trail near a sign in a tree</fex>, and go downhill to the stream.</ex>.

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (<ment>hard</ment>, <ment>softly</ment>), secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In agentive frames, it may indicate salient characteristics of an intentional Theme that affect the action (<ment>presumptuously</ment>, <ment>coldly</ment>, <ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>, <ment>carefully</ment>).

<ex>I <fex name="Manner">carefully</fex> <t>turned</t> left onto Narragansett and worked my way through the debris.</ex>

name: Means
description: An event involving the #Theme that results in the #Theme moving in the specified way.

name: Speed
description:
The #Speed is the rate at which the #Theme changes direction.

<ex>Suddenly, the jeep <fex name="Speed">quickly</fex> <t>turned</t> left down a side road.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place is the setting where the change of direction during the Theme s motion occurs.

<ex><t>Turn</t> right <fex name="Place">at the stop light</fex> and follow Park Avenue.</ex>

name: Path_shape
description:
The configuration formed by the #Path that the #Theme traverses during the change of direction.

<ex>The tank rumbled, backed quickly, <t>turned</t> left and right <fex name="Path_shape">in a sine curve</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time at which the change of direction takes place.


<ex><fex name="Time">Then</fex> I <t>turned</t> left onto 220th Street.</ex>

name: Angle
description:
The angle between the old and the new #Direction in which the #Theme moves.

<ex>There we <t>turned</t> right <fex name="ang">by almost 180 degrees</fex> and by a winding road, going steeply
up we went to And?lka.</ex>

name: Agent
description: The sentient entity that changes the duration of the #Event.

name: Event
description: The #Event whose duration is changed.

name: Cause
description: An event that causes the change in #Event duration.

name: New_duration
description: The new duration of the #Event.

name: Initial_duration
description: The planned duration of the #Event before the change takes place.

name: Time
description: The time at which the change in duration of the #Event is caused.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the initial and final durations differ from each other.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the  event causing the change of the Event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the Agent that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by  changing the duration of the #Event.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Agent (or event resulting from the #Cause) that produces a change in the #Event's duration.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the animate entity which brings about the change in time of the #Event.

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is the non-sentient force which brings about the change of time for the #Event.

name: Event
description: The #Event is the occurrence which changes time.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner is the way in which the time change takes place.

name: Means
description: The #Means describe the way in which the time change is accomplished.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree is the extent to which the time change takes place.

name: Destination_event
description: The #Destination_event is the occasion which the timing of the Event occurs with respect to.

name: Destination_time
description: The #Destination_time is the time at which the #Event actually occurs.

name: Interval
description: The Interval between the #Landmark_time and the #Destination_time may be expressed.

name: Landmark_time
description: The #Landmark_time is when the #Event was originally intended to take place.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Agent intends to bring about by changing the time the #Event will take place.

name: Time
description: The time at which the delay occurred.

name: Place
description: The location at which the expected time of the #Event changes.

name: Patient
description: The #Patient is the entity that undergoes a change.

name: Initial_state
description: This is the original state of the #Patient.

name: Place
description: Where the the #Patient changes consistency.

name: Time
description: When the #Patient changes consistency.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed at which the change of consistency occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Patient changes consistency.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Patient changes consistency.

name: Selector
description: The #Selector (most commonly a group of people) is responsible for a change in leadership.

name: Old_leader
description: The person who held the position of leadership before the change.

name: New_leader
description: A person who occupies a leading position after the #Old_leader leaves.

name: Role
description: Frequently the #Old_leader or #New_leader is referred to only by his/her role. However, the #Role can be expressed separately from the leader.

name: Old_order
description: It identifies the political order that existed before the change of leadership occurs.

name: Function
description: The #Function is the purpose the #New_leader will fulfill.

name: Body
description: A group of individuals who are elected or appointed to perform some function of governance.

name: Degree
description: It indicates the #Degree to which an event occurs.

name: Manner
description: It is used for the #Manner of performing an action.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which  the #Selector accomplishes the change of leadership.

name: Time
description: When the change of leadership takes place.

name: Place
description: Where the change of leadership takes place.

name: Degree

name: Speed

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Patient changes phase.

description: The #Patient is the entity that undergoes a change of phase.

name: Owner

name: Possession
