name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Possession undergoes a change in quantity.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #Possession undergoes a change in quantity.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree of the change in quantity.

name: Item
description: The entity whose temperature changes.

name: Temperature
description: The scalar property that the #Item possesses.

name: Initial_temperature
description: The temperature that the #Item has prior to the event.

name: Final_temperature
description: The temperature of the #Item after the event.

name: Temperature_change
description: The amount of difference between the #Initial_temperature and the #Final_temperature of the #Item.

name: Hot_cold_source
description: The #Hot_cold_source is the source of the heat or coolness.

name: Cause
description: An event or state-of-affairs that leads to the change in temperature of the #Item.

name: Container
description: It identifies the #Container that holds the #Item whose temperature is being changed.

name: Duration
description: The span of time in which the #Item is changing temperature.

name: Time
description: The time at which the change in temperature occurs.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Item changes temperature.

name: Manner
description: The manner in which the #Item changes temperature.

name: Result
description: The state of the #Item that results from the temperature change.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the change in temperature takes place.

name: Device
description: The #Device or machine that is in or out of operation.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person who changes the operational state of the #Device.

name: Cause
description: It identifies the non-agentive force that causes the #Device to begin to operate.

name: Time
description: The #Time when a #Device is put into or out of operation.

name: Place
description: The #Place in which the #Device is put into or out of operation.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In agentive uses, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Device is active after the action.

name: Means
description: An action done by the #Agent in order to cause the #Device to being to operate.

name: Attribute
description: The #Attribute is a scalar property that the #Item possesses.

name: Item
description: The entity that has a position on the scale.

name: Difference
description: The distance by which an #Item changes its position on the scale.

name: Final_value
description: The position on the scale where the #Item ends up.

name: Initial_value
description: The initial position on the scale from which the #Item moves away.

name: Value_range
description: A portion of the scale, typically identified by its end points, along which the values of the #Attribute fluctuate.

name: Initial_state
description: A description that presents the #Item's state before the change in the #Attribute's value as an independent predication.

name: Final_state
description: A description that presents the #Item s state after  the change in the #Attribute s value as an independent predication.

name: Path
description: Any expression that gives information about points on the scale that the #Item traverses between the starting and ending point of its movement along the scale.

name: Speed
description: The rate of change of the Value.

name: Correlated_variable
description: The #Correlated_variable is a directional path (or ordered collection of values) that the (dependent) #Attribute is measured against.  Note that normally, the #Correlate is simply (forward-directional) time.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Time
description: The #Time is the time-frame in which the change of position occurs.

name: Duration
description: The length of time over which the change takes place.

name: Initial_correlate
description: The value, location, or state-of-affairs that corresponds to the #Initial_value of the #Attribute.

name: Final_correlate
description: The value, location, or state-of-affairs that corresponds to the #Final_value of the #Attribute.

name: Place
description: A location where the #Attribute is measured.

name: Entity
description: The entity which has undergone change.

name: Initial_situation
description:
A holistic description of how a situation was before a change happened.

<ex>The rock was <t>unaltered</t> <fex name="Initial_situation">from its Pre-Cambrian composition</fex> .</ex>

name: Cause
description:
The entity or situation that previously brought about the change in the #Entity.  (For negative LUs, this is the entity or situation that would have been expected to cause a change, but did not.)

<ex>She was completely <t>changed</t> <fex name="Cause">by the worry she suffered that year</fex> .</ex>

name: Degree
description: The notability or categoricality of the state, compared to how the #Entity was before.

name: Protagonist
description: The individual whose posture changes.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the change in posture which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a #Protagonist that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Location
description: The place or  setting in which the #Protagonist's change of posture takes place.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Protagonist changes posture.

name: Path
description: The #Path is used for expressions that indicate the trajectory of motion without referring to the #Source or the #Goal of motion.

name: Goal
description: This FE is used for any expressions that indicate the endpoint of the posture change. Often this is the place that provides support for the posture.

name: Source
description: The #Source is used for expressions that indicate the starting point of the change of posture.

name: Direction
description: This FE is used for expressions that indicate a line from the deitic center towards a reference point (which may be implicit) that is neither the #Goal of the posture change nor a landmark along the way of the moving part of the body.  Often #Direction is defined with reference to the canonical orientation of the Protagonist, or the orientation imposed by an implicit observer.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which a #Protagonist assumes a posture.

name: Distance
description: This FE is used for expressions that indicate the extent to which the body (part) moves during the change of posture.

name: Means
description: An action of the #Protagonist whereby they achieve the change of posture.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent makes the #Patient more resistant to attack.

name: Patient
description: The #Patient is the entity that is being made more resistant.

name: Cause
description: An event which causes the #Patient to become more resistant.

name: Means
description: An act performed by an #Agent that enables them to act upon the #Patient.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Agent makes the #Patient more resistant.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Agent makes the #Patient more resistant.

name: Attack
description: It describes the literal or figurative #Attack that the #Agent is strengthening the #Patient for.

name: Agent
description: The individual that changes the tool's situation.

name: Tools
description: The entities controlled by an #Agent to achieve some #Purpose.

name: Old_tool
description: The tool that the #Agent had been using.

name: New_tool
description: The tool that the #Agent ends up using.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Agent makes a change.

name: Purpose
description: The aim of the #Agent when they carry out the change.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Agent acts intentionally.

name: Means
description: The action of the #Agent which brings about a change.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Agent's change which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Entity
description: The object or phenomenon which exists in the #State of disorder.  It is common for the #Entity to be null instantiated in this frame.

name: State
description: The #State in which the #Entity exists.  Usually the #State will be the target-denoting noun.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #State exists.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Entity exists in the #State.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Entity exists in the #State.

name: Descriptor
description: Any characterization of the #State not covered by a more specific frame element.

name: Interlocutors
description: The group of individuals involved in chatting.

name: Interlocutor_1
description: The individual or individuals that form the more prominent (i.e. agentive) party of a conversation, as compared with #Interlocutor_2. That is, #Interlocutor_1 is generally encoded as the External Argument of verbs, and peripheral FEs that do not make reference to the event itself generally make reference to #Interlocutor_1. Thus a #Purpose (or #Means, #Depictive, or #Manner) is construed to be that of #Interlocutor_1, not necessarily that of #Interlocutor_2 or the group of #Interlocutors as a whole.

name: Interlocutor_2
description: The semantically (and grammatically) less prominent group of participants in a conversation.

name: Duration
description: The length of time that the chatting goes on.

name: Topic
description: The general subject that the statements of the #Interlocutors in the conversation pertain to.

name: Language
description: The language(s) or dialect(s) that a conversation is conducted in.

name: Means_of_communication
description: The device used by the #Interlocutors to communicate.

name: Purpose
description: What the #Interlocutors (or #Interlocutor_1) hope to accomplish by chatting.

name: Time
description: The time at which a chat takes place.

name: Place
description: The location where a chat takes place.

name: Means
description: The way that the #Interlocutors succeed in having a conversation.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the conversation which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Interlocutors (or #Interlocutor_1) that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Perceptual_source
description: The #Perceptual_source is used for the entity that is being described. A recipe can stand in for a #Perceptual_source which is a kind of food.

name: Sensory_attribute
description: The #Sensory_attribute is used for words that describe the perception itself.

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree to which a chemical sense is described.

name: Chemical_entity
description: The entity for which potency is being evaluated.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the potency from the norm expressed by the target LU.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer chooses the #Chosen out of the #Possibilities.

name: Chosen
description: It identifies the entity or course of action which is selected from among the #Possibilities.

name: Possibilities
description: A #Cognizer makes a choice from among a set of #Possibilities. #Possibilities are commonly expressed via an oblique phrase which indicates the alternative or alternatives, or by a subordinate clause.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the #Cognizer accomplishes the choosing.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the choosing occurs.

name: Larger_purpose
description: It identifies the Larger_purpose for which the #Cognizer chooses. It exemplifies what the #Cognizer hopes to accomplish by choosing the particular #Chosen.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the #Cognizer chooses the #Chosen.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the selecting event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of a #Cognizer that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Topic
description: It occurs quite rarely in this frame and usually only as a PP Complement of a noun target.

name: Entity
description: An object or event that is described as being available under delimited conditions.

name: Time
description: A temporal characterization of the circumstances of the existence of an #Entity.

name: Place
description: A spacial characterization of the #Circumstances of the existence of the #Entity.

name: Circumstances
description: A description of the state of the world in which the #Entity can be experienced.

name: Descriptor
description: Properties of the #Entity as it exists in the stated #Circumstances.

name: Defendant
description: The #Defendant is the individual or entity summoned to appear in #Court, or to pay a #Fine instead.

name: Authority
description: The #Authority serve a citation or summons to a #Defendant, requiring that the latter appear in #Court or pay a #Fine.

name: Charges
description: It identifies the infraction or offense for which the #Defendant is summoned.

name: Court
description: The #Court where the #Defendant is summoned to appear.

name: Place
description: It is the location where the #Defendant is issued the citation or summons.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Defendant is issued the citation or summons.

description: Citizen

description: Right_or_duty

description: Name

name: Part

description: Time_of_creation

name: Type

name: Use
description: Use

name: Claimant

name: Property
description: The #Property is declared to be under the ownership of the #Claimant.

name: Offender
description: The individual who is accused or convicted of a #Crime.

name: Crime

name: Means

name: Containing_object

name: Agent
description: The #Agent opens/closes the #Containing_object.

name: Fastener
description: It identifies the #Fastener that the #Agent manipulates.

name: Container_portal
description: It identifies the active zone of the container that may be expressed as the direct object of the target verb.

name: Enclosed_region
description: It identifies the region enclosed by the #Containing_object that is closed.

name: Manipulator
description: It identifies the instrument or part of the body that manipulates  the #Fastener.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Container_portal/ #Containing_object ends up closed.

name: Instrument
description: An entity manipulated by the #Agent that accomplishes the closure of the #Containing_object or the #Container_portal.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the closing event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An action of the #Agent that accomplishes the closure of the #Container_portal or #Containing_object.

name: Place
description: The location where the closing event takes place.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Agent closes the #Container_portal or the #Containing_object.

name: Garment
description: This FE identifes the clothing worn.

name: Wearer
description: The #Wearer is the person wearing the clothes, or for whom the clothes are intended.

name: Style
description:
This FE identifes the design, or cut, of the clothing.

<ex>Mike wore a <fex name="Style">tailored</fex> leather <t>jacket</t>.</ex>

name: Material
description: This FE identifes the material from which the clothing is made.

name: Subregion
description: This FE identifies a part of the clothing.

name: Use
description: This FE identifes the #Use for which a #Garment is worn or was made.

name: Body_location
description: #Body_location identifies the place on the body where the clothing is worn.

name: Creator
description:
The individual who created the #Garment.

<ex>She  s wearing a <fex name="cre">Ralph Lauren</fex> <t>dress</t>.</ex>

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which the #Creator makes the #Garment.

name: Name
description: The name given to a specific #Garment.  Note this is not the name of a general class of clothing items, but rather an individual item.  This is accordingly VERY RARE.

name: fe_Modo_de_criação
description: fe_Modo_de_criação

name: Subpart
description: This is a #Subpart of the #Clothing item.

name: Clothing
description: This is the #Clothing of which the target word is a part.

name: Material
description: The #Material from which the #Subpart is made.

name: Subregion
description: A part of the #Clothing item.

name: Wearer
description: The person who is wearing the clothes, or for whom the clothes are intended.

name: Body_location
description: This is the part of the body were the garment is worn.

name: Participant1
description: <def-root>The profiled member of a co-association relationship.</def-root>

name: Participants
description: The members of a co-association relationship (collectively).

name: Participant2
description: <def-root>The backgrounded member(s) of a Co-association relationship.</def-root>

name: Place
description: The place at which the co-association relationship exists.

name: Time
description: The time during which the co-association relationship exists.

name: Institution
description: The institution or organization that the #Participants have in common.

name: Coaching_staff
description: A member of the group of coaches, doctors and physical trainers that accompany a squad.

name: Country
description: Country represented by the delegation the #Coaching_staff is a part of.

name: Origin
description: It is where the member of the #Coaching_staff was born or has lived a large part of life.

name: Age
description: It is the time that the member of the #Coaching_staff has been alive.

name: Cognizer
description: The person who thinks about the #Topic.

name: Topic
description: The subject that the #Cognizer thinks about.

name: Manner
description: It indicates the way in which the cognizing is being done.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Cognizer that makes them able to cogitate.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Cognizer is trying to bring about by thinking.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Cognizer considers the #Topic.

name: Concept_1
description: The concept which is linked to #Concept_2.  Generally expressed as the external argument.

name: Concept_2
description: The concept which is tied to #Concept_1. Generally expressed as a PP complement.

name: Concepts
description: The two concepts expressed jointly.

name: Point_of_view
description: The point of view from which the connection exists.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree of connection between the #Concepts.

name: Specification
description: A further specification on the linkage.

name: State_of_affairs
description: A #State_of_affairs (that is, an event or state) that holds independently of (potentially) causally-related States of affairs.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #State_of_affairs holds.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #State_of_affairs holds.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the target word not covered by a more specific FE.

name: Partner_1
description: When the parties in a collaboration are expressed separately, this Frame Element marks constituents that express the one that is grammatically more prominent, i.e., the one that is the subject of an active clause.

name: Partner_2
description: It marks constituents expressing the grammatically  less prominent, typically oblique, party in a collaboration.

name: Undertaking
description: It marks constituents that express the project in which the #Partners are collaborating.

name: Partners
description: It marks expressions that express the parties that work together in an #Undertaking.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which #Partner_1 collaborates with #Partner_2 or in which the #Partners collaborate.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Partners are engaged in their collaboration.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the collaboration occurs.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the amount of time the #Partners collaborate.

name: Degree
description: It marks expressions that indicate to what extent the #Partners are cooperating.

name: Means
description: The action taken by the #Partners that lets them accomplish the collaboration.

name: Profiled_region
description: A region of space located at a #Ground.

name: Ground
description: An entity whose location is relatively well-known and which, thus, can serve as a landmark to identify the #Profiled_region.

name: Colonists
description: A group of people who move together to an area outside their #Homeland for the purpose of settling.

name: Homeland
description: The #Homeland is where the #Colonists are originally from.

name: New_area
description:
The #Colonists move to the #New_area, inhabiting it and (in the case of nation-states) extending the control of the #Homeland.

<ex>Norse invaders in the 900s <t>colonized</t> <fex name="new">the North Midlands</fex> more densely than any other part of England" </ex>

name: Time
description: The time at which the colonizing takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which the colonizing is done.

name: Entity
description: It identifies the #Entity described by the #Color.

name: Color
description: A position in color-space, generally used to describe the quality of some #Entity.

name: Type
description: It indicates what subtype of the general category of a #Color is indicated.

name: Comparand
description: A physical entity (or type of physical entity) whose color is similar to the designated color.  When this FE occurs with adjective targets, (a relatively rare circumstance) the #Comparand also serves to specify a #Type, which should be labeled on the second FE layer.

name: Color_qualifier
description: A phrase that indicates the direction in color-space from the center of the region designated by the Color.

name: Descriptor
description: Some characteristic or judgment of a #Color implicitly imposed by a speaker.

name: Cause
description: The state of affairs that the #Color is dependent on.

name: Degree
description: The closeness of the #Entity's color to the center of a #Color prototype.

name: Attribute
description: The aspect of the #Entity which is under discussion, namely color.

name: Color
description: The #Color that is being described.

name: Described_entity
description: The entity whose #Color is being described.

name: Degree
description: The level to which the Color is representative of a specific quality.

name: Source
description: The individual or environmental reservoir of a #Disease that the #Protagonist was exposed to.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Protagonist contracts the #Disease.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Protagonist contracts the #Disease. It is different from the #Source (usually marked with -from-) in that it does not necessarily mean that it was contact with the #Place that actually led to infection.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event as a whole in comparison to other events (the same way) or in terms of details of the event that affect the overall event (rapidly).

name: Binding_principle
description: It describes the #Binding_principle which comes into effect.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which an action is performed.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the #Event occurs.

name: Individuals
description: The #Individuals are self-movers who come together.

name: Configuration
description: The #Configuration describes the resulting formation of the individuals.

name: Party_1
description: The #Party_1 is the grammatically more prominent participant in the congregating event.

name: Party_2
description: A grammatically less prominent participant in the congregating event.

name: Means
description: The #Means describes the way in which the #Individuals accomplish the congregating.

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the congregating occurs.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the congregating occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of congregating which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of the #Individuals or #Configuration that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Entity
description: Concrete or abstract entity that did not exist before the #Time of the event.

name: Place
description: This is the #Place where the new #Entity comes into being.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when a new #Entity comes into existence.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Entity comes to be.

name: Cognizer
description: It is the person who comes to believe something.

name: Evidence
description: Words in this frame may occur with a PP which expresses the Evidence on which knowledge or belief is based.

name: Content
description: With a target verb, the #Content is usually expressed as a finite clausal Complement or an Object NP, and may sometimes be expressed by a PP.

name: Topic
description: Some verbs in this frame may occur with postverbal Topic expressions.

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Cognizer which enables them to figure something out.

name: Medium
description: It is the text created by the #Cognizer to communicate that they came to believe a specified #Content.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Cognizer comes to believe the #Content.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Cognizer discovers the #Content.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Cognizer realizes the #Content.

name: Cognizer
description: It is the person who comes up with or conceptualizes the Invention.

name: Idea
description: It is the intellectual creation of the #Cognizer.

name: Manner
description: A state of the #Cognizer that directly and palpably influences the overall action.

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Cognizer that contributes to the creation of the #Idea.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Cognizer comes up with the #Idea.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Idea is created.

name: Honored_entity
description: This FE identifies the person, subject, or event that is being honored.

name: Dedicated_type
description: It identifies the type of entity that had been dedicated to honor the #Honored_entity.

name: Dedicated_entity
description: The entity which has been dedicated to the #Honored_entity.

name: Speaker
description: The #Speaker is the person who commits him/herself to do something.

name: Addressee
description: The #Speaker's commitment can be made to an #Addressee.

name: Message
description: An expression of the commitment made by the #Speaker expresses the frame element Message.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic expressions are not very frequent in this frame.

name: Medium
description: As with other frames in the Communication domain, the Medium of communication may be expressed. Medium is the physical entity or channel used to transmit the Message.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the commitment is made.

name: Time
description: The time period during which the #Speaker makes the commitment.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Speaker makes the commitment.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Speaker intends to accomplish by taking on the commitment.

name: Perpetrator
description: The individual that commits a #Crime.

name: Crime
description: An act, generally intentional, that has been formally forbidden by law.

name: Purpose
description: The action that the #Perpetrator was trying to accomplish in the #Crime.

name: Manner
description: A description of secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of the #Perpetrator that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An action performed by the #Perpetrator in order to accomplish the #Crime.

name: Time
description: When the #Crime was committed.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Crime occurs.

name: Entities
description: It denotes the people in possession of the #Commonality.

name: Commonality
description: It denotes an object or attribute which is jointly possessed by the #Entities.

name: Entity_1
description: One of the possessors of the #Commonality.

name: Entity_2
description: One of the possessors of the #Commonality.

name: Speaker
description: The individual that communicates the message concerning the #Category of an #Item.

name: Category
description: The class of entities with characteristics that match those of the #Item according to the portrayal of the #Speaker.

name: Item
description: The entity that the #Speaker portrays as belonging to a #Category.

name: Medium
description: The piece of text in which a #Speaker communicates their categorization of the #Item.

name: Means
description: An action taken by the #Speaker through which they communicate that the #Item fits into a particular #Category.

name: Time
description: The point in time at which the #Speaker makes a characterization of the #Item.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Speaker characterizes the #Item.

name: Criteria
description: The characteristics of an #Item that fit the defining characteristics of a #Category, and thus serve as the basis of the #Speakers characterization of the #Item.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of a #Speaker that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Communicator
description: The sentient entity that uses language in the written or spoken modality to convey a #Message to another person.

name: Message
description: A proposition or set of propositions that the #Communicator wants the #Addressee to believe or take for granted.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the entity that the proposition or propositions conveyed relate to, that they are about.

name: Medium
description: The physical or abstract setting in which the #Message is conveyed.

name: Quote
description: The #Quote is the concrete record of a communication act.

name: Addressee
description: The #Addressee receives a #Message from the #Communicator.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Communicator communicates.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Communicator communicates.

name: Time
description: The time at which the communication takes place.

name: Place
description: The location where the act of communication occurs.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which a #Communicator communicates.

name: Speaker
description: It is the sentient entity that produces a #Message or communicates about a #Topic.

name: Addressee
description: It is the person to whom the #Speaker  is communicating.

name: Message
description: It is the content which is communicated by the #Speaker.

name: Topic
description: It is the subject matter of the communicated #Message.In this frame, is frequently preceded by a quantificational noun which is treated as referring to the #Message.

name: Medium
description: It expresses the medium of communication, such as the language used or the specific type of text in which the #Message occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which an event occurs.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time that the communicative event lasts.

name: Time
description: The time at which the communication event takes place.

name: Place
description: The location at which the communication event takes place.

name: Means
description: The action that the #Speaker performs in order to communicate in the particular way described by the target.

name: Communicator
description: It is the person who uses the #Means of communication to deliver the #Message to the #Addressee.

name: Addressee
description: It is the person to whom the #Message is communicated.

name: Message
description: It identifies the content of what the #Speaker is communicating to the #Addressee.

name: Topic
description: It is the subject matter to which the #Message pertains.

name: Means
description: It refers to the Instrument of Communication that is used by the #Communicator (and #Addressee). Each LU in this frame incorporates the FE #Means.

name: Manner
description: It is for expressions that elaborate the manner in which an action is carried out.

name: Speaker
description: The #Speaker is the sentient entity that delivers the #Message.

name: Message
description: It has a number of different realizations in this frame.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the subject of the #Message.

name: Voice
description: It describes the #Speaker's utterance or other message-encoded production.

name: Addressee
description: The #Addressee refers to the one toward whom the Communication_noise is directed.

name: Medium
description: It is used for a physical entity or channel that transmits the #Message.

name: Manner
description: It describes the manner or style in which the Communication_noise is delivered.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Speaker communicates.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where an event occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time where the Communication noise event occurs.

name: Speaker
description: The #Speaker is the sentient entity that communicates the reply or response.

name: Addressee
description: This is the person to whom the response is communicated.

name: Message
description: It identifies the content of what the #Speaker is communicating to the #Addressee. It can be expressed as a direct quote or a clause.

name: Topic
description: It occurs quite rarely in this frame.

name: Trigger
description: The #Trigger is the prior communication or action to which a response is given.

name: Medium
description: As with #Medium in other Communication frames, the physical entity or channel that is used to communicate.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by the #Speaker achieves the communication of the response #Message .

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Speaker makes a verbal response.

name: Time
description: The time interval during which the #Speaker makes their verbal response.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Speaker intends to accomplish by making a verbal response.

name: Duration
description: The #Duration of the communication response.

name: Utterer
description: The #Utterer participates in a communicative interaction and produces a statement directed to the #Comprehender(s).

name: Comprehender
description: The #Comprehender participates in the communicative interaction with the #Utterer. This is the person (or people) to whom the utterance is addressed.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the communicative interaction takes place.

name: Time
description: The #Time in which the communicative interaction occurs.

name: Communicators
description: The #Communicators who participate in the communicative interaction.

name: Executive_authority
description: The constitutionally specified authority who has the power to commute punishments.

name: Original_punishment
description: The punishment the #Offender was originally sentenced to.

name: Offender
description: The individual who was convicted of a crime and given a sentence (the #Original_punishment).

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Original_punishment  is commuted.

name: New_punishment
description: The new reduced form of punishment that the #Executive_authority orders for the #Offender.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the commutation which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of an #Executive_authority that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Place
description: The location where the #Executive_authority commutes the #Original_punishment.

name: Means
description: An action performed by the #Executive_authority that accomplishes the commutation.

name: Term1
description: <def-root>The grammatically more prominent number involved in a commutative operation.</def-root>

name: Term2
description: <def-root>The grammatically less prominent number involved in commutative operation.</def-root>

name: Terms
description: Two or more elements of a commutative arithmetic operation. This frame element may be represented as #Term_1 and #Term_2.

name: Calculator
description: An entity that uses the arithmetic operation.

name: Term1
description: <def-root>The grammatically more prominent number involved in a commutative operation.</def-root>

name: Term2
description: <def-root>The grammatically less prominent number involved in commutative operation.</def-root>

name: Terms
description: Two or more elements of a commutative arithmetic operation. This frame element may be represented as #Term_1 and #Term_2.

name: Result
description: The number or role of a number that comes from the interaction of #Term_1 and #Term_2 via a commutative operation.

name: Item_1
description: The #Item_1 marks the grammatically more prominent of the two entities, i.e.the subject in active clauses, when they are expressed separately.

name: Item_2
description: The #Item_2 marks the grammatically less prominent of the #Items when they are expressed separately.

name: Items
description: It is used when the #Items are expressed jointly in a phrase, either a plural or a coordinated NP.

name: Parameter
description: It is used for expressions that indicate a #Parameter or respect in which the #Items are said to be compatible, not in conflict.

name: Degree
description: It is used for expressions that indicate the extent to which two #Items are compatible.

name: Participant_1
description: It identifies the first (or only) participant in a competition.

name: Participant_2
description: It identifies the second participant in a competition.

name: Participants
description: It is used for plural participants in a competition.

name: Competition
description: It is used for the name of the competition.

name: Score
description: It is used for the score in a game.

name: Rank
description: It is used for the ranked results of a competition, and is translatable into a numerical value.

name: Venue
description: It is for the named venue of a competition, particularly when the place has been built for the purpose of a competition.

name: Manner
description: The way the #Participants compete.

name: Means
description: The action the #Participants (or #Participant_1) are involved in that constitutes a #Competition.

name: Time
description: When the #Competition occurs.

name: Duration
description: It is used to describe the length of time over which competition occurs.

name: Degree
description: It describes the intensity of competition.

name: Equipment
description: It refers to any sports object or equipment used in a #Competition, either by the referees or by the #Participants.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Complainer
description: The #Complainer is the sentient entity that produces the #Complaint (whether spoken or written).

name: Complaint
description: The lamentable situation that the #Complainer is communicating to the #Addressee.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the subject matter to which the #Complaint pertains.

name: Medium
description: It is the physical entity or channel used by the #Complainer to transmit the #Complaint.

name: Addressee
description: The #Addressee is the person to whom the #Complaint is communicated.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the complaining event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Complainer that affect the action (presumptuously, bitterly, vociferoursly).

name: Means
description: An act whereby the #Complainer makes a complaint.

name: Time
description: The time when the complaint is made.

name: Place
description: It specifies the place where the complaining takes place.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Occasion
description: The #Occasion is the reason a public statement is given.

name: Whole
description: The entity that is being assessed for having all its necessary parts or not.

name: Degree
description: An expression indicating a deviation of the actual level of completeness from the level indicated by the target.

name: Time
description: The interval of time when the completeness of the entity is assessed.

name: Protagonist
description: The #Protagonist's behavior is in or out of compliance with norms.

name: Act
description: It identifies the #Act that is judged to be in or out of compliance with the #Norms.

name: State_of_affairs
description: A #State_of_affairs may violate a law or rule.

name: Norm
description: It identifies the rules or #Norms that ought to guide a person's behavior.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the compliance occurs.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the compliance occurs.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the compliance is (or is not) accomplished.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time  when the act of compliance or non-compliance occurs.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Conceded_state_of_affairs
description: A proposition or set of propositions that the speaker wants the addressee to believe or take for granted. This statement is not asserted, but presupposed by the speaker of the sentence, and is mentioned to contrast with the #Main_assertion. It would or could seem to predict a situation different than the #Main_assertion, but, for reasons left implicit, this normal prediction is contradicted by the fact that the #Main_assertion and the #Conceded_state_of_affairs are both simultaneously true.

name: Topic
description: An entity which metonymically stands in for an associated #Conceded_state_of_affairs.

name: Main_assertion
description: The statement that the speaker wishes to assert or offer as their main contribution to the discourse, which is be modified or hedged in some way by the #Conceded_state_of_affairs. The force of the contribution of the #Main_assertion is presented as undiluted by the fact that something different from the #Main_assertion would normally by predicted, based on the facts in the #Conceded_state_of_affairs.

name: Profiled_possibility
description: The situation presented explicitly as a possibility, contrasting with the implicit Negated_possibility.

name: Consequence
description: The situation that follows from the #Profiled_possibility.

name: Profiled_possibility
description: The situation presented explicitly as a possibility, contrasting with the implicit #Opposite_possibility.

name: Consequence
description: The situation that follows from the #Profiled_possibility.

name: Anti_consequence
description: The situation that follows as a result of the #Opposite_possibility.

name: Opposite_possibility
description: The implicit situation that is mutually exclusive with the #Profiled_possibility.

name: Patient
description: The person who has a #Medical_condition associated with #Symptom.

name: Medical_condition
description: A holistic description of the medical state of the #Patient (or a part of the state of the #Patient), which may or may not indicate the cause of a deviation from normal.

name: Symptom
description: A deviation from normal function or feeling which is noticed by a #Patient or physician, indicating the presence of a #Medical_condition

name: Time
description: When a #Symptom or #Medical_condition occurs.

name: Place
description: The location where a #Medical_condition presents.

name: Frequency
description: The commonality of a #Medical_condition or #Symptom.

name: Extent
description: The degree to which a #Medical_condition is associated with a #Symptom(s).

name: Influence
description: Genetic, Biological, and Environmental #Influences affect #Medical_conditions.

name: Agent
description: It marks expressions that denote the person whose conduct is being evaluated.

name: Manner
description: It marks expressions that characterize the way that the #Agent behaves.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Agent behaves in a certain way.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Agent exhibits their behavior.

name: Means
description: The way in which the #Agent behaves in the specified #Manner.

name: Domain
description: The #Domain of human behavior in which the #Agent acts in a certain #Manner.

name: Standard
description: An explicit point to which the conduct of the #Agent is compared.

name: Entity_1
description: Entity_1

name: Entity_2
description: Entity_2

name: Entities
description: Entities

name: Relation_type
description: Relation_type

name: Utterer
description: Utterer

name: Comprehender
description: Comprehender

name: Communicators
description: Communicators

name: Issue
description: It identifies the #Issue that the #Agent deals with.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person who is acting to deal with the #Issue.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the intentional act occurs.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the reason why the #Agent confronts the issue.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Agent acts intentionally.

name: Means
description: It identifies the way in which an #Agent goes about facing the #Issue.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Part
description: A  #Part of a larger architectural unit, the  #Whole.

name: Whole
description: An architectural unit which includes the #Part.

name: Descriptor
description: A property relating to the #Part.

name: Orientation
description: This is a property of the #Part that situates  the  #Part within the #Whole.

name: Material
description: Any indication of what makes up the #Part, including components, ingredients, etc.

name: Creator
description: The Individual  who creates the #Part.

name: Source
description: The #Source is one of the #Connected_locations treated as source.

name: Connected_locations
description: Two or more named locations that are connected by the architectural #Part.

name: Direction
description: The #Direction is the direction or directions the #Part of connecting architecture runs.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is one of the #Connected_locations treated as a goal.

name: Connector
description: The #Connector identifies the entity or substance that forms the bond that maintains the #Item in a fixed position.

name: Connected_item
description: It identifies the entity that is attached to the #Connector in such a way as to stabilize their position or to immobilize them.

name: Fixed_location
description: It identifies the location to which the #Connector is attached.

name: Use
description: The items that a #Connector usually attaches or the type of activity the attaching is generally for.

name: Material
description: It identifies the material of which the #Connector is made.

name: Type
description: It designates the type of #Connector. Often the #Type labels part of a multi-word or compound word target.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to a #Connector.

name: Creator
description: The individual or group that creates a #Connector.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which the #Connector comes to be.

name: Conqueror
description: The #Conqueror is the entity that overtakes the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the land, government, and its people that is seized by the #Conqueror.

name: Degree
description: It describes the intensity and extent of the conquering event.

name: Manner
description: The manner in which the #Conqueror takes over the #Theme.

name: Means
description: The action by which the conquering event is made possible through the efforts of the #Conqueror.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Conqueror takes over the #Theme.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Conqueror seizes the #Theme.

name: Instrument
description: The tool used by the #Conqueror to seize the #Theme.

name: Communicator
description: The person who uses language in the written or spoken modality to convey a message to another person.

name: Addressee
description: The person that receives the message from the #Communicator.

name: Address
description: It is used for a (metaphorical) place in a system of communication where #Communicators and #Addressees can access the system.

name: Communication
description: The information that the #Communicator wishes to impart to the #Addressee, often to get a particular response. In this frame the #Communication is not necessarily received by the #Addressee.

name: Topic
description: This is the subject matter to which the message pertains.

name: Medium
description: The physical or abstract setting in which the message is conveyed.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the #Purpose for the #Communicator contacting the #Addressee.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the intentional act occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Communicator acts intentionally.

name: Intermediary
description: The #Intermediary is the person who facilitates the contact.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the nature of the action.

name: Means
description: An action of the #Communicator that enables them to make contact.

name: Profiled_region
description: A region of space in contact with a #Ground.

name: Ground
description: An entity whose location is relatively well-known and which, thus, can serve as a land-mark to identify the #Profiled_region.

name: Container
description: It is an object which is conventionally used as a container. Target words in this frame are tagged with this frame element.

name: Contents
description: It is the object(s)/stuff contained in the #Container.

name: Material
description: It identifies the material of which the #Container is made.

name: Type
description: It designates the type of #Container.  Often the #Type labels part of a multi-word or compound word target.

name: Relative_location
description: It is the location of the #Container.

name: Construction
description: It indicates the action (or cause) which creates the #Container.

name: Owner
description: It identifies the owner of the #Container.

name: Use
description: It identifies the purpose for which an artifact is constructed and the activity with which it is associated, or the #Contents prototypically contained in the #Container.

name: Part
description: It identifies a #Part of the #Container.

name: Descriptor
description: The #Descriptor describes some aspect of the #Container.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the actor who instigates the filling.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the physical object or substance which changes location.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is the area or container being filled.

name: Cause
description: An event which brings about the filling of the #Goal.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the location where the #Theme begins its motion.

name: Path
description: The #Path is the trajectory of the motion.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the filling occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the filling occurs.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the filling occurs.

name: Time
description: When the filling occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the filling takes place.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which the filling occurs.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the entity that does the emptying.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the physical object or substance which changes location.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the region or container which is emptied of something.

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is the non-sentient force which instigates the emptying.

name: Path
description: The #Path is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is any expression which tells where the #Theme ends up, or would end up, as a result of the motion.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Agent empties the #Source.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Agent empties the #Source.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Agent empties the #Source.

name: Instrument
description: This is the object with which the #Agent empties the #Source.

name: Place
description: The location where the emptying takes place.

name: Time
description: The time at which the emptying takes place.

name: Container
description: The #Container is the physical object which holds within its boundaries the #Contents.

name: Contents
description: The #Contents is the substance or objects contained within the physical bounds of the #Container.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Container holds the #Contents.

name: Contents
description: The thing or substance located within the #Container.

name: Container
description: The non-point-like entity which has a Boundary which (largely or completely) separates the #Interior region from the Exterior region. It normally also has a #Portal which links the #Interior and Exterior regions.

name: Interior
description: The (finite) region which is inside the Boundary of the #Container, disjoint from the Exterior, and overall closer or included in the #Container.

name: Time
description: The period or moment in which the #Contents occupy the #interior of the #Container.

name: Portal
description: A (relatively small) region which goes through the Boundary, connecting the #Interior and Exterior of the #Container.

name: Outcome
description: An open question that is (to some #Degree) predictable from the #Determinant.

name: Determinant
description: An open question that determines the #Outcome.

name: Degree
description: The amount of predictive power supplied by the #Determinant with respect to the #Outcome.

name: State_of_affairs
description: A state which holds prior to and up through the #Reference_occasion.

name: Reference_occasion
description: The time or event (normally speech time) with respect to which the #State_of_affairs is located.

name: Event
description: The #Event that occurs despite an #Adversity that would seem to contradict the possibility of its occurence.

name: Adversity
description: The #Adversity is a state of affairs or entity that hinders or negatively affects the #Event.

name: Contrary_circumstances
description: The #Contrary_circumstances are the circumstances that would normally be expected to occur given the presence of the #Adversity.

name: Experiencer
description: It indicates the person who experiences the emotion about their prior action.

name: Action
description: It marks expressions that indicate a prior action that the #Experiencer has come to feel bad about.

name: Expressor
description: It marks expressions that indicate a gesture or body part which is displaying the #Emotional_state of the #Experiencer.

name: Emotional_state
description: It is modified by an adjective  that indicates the #Experiencer is contrite.

name: Degree
description: It marks expressions that indicate how badly the #Experiencer feels about their prior action.

name: Authenticity
description: It marks expressions that indicate whether the #Experiencer genuinely feels contrite or just acts as if they did.

name: Controlling_entity
description: A thing or person whose behavior controls a #Dependent_entity, #Dependent_situation, or #Dependent_variable.

name: Dependent_entity
description: An entity, usually a thing, that is influenced in its behavior by a #Controlling_entity or an #Controlling_situation.

name: Controlling_variable
description: A scalar variable (with unspecified value) which has an effect on the #Dependent_entity, #Dependent_situation, or #Dependent_variable.

name: Dependent_situation
description: A situation whose temporal or other characteristics are influenced by a #Controlling_entity, #Controlling_situation, or #Controlling_variable.

name: Dependent_variable
description: A scalar variable, whose value depends on the behavior of a #Controlling_entity, a #Controlling_situation, or a #Controlling_variable.

name: Controlling_situation
description: A situation whose temporal or other characteristics control a #Dependent_entity, #Dependent_situation, or #Dependent_variable.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the controlling element affects the dependent element.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the controlling occurs.

name: Place
description: The location at which the controlling occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Controlling_entity that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Control
description: It identifies the entity or substance that is designed to have a particular #Use. This is often an incorporated FE.

name: Use
description: The use for which an control is intended.

name: Controlled_entity
description: The entity which the #Control controls.

name: Speaker
description: The person who uses language in the written or spoken modality to convey a #Message to another person.

name: Message
description: The proposition whose denotation the #Speaker presents as important.

name: Medium
description: The physical or abstract setting in which the #Message is conveyed.

name: Addressee
description: The #Addressee is the audience to which the #Speaker communicates the #Message.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, in particular secondary effects (loudly), general descriptions comparing events (the same way), and salient characteristics of an agent that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Speaker communicates the importance of the state of affairs denoted by the #Message.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Speaker communicates a #Message.

name: Degree
description: The degree of importance that the #Speaker conveys the #Message s denotation as having.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Speaker delivers the #Message.

name: Vehicles
description: The constituent vehicles that make up the #Convoy.

name: Convoy
description: The group of vehicles transporting the #Cargo.

name: Cargo
description: The #Cargo are the goods and/or individuals transported by the #Convoy. This FE also covers the intended use of the transported goods.

name: Support
description: People and possibly other elements of the convoy who support and defend the transport of the #Cargo are the #Support. In military contexts, this typically consists of soldiers and military vehicles who provide defense for the conveying #Vehicles and #Cargo.

name: Possessor
description: The #Possessor of the #Convoy. Often a nation or organization that wants the #Cargo transported.

name: Source
description: It is the beginning of the path along which the #Convoy travels.

name: Path
description: The #Path along which the #Convoy travels.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is the endpoint of path along which the #Convoy travels.

name: Direction
description: The direction in which the #Convoy travels.

name: Place
description: The general #Place where the #Convoy is operating.

name: Cook
description: The #Cook prepares the #Produced_food.

name: Produced_food
description: The #Produced_food is the result of a #Cook's efforts.

name: Heating_instrument
description: It identifies the #Heating_Instrument  with which the #Cook prepares the #Produced_food.

name: Container
description: It identifies the #Container that holds the food being produced.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the cooking creation occurs.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the cooking creation is performed.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the cooking creation occurs.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which an event occurs.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the cooking creation performed.

name: Ingredients
description: It identifies the #Ingredients which are altered by the #Cook to create the #Produced_food.

name: Duration
description: For how long the cooking process lasts.

name: Utensil
description: Any instrument used for preparing food, not covered by other FE.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person performing the intentional act.

name: Evaluee
description: It is the person or thing about whom/which a judgment is made.

name: Reason
description: Typically, there is a constituent expressing the #Reason for the judge's judgment.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which an intentional act is performed.

name: Means
description: The action that is taken that results in punishment/reward.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which an intentional act is performed.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action.

name: Body_part
description: It is the location on the body where the bodily injury takes place.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Severity
description: It marks a quantity related to the seriousness of the punished behavior.

name: Information
description: The #Information matches or does not match the facts of the world.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the agent who holds the correct/incorrect information.

name: Communicative_act
description: The event which communicates the #Information.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic about which the #Source has accurate information.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Information matches or does not match the facts of the world.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Source is correct/incorrect.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Information or the #Source is correct.

name: Medium
description: The physical context that the #Information is found in.

description: The #Patient undergoes a change.

name: Initial_state
description: The #Initial_state is the original state of the #Patient.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #Patient corrodes.

name: Time

description: It identifies the #Degree to which the #Patient corrodes.

name: Speed
description: It identifies the #Speed at which the #Patient corrodes.

description: The #Patient is corroded by the #Cause.

description: It identifies an animate or inanimate entity, a force, or event that corrodes the #Patient. Volitionality is not a necessary characteristic of #Cause.

name: Agent
description: The individual that corrodes the #Patient.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the #Cause corrodes the #Patient.

description: It identifies the #Duration of  time for which the #Cause corrodes the #Patient.
