name: Product
description: Product

name: Use
description: Use

name: User
description: User

name: Body_part
description: Body_part

name: Theme
description: This is the entity, frequently a living being, which moves in relation to the #Cotheme.

name: Cotheme
description: It is the second moving object.

name: Source
description: It marks any expression which implies a definite starting-point of the motion of the #Cotheme. In prepositional phrases, the  object expresses the starting point of motion. With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Path
description: It marks phrases that describe the #Theme and #Cotheme's trajectory of motion and which are neither expressions of the  #Source nor the #Goal of motion. The notion #Path also includes directional expressions.

name: Goal
description: Any expression which tells where the #Cotheme ends up as a result of the motion expresses the frame element #Goal. Note that if the #Cotheme is animate, the #Theme need not also end up in the same place. Some particles imply the existence of a #Goal which is understood in the context of utterance.

name: Area
description: It marks expressions which describe a general area in which the motion of #Theme and #Cotheme takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular and not to consist of a single linear path. Locative setting adjuncts of motion expressions may also be assigned this frame element.

name: Road
description: Phrases that denote a physical path on which the motion of #Theme and #Cotheme takes place are marked #Road.

name: Direction
description: The direction in which the #Theme and #Cotheme move.

name: Manner
description: Phrases marked with this frame element  describe a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of the #Theme's motion. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Distance
description: Any expression which characterizes the extent of the motion of the #Theme and #Cotheme expresses the frame element #Distance.

name: Means
description: It expresses the #Means by which a (volitional) #Theme moves in relation to the #Cotheme.

name: Mode_of_transportation
description: It denotes the means of conveyance on which the #Theme is traveling. The #Mode_of_Transportation can be the #Theme's  own body or a vehicle. Vehicles can move in any way and in any medium.

name: Speed
description: Phrases that describe the rate of motion of the #Theme are marked #Speed.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which motion occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the motion occurs.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the #Purpose for which a #Theme moves.

name: Following_distance
description: The #Following_distance is the distance between the #Theme and #Cotheme.

name: Place
description: The #Place is the location which provides a setting for a defined motion (that is one with #Source, #Path or #Goal).

name: Victim
description: It is the being or entity that is injured by the #Assailant's attack.

name: Assailant
description: The person or other self-directed entity that is responding to a prior attack by attempting physical harm to the #Victim.

name: Weapon
description: An entity used by the #Assailant to cause damage to the #Victim.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Assailant that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Assailant that accomplishes the assault.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Assailant makes an assault on the #Victim.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which an #Assailant attacks the #Victim.

name: Source
description: The starting-point of the motion of the #Assailant or projectiles of the #Assailant as they move toward the the #Place that the #Victim is occupying in the attack. In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion.  With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Path
description: The #Path refers to a part of the ground over which the #Assailant travels.

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the time when the #Assailant attacks the #Victim.

<ex><fex name="Time">The previous day's</fex> <t>counterattack</t> <fex name="Victim">on French troops</fex> was deemed a success.</ex>

name: Course
description: A #Class #Program or other #Material that deals with a #Topic

name: Program
description: Planning for the #Course.

name: Class
description: A step or an event in a #Course

name: Material
description: Educational material, such as books, tapes or videos, used by a Teacher or Student to acquire #Skills or #Knowledge.

name: Theme
description: Area of #Knowledge or #Skill that is taught by a #Teacher or to a #Student.

name: Specialty
description: A formal qualification, such as an academic degree or a certificate, that the #Student seeks.

name: Student
description: Who is instructed by a #Teacher to acquire or improve skills or knowledge.

name: Institution
description: An educational institution, such as a school or college.

name: Teacher
description: One who instructs a #Student in some area of knowledge or #Skill.

name: Duration
description: Amount of Time during which a #Course runs.

name: Questioner
description: The individual that asks a #Witness questions.

name: Witness
description: A person who is present in a courtroom in order to give some form of evidence, has been sworn in, and is being examined by a #Questioner.

name: Topic
description: The subject matter to which the examination pertains.

name: Time
description: When the examination occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the examination takes place.

name: Manner
description: The manner in which the questioner examines the witness.

name: Means
description: The means by which the #Questioner examines the #Witness.

name: Duration
description: How long the examination takes place.

name: Activity
description: It marks expressions that indicate the #Activity that is being performed habitually or conventionally.

name: Practitioner
description: It marks expressions that indicate whose #Activity is at issue.

name: Culture
description: A #Culture within which the Activity is performed.

name: Place
description: It marks expressions that indicate the #Place in which the #Activity is performed.

name: Descriptor
description: It marks expressions that indicate attributes, traits, or evaluations of the #Activity.

name: Creator
description: An individual or individuals that bring the #Representation into existence.

name: Representation
description: The entity that is created to represent either iconically or abstractly.

name: Time
description: The time at which a #Representation is created.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of the #Creator that also affect the action (deliberately, carefully).

name: Location_of_representation
description: The physical location that holds the #Representation.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Creator intends to accomplish by creating the #Representation.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Creator produces the #Representation.

name: Instrument
description: The entity which the #Creator uses to create the work of art.

name: Means
description: An action performed by the #Creator which brings about the creation of the #Representation.

name: Creator
description: An individual or individuals that bring the #Representation into existence.

name: Represented
description: The entity - which may be a thing, an action or a state - that is represented by the #Representation.

name: Representation
description: The entity produced by the #Creator to evoke in an audience the idea of the #Represented.

name: Time
description: The time at which a #Representation is created.

name: Depictive_of_represented
description: A characterization of the state in which the #Represented entity is presented.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of the #Creator that also affect the action (deliberately, carefully).

name: Material
description: The physical #Material that is used in the production of the #Representation.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Creator intends to accomplish by creating the #Representation.

name: Place
description: The location in which the artist produces the representation.

name: Instrument
description: The entity used by the #Creator to make a #Representation of the #Represented entity.

name: Means
description: The action of the #Creator that allows them to make a #Representation of the #Represented entity.

name: Created_entity
description: It identifies the entity that the agent intentionally creates.

name: Creator
description: The #Creator creates a created entity.

name: Cause
description: An animate or inanimate entity, a force, or event that produces an effect. Volitionality is not a necessary characteristic of #Causes.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which a #Creator intentionally creates a new entity.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which a #Creator intentionally creates a new entity.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the agent intentionally creates the new entity.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when an agent intentionally creates a new entity.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group that is victim of a #Crime.

name: Crime
description: Illegal practice that victimizes the #Tourist.

name: Place
description: Where the #Tourist has been the victim of a #Crime.

name: Duration
description: How long the criminal act lasts.

name: Time
description: When the #Crime happens.

name: Means
description: Actions or means that enable the stay of the #Tourist in a specific place.

name: Source
description: The starting point of trip. Generally, it is the place where the #Tourist lives and to where she will return after the stay at the touristic destination.

name: Manner
description: How the #Crime happens.

name: Means_of_transportation
description: The means of transportation used by the #Tourist during the stay.

name: Description
description: Specific features of the #Crime or of the #Tourist.

name: Suspect
description: The individual which is under suspicion of having committed the #Crime.

name: Perpetrator
description: The individual that commits a #Crime.

name: Crime
description: An act, generally intentional, that matches the description that belongs to an official #Charge.

name: Charge
description: A description of a type of act that is not permissible according to the law of society.

name: Authorities
description: The group which is responsible for the maintenance of law and order, and as such have been given the power to investigate #Crimes, find #Suspects and determine if a #Suspect should be submitted to the Criminal_process.

name: Investigator
description: The #Investigator is the person or agency that investigates a person of a crime.

name: Incident
description: The #Investigator attempts to determine the exact circumstances surrounding the #Incident, which is typically a criminal act (murder, robbery) or the result of such an act (death, loss of money).

name: Suspect
description: It denotes the #Suspect that is investigated by the #Investigator.

name: Time
description: When the #Investigator investigates the #Incident.

name: Court
description: It identifies the court involved in a trial.

name: Defendant
description: The #Defendant is charged with an offense.

name: Judge
description: The #Judge heads the court where arraignment occurs and the case is tried.

name: Prosecution
description: It identifies the attorney(s) prosecuting the #Defendant.

name: Charges
description: It identifies the #Charges brought against the #Defendant.

name: Defense
description: The #Defense represents the interests of the #Defendant.

name: Jury
description: It identifies the people who are charged by the #Court to listen to the testimony, evidence, and arguments, and come to a consensus about the guilt or innocence of the #Defendant.

name: Offense
description: It identifies the #Offense which the #Defendant is accused of committing.

name: Authorities
description: The #Authorities charge the #Suspect with committing a crime, and take him/her into custody.

name: Suspect
description: The #Suspect is taken into custody by the #Authorities, under suspicion of having committed a crime.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the event occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the event occurs.

name: Victim
description: It is the person (or other sentient being or group) that has in some way been harmed or wronged by the #Defendant.

name: Witness
description: A person who is present in a courtroom in order to give some form of evidence, has been sworn in, and is being examined by the #Prosecution or #Defense.

name: Fans
description: Supporters of a team or a #Delegation.

name: Delegation
description: Group of athletes that play a sport.

name: Manner
description: How the crowd behaves during the game.

name: Place
description: Where the crowd watches the games.

name: Time
description: The period of time when the game happens.

name: Crowd
description: The fans of a soccer team.

name: Time
description: When the crowd reacts.

name: Manner
description: How the crowd reacts.

name: Move
description: An action taken by an athlete or by the referee that causes the crowd to react.

name: Participant
description: The athlete, referee or member of the coaching staff who motivates the crowd reaction.

name: Healer
description: It is anyone who treats or cures the #Patient.

name: Patient
description: This is the sufferer of the injury, disease or pain. However, The #Patient may not be expressed as a separate Frame Element but frequently occurs as the possessor of the #Affliction.

name: Affliction
description: It is generally the NP Object of a verb, frequently incorporating the #Patient as a possessor.

name: Treatment
description: It is used for treatments and means, distinguished by separate FEs.

name: Medication
description: The injested, applied, injected, etc. substance designed to cure the #Patient.

name: Body_part
description: The #Body_part is the specific area of the #Patient's body which is treated.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Behavior
description: It marks expressions that indicate the entrenched #Behavior.

name: Protagonist
description: It marks expressions that indicate whose entrenched #Behavior is at issue.

name: Society
description: This Frame Element marks expressions that indicate the society whose entrenched #Behavior is at issue.

name: Domain
description: It marks expressions that indicate the area of human experience to which the #Behavior belongs.

name: Descriptor
description: It marks expressions that indicate attributes, traits, or evaluations of the entrenched #Behavior.

name: Place
description: It marks expressions that indicate a region where the #Behavior is  entrenched.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person cutting the #Item into #Pieces.

name: Item
description: The item which is being cut into #Pieces.

name: Pieces
description: The #Pieces are the parts of the original #Item which are the result of the slicing.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which the #Item is being cut into #Pieces.

name: Place
description: Where the slicing takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which the #Item is being sliced into #Pieces.

name: Time
description: When the slicing occurs.

name: Means
description: An act of the #Agent that accomplishes the slicing.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Item is being cut into #Pieces.

name: Entity
description: Concrete or abstract entity that did not exist, then came into existence, then (potentially) ceased to exist.

name: Protagonist
description: The #Protagonist identifies the being or entity that is dead or alive.

name: Agent
description: The conscious entity, generally a person, that performs the intentional action that results in the damage to the #Patient.

name: Patient
description: The entity which is affected by the #Agent so that it is damaged.

name: Cause
description: An event which leads to the damage of the #Patient.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Patient is damaged.

name: Instrument
description: An entity directed by the #Agent that interacts with a #Patient to accomplish the damage.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the action of damaging which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the damage.

name: Place
description: It identifies the location of the scene where a #Agent damages a #Patient.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Agent damages the #Patient.

name: Agent
description: The individual that performs the #Action, resulting in danger to themselves.

name: Action
description: It denotes the #Action taken by the #Agent.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which the #Action is performed.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Agent dares to perform the #Action.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Agent risks doing the #Action.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the risking action which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Protagonist
description:
#Protagonist identifies the being or entity that is  dead or alive.
<ex><fex name="Prot">Frank</fex> was <t>dead</t>.</ex>

name: Figure
description:
This FE identifies the #Figure or form being described by the target.

<ex>Frank s <t>dead</t> <fex name="Figure">body</fex> was apalling.</ex>

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree to which a #Protagonist is dead or alive.

name: Time
description: The time in which the #Protagonist is dead or alive.

name: Protagonist
description: It is the being or entity that dies.

name: Degree
description: Some measure of the event, generally frequency.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Place
description: It indicates where the death takes place.

name: Time
description: It denotes when the dying or killing occurs.

name: Cause
description:
The situation or event that led directly to the death.

<ex>The cat <t>died</t> <fex name="Explanation">of old age</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The children <t>perished</t> <fex name="Explanation">from hunger</fex>.</ex>
<ex>She <t>died</t> <fex name="Cause">of a fever</fex> .</ex>

name: Victim
description: The #Victim is the target of the deception.

name: Deceiver
description: The #Deceiver attempts to make the #Victim unable to know about or detect the truth about a #Phenomenon or #Topic.

name: Phenomenon
description: The #Phenomenon is presented to the #Victim as a way to mislead about the #Topic.

name: Topic
description: The entity to which the misleading idea relates, what it is about.

name: Time
description: When the deception fails or succeeds.

name: Place
description: The location where the deception fails or succeeds.

name: Victim
description: The #Victim is the target of the deception.

name: Deceiver
description: The #Deceiver attempts to make the #Victim unable to know about or detect the truth about a #Phenomenon or #Topic.

name: Phenomenon
description: The #Phenomenon is presented to the #Victim as a way to mislead about the #Topic.

name: Topic
description: The entity to which the misleading idea relates, what it is about.

name: Deceiver
description: The person who acts so as to give the #Victim an incorrect idea about a #Topic.

name: Victim
description: The person who receives an incorrect idea because of the #Deceiver's actions.

name: Topic
description: The entity to which the misleading idea relates, what it is about.

name: Phenomenon
description: The #Phenomenon, as perceived by the #Victim, causes the #Victim to have an incorrect understanding about a #Topic.

name: Means
description: The action performed by the #Deceiver to fool the #Victim.

name: Time
description: The time at which the deception occurs.

name: Place
description: The location at which the deception occurs.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer decides on a course of action.

name: Decision
description: It identifies the entity or course of action upon which the #Cognizer decides.

name: Possibilities
description: A #Cognizer makes a #Decision from among a set of #Possibilities.

name: Time
description: The time or time period over which the #Cognizer makes the #Decision.

name: Place
description: The place where the #Cognizer makes the decision.

name: Defender
description: This FE is the being or entity that responds forcefully to the #Assailant s attack.

name: Assailant
description: The person (or other self-directed entity) that is attempting physical harm to the #Victim.

name: Victim
description: The individual or entity that is under attack from the #Assailant.

name: Instrument
description: An entity used by the #Defender fend off the #Assailant.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Defender that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Defender that accomplishes their defense of the #Victim.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Defender defends the #Victim from the #Assailant.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Defender takes forceful action against the #Assailant.

name: Material
description: The substance which is altered in some useful way.

name: Degree
description: The amount to which a #Material has undergone processing.

name: Delegation
description: Committe that represents a #Country in a sports event.

name: Country
description: The #Country represented by the #Delegation in a sports event.

name: Item
description: The entity whose scalar property is specified.

name: Variable
description: The scalar property that the #Item possesses.

name: Limit1
description: The first-mentioned possibility of the range of variation.

name: Limit2
description: The second item of the range of variation.

name: Limits
description: The range of positions on the scale that the #Item occupies.

name: Degree
description: The deviation of the Upper_limit and the Lower_limit from each other (and thus from some single value).

name: Duration
description: A quantity or other characterization of the #State's absolute duration.

name: State
description: An ongoing state whose duration can be measured.

name: Deliverer
description: This is the person who completes the movement of the #Theme after having transported it.

name: Goal
description: The end of the path and intended goal of the sending.

name: Theme
description: The objects being delivered.

name: Recipient
description: This is the #Recipient of the sent #Theme.

name: Vehicle
description: The vehicle employed by the #Deliverer.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the delivery event  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Deliverer that affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose of the delivery.

name: Time
description: When the delivery takes place.

name: Place
description: The location at which the delivery takes place.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed at which the #Deliverer delivers the #Theme.

name: Source
description: The location of the #Theme before the delivery process begins.

name: Means
description: The #Means are intermediate actions performed by the #Deliverer in order to move the package to the #Goal.

name: Path
description: The path along which the #Theme moves while being delivered.

name: Action
description: The #Action is what the #Protagonist seeks to do, but is ordered not to.

name: Authority
description: The #Authority orders the #Protagonist to not engage in a particular #Action.

name: Protagonist
description: The #Protagonist wants to engage in an #Action, but is ordered not to by the #Authority.

name: Means
description: The action performed by an #Authority that brings about the denying or granting permission.

name: Theme
description: This is the object which moves. It may be an entity which moves under its own power, but it need not be. <ex><fex name="Theme">The officer</fex> <t>left</t> the house.</ex>

name: Source
description: All the verbs in this frame express some change of location, away from one place and to another. Any constituent that expresses the initial position of the #Theme, before the change of location, is tagged with #Source. Often the #Source is understood from context. <ex>The woman <t>left</t>. <fex name="Source">DNI</fex></ex> <ex>The woman <t>left</t> <fex name="Source">the house</fex>.</ex><ex>We <t>departed</t> <fex name="Source">from New York</fex> on Friday.</ex>

name: Path
description:
Any description of the trajectory of the departure which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal expresses the frame element #Path.  In this frame, #Path expressions almost always have a sense meaning  via . 
<ex>Spiderman <t>left</t> <fex name="Path">through the window</fex>.</ex>

name: Goal
description: This FE labels any expression which tells where the #Theme ends up, or would end up, as a result of departing from the #Source. <ex>Our visitors <t>left</t> <fex name="Goal">for Los Angeles</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, and many other things count as #Manner expressions, though #Speed and #Means should be tagged using the more specific FE labels. <ex>The messenger <t>left</t> the room <fex name="Manner">clumsily</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description: The action of the #Theme which results in its departure. <ex>He <t>retreated</t> from his opponent <fex name="Means">by taking a quick leap backwards</fex>.</ex>

name: Speed
description: This frame element labels words or phrases that describe how quickly the #Theme is moving. <ex>He <fex name="Speed">quickly</fex> <t>exited</t> the crowded terminal.</ex>

name: Mode_of_transportation
description:
The #Mode_of_transportation expresses how the motion of the #Theme is effected, by its body or by a vehicle which holds and conveys the #Theme. Vehicles can move in any way and in any medium. 

In this frame, #Mode_of_transportation is often expressed obliquely in a prepositional phrase headed by  in  or  by .

<ex>We <t>set</t> <t>out</t> <fex name="Mode_of_transportation">by boat</fex> for Nova Scotia.
</ex><ex>Wilbur <t>departed</t> <fex name="Mode_of_transportation">on foot</fex> for London.</ex>

name: Distance
description: The distance that the #Theme has traveled. <ex>He <t>withdrew</t> <fex name="Distance">a little</fex> from her. </ex>

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the departure takes place.<ex>We <t>left</t> <fex name="Time">in the morning</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: The #Place is the location in which the departing takes place.

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the #Purpose for which the #Theme departs from the #Source.

name: State_of_affairs
description: An Eventuality or an Entity that is taken to constitute sufficient reason for taking another #Action.

name: Action
description: An #Action that is taken to be justifiable given the #State_of_Affairs.

name: Degree
description: How sufficiently #State_of_affairs can be considered a reason for the #Action.

name: Domain
description: The general spectrum of reasoning along which the #State_of_affairs is a justification.

name: Evaluee
description: The #Evaluee is being judged for its quality.

name: Parameter
description: It marks expressions that denote a scalar property of the #Evaluee with respect to which the #Evaluee is judged.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the  #Degree to which the #Evaluee is judged good or bad.

name: State_of_affairs
description: The #State_of_affairs that the speaker finds desirable.

name: Purpose
description: The event or state of affairs that is achieved by bringing about the desirable #State_of_affairs.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the specified desirability of the #State_of_affairs deviates from the expected desirability.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer is the person (or sentient being) who wishes for the #Event to occur.

name: Event
description: The change that the #Experiencer would like to see.

name: Focal_participant
description: This is the entity that the #Experiencer wishes to be affected by some #Event.

name: Location_of_event
description: The #Location_of_event is the place involved in the desired #Event.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree is a the extent of the #Experiencer's Desiring.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Experiencer desires something.

name: Purpose_of_event
description: The #Purpose_of_event is the purpose pertaining to the desired #Event.

name: Time_of_event
description: The time that the #Event would ideally occur.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the #Experiencer desires something.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place. Note that this FE is of extremely rare occurrence in this frame.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which the #Experiencer has desired something.

name: Role_of_focal_participant
description: It is a role filled by a #Focal_participant in the #Event that the #Experiencer desires.

name: State_of_affairs
description: The #State_of_affairs that is destined to occur to the #Protagonist.

name: Protagonist
description: The #Protagonist is the one for whom the future #State_of_affairs is destined.

name: Role
description: The #Role filled by the #Protagonist in his/her destiny.

name: Time
description: The time for which the #Protagonist's future is determined.

name: Place
description: The location in which #State_of_affairs is destined to occur to the #Protagonist.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #State_of_affairs is destined to occur to the #Protagonist.

name: Destroyer
description: The conscious entity, generally a person, that performs the intentional action that results in the #Patient's destruction.

name: Patient
description: The entity which is destroyed by the #Destroyer.

name: Cause
description: The event or entity which is responsible for the destruction of the #Patient.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the destruction is completed.

name: Instrument
description: An entity directed by the #Destroyer that interacts with a #Patient to accomplish the #Patient's destruction.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the process of destruction which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Destroyer that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Destroyer that accomplishes the destruction.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Destroyer destroys the #Patient.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Destroyer destroys the #Patient.

name: Medium
description: It expresses the #Medium in which the #Patient is destroyed by the #Cause or #Destroyer. This FE is generally used in Metaphorical uses of this frame.

name: Agent
description: The individual that causes the #Item and #Source to come apart by manipulating the connector.

name: Item
description: It identifies the #Item that the #Agent detaches from the #Source.

name: Source
description: It identifies the location to which an #Item was attached before getting detached.

name: Items
description: It identifies the plural #Items that are detached from each other, resulting in their separation.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an #Agent detaches an #Item or #Items.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the detaching event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Agent that affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the #Agent detaches an #Item or #Items.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the #Agent detaches the #Item from the #Source.

name: Instrument
description: It identifies the #Instrument with which an #Agent detaches an #Item or #Items. Typically, it transmits the force applied by the #Agent, and is not left behind as a participant in the resultant state.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the #Item ends up detached.

name: Authorities
description: The #Authorities hold the #Suspect in custody.

name: Suspect
description: It identifies the person who is taken into custody and held, under suspicion of having committed a crime.

name: Charges
description: It identifies the crime with which the #Suspect is charged.

name: Place
description: Where is the detaining place.

name: Time
description: When the detaining occurs.

name: Holding_location
description: It identifies the place where the #Suspect is confined.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the length of time that the #Suspect spends in confinement.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent detonates the #Explosive.

name: Explosive
description: The #Explosive causes damage to surrounding objects when operated by the #Agent.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Agent detonates the #Explosive.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which an #Agent detonates the #Explosive.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Agent detonates the #Explosive.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an #Agent detonates the #Explosive.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Instrument
description: An implement used by the #Agent to detonate the #Explosive.

name: Victim
description: The #Victim (typically an individual or structure) is targeted by the explosion or inadvertently damaged by the explosion.

name: Pacient
description: Pacient

description: Health_professional

name: Cognizer
description: It is the person (or other sentient being) who potentially determines that two #Phenomena are distinct from each other.

name: Phenomenon_1
description: The phenomena that are potentially judged to be different from one another can be expressed as separate constituents.

name: Phenomenon_2
description: The phenomenon expressed less prominently.

name: Phenomena
description: Both phenomena that are potentially judged to be different from one another can be expressed jointly by the same constituent.

name: Quality
description: This is a property that is potentially used by the #Cognizer to distinguish one phenomenon from another.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Cognizer that allows them to differentiate the #Phenomena.

name: Activity
description: It marks expressions indicating the #Activity that the #Experiencer finds difficult or easy. In many cases, the relevant #Activity has to be inferred from the context.

name: Experiencer
description: It marks expressions that indicate which person judges carrying out the #Activity to be easy or difficult.

name: Degree
description: It marks expressions that indicate the #Degree of difficulty that the #Experiencer has in carrying out the #Activity.

name: Parameter
description: It marks expressions that indicate a respect in which the #Activity is judged easy or difficult to carry out by the #Experiencer.

name: Standard
description: The experience of the #Activity by the #Experiencer may be compared to a #Standard situation, which may be evoked either as an event or state, or by reference to a salient participant.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Activity takes place.

name: Dimension
description: It identifies the #Dimension which is measured.  Most LUs in this frame incorporate the #Dimension.

name: Object
description: The #Object identifies the item which is measured along one of its #Dimensions.

name: Measurement
description: The #Measurement identifies the extent of the #Object along the specified #Dimension.

name: Degree
description: FOR REFRAMING!

name: Establishment
description: It refers to places (snack bars, restaurants) and food services (meals) that are offered in a particular place of interest to the tourist.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group who uses the dining services.

name: Place
description: Where the tourist buys the food.

name: Type
description: The kind of dining service or establishment.

name: Landmark
description: The point of reference from which the rest of the #Path is reckoned.

name: Path
description: The one-dimensional set of locations.

name: Domain
description: The kind of space in which the set of points of the #Path is defined.

name: Independent_variable
description: The one-dimensional variable with respect to which the positions on the #Path are reckoned. For normal motion, the positions on the #Path are with respect to time.

name: Ground
description: The #Ground serves as a basis for describing the location of the #Figure.

name: Figure
description: The #Figure is perceived as located relative to a certain #Ground location in a certain direction specified by the particular LU. The #Figure can be an entity or an event.

name: Time
description: The period of time during which the locative relation between #Figure and #Ground obtains.

name: Opponent
description: The athlete from the opposing team who suffers the foul.

name: Infractor
description: The athlete who violates a rule of the game.

name: Place
description: Area of the venue in which the foul takes place.

name: Time
description: When the foul takes place.

name: Type
description: The kind of foul.

name: Condition
description: The deficiency itself of some bodily function (whether physical, sensory, mental and/or intellectual nature) that may result in limitations and/or disabilities.

name: Individual
description: The person affected by some #Condition.

name: Degree
description: Level of disability measured by physical, biological and/or social criteria.

name: Manifestation
description: Moment in which the disability manifests itself in the #Individual, and may be congenital (before birth) or acquired (after birth).

name: Tipo
description: Especifica o tipo de deficiência ou parte do corpo afetada.

name: Causa
description: Causa

name: Disaster
description: An event of great proportional magnitude with evidence leaving blame to which only the stars might answer. A disaster is an indisputably ill-fated occurrence.

name: Responder
description: The individual or group that is responding to a disaster with directed action.

name: Victim
description: The #Victim (typically a large group) which is affected by the disaster event.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Disaster occurs.

name: Response
description: Directed action leading to recovery, rescue, or general mitigation of distress due to an ensuing disaster.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the disaster scenario occurs.

name: Duration
description: The length of time between the instantiation of the #Disaster and the conclusion of the #Response.

name: Interlocutor_1
description: In cases where the #Interlocutors involved in a conversation are construed as two separate groups with different levels of volitionality or control, this FE identifies the conversational participant with greater semantic and syntactic prominence, as compared with #Interlocutor_2. That is, #Interlocutor_1 is generally encoded as Subject, and peripheral FEs that do not make reference to the event itself generally make reference to #Interlocutor_1.  Thus a #Purpose (or #Means, #Depictive, or #Manner) is construed to be that of #Interlocutor_1, not necessarily that of #Interlocutor_2 or the group of #Interlocutors as a whole.

name: Interlocutor_2
description: In cases where the #Interlocutors involved in a conversation are construed as two separate groups with different levels of volitionality or control, #Interlocutor_2 refers to the semantically and grammatically less prominent group.

name: Interlocutors
description: In some sentences both participants are expressed by the subject. In some sentences, the subject is assigned the #Interlocutors. In such sentences, the subject always denotes more than one person, and it is understood that the reciprocal communication takes place between these two (or more) people. The subject may denote two or more people either through conjunction or through plurality, or by denoting a group. In each of these cases the #Interlocutors is assigned.

name: Topic
description: It expresses the subject that the #Interlocutors are trying to come to some agreement about.  It may refer, for example, to an undesirable issue that the #Interlocutors want to have the proper response to, or it may refer more directly to an unresolved question.

name: Language
description: The linguistic system(s) used by the #Interlocutors to discuss something.

name: Amount_of_discussion
description: It applies to phrases expressing how thoroughly a #Topic has been discussed.

name: Manner
description: It marks phrases that express the #Manner in which one or both of the #Interlocutors communicate.

name: Means
description: It marks constituents expressing the means the parties to the conversation use to talk to each other.

name: Duration
description: The #Duration of the conversation.

name: Purpose
description: The goal that #Interlocutor_1 or the #Interlocutors jointly have, i.e. the state of affairs that they wish to bring about by the conversation.

name: Time
description: The time at which the discussion takes place.

name: Place
description: The location at which a discussion takes place.

name: Means_of_communication
description: The device or system that facilitates a discussion.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group that is affected by a #Disease during the touristic activity.

name: Disease
description: Physical or psychological harm that affects the #Tourist when staying at a #Place.

name: Place
description: Where #Tourist falls ill.

name: Duration
description: How long the #Disease lasts.

name: Time
description: When the #Disease appears.

name: Source
description: The starting point of trip. Generally, it is the place where the #Tourist lives and to where she will return after the stay at the touristic destination.

name: Manner
description: How the illness happens.

name: Description
description: Specific features of the #Disease or of the #Tourist.

name: Type
description: Kind or cause of the #Disease.

name: Traveller
description: The #Traveller is the entity which disembarks from the #Vehicle.

name: Vehicle
description: The #Vehicle is the means of conveyance that the #Traveller disembarks from.

name: Manner
description: It describes a property of the motion not related to its trajectory.

name: Path
description: It describes the trajectory of the #Traveller's motion off or out of the #Vehicle.

name: Time
description: When the disembarking of the #Vehicle takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Traveller disembarks from the vehicle.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Traveller disembarks from the #Vehicle.

name: Goal
description: The location that the #Traveller reaches by leaving the #Vehicle.

name: State_of_affairs
description: The entity or event which brings disgrace upon the #Protagonist.

name: Protagonist
description: The person or organization responsible for the occurrence of the #State_of_affairs.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #State_of_affairs diverges from the social norm for things of its kind.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent disperses or scatters the #Individuals.

name: Individuals
description: The #Individuals are scattered by the #Agent.

name: Cause
description: An event or force that causes that #Individuals to disperse.

name: Source
description: It is the relatively confined space from which an #Agent scatters the #Individuals.

name: Goal_area
description: It identifies the broader space to which the #Agent scatters the #Individuals.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the dispersing event  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). With agentive uses, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (eagerly, carefully).

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Individuals are dispersed.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the dispersal.

name: Path
description: The trajectory along which the #Individuals move.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the dispersing event happens.

name: Distance
description: The distance that the #Individuals move from their original location, the #Source.

name: Speed
description: The rate of motion of the #Individuals, usually in terms of how long it takes for them to leave the #Source and end up in the #Goal_area.

name: Count
description: The number of #Units of the linear extent.

name: Unit
description: The standardized quantity in terms of which other quantities of the same kind are measured.

name: Location_1
description: The location of the end of the line or curve measuring distance. It is distinct from #Location_2 in being more topical.

name: Location_2
description: The location of the end of the line or curve measuring distance. It is distinct from #Location_1 in being less topical.

name: Locations
description: The pair or group of locations that delimit the line or curve that measures the #Distance.

name: Distance
description: The measure of a line or curve from #Location_1 to #Location_2, either quantified by a #Count of #Units or implicitly characterized by the #Degree of deviation from expectation.

name: Dimension
description: It marks constituents which express what property is being measured.

name: Degree
description: The amount to which the #Distance differs from expectation.

name: Bomb
description: The #Bomb is set off by the #Detonator at a distance, injuring or damaging a #Target.

name: Use
description: The type of activity that the #Bomb is generally involved in.  Often this can be considered a kind of #Type specification also.

name: Type
description: It indicates what subtype of the general category the #Bomb belongs to.

name: Material
description: The substance that makes up the #Bomb.

name: Detonator
description: The person that wishes to attack the #Target and who activates the #Bomb.

name: Part
description: It identifies a part of the #Bomb. This includes parts that aid in the detonation or damaging, or mere attachments.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to the #Bomb.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which a #Bomb comes into existence.

name: Creator
description: The individual or group responsible for the creation of the #Bomb.

name: Descriptor
description: A description or characteristic of the #Bomb not covered by more specific FEs.

name: Target
description: The intended or actual target of the #Bomb.

name: Feature
description: The aspect of the #Entity which makes it different from the other members of its class.

name: Entity
description: The item which differs from other members of its class in the #Feature's value.

name: Theme
description: It covers or fills the #Location.

name: Location
description: It is the object or area that the #Theme fills or covers.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree of abundance with which the #Theme covers or fills the #Location.

name: Time
description: The time during which the #Theme and the #Location are positioned relative to each other.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme in this frame is the object which is described as standing in some spatial relation to a particular #Location. #Theme typically occurs as the External Argument or, with passives, as a PP Complement headed by with or by.

name: Location
description: It is the entity or area with respect to which the #Theme s spatial arrangement is described.  This frame element generally occurs as an NP Object.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Theme occupies the #Location.

name: Group
description: It marks constituents that express the set of objects or types whose diversity is at issue.

name: Dimension
description: It marks constituents which express a property in respect to which the similarity of the #Group is assessed.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the members of the #Group are similar to each other, in general or with respect to some #Dimension.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the #Group is diverse or homogenous.

name: Place
description: The #Place is the general area in which diversity occurs or exists.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which #Dimension is similar or different.

name: Bearer
description: The holder of the document.

name: Issuer
description: The authority that issues the document.

name: Obligation
description: It is the obligation that is imposed on the #Bearer of the #Document.

name: Right
description: It is the right of the #Bearer of the #Document that is authorized by the #Document.

name: Status
description: It is the state of the #Bearer of the #Document indicated by the #Document.

name: Document
description: It is the piece of paper that has the legal status.

name: Medium
description: The language the #Document is written in, or a specification of the kind of object that instantiates it.

name: Dodger
description: The #Dodger acts to avoid an oncoming #Bad_entity.

name: Bad_entity
description: The #Bad_entity is  the oncoming entity to avoid.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the dodging occurs.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the dodging occurs.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the dodging occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time at which the dodging occurs.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the #Purpose for which the dodging occurs.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the dodging occurs.

name: Predicate
description: It denotes the #Predicate which is applied to the #Domain.

name: Domain
description: It applies to the #Domain in which the #Predicate is said to apply.

name: Explanation
description: It denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent controls the #Patient by being forceful and possibly aggressive.

name: Patient
description: The #Patient is trying to gain control of a situation, but ends up being subject to the control and influence of the #Agent.

name: Situation
description: The #Situation within which the #Agent is able to gain control over the #Patient (thus excluding them from controlling the #Situation).

name: Duration
description: The period of time over which the domination occurs.

name: Manner
description: A description of the event as a whole, or of any of the participants that does not fit any of the other more specific Frame Elements.

name: Place
description: The place where the domination occurs.

name: Time
description: The time when the domination takes place.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Agent dominates the #Patient.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the most forceful and pivotal factor in the situation.

name: Situation
description: The #Situation is primarily affected by the #Agent, in particular how it develops or concludes.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Agent is dominant.

name: Duration
description: The period of time over which the domination occurs.

name: Place
description: The location where the domination takes place.

name: Manner
description: A description of the event as a whole, or of any of the participants that does not fit any of the other more specific Frame Elements.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Agent dominates the #Situation.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent has a controlling position in the #Situation.

name: Situation
description: The #Situation is primarily affected by the #Agent, in particular how it develops or concludes.

name: Competitor
description: The #Competitors are trying to gain control of a situation, but end up being subject to the control and influence of the #Agent.

name: Time
description: The time when the domination takes place.

name: Place
description: The location of the domination.

name: Manner
description: The manner of the domination.

name: Duration
description: The length of time over which the domination takes place.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Agent dominates.

name: Dough
description: The paste made out of any cereals (grains) or leguminous crops by grinding, with some water added, which expands in volume as a result of leavening before baking.

name: Duration_of_activity
description: The length of the interval during which the #Dough rises.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the expansion of the #Dough takes place.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed at which the #Dough expands.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the rising of the #Dough  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Size_change
description: The amount by which the volume of the #Dough increases.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent forces the #Patient to come to the ground.

name: Patient
description: The #Patient is the entity that is being forced to the ground.

name: Cause
description: An event which causes the #Patient to come to the ground.

name: Means
description: An act performed by an #Agent that enables them to force the #Patient to the ground.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Time
description: The time at which the event takes place.

name: Place
description: The location at which the event takes place.

name: Instrument
description: An object used by the #Agent to facilitate bringing down the #Patient.

name: Wearer

description: It is used for the item of clothing that the #Wearer ends up wearing.

name: Body_location
description: The body part that the #Clothing ends up covering.

name: Means
description: The #Means is an act whereby the #Wearer puts on the #Clothing.

name: Visitor
description: The #Visitor arrives at the Host_location to visit the #Host for a #Purpose.

name: Host
description: The #Host is the person highly associated with the goal location of the #Visitor, and who allows the #Visitor onto his/her territory, and possibly to make use of available resources. The #Host and #Visitor and in a host-guest relationship.

name: Host_location
description: The #Host_location is a place primarily associated with the #Host.

name: Normal_location
description: #Normal_location is any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion. While #Normal_location expressions are possible in this frame, they are relatively infrequent.  If present, they often express a general direction from which a #Visitor moves, rather than a landmark away from which it moves.

name: Path
description: #Path is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Normal_location nor the #Host or Host_location.  In this frame, #Path expressions almost always have a via-sense.

name: Manner
description: A #Manner expression  describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion.  Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an #Visitor arrives.

name: Mode_of_transportation
description: The #Mode_of_transportation expresses how the motion of the #Visitor is effected, by its body or by a vehicle which holds and conveys the #Visitor.   Vehicles can move in any way and in any medium. They are usually expressed obliquely with  in  or  by .

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when arriving occurs.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which the #Visitor arrives at a location associated with the #Host.

name: Frequency
description: The frequency with which the #Visitor drops in on a #Host.

name: Duration
description: The length of time that the #Visitor remains with the #Host.

name: Place
description: The larger area within which the visiting takes place.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent places the #Theme into a #Substance.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme temporarily goes partially or completely into the #Substance.

name: Substance
description: The #Substance is the fluid into which the #Theme is placed. This may be metonymically represented by the container of the fluid.

name: Manner
description: The way that the #Agent puts #Theme in the #Substance.

name: Time
description: The location in time when the dunking occurs.

name: Creator
description: The #Creator produces the #Copy based on the #Original.

name: Original
description: The #Original is the entity which is copied.

name: Copy
description: The #Copy produced by the #Creator is frequently not expressed.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the location from which material is copied, i.e. the location of the #Original. Unlike the FE #Source in other domains and frames, there is no actual movement of either #Copy or #Original from this location.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Creator that lets them bring about the duplication.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which an intentional act is performed.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which an intentional act is performed.

name: Fidelity
description: The way in which the #Copy matches or does not match the #Original.

name: Eventuality
description: A situation, action or event whose duration is being described.  The Eventuality occurs as the External Argument if the adjective is used predicatively, or as the modified noun if the adjective is used attributively.

name: Period
description: Sometimes these adjectives describe simply a period of time, rather than an event or state.  The Period almost invariably occurs as the modified noun with an attributive adjective.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Eventuality
description: A situation, action or event whose duration is being described.

name: Period
description: Sometimes a period of time, rather than an event or state is described.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time that the #Eventuality, #Period, or #Entity lasts.

name: Entity
description: An item which is metonymically related to an #Eventuality. Some common eventualities that are metonymically entailed are the effect of the entity in its capacity as an instrument and the existence of the entity.

name: Period
description: The #Period whose the duration #Attribute is appropriate and under consideration.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of an #Period which is under discussion, namely the duration.

name: Duration
description: A quantity or other characterization of the #Period's absolute duration.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Duration from the norm.

name: Unit
description: A standard measure, having a known duration.

name: Count
description: The number of #Units which are equivalent to the #Duration of the #Period .

name: Event
description: A process whose duration is measured.

name: Protagonist
description: It is the being or entity that dies.

name: Place
description: The location where the dying event happens.

name: Time
description: When the dying event occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Entity
description: Concrete or abstract entity

name: Event
description: Name of the event which occurs.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Action
description: The #Action that exerts an energy of the level specified by the target.

name: Exerter
description: The #Exerter which exerts an energy of the level specified by the target.

name: Force
description: The #Force that exerts an energy of the level specified by the target.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Exerter, #Action, or #Force exerts its energy.

name: Domain
description: The #Domain is the field in which the #Exerter, #Action, or #Force exerts its energy.

name: Earner
description: The #Earner is involved in a transaction or set of transactions as the party that receives payment.

name: Earnings
description: The #Earnings are the money given to the #Earner in a transaction, generally in exchange for #Goods.

name: Buyer
description: The #Buyer is the source of the #Earnings of the #Earner.

name: Goods
description: It is anything including labor or time, for example, which is exchanged for #Earnings in a transaction.

<ex><fex name="end">The hot dog stand</fex> <fex name="pla">on 4th avenue</fex> <t>flopped</t>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The #Manner describes the way in which the #Endeavor failed.

<ex><fex name="exp">Because of its lack of funding</fex>, <fex name="end">the website</fex> <fex name="man">quickly</fex> <t>flopped</t>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Endeavor fails.

name: Means
description: The means by which the #Endeavor fails.

name: Rule
description:
The #Rule is the set of constrants on behavior that the #Agent implements (i.e., forces others to obey or face consequences).

<ex>Employers should strictly <t>enforce</t> <fex name="Rule">a prohibition against use of any substance that may affect a worker s physical or mental ability</fex>.</ex>

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent, often an institution, governmental organization, or arm thereof, puts into effect (i.e., enforces) a #Rule.

<ex>Can <fex name="Agent">a landlord</fex> <target>enforce</target> rules upon tenants?</ex>

name: Medium
description:
This FE describes the medium through which the rule was enforced.  It may occur in the same syntactic position as the Agent.
<ex>The rules will be <t>enforced</t> <fex name="Medium">by a new computer system that tracks people s movements</fex>.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The length of time for which the #Rule is or is not in effect.

<ex>The coat-and-tie dress code for the Plimsoll Club in the World Trade Center was strictly <t>enforced</t> <fex name="dur">for years</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time at which the Agent enforces the #Rule.

<ex>That particular regulation was only <t>enforced</t> <fex name="tim">in 1920</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place at which the #Rule is or is not enforced.

<ex>For this reason they <t>enforced</t> the settlement system <fex name="place">in America</fex> just as strictly as in Germany.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The #Manner describes some state of the #Agent, or provides additional characterization of the event.

<ex>The coat-and-tie dress code for the Plimsoll Club in the World Trade Center was <fex name="Manner">strictly</fex> <t>enforced</t> for years.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The #Means is an intermediate action done by the #Agent in order to enforce the #Rule.

<ex>Since 1961 the church has <t>enforced</t> it <fex name="mea">by "disfellowshipping" or expelling un-repentant members who wilfully accept prohibited blood components</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the #Purpose for which the #Agent enforces the #Rule.

name: Judge
description: The judge of the court in which the accused enters a plea.

name: Accused
description:
The person entering the plea in court.
<ex><fex name="Accused">Joy Peterson</fex> <t>pleaded</t> <fex name="Plea">innocent</fex> <fex name="Charges">to the murder of his son</fex>.</ex>

name: Charges
description:
The crime with which the Accused is charged
<ex><fex name="Accused">Simpson</fex> <t>pleaded</t> <fex name="Plea">not guilty</fex> <fex name="Charges">to the murder of his wife</fex>.</ex>

name: Plea
description: The #Plea that a defendant makes. ex:The student pleaded guilty to stealing a bike.

name: Court
description: The #Court is the institution before which the plea is entered.

name: Agent
description: The person who removes the #Information.

name: Information
description: The thing that the #Agent removes from the #Document.

name: Cause
description: A non-agentive entity that removes the #Information.

name: Document
description: The collection of pieces of information from which the specific #Information is removed.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Agent or #Cause removes the #Information from the #Document.

name: Escapee
description:
The #Escapee manages to leave the #Undesirable_location.
<ex><fex name="Escapee">Benjamin</fex> <t>escaped</t> from Germany.</ex>

name: Undesirable_location
description:
The <fex name="">Undesirable_location</fex> is where the Escapee begins.

<ex>Benjamin <t>escaped</t> <fex name="Undesirable_location"> from Germany</fex>.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
#Goal identifies any expression which tells where the Escapee ends up, or would end up, as a result of the motion. 
<ex>Benjamin <t>escaped</t> <fex name="Goal">to the United States</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
<fex name="Means"></fex> covers any act performed by the #Escapee brings about the escape. 

<ex>Benjamin <t>escaped</t> from Germany <fex name="Means">by bribing the border guards</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
#Manner is used for any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion, including descriptions of steadiness, grace, means of motion, etc.

<ex>Benjamin <t>escaped</t> from Germany <fex name="Manner">with difficulty</fex>.</ex>

name: Speed
description:
#Speed idenitifies the rate at which the escaping occurs.

<ex>Benjmain <fex name="Speed">speedily</fex> <t>escaped</t>  from Germany.</ex>

name: Vehicle
description:
#Vehicle identifies the means of conveyance by which the #Escapee leaves the #Undesirable_location.

<ex>Benjamin <t>escaped</t> <fex name="Vehicle">in a lorrie</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the escaping occurs.

name: Purpose
description:
This FE identifies the #Purpose for which the escaping takes place.
<ex>Benjamin <t>escaped</t> from Germany <fex name="Purpose">to rsave his life</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the Escaping occurs.

name: Path
description:
#Path describes the trajectory of motion of the #Escapee.

<ex>Benjmain <t>escaped</t> from Germany <fex name="Path">along the southern border</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
This FE identifies the (abstract) nearness of the #Escapee to being caught in the #Undesirable_location.

<ex>Benjamin s <fex name="Degr">narrow</fex> <t>escape</t> from Germany left him fearful.</ex>

name: Distance
description:
The distance along a path away from the #Undesirable_location that the #Escapee travels.

<ex>She <t>escaped</t> <fex name="dis">a few feet</fex> away, then looked back at him coldly.</ex>

name: Speed

name: Standard_item

name: Degree

name: Exchanger_1
description: In cases where the #Exchangers involved in a conversation areconstrued as two separate groups with different levels ofvolitionality or control, this FE identifies the conversationalparticipant with greater semantic and syntactic prominence, ascompared with #Exchanger_2. That is, #Exchanger_1 is generallyencoded as Subject, and peripheral FEs that do not make referenceto the event itself generally make reference to #Exchanger_1. Thus a #Purpose (or #Means, #Depictive, or #Manner) is construed to be that of #Exchanger_1, not necessarily that of #Exchanger_2 or the groupof #Exchangers as a whole.

name: Exchanger_2
description: In cases where the #Exchangers involved in a conversation areconstrued as two separate groups with different levels ofvolitionality or control, #Exchanger_2 refers to the semanticallyand grammatically less prominent group. It is generally encodedwithin a prepositional phrase. Note that itis possible for a single role to correspond to multiple referents.

name: Exchangers
description: In some sentences both participants are expressed by the Subject. In sentences like this, the Subject is assigned the FE role #Exchangers. In such sentences, the Subject always denotes more than one person, and it is understood that the reciprocal communication takes place between these two (or more) people. The Subject may denote two or more people either through conjunction, or through plurality or by denoting a group. In each of these cases the FE #Exchangers is assigned.
