description: It identifies the #Size_change of an #Item.

name: Rate
description: It identifies the #Rate of change of the value.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of time that the expansion takes.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the expansion occurs.

name: Co-variable
description: It is the quantity that varies commensurately with the size of the #Item, usually construed to be causally linked to the size.

name: Manner
description: It is used for any description of the #Manner of the expansion including force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the expansion occurs.

name: Path
description: It is used for any expression that gives information about points on the scale of size that the #Item traverses between the starting and ending point of its movement.

name: Goal
description: Where the #Item ends up due to expansion.

name: Cognizer
description: It is the person who believes some #Phenomenon will take place in the future.

name: Phenomenon
description: This is what the #Cognizer believes will happen in the future.

name: Topic
description: An entity that serves as the focus of a predicted #Phenomenon.

name: Degree
description: It is the #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Manner
description: It is the #Manner of performing an action.

name: Evidence
description: Words in this frame may express the #Evidence on which knowledge or belief is based.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Cognizer foresees the #Phenomenon.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Cognizer makes the prediction.

name: Time_of_phenomenon
description: The time that the #Cognizer expects the #Phenomenon to occur. Note that it is distinct from simple #Time, which is when the #Cognizer is actually involved in thinking about the #Phenomenon.

name: Location
description: The #Location is the place of business or residence prototypically occupied by the #Person.

name: Person
description: The #Person is located in or at a place that they customarily occupy.

name: Resource
description: The #Resource is exhausted over time by being used.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent uses the #Resource.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Resource is depleted by the #Agent.

name: Purpose
description: The #Agent uses the #Resource for a #Purpose.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Agent exhausts the #Resource.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an #Agent exhausts the #Resource.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Agent exhausts the #Resource.

name: Goods
description: It is the item whose price is being assessed.

name: Payer
description: The person whose #Asset is given up in order to achieve an #Intended_event.

name: Asset
description: The price of or payment made for the #Goods.

name: Intended_event
description: The event that the #Payer brings about by deploying the #Asset.

name: Origin
description: The place where a transaction would take place, generally where #Goods and services are created or sold.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which #Goods are cheap or expensive.

name: Time
description: The time when a transaction takes place.

name: Rate
description: The amount of an #Asset relative to some measure of the #Goods.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer experiences the emotion or other internal state.

name: Content
description: It is what the #Experiencer's feelings or experiences are directed towards or based upon. The #Content differs from a stimulus because the #Content is not construed as being direcly responsible for causing the emotion.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the area about which the #Experiencer has the particular experience.

name: Event
description: The #Event is the occasion or happening that #Experiencers in a certain emotional state participate in.

name: Expressor
description: It marks expressions that indicate a body part, gesture or other expression of the #Experiencer that reflect his or her emotional state.

name: State
description: The #State is the abstract noun that describes a more lasting experience by the #Experiencer.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the experience occurs.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Experiencer is in the specified emotional state.

name: Body_part
description: The location on the body of the #Experiencer where the bodily injury takes place.

name: Experiencer
description: The being or entity that is injured.

name: Manner
description: It is the #Manner in which the injury takes place.

name: Place
description: The place where the harming event occurs.

name: Time
description: The time when the harming event occurs.

name: Injuring_entity
description: The #Experiencer injures him/herself on an #Injuring_entity.

name: Severity
description: The extent to which the #Experiencer is affected by the injury.

name: Duration
description: The period of time during which the #Experiencer repeatedly receives bodily injuries.

name: Experimenter
description: The #Experimenter is the individual conducting the #Experiment.

name: Control_group
description: The group of entities in the #Experiment which have not been treated and are compared to the #Treatment_group or #Treated_individual.

name: Control_group_member
description: An individual entity of the #Experiment which is left untreated and then compared with the #Treatment_group or the #Treated_individual.

name: Treatment_group
description: A group of subjects that receive treatment and are compared to the #Control_group or controlled individuals.

name: Treated_individual
description: An individual subject that receives treatment and is then compared to the #Control_group or #Controlled_group_member.

name: Experiment
description: The test or #Experiment conducted by the #Experimenter using a #Control_group and a #Treatment_group.

name: Hypothesis
description: The #Hypothesis is a conjecture as to the result of an #Experiment. The #Experiment takes place in order to prove the #Hypothesis as correct or incorrect.

name: Subjects
description: In this frame #Control_group and #Treatment_group can be combined and expressed as #Subjects. This FE can also be used for a generic individual on whom the #Experiment is being conducted.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the subject that the #Experiment is studying.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time the #Experiment lasts.

name: Place
description: The #Place in which the #Experiment is conducted.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Experimenter conducts the #Experiment.

name: Phenomenon
description: A property that belongs to either the #Control_group or the #Treatment_group.

name: Result
description: The #Result depicts the outcome of the #Experiment.

name: Descriptor
description: A #Descriptor identifies a characteristic or description of the #Experiment or the subjects not captured by any other frame element.

name: Instrument
description: A tool used in conducting the #Experiment.

name: Protagonist
description: The person whose expertise is assessed.

name: Skill
description: It identifies the #Protagonist's talent or ability to do things with one's hand or body.

name: Knowledge
description: The area of knowledge (as opposed to a practical skill) in which the #Protagonist's experience is assessed.

name: Behavior_product
description: A product of behavior that shows the #Protagonist's skill or lack of skill.

name: Focal_participant
description: It can only occur in place of a skill expression. It refers to the prototypical patient in an action involving the #Protagonist.

name: Role
description: It denotes a role in which the #Protagonist has developed his expertise.

name: Degree
description: It is the #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner give further description of the way in which the #Protagonist exhibits their skill or lack of skill.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Protagonist has the expertise.

name: Fact
description: A fact which can be connected by a chain of reasoning to the #State_of_affairs.

name: State_of_affairs
description: A fact whose cause is under consideration.

name: Question
description: An open proposition concerning the cause of the #State_of_affairs.

name: Degree
description: It identifies how much of the #State_of_affairs is explained by the #Fact.

name: Manner
description: It indicates salient characteristics of the #Fact considered as an explanation.

name: Means
description: An intermediate logical step that justifies the relationship between  the #Fact and the #State_of_affairs.

name: Explosive
description: The #Explosive releases a large amount of force, destroying itself and causing damage to the surrounding area.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the explosion occurs.

name: Place
description: The location where the explosion occurs.

name: Victim
description: The #Victim is targeted by the explosion or inadvertently damaged by the explosion.

name: Means
description: The means by which the #Explosive explodes.

name: Manner
description:
A description of the explosion not specifically covered by other Frame Elements.

<ex>The bomb <t>detonated</t> <fex name="man">explosively</fex> in the middle of the square.</ex>

name: Exporter
description: The conscious entity, generally a person, that moves the #Goods across a border out of the #Exporting_area. Very often, an #Exporting_area will metonymically stand in for the person or persons directly responsible for the movement of the #Goods.

name: Goods
description: The items of value whose location is changing.

name: Importing_area
description: It is the place that the #Goods end up as a result of motion.

name: Exporting_area
description: The place where the #Goods are initially, before the the #Exporter moves them.

name: Vehicle
description: A mobile entity directed by the #Exporter that holds the #Goods and moves them along from the #Exporting_area to the #Importing_area.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Exporter that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Exporter that accomplishes the action indicated by the target.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Exporter moves the #Goods.

name: Path
description: It identifies the location of the #Goods during transit, i.e. after leaving the #Exporting_area and before reaching the #Importing_area.

name: Type
description: It indicates what subtype of the general category the exporting event belongs to.

name: Communicator
description: The #Communicator is the person who expresses the #Content (whether spoken or written).

name: Content
description: The attitude or feeling that the #Communicator had not previously expressed.

name: Medium
description: It is the observable action or product of the #Communicator.

name: Addressee
description: The #Addressee is the person to whom the #Content is communicated.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Communicator that also affect the action (eagerly).

name: Means
description: An act whereby the #Communicator communicates the #Content.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Content is communicated.

name: Place
description: It specifies the place where the communication takes place.

name: Authorities
description: The #Authorities act on behalf of the #Current_jurisdiction, giving up the #Suspect to the #Crime_jurisdiction.

name: Current_jurisdiction
description: The jurisdiction (generally a nation) the #Suspect starts off in.

name: Crime_jurisdiction
description: The jurisdiction (generally a nation) to which the #Suspect is sent.

name: Suspect
description: The #Suspect is forced to go to the jurisdiction where a crime he or she is suspected of took place or is being tried.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Authorities extradite the #Suspect.

name: Legal_basis
description: It indicates the basis in law of an extradition.

name: Time
description: The time at which  the #Suspect is moved.

name: Manner
description: A description of the manner of the extradition.

name: Means
description: The act of the #Authorities which brings about the transfer from the #Current_jurisdiction to the #Crime_jurisdiction.

name: Place
description: The location where the extradition occurs.

name: Entity
description: An concrete or abstract entity that possesses characteristics that change over time.

name: Marker
description: A point or phase in time when, viewed across the actual or expected development, the #Entity's powers have reached an extreme high or low point. The point or phase is often identified metonymically by reference to a product created by the #Entity or an event involving the #Entity.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity whose #Value of a particular gradable #Attribute is extreme.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of an #Entity which is under discussion.

name: Value
description: A quantity or other characterization of the #Entity's state with respect to the #Attribute.

name: Period
description: The period for which values of a particular #Attribute of one or more entities are compared.

name: Expression
description: This is the #Expression made.

name: Possessor
description: This is the person who exhibits the #Expression.

name: Conveyed_emotion
description: The emotion that is conveyed by a particular #Expression.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of #Expression.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Expression occurs.

name: Intended_perceiver
description: An entity toward which the #Expression is directed.

name: Duration
description: The period of time for which the facial #Expression is held.

name: Actor
description: The #Actor is the individual who performs the #Action and can thus be characterized with respect to how that #Action affects the #Affected_party.

name: Action
description: The #Action is judged based on how just and appropriate it is to the #Affected_party in a particular situation.

name: Grounds
description: The #Grounds is the event or state that requires some decision or action in response to it for which the #Actor is judged.

name: Affected_party
description: The #Affected_party s treatment is what determines the evaluation of the #Actor's #Action.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree is the extent to which the #Action or #Actor is evaluated as being fair or unfair.

name: Parameter
description: The #Parameter is the area in which the #Action is judged.

name: Manner
description: A holistic characterization of the description of the #Actor, including depictions of the #Actor's state in terms of how it affects the entire description.

name: Sleeper
description: The #Sleeper is the entity that falls asleep.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the event occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the event occurs.

name: Victim
description: The #Victim has false beliefs as a result of exposure to a #Deception.

name: Deception
description: The #Deception is perceived by the #Victim, leading to false beliefs. The #Deception, orchestrated by an agent or agents with the intention of deception, may be any misinformation, event, or situation perceived by the #Victim.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Victim falls for the #Deception.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #Victim falls for the #Deception.

name: Manner
description: A description of the way #Victim is deceived which is not covered by more specific FEs.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Victim believes the #Deception.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity which is widely known and recognized.

name: Reason
description: The behavior, attribute, or associated entities that provide the reason for the #Entity being famous.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the degree of fame of the #Entity.

name: Duration
description: The length of time during which the #Entity is famous.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Entity is famous.

name: Means
description: The way in which the #Entity becomes famous.

name: Entity
description:
A concrete thing or abstract phenomenon or fact that is assessed in terms of how well recognizable it is to a #Cognizer.

<ex>He gave <fex name="ent">an address</fex> quite <t>familiar</t> to the chauffeur.</ex>

name: Cognizer
description: The (typically non-specific and backgrounded) sentient being for whom the #Entity possesses a specified level of recognizability.

name: Degree
description: The deviation of the actual level of recognizability of the #Entity from the level specified by the target.

name: Context
description: A situation or source from which the #Entity is made more recognizanable to the #Cognizer.

name: Container
description: It identifies the item that is closed with the #Fastener.

name: Fastener
description: The artifact created to close a #Container.

name: Container_portal
description: It identifies the active zone of the container where the #Fastener is located.

name: Material
description: It identifies the material from which the #Fastener is made.

name: Descriptor
description: It identifies a characteristic or description of the #Fastener.

name: Creator
description: An individual or individuals that bring the #Fastener into existence.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which the #Fastener comes into existence.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to the #Fastener.

name: Type
description: An indication of the subtype of the #Fastener.

name: Use
description: It identifies the purpose for which an #Fastener is made.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer is the person or sentient entity that experiences or feels the emotions.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the general area in which the emotion occurs. It indicates a range of possible #Stimulus.

name: Stimulus
description: The #Stimulus is the person, event, or state of affairs that evokes the emotional response in the #Experiencer.

name: Expressor
description: The body part, gesture, or other expression of the #Experiencer that reflects his or her emotional state.

name: State
description: The #State is the abstract noun that describes a more lasting experience by the #Experiencer.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Experiencer's emotion deviates from the norm for the emotion.

name: Parameter
description: The #Parameter is a domain in which the #Experiencer experiences the #Stimulus.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the way in which the #Experiencer experiences the #Stimulus which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).  The #Manner may also describe a state of the #Experiencer that affects the details of the emotional experience.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Experiencer, #Expressor, or #State can be described as having said emotion.

name: Agent
description: Agent

name: Pacient
description: Pacient

name: Food
description: Alimento

name: Provedor
description: Entidade - humana ou animal - que alimenta o #Beneficiário.

name: Food
description: Food

name: Recipient
description: Recipient

name: Imposed_purpose
description: Imposed_purpose

name: Means
description: Means

name: Purpose
description: Purpose

name: Source
description: Source

name: Place
description: Lugar

name: Time
description: Tempo

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer experiences the #Emotion or is in the #Emotional_state.

name: Emotion
description: The #Emotion is the feeling that the #Experiencer experiences.

name: Emotional_state
description: It is the state the #Experiencer is in.

name: Evaluation
description: It is a negative or positive assessment of the #Experiencer regarding his or her #Emotional_state.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person who acts in a misleading way to create the impression that a #State_of_affairs holds.

name: Original
description: This is the entity which is copied.

name: Copy
description: The #Copy produced by the #Creator.

name: State_of_affairs
description: The #State_of_affairs is a an event, a state, or a property that the #Agent wants others to believe have occurred or hold.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the imitation.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Purpose
description: An action or state that the #Agent intends to accomplish by performing the feigning of some #State_of_affairs.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Agent feigns something.

name: Place
description: The place in which the #Agent feigns something.

name: Activity
description: An activity that defines a group of people in their professional capacity.

name: Practitioner
description: The individual, group, or organization  that engages in the #Activity as part of their profession.

name: Salient_entity
description: A physical or abstract entity that is characteristically associated with the #Activity.

name: Work
description: A phase of a #Practitioner's career that is spent engaged in an #Activity.

name: Type
description: The subfield of the #Activity that the #Practitioner is engaged in.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Practitioner engages in the #Activity.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Practitioner engages in the #Activity.

name: Combatants
description: The #Combatants participate as fighters in the #Fight.

name: Fight
description: The violent activity.

name: Time
description: When the #Fight takes place.

name: Place
description: Where the #Fight takes place.

name: Manner
description: The manner of the #Fight.

name: Salient_activity
description: An activity that engaged in by the #Combatants while fighting.

name: Issue
description: The #Issue over which #Fight happens.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which the #Fight takes place.

name: Means
description: The means by which the #Combatants engage in the #Fight.

name: Instrument
description: The weapon or other instrument used by the #Combatants.

name: Purpose
description: The state of affairs that (some of) the #Combatants wish to achieve by fighting.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the actor who instigates the filling.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the physical object or substance which changes location.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is the area or container being filled.

name: Cause
description: An event which brings about the filling of the #Goal.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the location where the #Theme begins its motion.

name: Path
description: The #Path is the trajectory of the motion.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the filling occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the filling occurs.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the filling occurs.

name: Time
description: When the filling occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the filling takes place.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which the filling occurs.

name: Finals
description: Final game of a sports competition.

name: Loser
description: The squad that loses the final match and, hence, the tournament.

name: Winner
description: The squad that wins the final match and becomes the champion.

name: Athletes
description: Individuals or teams representing a country, taken collectively.

name: Competition
description: The sports tournament being played.

name: Duration
description: For how long the final match is played.

name: Venue
description: The venue where the final match takes place.

name: Place
description: Where the match occurs.

name: Manner
description: How the final match is played.

name: Means
description: Actions of the #Winner or the #Loser that influence the development of the final match.

name: Prize
description: The prize that is given to the winner.

name: Time
description: The period of time when the final match occurs.

name: Speaker
description: The #Speaker is the person imposes the fine upon the #Payer.

name: Payer
description: The #Payer is the person or thing about whom/which a judgment is made.

name: Reason
description: Typically, there is a constituent expressing the #Reason for the judge's judgment.

name: Fine
description:
The money given to expiate some debt for transgression.
Pat paid <fex name="Money">14 dollars</fex> in <t>fines</t>.

name: Instrument
description: The instrument with which the fining is performed.

name: Means
description: The action that is taken that results in punishment/reward.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which an intentional act is performed.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: A description of the event (or state) not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of the #Speaker that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Rate
description: In some cases, price or payment is described per unit of goods.

name: Unit
description: It is any unit in which goods or services can be measured.

name: Event
description: The imposition of a debt due to culpable behavior.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Fine is punitive to the #Payer.

name: Competitor
description: The individual involved in the #Competition.

name: Opponent
description: The individual that the #Competitor has been competing against.

name: Competitors
description: The individuals who compete against each other.

name: Competition
description: The event in which the #Competitors compete with each other.

name: Score
description: A quantity whereby progress is measured during the game, and #Rank and #Prizes are awarded to the #Competitors afterward.

name: Margin
description: The amount by which the #Competitor's and #Opponent's #Scores differ.

name: Rank
description: The rank (according to #Score) that a #Competitor achieves.

name: Prize
description: A socially and/or monetarily significant entity which is given to a #Competitor according to #Score or #Rank.

name: Means
description: An action of the #Competitor that results in the outcome of the #Competition.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Competition which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of a #Competitor that also affect their action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Competition takes place.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Competition takes place.

name: Venue
description:
This FE is for the named venue of a competition, particularly when the place has been built for the purpose of a competition.
<ex>The Mets <t>won</t> against the Yankees  <fex name="Venue">at Shea Stadium</fex>.</ex>

name: Game
description: An activity the #Player participates in.

name: Player
description: The individual participating in a #Game.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Game which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of a #Player that also affect their action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An action of the #Player that results in the outcome of the #Game.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Game takes place.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Player finishes the #Game.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which the #Player wins or loses the #Game.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Player wins or loses the #Game.

name: Fire
description: The fire that #Firefighters target.

name: Firefighter
description: The individual or group who respond(s) to the #Fire.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Firefighter fights the #Fire.

name: Place
description: It identifies the location of the #Firefighters as they attempt to fight the #Fire.

name: Manner
description: The manner in which the #Firefighters are fighting the #Fire.

name: Purpose
description: The desired result of the firefight. It may either directly refer to the state of affairs that is desired.

name: Instrument
description: An instrument with which an intentional fire-fighting act is performed.

name: Fire_break
description: The constructed entity that is intended to prevent a fire from reaching a protected area.

name: Creator
description: An individual or individuals that bring the #Fire_break into existence.

name: Material
description: Any indication of what makes up the #Fire_break, including components, ingredients, etc.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to a #Fire_break.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which a #Fire_break comes into existence.

name: Type
description: An indication of the subtype of #Fire_break.

name: Use
description: The use for which a #Fire_break is intended.

name: Fire
description: The total material currently involved in combustion, including both the parts of the #Fuel currently undergoing chemical alteration and the partially ionized gas that results from this process.

name: Fuel
description: The entity that is undergoing rapid chemical alteration leading to damage or destruction.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the #Fire is burning.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the #Fire is burning.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Fire event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Duration
description: The amount of time that the #Fire burns.

name: Victim

name: Employee
description: The person who is let go by their #Employer.

name: Employer
description: The person (or institution) that end an employment relationship with an #Employee.

name: Position
description: The label given to a particular type of employment.

name: Task
description:
The action that the #Employee is relieved from doing for the #Employer

.<ex>I was <t>fired</t> <fex name="Task">from training the new actors</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which an #Employer fires an #Employee.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the #Employer fires the #Employee.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the #Purpose for which an #Employer fires the #Employee.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when an #Employer fires the #Employee.

name: Firing_point
description: The location from which the #Detonator activates an explosive device.

name: Relative_location
description: A place that a #Firing_point is located with respect to.

name: Detonator
description: The #Detonator is located at the #Firing_point when he or she activates the explosive device.

name: Experience
description: An event happens for the first time within the #Context.

name: Context
description: A spatial, cultural, or personal delimitation within which the #Experience occurs for the first time.

name: Item
description: An #Item is the foremost thing in the #Contrast_set.

name: Limits_of_consideration
description: It identifies the domain (usually temporally or spatially defined) within which the #Item is primary among its kind.

name: Contrast_set
description: The #Contrast_set is a group of entities similar to the #Item out of which the #Item is the most preeminent.

name: Attribute
description: The #Attribute of the #Item which is under consideration.

name: Self_mover
description: It is the living (or self-directed) being which moves under its own power.

name: Source
description: It is used for any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion.

name: Path
description: It is used for any description of a trajectory of motion involving a landmark which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal.

name: Goal
description: It is used for any expression which tells where the #Self_mover ends up as a result of the motion.

name: Direction
description: The direction that the #Self_mover heads in during the motion.

name: Manner
description: An expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory or rate of motion. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Distance
description: Any expression which characterizes the extent of motion expresses the #Distance.

name: Time
description: The time when the motion occurs.

name: Speed
description: The rate at which the location of the #Self_mover changes with respect to time.

name: Means
description: An act whereby the #Self_mover achieves movement.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which the #Self_mover moves.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which a #Self_mover moves.

name: Place
description: The #Place is the location within which a defined motion takes place.  Any specified or implied  #Source, #Path or #Goal should designate a location contained with the #Place.

name: Explanation
description: The state of affairs that leads to the particular motion that the #Self_mover adopts.

name: Area
description: It is the setting in which the #Fluid s movement takes place on an unspecified #Path.

name: Goal
description: It is the location the #Fluid ends up.

name: Path
description: The #Path is the trajectory along which the #Fluid moves.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the location the #Fluid occupies initially.

name: Fluid
description: The #Fluid is the entity that changes location and moves in a fluidic way.

name: Distance
description: It describes the physical extent of the motion of the #Fluid.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which the #Fluid moves.

name: Speed
description: This is the rate at which the #Fluid flows.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Fluid flows.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Fluid flows.

name: Place
description: It describes the location of the motion which has a specified #Source, #Path or #Goal.

name: Food
description: The type of foods and drinks.

name: Descriptor
description: It indicates a characteristic or description of the food.

name: Type
description: It identifies a particular #Type of the food item.

name: Constituent_parts
description: A part of the #Food.

name: Gatherer
description: The #Gatherer is the agent gathering the #Crop.

name: Crop
description: It is item being collected together by the #Gatherer.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the ground where the #Crop is gathered from.

name: Duration
description: For what length of time the #Gatherer was gathering the #Crop.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Gatherer gathers the #Crop.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the #Crop is gathered.

name: Place
description: The greater geographic location where the #Gatherer gathers his #Crop.

name: Time
description: When the #Crop gathering action occurs.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Gatherer intends to accomplish by gathering his #Crop.

name: Frequency
description: How often the #Gatherer collects his #Crop.

name: Degree
description: It describes the amount of effort put into the food gathering event.

name: Establishment
description: Commercial establishment which offers food services to the #Eater.

name: Service
description: Several different types of service offered to #Eater.

name: Eater
description: The person who eats or drinks something offered by a #Establishment or benefits from a #Service offered by a place.

name: Type
description: The type of #Food_service.

name: Location

name: Current_country
description: The country or countries that the speaker is indicating in the current instance, which may match or be distinct from the #Discourse_salient_country.

name: Discourse_salient_country
description: The country that has been featured in the discourse, or that the speaker/hearer identify with or are located in; it serves to identify the #Current_country by specifying it as the same or different. This FE is incorporated in the targets of this frame.

name: Constituent_parts
description: The materials or #Constituent_parts that make up the #Current_country.

name: Container_possessor
description: The location that the #Current_country is a part of.

name: Name
description: This FE is used for the Names of Locales.

name: Relative_location
description: A place that the #Current_country is located with respect to.

name: Descriptor
description: Any description, characteristic, or property of the #Current_country which is not covered by more specific FEs.

name: Population
description: The people living in the jurisdiction of the locale.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person that creates a #Forgery with the intent of passing it off as (an instance of) the #Standard.

name: Forgery
description: The #Forgery is the product that the #Agent creates with the intent of passing it off as (an instance of) the #Standard.

name: Standard
description: The #Standard is the actually existing or imagined (kind of) thing that the #Agent wants to pass the #Forgery off as.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the imitation.

name: Purpose
description: An action or state that the #Agent intends to accomplish by producing the #Forgery.

name: Instrument
description: An entity manipulated by the #Agent in order to produce the #Forgery.

name: Place

name: Time

name: Fidelity

name: Offense

name: Forgoer

name: Desirable

name: Manner

name: Part_2

name: Location_of_confinement
description: The location to which the #Theme's motion was formerly inhibited.

name: Manner

name: Time

name: Event

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the actually observed rate of occurrence of the #Event or #Salient_entity differs from the expected rate.

name: Interval
description: The #Interval is a noun modified by the target word. The target word specifies the frequency of the #Interval.

name: Time_span
description: The #Time_span is the length of time of the #Interval. This FE is incorporated by most of the lexical units in this frame.

name: Rate
description: The number of times per unit of real or scanning time that an #Event or #Salient_entity is encountered.

name: Salient_entity
description: An entity which the implicit cognizer encounters with the specified frequency.

name: Attribute
description: The frequency feature of the #Event or #Salient_entity that is under discussion. All the lexical units in this frame incorporate this frame element.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Event has a particular frequency.

name: Group
description: The #Group in which the #Event or #Salient_entity is frequent.

name: Theme

description: A non-moving physical object over a surface of which the #Theme moves.

name: Themes

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Theme moves against the #Static_object.

name: Place
description: The setting in which the motion of the #Theme happens.

name: Degree
description: The amount of friction produced in the #Theme's motion.

name: Front
description: The #Front acts as a legitimate individual, organization, or enterprise, but is truly a cover for an illicit organization or activity.

name: Illicit_organization
description: The existence and activities of the #Illicit_organization are concealed by the #Front.

name: Illicit_activity
description: The #Illicit_activity of the #Illicit_organization is concealed by (the activities of) the #Front .

name: Time
description: The time at which the deceptive activity occurs.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Front is attempting to bring about.

name: Place
description: The place where the fronting occurs.

name: Means
description: The action taken by the #Front to ensure successful deceit of authorities.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the similarity of the event to some other event, particularly descriptions of the #Front that also affect the details of the action.

name: Resource_controller
description: The #Resource_controller is the individual whose frugality or generosity is being described.

name: Behavior
description: Some specific #Behavior may be described as frugal or extravagant, rather than attributing the characteristic directly to the #Resource_controller.

name: Resource
description: It is the resource which the #Resource_controller expends.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which a #Resource_controller is frugal or profligate.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Fugitive
description: The #Fugitive has escaped and/or is evading capture by law enforcement #Authorities.

name: Prison
description: The facility where the #Fugitive was being held.

name: Authorities
description: The #Authorities want to take (or retake) the #Fugitive into custody on suspicion of having committed a #Crime.

name: Crime
description: The crime of which the #Fugitive is wanted. This FE also covers expressions that indicate suspicion of crimes, convictions, and sentences.

name: Place
description: It identifies the general #Place where the #Fugitive is located.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Fugitive is evading law enforcement.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the state of being imprisoned which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of time for which the #Fugitive is on the run.

name: Container
description: It is used for the entity whose fullness is being described.

name: Contents
description: It is used for the stuff that is present/absent in the #Container.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the amount of #Contents in the #Container diverges from the maximal expected amount for the #Container.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Container is full.

name: Duration
description: It denotes the length of time from the beginning of the #Container's fullness to the end.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity is an object or person that performs the #Activity or fulfills the #Role.

name: Activity
description: The #Activity is the action that the #Entity performs.

name: Role
description: The #Role is  the position or duty that is occupied by the #Entity.

name: Descriptor
description: The #Descriptor provides additional information about the #Entity.

name: Duration
description: The #Duration that the #Entity performs an #Activity or fulfills a #Role.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Entity functions.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which an #Entity functions.

description: It is the person, people, or organization funded by the #Supplier.

name: Imposed_purpose
description: It is the intended purpose of the funding.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the funding event which is not covered by more specific fes, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). it may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Supplier that affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: It expresses the #Means by which the #Supplier funds the #Recipient or #Imposed_purpose.

name: Place
description: It is the #Place where the #Supplier funds the #Recipient or the #Imposed_purpose.

name: Source
description: It is the #Source of the funding.

name: Time
description: It is the #Time at which the #Supplier gives funds to the #Recipient or #Imposed_purpose.

name: Money
description: It is the specified currency or amount of funding.

name: Purpose
description: It is the #Purpose for which the #Supplier funds the #Recipient.

name: Creator

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which a #Piece_of_furniture comes into existence.

name: Name

name: Origin
description: It is the place where the #Piece_of_furniture came from.

name: Constituent_parts
description: Salient parts that make up the #Piece_of_furniture.

name: Material
description: Any indication of what makes up the #Piece_of_furniture, including components, ingredients, etc.

name: Quantity
description: It is the amount of pieces of furniture.

name: Place
description: It is where the #Piece_of_furniture is located.

name: Type
description: An indication of the subtype of #Piece_of_furniture.

name: Aggregate
description: It identifies the aggregate that results from the gathering.

name: Agent
description: It is the person who gathers Individuals.

name: Individuals
description: It identifies the entities that come together to form an #Aggregate.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the gathering event occurs, if specified.

name: Means

name: Purpose

name: Goal

name: Path

name: Theme
description:
This FE identifies #Theme whose motion ceases.


<ex>When the kitty was standing beside the slayer s pillow, <fex name="Theme">she</fex> <t>stopped</t> to make sure everything was quiet</ex>

name: Place
description:
This FE identifies the #Place where the #Theme s motion stops. 

<ex> She <t>stopped</t> <fex name="Place">on the threshold</fex> with a sinking heart</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time when the #Theme stops.

<ex>John <t>stopped</t> <fex name="Time">suddenly</fex>, whirled around and spread out his arms</ex>

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Theme stops motion.

<ex>Martha <t>stopped</t> <fex name="Manner">abruptly</fex> and stared at her only son</ex>

name: Duration
description:
This FE identifies the length of #Time during which the motion  is stopped.

<ex>She <t>stopped</t> <fex name="Duration">for a minute</fex> and listened, but the wind came back empty handed as she stared down the desolate road</ex>

name: Containing_event
description: It is an event that is occuring at a time during which the #Theme ceases motion.

description: The entity under discussion, whose states and properties are impacted by its association with the #Entity.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Entity exists and is associated with the #Topical_entity

name: Place

name: Dependent
description: The state-of-affairs which cannot hold without the state of affairs of the #Requirement or the presence of the #Required_entity.

name: Requirement
description: The state-of-affairs that must obtain in order for the #Dependent to obtain.

name: Required_entity
description:
An entity that has to be present for the #Dependent state of affairs to obtain.

<ex>Believe it or not, but this cake <t>requires</t> <fex name="Required_entity">a pound of mild sausage</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The extent to which the #Dependent depends on the presence of the #Required_entity or the obtaining of the #Requirement.

<ex>A performance like this <fex name="deg">absolutely</fex> <t>demands</t> charm.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Requirement is necessary for the #Dependent.

name: Place
description:
#Place denotes a location in which the specified relation between #Requirement and #Dependent holds.

<ex><fex name="pla">In the US</fex>, putting this on the agenda <t>requires</t> the political weight and leadership of big city mayors.</ex>

name: Source_symbol
description:
A symbol or set of symbols representing the #Content in the #Source_representation format.

<ex><fex name="Source_symbol">"Hi, dude"</fex> <t>translates</t> into Spanish as Hola tío.</ex>

name: Source_representation
description:
The representation system in which the #Content pre-exists.

<ex>The bands  name <t>translates</t> into English as Killer Bananas <fex name="Source_representation">from their native French</fex>
and they play metal and horror themed punk rock  n  roll.</ex>

name: Target_symbol
description:
A symbol or set of symbols representing the #Content in the #Target_representation format.

<ex>The word giallo <t>translates</t> into English as <fex name="Target_symbol"> yellow </fex>.</ex>

name: Target_representation
description:
The representation system within which the #Target_symbol is equivalent in its signification to the #Source_symbol within the #Source_representation system
.

<ex>More sinister still is the fact that Homeland <t>translates</t> <fex name="tarr">into German</fex> as Fatherland.</ex>

name: Content
description:
The information that is meant to be represented by the #Source_symbol and #Target_symbol.

<ex><fex name="Content">The disclaimer in question</fex> <t>translated</t> as: "Yo, Gringo! This episode of The Twilight Zone was paid for by Robinson for Congress."</ex>

name: Time
description: The period of time during which the translation equivalence holds.

name: Equivalence
description:
An assessment of how equivalent the #Source_representation and the #Target_representation are.

<ex>The Swedish word, pepparkakor, <fex name="equ">literally</fex> <t>translates</t> as pepper cakes.</ex>

name: Medium
description:
A text in which the Source_symbol is rendered by a Target_symbol to express a particular Content.

<ex><fex name="med">In the New Testament</fex> the Greek word ekklesia <t>translates</t> 115 times as "church".</ex>

name: Body_part
description: The #Body_part identifies the part of the body that is responding to the #Trigger.

name: Hearer
description: It is the person who receives a #Message.

name: Message
description: It is the content that is communicated from one person to another.

name: Topic
description: It is the subject matter about which the #Message is communicated.

name: Speaker
description: This is the person who produces a #Message.

name: Medium
description: It is the physical entity or channel used to transmit the #Message.

name: Time
description: The #Time the #Hearer receives the #Message.

name: Insulator
description: The object which provides warm. It does not have to radiate heat; it may provide warmth with heavy insulation.

name: Activity
description: The #Activity the #Experiencer engages in to feel heat.

name: Circumstances
description: The state of the world when the #Experiencer feels warmth.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Experiencer feels a level of heat.

name: Experiencer
description: The sentient entity that utilizes the #Insulator.

name: Hedged_content
description: The idea or ideas that the speaker wishes to be careful about asserting.

name: Communicator
description: The #Communicator greets the arrival of an #Individual or occurrence of an #Event.

name: Individual
description: The person who is greeted at their arrival by the #Communicator.

name: Event
description:
The occurrence which is greeted by the #Communicator.

<ex>Sheep scattered from the road as trumpets <t>heralded</t> <fex name="evt">his arrival at the castle gates</fex></ex>

name: Medium
description: The symbol-containing artifact whereby a #Communicator heralds.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the place where the Communicator heralds.

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the purpose for which a #Communicator  heralds.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the time when the #Communicator  heralds.

name: Means
description:
This FE identifies the #Means by which a #Communicator heralds.

<ex>The town <t>heralded</t> his arrival <fex name="mns">with a peal of church bells</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Communicator that also affect the heralding (<ment> eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Hidden_object
description: The #Hidden_object is the entity which is blocked from view.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person who causes the #Hidden_object to be not perceptually accessible to potential perceivers.

name: Hiding_place
description:
The location in which the #Hidden_object is placed so as not to be perceptually accessible.


<ex>He had <t>concealed</t> the necklace <fex name="Hiding_place">behind him</fex>.</ex>

name: Obstruction
description: The entity that the #Agent uses to block the #Hidden_object from being perceptible.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Hidden_object becomes perceptually inaccessible.

name: Place
description: The #Place is the spatial setting in which the hiding event takes place.

name: Time
description: It denotes the interval of time during which the #Agent causes the #Hidden_object to become hidden from perceptual access.

name: Means
description: An action of the #Agent that brings about the hiding of the #Hidden_object.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Agent hopes to bring about by hiding the #Hidden_object.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Protagonist
description: The #Protagonist is the entity that tends towards or plans some #Action which the #Hindrance causes to be more difficult.

name: Hindrance
description: The #Hindrance is the force which makes the #Action more difficult or less likely to be successfully completed. The #Hindrance may be a lack of enabling force or the #Hindrance may be an obstacle in the natural progression of the #Protagonist or #Action.

name: Action
description: The #Action is what the #Protagonist desires to do, which is made more difficult by the #Hindrance. It can also be a natural act or collective endeavor, not linked to an overt #Protagonist.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the #Hindrance affects the #Protagonist or #Action.

name: Place
description: The #Place is the location where  the #Hindrance affects the #Protagonist or #Action.

name: Means
description: It describes the means by which hindering occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which hindering occurs.

name: Money
description: It is the thing given in exchange for goods in a transaction.

name: Tourist
description: The #Tourist wants the #Services and offers #Money to an #Operator in exchange for them.

name: Services
description: The services are anything which is exchanged for money in a transaction.

name: Operator
description: The #Operator offers the #Services and exchanges them for #Money from a #Tourist.

name: Means
description: The means by which a commercial transaction occurs.

name: Rate
description: In some cases, price or payment is described per unit of goods.

name: Unit
description: It is any unit in which goods or services can be measured.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Manner
description: A description of the transfer not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a buyer, seller, or exchangers that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the buyer, seller, or exchangers wish to bring about by participating in the exchange.

name: Employee
description: The person whom the #Employer takes on as an #Employee, obligating them to perform some #Task in order to receive #Compensation.

name: Employer
description: The person (or institution) that takes on an #Employee, giving them  #Compensation in return for the performance of an assigned #Task.

name: Task
description: The action that the #Employee is taken on by the #Employer to do.

name: Position
description: The label given to a particular type of employment.

name: Field
description: The #Field that the #Employee is going to work in for their #Employer.

name: Compensation
description: The #Compensation is the payment that the #Employee is set to receive  for performing an assigned #Task.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which an #Employer hires an #Employee.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Employer hires the #Employee.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when an #Employer hires the #Employee.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the #Purpose for which an #Employer hires the #Employee.

name: Instrument
description: An entity that the #Employer uses to hire the #Employee.

name: Means
description: An action by the #Employer whereby the hire is brought about.

name: Contract_basis
description: The #Contract_basis is the condition of employment with respect to permanency, hours per time period or payment arrangements.

name: Event
description: It identifies the event which occurs to create history.

name: Entity
description: It identifies the entity, concrete or abstract.

name: Place
description: It identifies where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Domain
description: The #Domain is (a characterization of) the type of event that is part of the #Event's history.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the subject about which the history is given.

name: Domain
description: The #Domain is (a characterization of) the type of event that is to be included in consideration of the #Topic's history.

name: End_time
description: The end of the span of time during which the #Topic occurs.

name: Start_time
description: The beginning of the time span over which the #Topic occurs.

name: Time_span
description: The span of time over which the events related to the #Topic take place.

name: Duration
description: The #Duration, often expressed in calendric units, of the history of the #Topic.

name: Time
description: When the events concerning the #Topic occurred.

name: Event
description: It identifies the event which occurs to create history.

name: Place
description: It identifies where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the event occurs.

name: Agent
description: The individual who tries to interact with the #Target.

name: Instrument
description: The object manipulated by the #Agent in order to interact with the #Target.

name: Target_location
description: The location that the #Agent is attempting to access using the #Instrument.

name: Target
description: The #Target is the entity located in an indirectly accessible location relative to the #Agent.

name: Outcome
description: The #Outcome is the failure or success of an attempt at interaction, incorporated in the LUs of the frame.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the #Agent achieves a #Purpose.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the interaction takes place at the #Target_location.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when something hits or misses.

name: Place
description: The place where the #Agent manages or fails to interact with the #Target.

name: Deviation
description: The distance of the actual location from the #Target_location.

name: Target
description: The entity which is hit by a projectile directed by the #Agent.

name: Agent
description: The individual that directs the projectile such that it impacts the #Target.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Agent hopes to bring about by hitting the #Target.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Agent hits the #Target.

name: Place
description: The location where the event happens.

name: Means
description: The action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes hitting the #Target.

name: Instrument
description: The entity, most often ammunition or a firearm, which the #Agent manipulates to hit the #Target.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Agent
description: The #Agent decides not to engage in a #Desirable_action for a while or not to interact with a #Salient_entity.

name: Desirable_action
description: It identifies the event or activity in which the #Agent does not engage for a while.

name: Salient_entity
description: An entity that evokes a contextually inferrable #Desirable_action that the #Agent is temporarily forgoing.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the temporary forgoing occurs.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the temporary forgoing occurs.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the temporary forgoing occurs.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the temporary forgoing occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the interval of #Time during which the the forgoing occurs.

name: Duration
description: It denotes the length of time from the beginning of the #Agent s decision to forgo a #Desirable_action to the point in time when the #Agent engages in the action.

name: End_point
description: The point in time, defined either as a clock time or in terms of an event that takes place, at which the #Agent engages in the #Desirable_action or interacts with the #Salient_entity.

name: Hospital
description: Existing buildings in particular #Place, which have the primary duty to provide health care.

name: Place
description: Geographical site visited by the #Tourist, where the #Hospital is.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group that uses the #Hospital.

name: Purpose
description: Any specific action that is made possible by the existence of #Hospital.

name: Type
description: Specific type of the #Hospital.

name: Host
description: The #Host is the person whose #Behavior towards others as a (potential) host is evaluated.

name: Guest
description: The #Guest is the entity which is positively or negatively treated by the #Host.

name: Behavior
description: The #Behavior is the action of the #Host on which the evaluation of the #Host's character is based.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the situation or person that the #Host's #Behavior responds to or is related to.

name: Expressor
description: The #Expressor is the body part or action by a body part which indicates the character of the #Host.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the evaluation.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree is the extent to which the #Host exhibits the particular #Behavior towards others.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner is the way in which the #Host embodies the characters of a good or poor host.

name: Side_1
description: One of two participants in a hostile encounter.

name: Side_2
description: One of two participants in a hostile encounter, usually the second mentioned.

name: Sides
description: The jointly expressed sides in a hostile encounter.

name: Issue
description: An unresolved question over which the two sides of a hostile encounter are in disagreement.

name: Purpose
description: The desired result of the outcome of the hostile encounter for the #Side_1 or for all the #Sides collectively.  It may either directly refer to the state of affairs that is desired, or it the state of affairs may be implicit in an (abstract or concrete) entity that they desire.

name: Means
description: It describes the way in which a side engages in a hostile encounter.

name: Manner
description: Any expression which describes a property of the hostile encounter. Descriptions of the intensity count as #Manner expressions.

name: Place
description: The location at which the hostile encounter takes place.

name: Time
description: The time at which the hostile encounter occurs.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which an event occurs.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which an intentional act is performed.

name: Event
description: The #Event that is organized by the #Host.

name: Host
description: The person, organization or place that organizes the #Event.

name: Duration
description: How long the #Event lasts.

name: Purpose
description: The #Host's goal when organizing the #Event.

name: Manner
description: How the #Host organizes the #Event.

name: Means
description: The means through which the #Host organizes the #Event.

name: Tourist
description: The individual or group that attends the #Event.

name: Hunter
description: The #Hunter is the agent hoping to obtain #Food.

name: Food
description: It is the sought-out item by the #Hunter.

name: Ground
description: This is the entity to which the #Hunter pays attention. It is referred to as #Ground because it serves as the background or context for the #Food.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument is used by the #Hunter as a tool to help obtain #Food. (This tool is not limited to typical artifacts and can be hands, arms, and other atypical hunting and fishing instruments).

name: Duration
description: For what length of time the #Hunter attempted to obtain #Food.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Hunter makes the attempt for #Food.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an attempt at achieving a #Food obtainment.

name: Outcome
description: The failure or success of an attempt.

name: Place
description: The greater geographic location where the #Hunter attempts to obtain #Food.

name: Time
description: When the #Time seeking action occurs.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Hunter intends to accomplish by seeking #Food.

name: Frequency
description: How often the #Hunter attempts to obtain #Food.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the amount of effort the #Hunter puts into his attempt to obtain #Food.

name: Hunter
description: The #Hunter is the agent hoping to obtain #Food.

name: Food
description: It is the sought-out item by the #Hunter.

name: Ground
description: This is the entity to which the #Hunter pays attention. It is referred to as #Ground because it serves as the background or context for the #Food.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument is used by the #Hunter as a tool to help obtain #Food. (This tool is not limited to typical artifacts and can be hands, arms, and other atypical hunting and fishing instruments).

name: Duration
description: For what length of time the #Hunter attempted to obtain #Food.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Hunter makes the attempt for #Food.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an attempt at achieving a #Food obtainment.

name: Outcome
description: The failure or success of an attempt.

name: Place
description: The greater geographic location where the #Hunter attempts to obtain #Food.

name: Time
description: When the #Food seeking action occurs.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Hunter intends to accomplish by seeking #Food.

name: Frequency
description: How often the #Hunter attempts to obtain #Food.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the amount of effort the #Hunter puts into an attempt to obtain #Food.

name: Hunter
description: The #Hunter is the agent that has successfully obtained #Food.

name: Food
description: It is the item obtained by the #Hunter.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument is used by the #Hunter as a tool to obtain #Food.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Hunter obtains the #Food.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the #Food is obtained.

name: Place
description: The greater geographic location where the #Hunter obtains #Food.

name: Time
description: When the #Food seeking action occurs.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Hunter intends to accomplish obtaining #Food.

name: Frequency
description: How often the #Hunter obtains #Food.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the amount of effort the #Hunter puts into an attempt to obtain #Food.

name: Agent
description: Agent

name: Digital_content
description: Digital_content

name: Place
description: Place

name: Purpose
description: Purpose

name: Descriptor
description: Descriptor

name: Mean
description: Mean

name: Type
description: The kind of thing of which instances are under discussion.

name: Current_instance
description: The instance of the #Type that is currently under discussion.

name: Previous_instance
description: An instance of the #Type that was encountered previously and which is now compared for identity with the #Current_instance.

name: Previous_context
description: The situation in which another instance of the #Type was encountered earlier.

name: Set_of_instances
description: The complete set of instances of the #Type involved in the mentioned contexts.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Current_instance is the same or different.

name: Instance
description: The #Instance of a type or out of a set that is currently under discussion.

name: Identity
description: The feature of each #instance that distinguishes it from all others.  notionally, each #instance has a separate #identity, although in practice many #instances cannot be distinguished from each other.

name: Type
description: The kind of thing of which #Instances are under discussion.

name: Instance
description: The #Instance of the #Type that is currently under discussion.

name: Identity
description: The property of an #Instance that is defined as unique for each separate #Instance of a #Type.

name: Idiosyncrasy
description: An entity or characteristic belonging to the #Entity.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity that has a certain distinguishing #Idiosyncrasy.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Idiosyncrasy differs from the norm.

name: Profiled_region
description: A region of space located relative to a #Ground.

name: Ground
description: An entity whose location is relatively well-known and which, thus, can serve as a landmark to identify the #Profiled_region.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person that borrows a #Characteristic behavior from a #Standard.

name: Characteristic
description: The #Characteristic is a behavior or property that the #Standard possesses and which the #Agent adopts in his or her own behavior.

name: Standard
description: The #Standard is the entity that exhibits a certain #Characteristic that the #Agent models their own behavior on.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the imitation.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by performing the imitation.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Agent s way of behaving is similar to that of the #Standard.

name: Time
description: The time at which the imitation occurs.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Agent imitates some entity which acts as a #Standard.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent immobilizes the #Patient.

name: Patient
description: The #Patient is immobilized by the #Agent, optionally to an #Anchor.

name: Instrument
description: The instrument with which an intentional act is performed.

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the immobilization.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the #Purpose for which an #Agent immobilizes a #Patient.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Anchor
description: The #Agent attaches the #Patient to an #Anchor, generally, an immobile object.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Patient is immobilized as a result.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the immobilizing event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). This FE also covers expressions that indicate salient characteristics of the #Agent which also affect the action (carefully, eagerly).

name: Impactor
description: The entity that hits the #Impactee.

name: Impactee
description: The entity which is hit by the #Impactor.

name: Impactors
description: The multiple entities that collide.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action.

name: Speed
description: The speed at impact.

name: Subregion
description: It identifies the affected part of the larger whole.

name: Force
description: The amount of force in the course of the impact.

name: Factor
description: It is used for the concrete or abstract entity whose importance is assessed.

name: Undertaking
description: The #Undertaking is a process or state or field of activity in which the #Interested_party has a stake.

name: Interested_party
description: It identifies the people who are affected by a particular #Factor.

name: Field
description: A #Factor may be generally important to the people or the activities in a field of endeavour.

name: Degree
description: It marks expressions that indicate the #Degree to which the #Factor is important to the #Undertaking.

name: Importer
description: The conscious entity, generally a person, that brings the #Goods into the #Importing_area.

name: Goods
description: The items of value whose location is changing.

name: Importing_area
description: It is the place that the #Goods end up as a result of motion.

name: Exporting_area
description: The place where the #Goods are initially, before the being moved.

name: Vehicle
description: A mobile entity directed by the #Importer that holds the #Goods and moves them along from the #Exporting_area to the #Importing_area.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Importer that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Importer that accomplishes the action indicated by the target.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Importer moves the #Goods.

name: Path
description: It identifies the location of the #Goods during transit, i.e. after leaving the #Exporting_area and before reaching the #Importing_area.

name: Agent
description: The conscious entity, generally a person, that moves the #Goods.

name: Goods
description: The items of value whose location is changing.

name: Importing_area
description: It is the place that the #Goods end up as a result of motion.

name: Exporting_area
description: The place where the #Goods are initially, before the action.

name: Vehicle
description: An mobile entity directed by the #Agent that holds the #Goods and moves them along from the #Exporting_area to the #Importing_area.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the action indicated by the target.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Agent moves the #Goods.

name: Path
description: It identifies the location of the #Goods during transit, i.e. after leaving the #Exporting_area and before reaching the #Importing_area.

name: Responsible_party
description: The person who must perform the #Duty.

name: Duty
description: The action that the #Responsible_party is obligated to perform.

name: Obligator
