description: The #Obligator is the person who imposes the #Duty on the #Responsible_party.

name: Situation
description: A state of affairs that results in the #Responsible_party being obligated to carry out the #Duty in accordance with the #Principle.

name: Principle
description: A regulating idea  (which may be instantiated as a document)  that the #Responsible_party is subject to.

name: Time
description: The time interval during which  the #Duty is imposed on the #Responsible_party  by the #Obligator or the #Situation.

name: Place
description: A location in which the #Responsible_party has a specified #Duty.

name: Manner
description: Any holistic description of the details of the action, either comparing to another event or describing the action in terms of characteristics of the #Obligator that affect the action holistically.

name: Means
description: An event which brings about the obligation.

name: Figure
description: The entity (a person, organization, product, or event) for which the #Audience has an #Impression.

name: Audience
description: A person or group of people who have an #Impression of a #Figure.

name: Impression
description: A generalized conception of a #Figure presented to or shared by an #Audience.

name: Descriptor
description: The effect of the #Impression left on the #Audience.

name: Degree
description: The effectiveness of the #Impression on the #Audience.

name: Context
description: A spatial, cultural, or personal delimitation within which a #Figure leaves an #Impression on an #Audience.

name: Prisoner
description: The person who is confined in a penal institution.

name: Prison
description: The #Prison within which the #Prisoner comes to be confined.

name: Authorities
description: The #Authorities are the institution or actors carrying out the imprisonment.

name: Offense
description: The action that the #Prisoner is being punished for.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the #Prisoner is kept.

name: Time
description: The time when the imprisonment happens.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose of the imprisonment.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Authorities that brings about the imprisonment.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the imprisoning event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Authorities that affect the action (ruthlessly).

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of time for which the #Authorities maintains the confinement of the #Prisoner.

name: Entity
description: The object that undergoes change.

name: Prior_state
description: The former state of the #Entity.

name: Post_state
description: The state of the #Entity following the improvement.

name: Time
description: The time at which the improvement occurs.

name: Rate
description: The rate at which the change happens.

name: Manner
description: A description of the improvement, generally a description comparing events (the same way).

name: Duration
description: The period over which the improvement occurs.

name: Degree
description: The amount of improvement that the #Entity has attained.

name: Domain
description: The relevant dimension of improvement.

name: Place
description: The location where the improvement occurs.

name: Bomb
description: The #Bomb explodes, injuring or damaging a #Target.

name: Use
description: The type of activity that the #Bomb is generally involved in.  Often this can be considered a kind of #Type specification also.

name: Type
description: It indicates what subtype of the general category the #Bomb belongs to.

name: Material
description: The substance that makes up the #Bomb.

name: Wielder
description: The person that wishes to attack the #Target and who controls (directly or indirectly) the detonation of the #Bomb.

name: Part
description: It identifies a part of the #Bomb. This includes parts that aid in the detonation or damaging, or mere attachments.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to an #Bomb.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which a #Bomb comes into existence.

name: Creator
description: The individual or group responsible for the creation of the #Bomb.

name: Descriptor
description: A description or characteristic of the #Bomb.

name: Target
description: The intended or actual target of the #Bomb.

name: Location
description: The location of the #Bomb.

name: Entity
description: It identifies the person or thing that has a tendency towards some #Behaviour.

name: Behavior
description: It marks expressions that indicate which state or action the #Entity tends towards.

name: Degree
description: It marks expressions that indicate how great the inclination of an #Entity towards a #Behavior is.

name: Total
description: A complex entity, either an aggregate or a unit, of which a #Part,  a constituent or a component, is specified.

name: Part
description: A component or constituent that is specified to form part of the #Total.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the inclusion event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Total includes the #Part.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Total includes the #Part.

name: Whole
description: The #Whole is the larger entity that includes the #Part.

name: Part
description: The #Part is either a subset or a constituent part of the #Whole.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the inclusion event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the inclusion relation holds.

name: Place
description: The location at which the inclusion relation holds.

name: Class
description: The general category of entity which has been referred to.

name: Added_set
description: The instance of the #Class that is added to the #Initial_set of entities in the #Class.

name: Initial_set
description: The previously mentioned group of entities of the #Class.

name: Increment
description: The number of entities within the #Added_set.

name: Communicator
description: The person who uses language in the written or spoken modality to convey the #Unresolved_referent to another person.

name: Unresolved_referent
description: The thing to which the #Communicator or #Medium refers for identification purposes.

name: Medium
description: The physical or abstract setting in which the #Unresolved_referent is conveyed.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Communicator makes the indication.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Communicator makes the indication.

name: Time
description:
When the the #Communicator is makes the indication.

<ex><fex name="Time">When this is resolved</fex>, I will <t>name</t> the winner.</ex>

name: Place
description: The location where the #Communicator or #Medium indicates the #Unresolved_referent.

name: Purpose
description: To what end the #Communicator or #Medium makes the indication.

name: Entity
description: The item whose #Origin is under discussion.

name: Origin
description: The discourse-salient place or culture where the #Entity was produced.

name: Infractor
description: The athlete who violates a sport rule.

name: Opponent
description: The team that benefits from the indirect foul.

name: Place
description: Area of the venue in which the foul takes place.

name: Time
description: When the foul takes place.

name: Type
description: The kind of foul.

name: Participant
description:
The #Participant is either an active participant in all of the #Events (e.g., Agent or Patient), or is more peripherally associated with the #Events (e.g., Location or Topic).

<ex>We ve been worried about <fex name="par">our recent hire s</fex> <t>history</t> of deceiving employers.</ex>

<ex>I was charmed, and also determined to learn more about <fex name="par">the factory s</fex> <t>history</t>.</ex>

name: Events
description:
The #Events which the #Participant is a part of. This FE is used to mark the frame-evoking element.

<ex>We will focus on events in her recent <t><fex name="eve">history</fex></t>.</ex>

name: Domain
description:
The #Domain is (a characterization of) the type of event that is to be included in consideration of the #Participant s history.

<ex>One of my colleagues is an expert on the <fex name="dom">economic</fex> <t>history</t> of the Hellenistic period</ex>

<ex>The Netherlands  long <t>history</t> <fex name="dom">of trade with China</fex> provides important information for modern political economies.</ex>

name: End_time
description:
The end of the span of time during which the #Events occur.

<ex>This article discusses mainly the geography and the <t>history</t> of Palestine <fex name="end">until the United Nations took up the Palestine problem in 1947</fex>.</ex>

name: Start_time
description:
The beginning of the time span over which the #Events occur.

<ex>The introduction describes the history of geography <fex name="sta">from the eighteenth century onwards</fex>.</ex>

name: Time_span
description:
The span of time over which the #Events take place.

<ex>We have traced the flag?s <t>past</t> <fex name="tim">between its original conception in the 14th century and its end a hundred years later</fex>.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The #Duration, often expressed in calendric units, of the history of the #Participant.

<ex>The following sections document the entire <fex name="dur">25-year</fex> <t>history</t> of the company.</ex>

name: Time
description: When the #Events concerning the #Participant occured.

name: Athlete
description: Someone who plays a sport.

name: Technique
description: Some specific mode of performing the move.

name: Place
description: The part of the field, court, pool or track where the #Athlete makes the move.

name: Time
description: When the #Athlete makes the move.

name: Purpose
description: The #Athlete's goal when performing the move.

name: Depictive
description: Some characteristic of the #Athlete or the move.

name: Manner
description: Some aspect of the manner through which the #Athlete performed the move that is not included in the #Technique.

name: Equipment
description: Some object used in the sport with which the #Athlete interacts.

name: Goal
description: The intended destination of the equipment the #Athlete puts in motion with the move.

name: Stimulus
description: The entity which inspires a feeling of amazement at its exceptionality.

name: Attribute
description:
An expression of the attribute of ineffability.

<ex>She had a <t>magical</t> <fex name="Attribute">quality</fex> .</ex>

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer experiences the emotion brought about by the #Stimulus

name: Degree
description: An expression of how unusual the ineffability of the #Stimulus is.

name: Parameter
description: The #Parameter is the area in which the #Stimulus brings about an effect on the #Experiencer.

name: Infection
description: An invasion, typically undetected, of an entity s system. The infection most often compromises the entity s stability. Infections are a common pathology for diseases.

name: Infected_entity
description: This FE labels the recipient of the #Infection.

name: Infection_cause
description: This FE labels the cause of the #Infection which affects the #Infected_entity.

name: Medium
description: The medium through which the infection is transmitted.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the Infecting event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification, force, secondary effects, and general descriptions comparing events.

name: Place
description: The place at which the Infecting event occurs; or, the location of the Infection_cause.

name: Time
description: When the infection occurs.

name: Depictive
description: Depictive phrase describing a participant in the event.

name: Means
description: An act by an #Infection_cause that enables them to act upon the #Infected_entity.

name: Result
description: The #Result of an #Infection.

name: Force
description: Something which has the capability of affecting a #Entity in some way.

name: Entity
description: Something which is dependent on the influencing #Force.

name: State_of_affairs
description: A situation which can be influenced or brought about by the #Force.

name: Domain
description: A description of the areas in which the #Force can affect the #Entity.

name: Source
description: A principle factor which gives the #Force the capability to affect the #Entity.

name: Information
description: The #Information that the #Cognizer possesses or comes to possess.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer is aware of the #Information.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is what the Information is about in general.

name: Source
description: The #Cognizer obtains the Information from the #Source.

name: Means_of_gathering
description: An action or method used by the #Cognizer that results in the acquisition of the #Information.

name: Display
description: It identifies the entity or substance that is designed to have a particular #Use.

name: Use
description: The use for which a display is intended.

name: Infractor
description: The player who commits the infraction.

name: Opponent
description: The player or team that benfits from the infraction.

name: Infraction
description: Violation of the game rules.

name: Time
description: When the infraction takes place.

name: Place
description: Area of the field where the infraction takes place.

name: Type
description: The kind of infraction.

name: Activity
description: The #Activity which is enabled or facilitated by the infrastructure.

name: Possessor
description: The organization, institution, or individual who owns the infrastructure.

name: Resource
description: The infrastructure may be conceived of as consisting of #Resources that can be made use of by #Users in performing an #Activity.

name: User
description: The people for whom the infrastructure is designed to be used by.  In the cases where the constituent denoting the user also evokes the #Activity, we annotate this on the second FE layer.

name: Infrastructure
description: The collection of entities and/or institutions that help to promote an #Activity of a public character.

name: Place
description: The location of the infrastructure.

name: Ingestor
description: The #Ingestor is the person eating or drinking.

name: Ingestibles
description: The #Ingestibles are the entities that are being consumed by the #Ingestor.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which an intentional act is performed.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action.

name: Source
description: The place from which the #Ingestor takes the #Ingestibles.

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Ingestor that enables them to accomplishes the whole act of ingestion.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Ingestibles are consumed by the #Ingestor.

name: Purpose
description: The action that the #Ingestor hopes to bring about by ingesting.

name: Duration
description: The length of time spent on the ingestion activity.

name: Delivery_device
description: The #Delivery_device is the means by which the substance is ingested. <ex> <fex name="Ingestor">Tabitha</fex> <t>smoked</t> <fex name="Delivery_device">a pipe</fex>.</ex> <ex> <fex name="Ingestor">Simon </fex><t>smoked</t> <fex name="Substance"> pot</fex> <fex name="Delivery_device">with a bong</fex>.</ex>

name: Ingestor
description: The #Ingestor ingests the #Substance

name: Substance
description: The #Substance is the drug or other substance that is ingested by the #Ingestor.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Ingestor ingests the #Substance.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Ingestor ingests the #Substance.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #Ingestor ingests the #Substance.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Ingestor ingests the #Substance.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Ingestor ingests the #Substance.

name: Entry_path
description: The #Entry_path is the path along which the #Substance enters the #Ingestor s body. <ex> <fex name="Ingestor">Rick</fex> <t>snorted</t> <fex name="Substance">cocaine</fex> <fex name="Entry_path">up his nose</fex>.</ex>

name: Duration
description: The #Duration is the length of time for which the #Ingestor ingests.

name: Material
description: The entity which is used to make a #Product.

name: Use
description: The purpose for which the #Material is intended.

name: Product
description: The entity or substance that is created out of the #Material.

name: Type
description: It indicates what subtype of the general category the #Material belongs to.

name: Apparatus
description: An entity that was not created by a living thing that is conceptualized to exist to fulfill some #Goal.

name: Goal
description: The ultimate aim of the #Apparatus.

name: Domain
description: The sphere of activity in which the #Apparatus operates.

name: Type
description: A description of the #Goal.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent prevents the #Theme from moving.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme has a tendency or desire to move, but is prevented from doing so.

name: Holding_location
description: The location where the #Agent keeps the #Theme.

name: Cause
description: A non-volitional cause that inhibits the motion of the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The entity which is confined.

name: Holding_location
description:
The area within which the #Theme comes to be confined.

<ex>He <t>confined</t> 340 mutineers <fex name="Holding_location">in Burford Church</fex> for the next three days under general sentence of death.</ex>

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person performing the intentional act.

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is the non-sentient entity which is responsible for restricting the movement or location of the #Theme.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the event occurs.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose the confinement.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the action indicated by the target.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification, force, secondary effects, and general descriptions comparing events. It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Agent that affect the action.

name: Duration
description: This FE identifies the #Duration of time for which the #Agent maintains the confinement of the #Theme.

name: Inspector
description: The person who inspects the #Ground to see if it is intact or without blemish.

name: Ground
description: The entity that the #Inspector inspects with his senses to ascertain whether it is intact.

name: Unwanted_entity
description:
An entity whose presence would impair the acceptability or usefulness of the #Ground.

<ex>Security guards <t>frisked</t> all the spectators <fex name="unw">for weapons</fex> as they entered the stadium.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
Some of the words in this frame occur with a constituent that expresses the desired outcome of the inspection.  Normally this constituent is a PP Complement headed by <ment>for</ment>, or a <ment>to</ment>-marked VP Complement.

<ex><t>Check</t> all gutter brackets and clips <fex name="pur">to ensure no water will drip on to the walls</fex>.</ex>

name: Desired_state_of_affairs
description: The desirable state of affairs which the #Inspector hopes to find to obtain when inspecting the #Ground.

name: Means
description:
This FE is used for the #Means by which the #Inspector examines  the #Ground.

<ex>As in the second step the baby went to the toy and <t>examined</t> it <fex name="Means">by placing it in his mouth</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Inspector scrutinizes the #Ground.

<ex>Leather is <fex name="man">carefully</fex> <t>inspected</t> for softness, elasticity and texture</ex>

name: Degree
description:
This FE identifies the extent  to which the #Inspector examines the #Ground.

<ex> This section was <fex name="deg">partially</fex> <t>inspected</t> by the commissioner of Metro rail safety on Thursday</ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time when the #Inspector examines the #Ground.

<ex><fex name="tim">Yesterday</fex> we <t>inspected</t> all the taps and water pipes at animal enclosures being utilized</ex>

name: Instrument
description: An entity used by the #Inspector to scrutinize the #Ground.

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent is the person (or other force) that installs the #Component.


<ex><fex name="Agt">John</fex> <t>installed</t> it last night on my Gentoo system and everything is going fine so far.</ex>

name: Component
description:
The #Component is the object that is placed in a #Fixed_location.


<ex>My plumber <t>installed</t> <fex name="com">the shower pan</fex>.</ex>

name: Fixed_location
description:
The #Fixed_location is the location where the #Component is placed and to which it is attached so as to be useful.


<ex>I assembled the fuel tank using a vent line and a supply line, and then I <t>installed</t>
the tank <fex name="fix">in the fuselage</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any description of the installation event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the Agent that affect the action (<ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>, <ment>carefully</ment>).

name: Means
description:
The #Means is an act whereby the #Agent achieves the installation of the #Component.


<ex>We <t>installed</t> the spindle assembly <fex name="Means">by starting with the lower-ball joint, followed by the upper</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place indicates where the installation occurs.

<ex>When I <t>installed</t> the server <fex name="Place">there</fex> last winter they only had two rows of racks, mostly empty.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time period in which the #Component is installed.


<ex>When we <t>installed</t> our hood <fex name="Time">last month</fex>, the folks at Dallas Auto Body painted our roll pan at the same time.</ex>

name: Area
description: The #Area is the setting into which multiple #Components or a  complex #Component is installed.    <ex>I <t>installed</t>  tongue and groove pine flooring <fex name="Area">through my entire house</fex>.</ex>

name: Instance
description: A thing or episode of a certain #Type.

name: Type
description: The category of thing or event of which an #Instance is picked out.

name: Instance_prop
description: A property of the #Instance.

name: Patient
description:
The person who is committed to a facility with a view towards helping them mentally or physically.



<ex>Buffy s got this hospital phobia because her caring parents <t>institutionalized</t>
<fex name="pat">her</fex> for a while before she moved to Sunnydale.</ex>

name: Facility
description:
The facility where the #Patient is taken for treatment.


<ex>Unfortunately for Mrs. Lincoln, her son, Robert, <t>institutionalized</t> her <fex name="fac">in the
Batavia Asylum</fex> shortly after the visit to St. Charles.</ex>

name: Authority
description:
The #Authority is the actor carrying out the institutionalization with proper legal authorization, either invested into them in general by the government or granted due to power of attorney over the #Patient.

<ex>Goodrum then went to see <fex name="aut">a private doctor</fex> <fex name="aut">who</fex> <t>hospitalized</t> him.</ex>

name: Affliction
description:
The condition exhibited by the #Patient, which is deemed to merit institutionalization by the #Authority.


<ex>Her parents <t>institutionalized</t> her <fex name="aff">for what was essentially typical bad adolescent behavior</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time interval during which the institutionalization happens.

<ex><fex name="Time">Later</fex> her mother became depressed and was <t>institutionalized</t>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
An intentional action performed by the #Authority that brings about the institutionalization of the #Patient.

<ex>Without informing Volkobraun or her attorney of the court s decision, police
<fex name="Mns">forcibly</fex> <t>committed</t> her to a psychiatric hospital.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the institutionalization event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Authority that affect the action (<ment>ruthlessly</ment>). 


<ex>St Remy, of course, is most noted for being the place where Van Gogh <t>committed</t>
himself <fex name="man">voluntarily</fex> to an asylum.</ex>

name: Duration_of_final_state
description:
This FE identifies the length of the time period for which the #Authority has placed  the #Patient in the #Facility.

<ex>This time, physicians <t>hospitalized</t> him <fex name="dur">for more than a month</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location in which the #Facility is situated.

<ex>The widow of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. suffered a stroke on Wednesday, and was
<t>hospitalized</t> <fex name="pla">in Atlanta</fex>.</ex>

name: Institution
description: A permanent organization with a socially important purpose.

name: Domain
description: The concern of the #Institution - broadly speaking, the aspect of society that they affect.

name: Purpose
description: The goal of the #Institution.

name: Members
description: The individuals that make up an #Institution.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #Institution is located.

name: Descriptor
description: Any description of the #Institution not covered by a more specific frame element.

name: Agent
description: Someone who performs the intentional act.

name: Act
description: It identifies the Act that the Agent performs intentionally.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the intentional act occurs.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which an #Agent performs an intentional act.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the Agent acts intentionally.

name: Means
description: It identifies the Means by which an Agent acts intentionally.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Agent
description: The conscious entity, generally a person, that performs the intentional act that affects the #Patient.

name: Patient
description: It is the entity acted on and that may, but need not, undergo a change.

name: Event
description: It identifies the act that the #Agent performs intentionally.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the action indicated by the target.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Agent performs the intentional act.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which an #Agent intentionally affects a #Patient.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Agent intentionally affects the #Patient.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Creator
description: The #Creator creates a created entity.

name: Created_entity
description: It identifies the entity that the Agent intentionally creates.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the Agent intentionally creates the new entity.

name: Time
description: It identifies the Time when an Agent intentionally creates a new entity.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which an Agent intentionally creates a new entity.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the creation event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a #Creator that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: It identifies the Means by which a Creator intentionally creates a new entity.

name: Instrument
description: It identifies the instrument with which an Agent intentionally creates a Created_entitiy.

name: Deceiver
description: The person who acts so as to give the #Victim an incorrect idea about a #Topic.

name: Victim
description: The person who receives an incorrect idea because of the #Deceiver's actions.

name: Topic
description: The entity to which the misleading idea relates, what it is about.

name: Means
description: The action performed by the #Deceiver to fool the #Victim.

name: Time
description: The time at which the deception occurs.

name: Place
description: The location at which the deception occurs.

name: Self_mover
description: This is a sentient being or a vehicle steered by a sentient being which moves.

name: Source
description: Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion expresses the #Source.

name: Path
description: Any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal expresses the frame element #Path, excluding directional expressions.

name: Goal
description: Any expression which indicates where the #Self_mover ends up as a result of the motion expresses the #Goal.

name: Path_shape
description: The configuration formed by the entire #Path of the #Self_mover, taken simultaneously.

name: Direction
description: The direction in which the #Self_mover goes.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of a #Self_mover that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Distance
description: Any expression which characterizes the extent of motion expresses the #Distance.

name: Means
description: An event involving the #Self_mover that results in their moving in the specified way.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which the #Self_mover moves.

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the motion (which is specified by a #Source, #Path or #Goal) is located.

name: Time
description: The time at which the motion takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Self_mover wishes to bring about.

name: Duration
description: The length of time that the #Self_mover spends in motion.

name: Athlete_1
description: The athlete whose perspective is assumed by the word representing the move.

name: Athlete_2
description: The athlete or team with whom #Athlete_1 interacts.

name: Athletes
description: The #Athletes who interact with one another when represented by a single phrase.

name: Purpose
description: The goal the athletes pursue while interacting with one another.

name: Place
description: From where on the field, the court, the track or the pool the interaction between the athletes takes place.

name: Manner
description: Some aspect of how the athletes interact with one another that is not covered by the #Technique.

name: Technique
description: Some special manner in which the athletes interact with one another. The technique is usually sport-specific.

name: Time
description: When the interaction between athletes happen.

name: Equipment
description: Any objects used in a sport, with which the #Athlete_1, the #Athlete_2 or the #Athletes interact.

name: Interceptor
description: The volitional agent who without authorization of sender or recipient takes control of a #Theme that is en route to a destination.

name: Theme
description: The entity, physical or abstract, construed as traveling from a sender to a goal location, which is taken hold of by the #Interceptor without permission.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Interceptor takes control of the #Theme.

name: Time
description: The time period during which the #Interceptor takes control of the #Theme.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the Intercepting event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate also salient characteristics of the #Interceptor that also affect the action (carefully).

name: Purpose
description: The state of affairs that the #Interceptor hopes to bring about by intercepting.

name: Means
description: The action performed by the #Interceptor that results in success.

name: Figure
description:
The #Figure is the entity located with respect to the #Ground.

<ex><fex name="Figure">Ben</fex> is <t>in</t> the hallway.</ex>

name: Ground
description: The #Ground is the area that the #Figure is located in.

name: Profiled_region
description:
The area or zone interior to the #Ground.  This FE excludes #Figure and is only used in particular constructions such as the following:

<ex><t>Inside</t> the cupboard <m>was</m> <fex name="Profiled_region">a good place to hide</fex> .</ex>
<ex>We looked <fex name="Profiled_region"><t>between</t></fex> the trees .</ex>
<ex>I found the ring <fex name="Profiled_region">in there</fex> , <t>in among</t> the old moldy rugs .</ex>

name: Time
description: The time during which the #Figure was located in the #Ground.

name: Cause
description:
A force, process, or event that produces the interruption.

<ex><fex name="Cause">Leaving the page after you ve clicked "Download"</fex> will <t>interrupt</t> the transfer.</ex>

name: Process
description:
The #Process goes into a paused state due to the #Cause or #Actor.

<ex>Leaving the page after you ve clicked "Download" will <t>interrupt</t> <fex name="Process">the transfer</fex>.</ex>

name: Actor
description:
An entity which participates in a #Cause, perhaps volitionally and perhaps not, but effectively causing the interruption.

<ex>In such cases <fex name="Actor">the server</fex> will automatically <t>interrupt</t> the process.</ex>

name: Place
description: Where the interruption takes place.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the interruption occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any holistic description of the event, including overall depictions (<ment>the same way</ment>) and descriptions pertaining to the #Actor or #Cause s influence on the character of the event.

name: Means
description: An action or sub-event through which the #Actor or #Cause interrupts the Process.

name: Intoxicant
description: The #Intoxicant is ingested.

name: Type
description: It identifies the kind or sort of #Intoxicant.

name: Descriptor
description: It describes a quality of the #Intoxicant.

name: Country_of_origin
description: It identifies where the #Intoxicant is grown or originates.

name: Cognizer
description: The mental state of the #Cognizer is changed by an #Intoxicant .

name: Intoxicant
description: The #Intoxicant alters the #Cognizer's mental experience.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the #Cognizer is altered by the #Intoxicant.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of time for which the intoxication holds.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the #Cognizer is intoxicated.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Cognizer becomes intoxicated.

name: Land
description:
The political area that is being crippled by the #Invader s entry.

<ex>Henry II had made no attempt to <t>invade</t> <fex name="Land">France.</fex></ex>

name: Invader
description:
The army or other self-directed entity that is entering the #Land in a hostile manner.

<ex>Indeed , three months later <fex name="Invader">Hitler</fex> <t>invaded</t> Austria.</ex>

name: Weapon
description: An entity used by the #Invader to assist in the invasion of the #Land.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Invader that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Invader that accomplishes the assault.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the location where the #Invader invades the #Land.

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the purpose for which an #Invader attacks the #Land.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the time when the #Invader invades #Land.

name: Source
description: The starting-point of the motion of the #Invader or projectiles of the #Invader as they move toward the the #Place that the #Land is occupying in the attack.  In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion. With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Path
description: The #Path refers to (a part of) the ground over which the #Invader travels.

name: Degree
description: This FE describes how intense the invation of the #Land is.

name: Duration
description: For how long the #Land is invaded by the #Invader.

name: Invader
description: The  #Invader is the entity that overtakes the #Attacked.

name: Attacked
description: The #Attacked is the land, government, and its people that is seized by the #Invader.

name: Degree
description: This FE describes the intensity and extent of the invasion event.

name: Manner
description: The manner in which the #Invader takes over the #Attacked.

name: Means
description: The action by which the conquering event is made possible through the efforts of the #Invader.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Invader takes over the #Attacked.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Invader seizes the #Attacked.

name: Instrument
description: The tool used by the #Invader to seize the #Attacked.

name: Combatant
description: The #Combatant is the human being involved in combat.

name: Side_1
description: The side of the conflict for which the #Combatant fights.

name: Side_2
description: A (or the) side of the conflict to which the #Combatant is opposed.

name: Conflict
description: The #Conflict in which the #Combatants are fighting.  <ex>Some call him a <fex name="conf">holy war</fex> fighter and martyr.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The desired result of the outcome of the hostile encounter for #Side_1. It may either directly refer to the state of affairs that is desired, or the state of affairs may be implicit in an (abstract or concrete) entity that they desire.

<ex>We are not just soldiers - we are <t>fighters</t> <fex name="pur">for a cause</fex>.</ex>

name: Group
description:
The larger military group of which the #Combatant is a part.

<ex>A number of <fex name="gro">militia</fex> <t>fighters</t> were arrested during the raid.</ex>

name: Place
description: The town or area that is in a remote location.

name: Relative_location
description: A place with respect to which the #Place is located.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer makes the judgment. This role is typically expressed as the External Argument.

name: Evaluee
description: Evaluee is the person or thing about whom/which a judgment is made. With verbs this FE is typically expressed as Object.

name: Reason
description: Typically, there is a constituent expressing the Reason for the Judge's judgment.

name: Expressor
description: It is the body part or action by a body part that conveys the judgment made by the #Cognizer.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the judging occurs.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner of judging.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which the #Cognizer judges the #Evaluee.

name: Topic
description: It identifies the entity to which the proposition or propositions conveyed relate.

name: Extent_of_acclaim
description: The #Extent_of_acclaim is a description of the number or locales of the #Cognizers.

name: Communicator
description: The #Communicator uses language in the written or spoken modality to convey his or her evaluation of the #Evaluee to another person.

name: Medium
description: It identifies the physical or abstract setting in which the evaluation is conveyed.

name: Topic
description: It identifies the entity to which the proposition or propositions conveyed relate.

name: Evaluee
description: A judgment is made about the #Evaluee.

name: Expressor
description: It is the body part or action by a body part that conveys the judgment made by the #Communicator.

name: Reason
description: Typically, there is a constituent expressing the #Reason for the #Communicator's judgment.

name: Addressee
description: The #Addressee hears the judgement from the #Communicator.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the judgmental communication occurs.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which a judgmental communication is accomplished.

name: Time
description: When the communication of the judgment takes place.

name: Place
description: Where the communication of the judgment takes place.

name: Communicator
description: The #Communicator communicates a judgment to the #Addressee.

name: Addressee
description: The #Addressee is judged by the #Communicator and receives the message of approval or disapproval.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the subject on which the #Addressee is being judged.

name: Reason
description: The #Reason is why the #Communicator forms the type of judgment they form.

name: Medium
description: The #Medium identifies the physical or abstract entity in which the judgment is conveyed.

name: Expressor
description: An action or entity under the control of the #Communicator that expresses the criticism or praise directed towards the #Addressee.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree is the severity of the judgment.

name: Grounds
description: The #Grounds describes the basis for the judgment.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner is the way in which the judgment is communicated.

name: Means
description: The #Means is the method employed to communicate the judgment.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Communicator admonishes the #Addressee.

name: Time
description: The point in time at which the #Communicator berates or compliments the #Addressee.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity for which a particular gradable #Attribute is appropriate and under consideration.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the intensity of the #Attribute from the norm or from the value for another #Entity. This FE is incorporated for each LU in this frame.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of an #Entity which is under discussion.

name: Judicial_body
description: A permanent organization with the socially important purpose of administering justice.

name: Domain
description: The concern of the #Judicial_body - broadly speaking, the aspect of society that they affect.

name: Task
description: The responsibility that a #Judicial_body has, either defined in terms of the type of cases that they can hear, or more specifically by reference to an action that the authority constituting them wishes the #Judicial_body to achieve.

name: Jurisdiction
description: The geographical area within which the #Judicial_body has authority and responsibility.

name: Rank
description: The degree of authority invested in a #Judicial_body relative to other courts in the same system.

name: Seat
description: The location (typically a city) in which the #Judicial_body hears cases.

name: Source_of_authority
description: The political entity under whose laws the #Judicial_body is constituted and whose laws are applied.

name: Judges
description: The individuals that make up the #Judicial_body.

name: Jury
description: The group that debates the case.

name: Charges
description: The legal label for the crime that the defendant is accused of.

name: Case
description: The #Case which a trial is convened to decide.

name: Possible_sentence
description: A sentence that the jury considers during deliberation.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which the deliberation is ongoing.

name: Time
description: When the deliberation takes place.

name: Place
description: Where the deliberation takes place.

name: Agent
description: The person or organization that  is held responsible for a prior #Act or for a #State_of_affairs.

name: Act
description: An action  for which the #Agent is held responsible, frequently one that the #Agent has taken themself.

name: State_of_affairs
description: A #State_of_affairs that the #Agent is held responsible for.

name: Judge
description: The person or institution that holds the #Agent responsible for an #Act or #State_of_affairs.

name: Means
description: An intentional action, typically an act of speaking, which the #Agent performs in order to justify an #Act or #State_of_affairs.

name: Domain
description: The general spectrum of reasoning that the #Agent uses to explain the #Act or #State_of_affairs.

name: Time
description: The #Time of the justifying event.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the justification was adequate.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer is the person or sentient entity that experiences or feels the emotions.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the general area in which the emotion occurs. It indicates a range of possible #Stimulus.

name: Stimulus
description: The #Stimulus is the person, event, or state of affairs that evokes the emotional response in the #Experiencer.

name: Expressor
description: The body part, gesture, or other expression of the #Experiencer that reflects his or her emotional state.

name: State
description: The #State is the abstract noun that describes a more lasting experience by the #Experiencer.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Experiencer's emotion deviates from the norm for the emotion.

name: Parameter
description: The #Parameter is a domain in which the #Experiencer experiences the #Stimulus.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the way in which the #Experiencer experiences the #Stimulus which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). The #Manner may also describe a state of the #Experiencer that affects the details of the emotional experience.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Experiencer, #Expressor, or #State can be described as having said emotion.

name: Medium
description: It is the physical entity or channel used to transmit the experience invoked by the #Stimulus.

name: Key
description: It identifies the object that is designed to grant access to a location or function. This is the target LU, and this frame element is incorporated into each of this frame s LUs.

name: Function
description: The function that the #Key grants access to.

name: Location
description: The location that the #Key grants access to.

name: Object
description: The artifact that the key operates on.

name: Perpetrator
description: The #Perpetrator is the person (or other agent) who carries off and holds the #Victim against his or her will.

name: Victim
description: The #Victim is the person who is carried off and held against his/her will.

name: Place
description: Where the kidnapping takes place.

name: Time
description: When the kidnapping occurs.

name: Source
description: It is the initial location of the #Victim before it changes location.

name: Goal
description: It is the place in which the #Victim ends up.

name: Degree
description: It is the #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Manner
description: It is the #Manner in which the kidnapping takes place.

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Perpetrator that helps them accomplish the kidnapping.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose is what the #Perpetrator hopes to accomplish by kidnapping.

name: Event
description: The abduction of a #Victim by a #Perpetrator.

name: Duration
description: The period of time for which the #Victim is held by the #Perpetrator.

name: Killer
description: The person or sentient entity that causes the death of the #Victim.

name: Victim
description: The living entity that dies as a result of the killing.

name: Cause
description: An inanimate entity or process that causes the death of the #Victim.

name: Means
description: The method or action that the #Killer or #Cause performs resulting in the death of the #Victim.

name: Instrument
description: The device used by the #Killer to bring about the death of the #Victim.

name: Place
description: The location where the death took place.

name: Time
description: The point or period of time within which the #Victim is killed.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of a #Killer that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Degree
description: The #Degree appears with adjectives to describe the killing potential of an object or with nouns to describe how widespread the killing is.

name: Alter
description: The person who fills the role named by the Kinship term with respect to the #Ego.

name: Ego
description: The person from whose perspective the Kinship relationship is defined.

name: Relatives
description: The combination of #Alter and #Ego together.

name: Degree
description: An expression of the closeness or distance of the relation.  We do not go into full anthropological detail in measuring the distance of the relation, but simply annotate all such expressions as #Degree.

name: Agent
description: It is the person performing the intentional act.

name: Knot
description: The stable configuration of a string which results from tying.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which a #Knot is produced.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which an intentional act is performed.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Agent by which the creation of the #Knot is accomplished.

name: Manner
description: It is the #Manner of performing an action.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the sentient being who manipulates the #Rope.

name: Rope
description: The basically linear object which is manipulated by the #Agent to produce a #Knot.

name: Knot
description: The stable configuration of a #Rope which results from tying.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which the #Rope is manipulated.

name: Place
description: Where the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.

name: Time
description: When the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.

name: Manner
description: It is the #Manner in which the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.

name: Speaker
description:
The #Speaker is the person who conventionally uses a linguistic sign to refer to an #Entity.

<ex><fex name="spe">They</fex> <t>call</t> it a Mutt Mitt.</ex>

name: Entity
description:
The concrete or abstract thing with which the #Speaker has associated a particular linguistic sign.

<ex>He <t>termed</t> <fex name="ent">it</fex> "a pretty incredible discovery" on par with two other 10,000-
to 11,000-year-old specimens</ex>

name: Label
description:
The linguistic sign that the #Speaker uses to designate the #Entity. 

<ex>In Texas, we <t>call</t> it <fex name="lab">walking"</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Americans <t>call</t> it <fex name="lab">a faucet</fex>. What do the British call it ?</ex>

name: Medium
description:
A text whose author applies a particular #Label to an #Entity.

<ex><fex name="med">Your article</fex> <t>labels</t> him "Republican Senator Jim Exon".</ex>

name: Time
description:
A time period in which a #Speaker uses the #Label.

<ex><fex name="tim">Back in the olden days</fex>, they <t>called</t> it "Bohemian people."</ex>

name: Place
description:
A physical space whose occupants use the #Label to refer to the #Entity. 

<ex>I really loved this movie. <fex name="Place">In France</fex>, they <t>called</t> it "Turbo Interceptor".</ex>

name: Agent
description: A sentient entity whose physical and mental faculties are directly expended on the #Input to create the #Output.

name: Cause
description: A non-sentient entity whose physical faculties are directly expended on the #Input to create the #Output.

name: Input
description: The mental or physical faculties onto which the #Agent or #Cause expends energy.

name: Output
description: The end product, either a concept or physical object onto which the #Agent or #Cause has exerted its mental or physical faculties from the rudimentary state of #Input.

name: fe_Língua
description: fe_Língua

name: user
description: user

name: capacity
description: capacity

name: development
description: development

name: Process
description: This Frame Element marks expressions that indicate the process that the #Agent initiates.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the actor responsible for starting the #Process.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the #Process is initiated.

name: Means
description: The #Means is the way in which the #Agent initiates the #Process.

name: Time
description: This FE is for the #Time when the #Agent initiates the #Process.

name: Medium
description: #Medium is the physical or abstract setting in which the #Agent initiates the #Process.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Agent initiates the #Process.

name: Law
description: This FE identifies the rule designed to guide activity, deprecating some types of activity and/or requiring other types of activity. This FE is incorporated into each LU in this frame.

name: Forbidden
description:
The state-of-affairs which is disallowed by the #Law.

<ex>I think we need a <t>law</t> <fex name="for">against all firearms within city limits</fex>.</ex>

name: Required
description:
A state-of-affairs which the #Law declares must be maintained.

<ex>The <t>law</t> <fex name="req">that all minors must be accompanied by an adult</fex> is a laughingstock.</ex>

name: Use
description:
The use for which a law is intended.

<ex>We brought back a <t>law</t> <fex name="Use">to forbid the use of profanity</fex>.</ex>

name: Creator
description:
An individual or individuals that bring the #Law into existence.

<ex>But this was forbidden by the <fex name="Creator">King s</fex> <t>Law</t> of 1665.</ex>

name: Time_of_creation
description:
The time at which a #Law comes into existence.

<ex>The <fex name="Time">1996</fex> welfare reform <t>act</t> was a sham.</ex>

name: Name
description:
The term used to refer to a #Law.

<ex>Well, they re still in violation of the <fex name="Name">Sarbanes-Oxley</fex> <t>Act</t>.</ex>

name: Type
description:
An indication of the subtype of #Law.

<ex>According to <fex name="Type">Canon</fex> <t>Law</t>, priests may not marry.</ex>

name: Part
description:
Any indication of what makes up the #Law.

<ex>We don t need another <t>law</t> <fex name="Part">with 300 subsections</fex>.</ex>

name: Jurisdiction
description:
The location where a given #Law is in force.

<ex>According to <fex name="jur">Fijian</fex> <t>law</t>, no-one may enter the park after sunset.</ex>

name: Agency
description: The #Agency is a part of the government dedicated to enforcing the laws of the government s jurisdiction.

name: Jurisdiction
description: The #Agency is charged with enforcing the laws of and within a particular #Jurisdiction.

name: Members
description: A person belonging to the #Agency.

name: Purpose
description: The reason for which the #Agency is formed or the purpose to which it is dedicated. This FE is for expressions that indicate more specific purposes than the general one(s) indicated by the target itself.

name: Place
description: This FE describes the general location where the #Agency operates, but does not indicate the jurisdiction of the #Agency.

name: Leader
description:
The #Leader is the one who has the role of leading.  With verbs, and with predicate nominals linking an individual to a #Role, the #Leader is usually the External Argument: 
<ex><fex name="Leader">King Hussein</fex> <t>ruled</t> Jordan.</ex> 
<ex><fex name="Leader">Hussein</fex> was <t>King</t> of Jordan.</ex> 
With leadership nouns, the frame element #Leader is most frequently instantiated by the target itself.
<ex>The <fex name="Leader"><t>queen</t></fex> announced her upcoming visit to Belgium.</ex>

name: Role
description:
The role played by the #Leader in a given situation, often an official title; incorporated in most noun LUsin this frame. When expressed separately from the target, #Role usually occurs in a PP Complement headed by <ment>as</ment>.

<ex>Hussein <t>reigned</t> <fex name="Role">as King of Jordan</fex></ex>

name: Governed
description:
The entity whose actions or beliefs the #Leader directs in the context of a joint activity or movement.  This entity can be a political body, a person, or a group of people.

<ex>Cyprus Turks turn against <fex name="gov">their</fex> <t>leader</t></ex>
<ex>Naoto Kan is the new <t>leader</t> <fex name="gov">of the Democratic Party of Japan</fex>.</ex>
<ex>King Hussein <t>ruled</t> <fex name="gov">Jordan</fex>.</ex>

name: Activity
description:
The #Leader directs the #Activity.

<ex>The captain s cousin <t>led</t> <fex name="Activity">the mutiny</fex>.</ex>
<ex>John Cage is one of the <t>leaders</t> <fex name="Activity">of the minimalist music movement</fex>.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
Leadership by any particular individual is frequently limited in time, which is noted here as #Duration.   #Duration usually occurs in a PP Complement.
<ex>She <t>reigned</t> <fex name="Duration">for 3 years</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
#Manner refers to the style/way in which the leadership is asserted.

<ex>Alternative and orthodox practitioners <t>reign</t> <fex name="Manner">harmoniously</fex> <fex name="Manner">side by side</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
#Means identifies act(s) performed by the #Leader through which leadership is maintained.
<ex>He <t>ruled</t> <fex name="Mns">by sheer brutality and intimidation</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Napolean <t>reigned</t> <fex name="Mns">by the grace of God and the will of the people</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which leadership is asserted.

name: Time
description:
#Time refers to the point in time that the leadership took place.

<ex>The general <t>led</t> his troops into battle <fex name="Time">on June 22, 1883</fex>.</ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
The #Descriptor is a temporary condition of the #Leader.

<ex>A <fex name="des">nervous</fex> <t>governor</t> stepped up to the lectern to give his speech.</ex>

name: Type
description: This FE indicates what subtype of the general category the #Leader belongs to.

name: Place
description:
The locale from which the #Leader leads the #Governed or the #Activity.

<ex>He <t>ruled</t> the west <fex name="Place">from his palace in Milan</fex>.</ex>

name: Evidence
description:
The thing that indicates an Entity was in a Location.

He found traces of the burglar in the hallway.

name: Entity
description:
The thing whose former existence in a Location can be deduced from the #Evidence.

Traces of the former inhabitants can still be found in the abandoned manor.

name: Event
description: An event whose details are revealed through the discovery of #Evidence.

name: Descriptor
description: This frame element describes characteristics and properties of the #Evidence not covered by other frame elements.

name: Location
description: The place or context in which the <fex name="">Evidence</fex> of an is discovered, showing that an <fex name="">Event</fex> occured there or an <fex name="">Entity</fex> existed there.

name: Time
description: A description of the time that an #Event occurs or an #Entity exists at a place.

name: Reliability
description: Any description of how clearly the #Evidence indicates the former #Event.

name: Process
description: The activity that is being applied to the mass or the set of entities.

name: Remainder
description: The mass or group that has not yet been processed.

name: Time
description:
The time when the #Remainder is assessed.

<ex><fex name="tm">Now</fex> only three more items <t>remain</t> to be sold</ex>

name: Agent
description: The individuals who are scheduled to apply the #Process to the #Remainder. The #Agent may be the same or a different individual who applied the process to the part that has already undergone the #Process.

name: Action
description: The #Action is the behavior which complies with or violates the #Code.

name: Object
description: The #Object complies with or violates the #Code by virtue of its existence, location or possession.

name: Authority
description:
The Authority (which may be the jury, judge, magistrate or court) decides on the #Finding.

<ex><fex name="Authority">The US International Trade Commission</fex> <t>ruled</t> <fex name="Finding">that a 1987 anti-dumping tariff against frozen concentrated orange juice from Brazil could be revoked</fex> <fex name="Case">DNI</fex>.</ex>

name: Finding
description:
This FE identifies the outcome of the #Authority s deliberation or consideration.

<ex>Miss Mahmod s father <t>ruled</t> <fex name="Finding">that she would never marry him</fex>.</ex>

name: Case
description:
This FE describes the question on which the #Authority gives a #Finding.

<ex>US Supreme Court <t>ruled</t> <fex name="Case">on flag salutes in public schools</fex> today.</ex>

name: Defendant
description:
The person about whom the #Authority passes a judgment or #Finding.

<ex>They held <t>judgment</t> <fex name="D">upon me</fex> as a convicted traitress.</ex>

name: Time
description: When the Authority gives his #Finding.

name: Place
description: Where the #Finding takes place.

name: Legal_basis
description: This FE indicates the basis in law of a #Finding.

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Authority acts.

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the purpose why the #Authority returns a particular #Finding.

name: Means
description: This FE identifies an action that the #Authority performs in order to return the verdict.

name: Re-encoding
description: This FE presents the current frame as an integral part of a larger conceptualization expressed by another frame. The frame expressed by the target typically corresponds to a Means action within the frame expressed by the Re-encoding, but not necessarily

name: Borrower
description:
The person or institution who receives the #Theme from the #Lender for a #Duration.
<ex>I <t>lent</t> the book <fex name="Borr">to him</fex> for a whole month, and he still hasn t read it.</ex>

name: Lender
description:
The person or institution who gives the #Theme to the #Borrower for a #Duration.

<ex><fex name="Lend">I</fex> <t>lent</t> the book to him for a whole month, and he still hasn t read it.</ex>

name: Theme
description:
The object that is transferred from the #Lender to the #Borrower for a #Duration.
<ex>I <t>lent</t> <fex name="Th">the book</fex> to him for a whole month, and he still hasn t read it.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The amout of time in which the #Borrower has possession of the #Theme.

<ex>I <t>lent</t> the book to him <fex name="Dur">for a whole month</fex>, and he still hasn t read it.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The aim of the #Lender which they believe will be accomplished by lending the #Theme to the #Borrower.

<ex>His parents <t>lent</t> him money <fex name="Purp">to pay off his student loans</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time when the lending event occurs.

<ex>I <t>lent</t> him my car <fex name="Time">on Friday</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The way in which the #Lender lends the #Theme.

<ex>Juan <t>lent</t> me the car <fex name="Man">reluctantly</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location in which the Lender lends the #Theme to the #Borrower.

<ex>I <t>lent</t> him my book <fex name="Pla">in Dubai</fex>.</ex>

name: Exerter
description:
the #exerter that can or does exert a force of the level specified by the target. 

<ex>salesmen touted the <t>power</t> <fex name="exer">of the engine's motor</fex>.</ex>

name: Force
description:
the #force that can or does exert a force of the level specified by the target. 

<ex>no one should underestimate the <t>mighty</t> <fex name="for">strength</fex> of the dung beetle.</ex>

name: Action
description: Action

name: Degree
description:
the #degree to which the #exerter, #action, or #force can or does exert a force. 

<ex>after being in space for six months, his muscles were <fex name="deg">extremely</fex> <t>weak</t>.</ex>

where #degree is expressed by a comparative or superlative form of the target, the fe is marked on the target (as well as on the rest of the comparative/superlative expression, if present):
<ex>years of lifting had made him a <t><fex name="deg">stronger</fex></t> man.</ex>
<ex>years of lifting had made him <t><fex name="deg">stronger</fex></t> <fex name="deg">than any of his peers</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
the location where the #exerter, #action, or #force can or does exert its force. 
<ex>muhammad ali's <t>force</t> <fex name="pla">in the ring</fex> was indisputable.</ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
this fe describes the force exertion of the #exerter, #action, or #force.

<ex>henry's <fex name="desc">longstanding</fex> <t>powerlessness</t> against the school bully made him fearful and withdrawn.</ex>

name: Domain
description:
the #domain is the field in which the #exerter, #action, or #force can or does exert its force. 

<ex>the u.s. possesses great <fex name="dom">military</fex> <t>strength</t>.</ex>

name: Resisting_entity
description:
the #resisting_entity is the item that resists the #opposing_force to the level specified by the target. 

<ex>these are made from a <t>tough</t> <fex name="ent">plastic foam</fex> and are very light to wear.</ex>

<ex>a great number of <t>hardy</t> <fex name="ent">plants</fex> usually succeed in blooming even in the severest season.</ex> 

<ex>the <t>fragile</t> <fex name="ent">canoe</fex> did not capsize!</ex>

name: Opposing_force
description:
the #opposing_force is the item placed in opposition to the #resisting_entity. #opposing_force hinders, blocks, helps, or allows (lets) the #resisting_entity to resist at the level specified by the target. sometimes this core fe is incorporated in the target; otherwise, it is often null instantiated in example sentences. 

<ex>the fortress was <t>impregnable</t> <fex name="opp">to attack by hostile invaders</fex>.</ex> 

<ex>its best-known feature is its soft and <t>pliable</t> duck-like beak. <fex name="opp">ini</fex> </ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
this fe describes the force resistance of the #resisting_entity. 

<ex>scottish ancestors had given her an <fex name="desc">amazing</fex> <t>toughness</t> which enabled her to endure the hardships of life.</ex>

name: Domain
description:
the #domain is the field in which the #resisting_entity resists an external force. 

<ex>factors that determine the choice of materials include <fex name="dom">physical</fex> <t>robustness</t>.</ex>

name: Location
description: The place whose amount of light is being described. The #Location can also be a location in time.

name: Source
description: The entity from which the light emanates.

name: Degree
description: The degree of the amount of light.

name: Emitter
description: This FE identifies the entity at the #Source from which the #Beam originates.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the location the #Beam occupies initially before its change of location.

name: Beam
description:
The light that travels from a #Source along a #Path to a #Goal. 
<ex><fex name="Beam">Sunlight</fex> <t>gleamed</t> from the water of the bay.</ex>
<ex><fex name="Beam">Lamplight</fex> <t>flickered</t> through the foggy air.</ex>

name: Path
description: #Path refers to where the #Beam travels over or to a landmark the #Beam travels by.

name: Goal
description: #Goal is the location the #Beam ends up in.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which the light movement occurs

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Hypothetical_event
description: The state of affairs or occurrence whose likelihood is assessed.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity would normally be expected to have a set of possibilities, but instead exhibits only certain possibilities, or exhibits them on fewer situations than expected.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Entity is limited.

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent consciously places limits upon the Range_of_options.

<ex><fex name="age">The military</fex> <t>limited</t> building access to key personnel.</ex>

name: Cause
description:
The #Cause is a natural occurrence or state-of-affairs that limits the Range_of_options.

<ex><fex name="cau">Ongoing rains</fex> have <t>limited</t> drivers to a small number of roads.</ex>

name: Range_of_options
description:
The #Range_of_options would normally be expected to have a set of possibilites, but is limited by an #Agent or #Cause to particular subtypes, situations or characteristics.

<ex>The military <t>limited</t> <fex name="ran">building access</fex> to key personnel.</ex>

name: Characteristic
description:
The #Characteristic indicates the subtypes or situations to which the #Range_of_options is limited.

<ex>The military <t>limited</t> access <fex name="cha">to key personnel only</fex>.</ex>

<ex>You should <t>limit</t> your meals <fex name="cha">to three per day at most</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The #Degree to which the #Range_of_options has been limited.

<ex>Our choices have now been <fex name="deg">severely</fex> <t>limited</t>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time at which the limiting takes place.

<ex>Banks are <fex name="tim">currently</fex> <t>limiting</t> customers to two cash transactions per day.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The length of time over which the #Range_of_options is limited.

<ex>If you <t>limit</t> your caloric intake <fex name="dur">for too long</fex>, it could damage your health.</ex>

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Agent of #Cause limits the #Range_of_options.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Agent or #Cause limits the #Range_of_options.

name: Means
description: An act performed by the Agent or Cause that accomplishes the action indicated by the target.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which the Agent or Cause limits the Range_of_options.

name: Form
description: #Form is the formal pole of a linguistic sign.

name: Meaning
description: #Meaning is the sense of a linguistic #Form.

name: Referent
description: #Referent identifies an object in the real (or a hypothetical) world that a linguistic expression is used to talk about.
