name: Location
description: The #Location where a lot of activity is taking place, or prototypically takes place.

name: Activity
description: The #Activity that is conceptually filling the #Location.

name: Individuals
description: The #Individuals are engaged in the #Activity, creating a lively #Location.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation in amount of activity from the norm or from the amount for another #Location.

name: Duration
description: Duration denotes the length of time from the beginning of a continuous situation (the one denoted by the target) to its end. In many cases, the continuous situation is a dynamic action which is ongoing, while in others it is simply an undifferentiated state.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Individuals or #Location is engaging in the #Activity.

name: Experiencer
description: A person who experiences the effects of some situation or #Condition for a long period of time.

name: Condition
description: This FE describes the situation that the #Experiencer must cope with over a long period of time.

name: Place
description: Where the #Experiencer is located when he or she faces the #Condition.

name: Time
description: A general description of the temporal location of the #Experiencer while coping with the #Condition.

name: Duration
description: The length of time that the #Experiencer must cope with the #Condition.

name: Locale
description: A stable bounded area.  It is typically the designation of the nouns of Locale-derived frames.

name: Relative_location
description: A place that a #Locale is located with respect to.

name: Locale
description:
A stable bounded area characterized by properties of the entities who are typically located there (e.g., work and/or live there).

<ex>A twenty-minute walk will take you to the Dutch-speaking <t><fex name="loc">quarter</fex></t> of the city.</ex>

name: Characteristic
description:
A property or characteristic of the entities in the #Locale.

<ex>A twenty-minute walk will take you to the <fex name="cha">Dutch-speaking</fex> <t>quarter</t> of the city.</ex>

name: Relative_location
description:
A place that a #Locale is located with respect to.

<ex>Residents of the suburban <t>enclave</t> <fex name="rel">near downtown</fex> have started their own little rebellion.</ex>

name: Container_possessor
description:
The larger area within which the #Locale is located.

<ex>A twenty-minute walk will take you to the Dutch-speaking <t>quarter</t> <fex name="ContP">of the city</fex>.</ex>

name: Profiled_region
description:
The region where the #Entity is located.

<ex>If you sign up for this new service, we can get a fix on your phone s <t><fex name="reg">location</fex></t> if you lose it or it is stolen.</ex>

name: Entity
description:
The entity is located at the #Profiled_region.

<ex>If you sign up for this new service, we can get a fix on <fex name="Entity">your phone s</fex> <t>location</t> if you lose it or it is stolen.</ex>

name: Relative_location
description:
A place that a #Profiled_region is located with respect to.

<ex>Once you have indicated your <t>location</t> <fex name="Relative_location">next to a shopping mall</fex>, you can access the full array of our services on your mobile device.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time at which the #Entity is at the #Profiled_region.

<ex>Any updates on his <fex name="tim">current</fex> <t>location</t>?</ex>

name: Locale
description:
A stable bounded area.  It is typically the denotation of the nouns in Locale_by_event, which will be annotated on the target word.

<ex>We need to find a suitable <t>venue</t> <fex name="DefEvnt">for such a large wedding</fex>.</ex>
<ex><fex name="Locale">Tours</fex> <m>was</m> the <t>site</t> <fex name="DefEvnt">of the defeat of the Turks by the French</fex>.</ex>

name: Defining_event
description:
The event for which the locale is known or is named
<ex>The driver died at the <t>scene</t> <fex name="DefEvnt">of the accident</fex>.</ex>

name: Relative_location
description:
A place that a #Locale is located with respect to.

<ex>The <t>site</t> <fex name="DefEvnt">of their first meeting</fex>, <fex name="rel">west of the Mississippi</fex>, has never been disclosed.</ex>

name: Name
description:
The name of the locale.
<ex>The <fex name="Name">Bonneville</fex> <t>site</t> has been a favorite of drivers for many years.</ex>

name: Locale
description: A stable bounded area.  It is typically the designation of the nouns of Locale-derived frames.

name: Owner
description: The individual or group of individuals who hold posses the #Locale.

name: Relative_location
description: A place that a #Locale is located with respect to.

name: Locale
description: A stable bounded area.  It is typically the designation of the nouns of Locale-derived frames.

name: Use
description: The activity that is carried out in the #Locale.

name: Constituent_parts
description: Salient parts that make up a #Locale.

name: Relative_location
description: A place that a Locale is located with respect to.

name: Locale
description:
The #Locale is the entity that ceases to be available for use.

<ex><fex name="loc">The other post office</fex> <t>closed</t> so they could build a new one.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time of the closure.

<ex><fex name="loc">The fire department</fex> <t>closed</t> <fex name="tim">in 2008 </fex> after the city ceased to be incorporated.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The #Manner describes the way in which the #Locale closed.

<ex><fex name="loc">Yosemite</fex> <fex name="man">swiftly</fex> <t>closed</t> when the wildfires swept through.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place of the failing locale.

<ex><fex name="loc">Every park</fex> <t>closed</t> <fex name="pla">in New York City</fex> <fex name="tim">last week</fex> <fex name="exp">for the fireworks</fex>.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The length of time that the #Locale remains closed.

<ex>The shop <t>closed</t> <fex name="dur">for three hours</fex> while police did their investigation.</ex>

name: Perceiver
description: The individual that determines the #Location of the #Sought_entity.

name: Sought_entity
description: The entity that the #Perceiver succeeds in finding.

name: Location
description: The position of the #Sought_entity.

name: Ground
description: The general set of entities that the #Perceiver examined in order to find the #Sought_entity.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Sought_entity is located.

name: Focal_time
description: The particular, salient point in time. If a specified time is present, it is the focal time. Otherwise, the unit is the focal time. If there is an appositive that specifies an entity that it not necessarily larger than the target, both the unit and the specification are the FE.

name: Relative_time
description: It denotes words that locate the time with respect to an identifiable reference point.

name: Name
description: It denotes the name of the particular point in time.

name: Whole
description: The #Whole describes the larger unit of which the target word describes one part. If there is an appositive that is necessarily larger, it's the #Whole.

name: Figure
description:
The percept which is perceived at a certain #Ground location.
<ex><fex name="Fig">Candlelight</fex> <t>sparkled</t> on the silverware.</ex><ex><fex name="Fig">Her face</fex> <t>glistened</t> with sweat.</ex>

name: Ground
description: The location of the phenomenon.<ex>Hot coals <t>glowed</t> <fex name="Grnd">behind the fire grate</fex>.</ex>

name: Light
description:
The #Light which is emitted.  In this frame, it is usually incorporated in verbs and adjectives, and is the denotation of many of the nouns.
<ex>The fire <fex name="Lit"><t>glowed</t></fex>.</ex>
<ex>The <fex name="Light"><t>glint</t></fex> of gold made me blind with greed.</ex>

Occasionally this FE shows up as a full argument:<ex>The chamber <fex name="Lit"><t>glowed</t></fex> <fex name="Lit">with brilliant light</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: #Degree to which the #Light is emitted, usually indicating the brightness.

name: Manner
description:
#Manner of #Light emission.
<ex>In the dim light the gold and strong colours <t>glittered</t> and glowed <fex name="Manr">intensely</fex>.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The period for which the #Figure shows up against the #Ground due to #Light falling on it.

<ex><fex name="Duration">For a few minutes</fex> the walls <t>glowed</t> in the sun</ex>

name: Place
description:
The spatial setting in which the #Figure shows up against a #Ground location.

<ex><fex name="Place">Outside</fex> something was <t>shimmering</t> on the shore.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time when the #Figure is observed against the #Ground location due to #Light shining on it.

<ex><fex name="Time">In the morning</fex> the grass <t>glistened</t> with dew</ex>

name: Ground
description: The #Ground serves as a basis for describing the location of the #Figure somewhere in the midst of their motion or during the entirety of the motion event.

name: Figure
description: The #Figure is perceived as in motion relative to a certain #Ground location.

name: Profiled_region
description:
The region within which a #Figure might be found.  This FE is exclusive of #Figure, and is a reconstrual that is not possible with verb lexical units.

<ex><fex name="Profiled_region"><t>Past</t> the kitchen</fex> is the path she chose .</ex>

name: Figures
description: The #Figures are items conceived of as moving with respect to each other.

name: Time
description: The period of time during which the locative relation between #Figure and #Ground obtains.

name: Ground
description: The #Ground serves as a basis for describing the location of the #Figure.

name: Figure
description: The #Figure is perceived as located relative to a certain #Ground location. The figure can be an entity or an event.

This FE is exclusive of #Figure, and is a reconstrual that is not possible with verb lexical units.A região dentro da qual uma #Figura pode ser encontrada. name: Figures
description: The #Figures are items which mutually serve to identify the location of the other items.

name: Time
description: The period of time during which the locative relation between #Figure and #Ground obtains.

name: Figure
description: The entity that is located with respect to the #Ground.

name: Ground
description: The entity with respect to which the #Figure is located.

name: Figures
description: The entities that are located with respect to each other.

name: Profiled_region
description: The area with respect to the #Ground or #Figures in which the #Figure or #Figures reside.

name: Host
description: The #Host is the individual (or group of individuals) that own or control the #Residence and allow the  #Lodger to temporarily stay there.

name: Lodger
description: The #Lodger is the individual who is given permission to lodge in the #Residence.

name: Residence
description: The location controlled by the #Host which the #Lodger stays at temporarily.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the #Host provides a #Residence to the #Lodger.

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the #Host provides a temporary #Residence.

name: Donor
description: The person that begins in possession of the #Theme and causes it to be in the possession of the #Recipient.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the object that changes ownership due to the Relinquishing.

name: Recipient
description: The #Recipient is the entity that ends up in possession of the #Theme.

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the Relinquishing occurs.

name: Time
description: The #Time indicates when the Relinquishing occurs.

name: Donor
description: The entity that began by owning the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The thing which was originally owned by the #Donor.(This does not include bodyparts or medical conditions, but does include intellectual property, etc.)

name: Owner
description: The original #Owner of the #Possession.

name: Possession
description: The object that is possessed by the #Owner.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Possession is lost.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #Possession is lost.

name: Means
description: This FE describes how the #Owner loses the #Possession.

name: Protagonist
description:
This is the person (or people) whose mental state changes.

<ex><fex name="Protagonist">Kim</fex> <t>went</t> <t>ballistic</t>.</ex>

name: Action
description:
Something done by the #Protagonist as a result of losing mental equilibrium.

<ex>You totally <t>lost</t> <t>it</t> <fex name="act">with that speech you just gave to the Principal</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
#Degree marks the extent to which the #Protagonist s mental state changes.

<ex>John <fex name="Degree">totally</fex> <t>lost</t> <t>it</t></ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, especially general descriptions comparing events.

<ex>He <t>flipped</t> <t>out</t> <fex name="Manner">like my dad did last year</fex>.</ex>

name: Sufferer
description: The being or entity that emotionally experiences the death of the #Deceased.

name: Deceased
description: The entity that has died.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #Deceased passed away.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Deceased passed away.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Timespan
description: The period over which a loss has occurred.

name: Duration
description: How long the event takes place.

name: Frequency
description: How often the loss occurs.

name: State_of_affairs
description:
The State of affairs that is evaluated.

<ex>That was a <t>lucky</t> <fex name="State_of_affairs">catch</fex>.</ex>

name: Protagonist
description:
The Protagonist is the one for whom the destiny is evaluated.

<ex><fex name="Protagonist">He</fex> is <t>lucky</t>.</ex>

name: Role
description:
The #Role filled by the #Protagonist.

<ex><fex name="Protagonist">He</fex> is a <t>lucky</t> <fex name="Role">gambler</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time for which the #Protagonist s destiny is good.

<ex><fex name="Protagonist">I</fex> was <fex name="deg">rather</fex> <t>fortunate</t> <fex name="Time">in the late 90s</fex>, making much of my fortune at that time.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The #Degree to which the #State_of_affairs is lucky (either a degree of goodness or a degree of unexpectedness, or both).

<ex><fex name="Protagonist">He</fex> is <fex name="deg">very</fex> <t>lucky</t>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location where the #Protagonist has luck.

<ex><fex name="Protagonist">I</fex> m only <t>lucky</t> <fex name="Place">in casinos</fex>.</ex>

name: Machinery
description: The machinery used in economic activities in agriculture, industry and services.

name: Sector
description: The sector of the economic activity in which the #Machinery is used.

name: Creator
description: The individual or individuals that bring the #Machinery into being.

name: Material
description: Any indication of what the #Machinery is composed of, including components, parts, etc.

name: Name
description: The name used to refer to the #Machinery.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time when the #Machinery came into being.

name: Type
description: An indication of the subtype of the #Machinery.

name: Use
description: The use for which the #Machinery is designed.

name: Individuals
description:
The persons (or in rare cases animals) that make each other s acquaintance.

<ex><fex name="inds">My wife and I</fex> <t>met</t> in college working in the theatre and we will have been married for 30 years in June 2000.</ex>

name: Individual_1
description:
The semantically more prominent one of the two parties when the Individuals are realized separately.

<ex><fex name="ind1">Melissa Hurley</fex> had never <t>met</t> her neighbor, Richard Congdon ? the dog owner ? until recently, when she and a reporter knocked on his door.</ex>

name: Individual_2
description:
The semantically less prominent of the two parties when the #Individuals are expressed separately.

<ex> Gossip reports say she either <t>met</t> <fex name="ind2">Kennedy</fex> while helping him shop for suits at Calvin Klein, or was contacted by him after he saw her jogging in a New York park </ex>

name: Time
description:
The time when the Individuals make each other s acquaintance.

<ex>I <t>met</t> my wife <fex name="tim">2 yrs ago</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location where the Individuals make each others acquaintance.

<ex>Bill <t>met</t> his  wife <fex name="pla">in Poltava, Ukraine</fex>.</ex>

name: Context
description:
The Event, frequently a social occasion, during which the Individuals make each other s acquaintance.

<ex>The two first <t>met</t> <fex name="con">at a lecture</fex> in 1851.</ex>

name: Party_1
description:
The individual or individuals that form the more prominent (i.e.
agentive) party of the agreement, as compared with #Party_2. That is,
#Party_1 is generally encoded as the External Argument of verbs, and
peripheral FEs that do not make reference to the event itself
generally make reference to #Party_1. Thus #Manner is construed to be that of #Party_1, not necessarily that of #Party_2 or the group of #Parties as a whole.



<ex>On Monday, <fex name="par1">the airline</fex> reached a <t>deal</t> with the Canadian Auto Workers.</ex>

name: Party_2
description:
The semantically (and grammatically) less prominent participant (or
group of participants) in the agreement. It is generally encoded
within a prepositional phrase (e.g. headed by with).

<ex>Mozilla Foundation has finally reached an <t>agreement</t> <fex name="par2">with America Online</fex>.</ex>

name: Obligation
description:
An expression of the commitment made by the #Parties .



<ex>The US and Russia have <t>agreed</t> <fex name="obl">to share early warning data on missile launches</fex>.</ex>

name: Topic
description:
#Topic is a description of the domain covered.

<ex>Some types of alloy steel have been covered in the expiring <fex name="top">trade</fex> <t>agreement</t>.</ex>

name: Parties
description:
The group of individuals portrayed as equally involved in making an agreement.

<ex><fex name="pars">The US and Russia</fex> have <t>agreed</t> to cooperate in destroying surplus portable anti-aircraft missiles.</ex>

name: Medium
description:
As with other frames in the Communication domain, the #Medium of communication may be expressed. #Medium is the physical entity or channel used to record or negotiate the #Obligation. 


<ex>The parties made a <fex name="med">written</fex> <t>agreement</t> to arbitrate disputes arising in connection with the contract.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the act of making an agreement which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of either #Party_1 or #Parties that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>). 

<ex>I <fex name="man">readily</fex> <t>agreed</t> with her to end our wrestling match.</ex>

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the Agreement occurs.<ex>The town coucil members reached an <t>agreement</t> <fex name="Place">at the City Hall plenary session</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time where the Agreement occurs.<ex>The town coucil members finally reached an <t>agreement</t> <fex name="Time">at midnight</fex>.</ex>

name: Concept_1
description: #Concept1 is the phenomenon which is believed to be related to #Concept2.

name: Concept_2
description: The phenomenon which is believed to be linked to Concept1.

name: Cognizer
description: The sentient entity that recognizes the causal connection.

name: Concepts
description: The phenomena which are believed to be related.

name: Evidence
description: The phenomenon which proves the causal connection.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Cognizer make the connection.

name: Place
description: The location where the Cognizer makes the connection.

name: Party_1
description:
The individual or individuals that form the more prominent (i.e., agentive) party to the compromise, as compared with #Party_2. That is, #Party_1 is generally encoded as the External Argument of verbs, and peripheral FEs that do not make reference to the event itself generally make reference to #Party_1. Thus #Manner is construed to be that of #Party_1, not necessarily that of #Party_2 or the group of #Parties as a whole.

<ex>On Monday, <fex name="par1">the airline</fex> <t>compromised</t> with the Canadian Auto Workers. on a contract for salary and benefits.</ex>

name: Party_2
description:
The semantically (and grammatically) less prominent participant (or group of participants) in the compromise. It is generally encoded within a prepositional phrase (e.g. headed by <m>with</m>).

<ex>Parenthetical Foundation has finally reached a <t>compromise</t> <fex name="par2">with The Bracket Fund</fex>.</ex>

name: Obligation
description:
An expression of the commitment made by the #Parties .

<ex>The US and Russia have <t>compromised</t> <fex name="obl">to share a portion of early warning data on missile launches</fex>.</ex>

name: Topic
description:
#Topic is a description of the domain covered by the compromise.

<ex>They ll never <t>compromise</t> <fex name="Topic">on salary</fex>.</ex>

name: Parties
description:
The group of individuals portrayed as equally involved in reaching a compromise.

<ex><fex name="pars">The US and Russia</fex> have <t>compromised</t> on a plan to destroy surplus portable anti-aircraft missiles.</ex>

name: Medium
description:
As with other frames in the Communication domain, the #Medium of communication may be expressed. #Medium is the physical entity or channel used to record or negotiate the #Obligation. 

<ex>The parties entered into an <fex name="med">oral</fex> <t>compromise</t> to arbitrate disputes arising in connection with the contract.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the act of making an agreement which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of either #Party_1 or #Parties that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>). 

<ex>I <fex name="man">readily</fex> <t>compromised</t> with her to end our wrestling match.</ex>

name: Place
description:
This FE identifies the #Place where the compromise occurs.

<ex>The town coucil members reached a <t>compromise</t> <fex name="Place">at the City Hall plenary session</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Place where the compromise occurs.

<ex>The town coucil members finally reached a <t>compromise</t> <fex name="Place">at midnight</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The #Purpose for which the #Parties make the compromise.

<ex>We re making <t>compromises</t> <fex name="pur">to head off potentially larger conflicts down the road</fex>.</ex>

name: Sound_source
description: It is assigned to a constituent referring to a physical entity which emits a sound. Such an entity must have an appropriately complex internal structure such that it can create a sound. For example, a machine or some other thing with moving parts can create sound by itself.

name: Sound
description: The frame element #Sound is incorporated in the meaning of the verbs of this frame.

name: Noisy_event
description: An event in which one or more #Sound_sources participate and which is accompanied by #Sound.

name: Manner
description: Manner expressions may be of lexicographic interest if they describe properties of a sounds.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which event occurs.

name: Place
description: The location of the #Sound_source. This FE differs from #Location_of_source only in terms of point of view; the latter FE implies a point of view that is not on the #Sound_source.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Noisy_event occurs.

name: Agent
description:
The person who makes arrangements for the #Event to take place at a #Time and #Place.

<ex><fex name="Agent">Lucy</fex> <t>organized</t> a playdate for little Michael and Marcy.</ex>

name: Event
description:
The incident for which the #Agent has made arrangements.

<ex>I ve already <t>made</t> <fex name="Event">vacation</fex> <t>arrangements</t>.</ex>

<ex>Josie <t>organized</t> <fex name="Event">the conference</fex> last year.</ex>

name: Scheduled_time
description:
The time for which the #Agent has arranged the #Event.

<ex>I ve <t>put</t> <t>together</t> a luncheon <fex name="Scheduled_time">for 12:30</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The way in which the #Agent makes the arrangements for the #Event.

<ex>Max <fex name="Manner">hastily</fex> <t>made</t> <t>arrangements</t> to go see the therapist tomorrow.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The means used by the #Agent to make arrangements for the #Event to take place.

<ex>Lily <t>made</t> <t>arrangements</t> <fex name="Means">via email</fex> to see the venue.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location at which the #Agent has made arrangements for the #Event to take place.

<ex>Lionel <t>organized</t> a meeting <fex name="Place">at the local pub</fex> to discuss the bleak future of our organization.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The #Agent s motivation for arranging the #Event.

<ex>Lionel <t>organized</t> a meeting at the local pub <fex name="Purpose">to discuss the bleak future of our organization</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: This FE describes the time at which the arrangements are made.

name: Agent
description: The individual that assumes a particular facial expression.

name: Body_part
description: The particular part of the face that the #Agent moves into a facial expression.

name: Internal_cause
description: The emotion or other mental state that leads the #Agent to assume a facial expression.

name: Degree
description: The amount to which the expression on the face of the #Agent matches the prototypical image for the indicated facial expression.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Time
description: The point in time at which the change in facial_expression takes place.

name: External_cause
description: An event experienced by the #Agent that leads them to make an expression.

name: Manipulator
description: The person who gets the Victim to act against their interest.

name: Victim
description: The person who the Manipulator gets to do something they would not have done had no pressure or deception been applied.

name: Resulting_action
description: What the #Manipulator intends to make the #Victim do and the #Victim actually does.

name: Goods
description:
The FE goods is anything (including labor, time, or legal rights) that can be taken away. 
<ex>Leslie <t>blackmailed</t> <fex name="Goods">the watch</fex> out of John.</ex>

name: Means
description:
An act of the #Manipulator that enables them to alter the action of the #Victim.
<ex>I <t>badgered</t> her into coming <fex name="Mns">by calling her every five minutes</fex>.</ex>

name: Instrument
description: An entity that the #Manipulator uses to get the #Victim to perform the #Resulting_action.

name: Purpose
description: A state-of-affairs that the #Manipulator is hoping to bring about by manipulating the #Victim.

name: Time
description: The time when the manipulation occurs.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Manipulator manipulates the #Victim.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including metaphorical force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of a #Manipulator that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the volitional actor who manipulates the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The object which is manipulated by the #Agent into a particular shape.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which the #Theme is manipulated.

name: Place
description: Where the manipulation of the #Theme takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the manipulation of the #Theme takes place.

name: Time
description: When the manipulation of the #Theme takes place.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the manipulation of the #Theme takes place.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the manipulation of the #Theme takes place.

name: Resultant_configuration
description: The shape or configuration of the #Theme after being manipulated by the #Agent.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent manipulates an object. The #Agent typically refers to animate beings, but is also extended to mechanical and other inanimate objects.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity which is being manipulated.

name: Bodypart_of_agent
description: The part of the Agent's body being used to manipulate the #Entity may also be expressed. While the default is for an #Agent to use his/her hands, other body parts may be specified.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of the manipulation.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action.

name: Time
description: When the manipulation takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The #Agent's purpose in performing the manipulation.

name: Instrument
description: An entity directed by the #Agent that interacts with the #Entity to accomplish the action indicated by the target.

name: Means
description: An action by the #Agent to accomplish the desired manipulation.

name: Place
description: The spatial setting in which the manipulation takes place.

name: Comparison_event
description: The #Comparison_event is the principal event being characteriszed by the #Manner. The #Manner of this #Comparison_event is often used in comparison with the #Foreground_event.

name: Salient_entity
description: The #Salient_entity that is associated with or directly responsible for the #Comparison_activity.

name: Manner
description: The description of the #Comparison_event or #Comparison_activity.

name: Manner_descriptor
description: A description of the #Manner.

name: Comparison_activity
description: The #Salient_entity conducts or engages in the #Comparison_activity that is being described.

name: Experiencer
description: The person who actualizes a pattern of behavior.

name: Lifestyle
description: A pattern of behavior which the actions of the #Experiencer matches for a significant period of time.

name: Manner
description:
The #Lifestyle may be characterized by a #Manner, which is often expressed adverbially.

<ex>He <t>lived</t> <fex name="Manner">dangerously</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: A temporal description of when the #Experiencer adopts a #Lifestyle.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Experiencer is carrying out the expected patterns of behavior of the #Lifestyle.

name: Place
description: The spatial location where the #Experiencer carries out a #Lifestyle.

name: Domain
description: The general category under which the #Lifestyle can be categorized.

name: Descriptor
description: This FE covers characterizations of the #Lifestyle that are not covered by other frame elements.

name: Producer
description:
The person or company that produces the Product.
<ex><fex name="Producer">General Electric</fex> <t>manufactures</t> <fex name="Product">electronic appliances</fex>.</ex>

name: Product
description:
The #Product is produced by the #Producer.
<ex><fex name="Producer">The company</fex> <t>manufactured</t> <fex name="Product">T-shirts</fex>.</ex>

name: Factory
description:
#Factory identifies the particular plant where the #Product is manufactured.
<ex><fex name="Product">Those machines</fex> were <t>manufactured</t> <fex name="Factory">in the Miami plant</fex>.</ex>

name: Resource
description:
Resource is the material that the product is made from.
<ex><fex name="Product">Copal varnishes</fex> are <t>manufactured</t> <fex name="Resource">from fossilised resins</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
This FE identifies the #Place where the #Product is manufactured.
<ex><fex name="Product">Those leather shoes</fex> were <t>made</t> <fex name="Place">in Italy</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This Fe identifies the #Time when the product was produced.
<ex><fex name="Product">Those cars</fex> were <t>produced</t> <fex name="Time">in 1997</fex>.</ex>

name: Consumer
description:
The #Producer produces the #Product for the #Consumer.
<ex><fex name="Product">The toys</fex> are <t>made</t> <fex name="Consumer">for children</fex>.</ex>

name: Instrument
description:
This FE identifies the #Instrument with which a #Producer
 produces a #Product.
<ex><fex name="Product">Those lamps</fex> were <t>made</t> <fex name="Instrument">by machines</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which a #Producer creates a #Product.
<ex><fex name="Product">Fine furniture</fex> is  usually <t>made</t> <fex name="Manner">slowly</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
This FE identifies the #Means by which a #Producer  creates a #Product.
<ex><fex name="Product">Cars</fex> are <t>manufactured</t> <fex name="Means">by mass production</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
This FE identifies the #Purpose for which an #Producer produces a #Product.
<ex><fex name="Producer">The company</fex> will <t>produce</t> more <fex name="Depictive">high-tech</fex> <fex name="Product"> gadgets</fex> <fex name="Purpose">to meet the demand of the market</fex>.</ex>

name: Outcome
description: The #Outcome of a contest whose #Margin is under consideration.

name: Margin
description: The difference between the minimum required for victory and the actual #Outcome.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Value from what is expected given the #Outcome and the #Value indicated by the target.

name: Value
description: The generally implicit #Value of the #Margin.

name: Mass_theme
description: The mass of entities which moves.

name: Area
description:
The place where the overall motion event takes place, thus including Source, Path, and Goal locations.

<ex>Letters <t>streamed</t> in <fex name="Area">all over the country</fex>.</ex>

name: Source
description:
The Source is the location the Theme occupies initially before its change of location. 

<ex>Afterwards, the crowd <t>flooded</t> <fex name="Source">away from the ceremony</fex>. </ex>

name: Path
description:
Path refers to (a part of the) ground the #Mass_theme travels over or to a landmark the #Mass_theme travels by. 

<ex>The door opened , and a crowd of people <t>flooded</t> <fex name="Path">past me</fex>, into the hall.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
Goal is the location the #Mass_theme ends up in. 


<ex>Eager spectators <t>crowded</t> <fex name="Goal">into the auditorium</fex></ex>

name: Direction
description: This FE is used for expressions that indicate motion along a line from the deitic center towards a reference point (which may be implicit) that is neither the #Goal of the posture change nor a landmark along the way of the moving part of the body.  Often #Direction is defined with reference to the canonical orientation of the #Mass_theme, or the orientation imposed by an implicit observer.

name: Degree
description: Degree of abundance.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which motion occurs.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.

name: Distance
description: This FE is any expression which characterizes the extent of motion.  This frame element occurs throughout the motion domain but is very infrequent in Motion.Noise. The engine 	<t>spluttered</t> forward <fex name="Distance">a short way</fex> and stopped.

name: Mode_of_transportation
description:
The #Mode_of_transportation expresses how the motion of the #Mass_theme is effected, by its body or by a vehicle which holds and conveys the #Mass_theme. Vehicles can move in any way and in any medium. They are usually expressed obliquely with  in  or  by .

<ex> Fans <t>poured</t> in <fex name="Mode_of_transportation">by boat and train</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the motion event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Mass_theme that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully)

<ex>Children <t>crowded</t> <fex name="Manner">eagerly</fex> around us</ex>

name: Place
description:
The spatial setting in which the Mass_motion takes place.

<ex><fex name="Place">In the main auditorium</fex> people <t>crowded</t> around Orange s newest computer</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
In cases wherein the #Mass_theme is construed as a sentient entities, this FE denotes the state of affairs that the entities wish to bring about by mass movement.

<ex>The ducks <t>flocked</t> south <fex name="pur">to mate</fex>.</ex>

name: Instrument
description: It identifies the medical #Instrument.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the #Purpose for which an #Instrument is used.

name: Expression_1
description: In an equation that has more terms on one side than the other, #Expression_1 is the side of the equation with fewer terms.

name: Expression_2
description: In an equation that has more terms on one side than the other, #Expression_2 is the side of the equation that has more terms.

name: Type
description: The value or type of object that is computed by the equation.

name: Agent
description: The Agent uses the Means to acheive a Purpose.

name: Means
description: The action performed by the Agent.

name: Purpose
description: The goal or purpose of the Agent.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Agent uses the #Means.

name: Means_of_transportation
description: Vehicles that may be used by the #Tourist.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group using the #Means_of_transportation.

name: Place
description: Geographic space visited by the #Tourist.

name: Type
description: The kind of transit service, defined in regards of coverage (local, interstate or international), mode of operation (local, express, non-stop), or to the schedule (daily, nocturne) and so on.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity for which a particular gradable #Attribute is appropriate and under consideration.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Value from the norm.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of an #Entity which is under discussion.

name: Value
description: A quantity or other characterization of the #Entity's state with respect to the #Attribute.

name: Count
description: The number of #Units of the measured #Entity.

name: Unit
description: The known quantity with respect to an #Attribute.

name: Entity
description: The item which is quantified in terms of the #Attribute.

name: Attribute
description: The aspect of the #Entity which is being described and quantified.

name: Unit
description: The #Unit of measurement.

name: Area
description: The region whose surface is being measured.

name: Count
description: The number of #Units.

name: Occupant
description: Things that occupy the #Area that is being measured.

name: Entity
description: An abstract or concrete undelimited entity that is measured by the #Event.

name: Event
description: The event that a delimitable quantity or duration of an #Entity participates in.

name: Count
description: The number of iterations of the #Event.

name: Count
description: The number of #Units of the measured entity.

name: Unit
description: The standardized quantity in terms of which other quantities are measured.

name: Process
description: The activity or state that takes place during the period of time under discussion.

name: Count
description: The number of #Units of the measured mass.

name: Unit
description: The standardized quantity in terms of which other quantities of the same kind are measured.

name: Stuff
description: The #Stuff whose weight is being measured.

name: Count
description: The number of #Units of the linear extent.

name: Stuff
description: The #Stuff whose linear extent is being measured.

name: Unit
description: The standardized quantity in terms of which other quantities of the same kind are  measured.

name: Dimension
description: It marks constituents which express what property is being measured.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity for which a particular gradable #Attribute is appropriate and under consideration.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of an #Entity which is under discussion.

name: Value
description: A quantity or other characterization of the #Entity's state with respect to the #Attribute.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Value from the norm.

name: Unit
description: A standard measure, having a known value for the #Attribute.

name: Count
description: The number of #Units which are equivalent to the #Value of the #Entity.

name: Count
description: The number of #Units of the measured volume.

name: Stuff
description: The #Stuff whose volume is being measured.

name: Unit
description: The standardized quantity in terms of which other quantities of the same kind are measured.

name: Size
description: A specification of the volume of the container.

name: Patient
description: It is used for the patient, entity, or population (originally) affected by the condition or illness.

name: Ailment
description: Any medical problem.

name: Body_part
description: The #Body_Part is used for the part or area of the body affected by the condition or disease.

name: Cause
description: It is used for the cause of a condition or disease.

name: Symptom
description: It is used for a prominent symptom of the condition or disease.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Ailment diverges from the norm.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Ailment is affecting the #Patients.

name: Description
description: Description

name: Duration
description: The length of time over which a medical condition persists.

name: Healthcare_professional
description: The #Healthcare_professional who has responsibility for the care of the #Patient.

name: Affliction
description: The particular disorder that the #Patient is suffering from and the the #Medic treats.

name: Patient
description: The person who is under the care of a #Medic or other form of medical professional.

name: Body_system
description: The part of the #Patient's body that is being treated.

name: Healthcare_center
description: The place visited by the #Patient and where the #Healthcare_professional works.

name: Intervention
description: A drug or procedure is administered or performed in order to treat a #Medical_condition.

name: Result
description: The consequence of the #Intervention.

name: Health_condition
description: A holistic description of the health state of the patient (or a part of the state of the patient), which may or may not indicate the cause of a deviation from normal.

name: Healthcare_professional
description: The individual or team that attempts to improve the #Health_condition of the #Patient.

name: Patient
description: Individuals that receive medical #Intervention because of their #Medical_condition.

name: Side_effects
description: Effects of the #Intervention that are unintended or undesirable.

name: Extent
description: The degree to which an #Intervention has affected the #Medical_condition or #Symptoms.

name: Frequency_of_success
description: The regularity with which an #Intervention is effective for treating a #Medical_condition or symptoms.

name: Time
description: The moment when the intervention takes place.

name: Professional
description: It identifies the medical #Professional.

name: Type
description: It identifies the #Type of medical professional.

name: Affliction
description: The particular disorder that the medical #Professional treats. Most words in the frame inherently indicate this information.

name: Body_system
description: The part of the body that the medical #Professional treats. This is usually indicated by the Lexical Unit itself.

name: Age
description: The length of time the #Professional has been alive.

name: Compensation
description: The payment that the #Professional receives for working.

name: Contract_basis
description: The #Contract_basis describes the conditions of employment with respect to permanency, hours per time period, or payment basis.

name: Employer
description: The #Employer gives compensation to the #Professional for working.

name: Ethnicity
description: It is the religious, racial, national, socio-economic or cultural group to which the #Professional belongs.

name: Place_of_employment
description: The place where the #Professional works.

name: Rank
description: It is the position in a hierarchy that the #Professional occupies within an organization.

name: Origin
description: The #Origin is the place where the #Professional was born or lived a salient part of her or his life.

name: Specialty
description: It identifies the medical #Specialty that someone practices.

name: Type
description: It identifies the #Type of medical #Specialty.

name: Body_system
description: The sub-part or sub-system of the body which is studied. This is normally incorporated in the LUs of the frame.

name: Affliction
description: The disease or disorder that a specialist attempts to treat.  This concept is normally incorporated in the name of the #Specialty.

name: fe_Medicamento
description: fe_Medicamento

name: fe_Medicamentos_Descritor
description: fe_Medicamentos_Descritor

name: fe_Medicamentos_Tipo
description: fe_Medicamentos_Tipo

name: fe_Medicamentos_Propósito
description: fe_Medicamentos_Propósito

name: fe_Medicamentos_Dosagem
description: fe_Medicamentos_Dosagem

name: fe_Medicamentos_Modo_de_administração
description: fe_Medicamentos_Modo_de_administração

name: Text
description: The written source, body of work, or linguistic utterance in which the #Item is found/expressed.

name: Item
description: The piece of information or expression that is contained within the #Text.

name: Frequency
description:
How often the #Item appears in the #Text. 

<ex><fex name="Frequency">Everyday</fex> <t>in</t> <fex name="Text">the newspaper</fex> <fex name="Item">there are articles relating to science and technology</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: When the #Item appears in the #Text.

name: Agent
description: The intentional #Agent acts to meet to a #Standard.

name: Entity
description: The non-intentional #Entity becomes sufficient enough to meet a #Standard.

name: Event
description: An act or occurence that changes circumstances sufficiently so as to meet a #Standard.

name: Standard
description: A condition or requirement that the #Agent, #Entity, or #Event attempt to meet.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Agent or #Entity become sufficient in regards to the #Standard.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Agent or #Entity become sufficient in regards in to the #Standard.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Agent, #Entity, or #Event becomes sufficient in regards to the #Standard.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Standard is exceeded or not by #Agent, #Entity or #Event.

name: Party_1
description: #Party_1 is the grammatically more prominent participant in the meeting event.  It can refer to either a single individual or a larger party separate from #Party_2 before the meeting.

name: Party_2
description: A grammatically less prominent participant in the meeting event.  It can refer to either a single individual or a larger party separate from #Party_1 before the meeting.

name: Purpose
description: An action that #Party_1 and #Party_2 plan to engage in upon meeting.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the meeting happens.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the meeting happens.

name: Means
description: The #Means descibes the way in which #Party_1 and #Party_2 convene.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the meeting event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of #Party_1 or #Party_2.

name: Trigger
description: The event that elicits a #Response.

name: Response
description: The means action or judgement in response to the #Trigger.

name: Manner
description: A characterization of the #Response action.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Response action takes place.

name: Time
description: The point in time when #Response is made to the #Trigger.

name: Member
description:
The person who belongs to a #Group.

<ex>Two <t><fex name="Member">members</fex></t> of the Red Cross were here about a donation </ex>

name: Group
description: A set of people standing in a semi-permanent relationship together.

name: Standing
description: An indication of the #Member's status within the #Group.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the inclusion event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Member is a member of the #Group.

name: Place
description: The location where the membership relationship holds.

name: Person
description: The #Person is the member of the military.

name: Origin
description: The #Origin is the place where the #Person was born or lived a salient part of her or his life.

name: Age
description: The #Age is the length of time the #Person has been alive.

name: Ethnicity
description: The #Ethnicity is the religious, racial, national, socio-economic or cultural group to which the #Person belongs.

name: Rank
description: It is the position in the military hierarchy that the #Person occupies.

name: Place_of_employment
description: It identifies the place where the #Person is stationed.

name: Loyal_side
description: The #Person belongs to the military of the #Loyal_side.

name: Type
description: It identifies a more specific #Type of military function or specialty that the #Person has.

name: Compensation
description: The #Compensation is the payment that the #Person receives for performing military service.

name: Contract_basis
description: The #Contract_basis describes the conditions of military membership with respect to permanency, time or duration of duty, payment basis, and so on.

name: Military_organization
description: The military organization to which the #Person belongs.

name: Cognizer
description:
The sentient being that focuses on a #Pattern so that it will remain in the memory.

<ex> <fex name="cog">I</fex> have <t>memorized</t> two kinds of knowledge from Allah s Apostle </ex>

name: Pattern
description:
The phenomenon that the #Cognizer observes and commits to memory.

<ex>Impress your friends by <t>memorizing</t> <fex name="pat">your phone numbers</fex> and throwing away your PDA! </ex>

name: Time
description:
The time when the #Cognizer memorizes the #Pattern.

<ex>Barney <t>memorized</t> the poem <fex name="tim">yesterday</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location wherein the #Cognizer memorizes the #Pattern.

<ex>Herbert Kornfeldt <t>memorized</t> his speech <fex name="pla">in the mailroom</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the memorization event  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of a #Cognizer that affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully). 

<ex><fex name="man">Hurriedly</fex>, the bus-driver <t>memorized</t> the new route.</ex>

name: Completeness
description:
The exactness of the match between the #Cognizer s memory and the #Pattern.

<ex>Whomever you emulate, internalize the sound of the soloist and <t>memorize</t> it <fex name="com">exactly</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
An intentional action performed by the #Cognizer by which they achieve memorization. 

<ex>Don t <t>memorize</t> Morse code  <fex name="mea">by counting dots and dashes</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description: The goal that the #Cognizer has in mind, which they believe will be accomplished by memorization.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer is the person whose mental #Content is at issue.

name: Content
description: The #Content is the mental content that a #Cognizer retains or forgets.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the subject the #Cognizer mental #Content is about.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Means
description: An act whereby the #Cognizer manages to remember or forget the #Content.

name: Duration
description: The #Duration is the amount of time for which the mental #Content is remembered or forgotten.

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the remembering or forgetting takes place.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the remembering or forgetting of mental #Content occurs.

name: Sentient_entity
description: The individual whose mind has a particular piece of #Content in it, or, more generically portrayed, whose mind is focussed on a particular #Topic.

name: Content
description: The situation or state-of-affairs that the #Sentient_entity s attention is focussed on.

name: Topic
description: A description of the kind of #Content in the #Sentient_entity s attention in terms of an idea which is salient throughout the #Content.

name: Expressor
description: It is the body part that reveals the #Sentient_entity's state to the observer.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the cognitive act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a #Sentient_entity that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Role
description: The category that an element of the #Content is considered to belong to.

name: Time
description: The time interval during which the #Sentient_entity has the #Content in their attention.

name: Protagonist
description:
This is the person (or people) to whom a mental property is attributed. The FE may be expressed as External Argument of a predicative use of the adjective, as a PP Complement, or as the head noun modified by an attributive use of the adjective: 
<ex><fex name="Protagonist">You</fex> were <t>smart</t> to save all your receipts.</ex>
<ex>It was <t>smart</t> <fex name="Protagonist">of you</fex> to save all your receipts.</ex>
<ex>You are a <t>smart</t> <fex name="Protagonist">person</fex> to save your receipts.</ex>

name: Behavior
description:
The #Behavior refers to any action, utterance, belief, or artifact thereof on the basis of which a mental property is attributed to the #Protagonist. The meaning of the English word <ment>behavior</ment> should not be taken to constrain the identity of this frame element too much---conceptually, this frame element includes things that would not normally be described using the word <ment>behavior</ment>.  Note the following examples:
<ex>That was a <t>stupid</t> <fex name="Behavior">mistake</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The manager made a few <t>stupid</t> <fex name="Behavior">remarks</fex> and then sat down.</ex>
<ex>What a <t>stupid</t> <fex name="Behavior">book</fex>!</ex>
<ex>It s <t>stupid</t> <fex name="Behavior">to think that everything will improve</fex>.</ex>

name: Practice
description: Some of the words in this frame have a slightly different use in that they evaluate someone only with respect to their mental performance in some particular domain or capacity.  We call this domain or capacity <t>Practice</t>. E.g., She is <t>astute</t> <fex name="Practice">at math</fex>. Note that this does not mean she is considered to be astute in general for doing math. Rather, she is astute with respect to math, but may be dumb with respect to other things. These uses probably belong in a different frame with words such as <ment>skilled</ment>, but for the time being they are marked with the FE Practice. General Grammatical Observations:  The adjectives in this frame may exhibit Extraposition of a <ment>to</ment>-marked infinitive VP, with an optional Protagonist expressed in an <ment>of</ment>-PP: It was <t>brilliant</t> (of you) <fex name="Prac">to invite the clowns to the party</fex>.

name: Degree
description:
#Degree marks the extent to which the #Behavior or #Practice is exhibited or attributed.

<ex>Jenkins is <fex name="Manr">far too</fex> <t>astute</t> to fall for that</ex>
<ex>She was <fex name="Degr">a bit</fex> <t>careless</t> at adding drops.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
#Manner refers to the method or way in which the Mental_property is attributed to the #Protagonist.

<ex>It was not licence he wanted -- his goal was the <fex name="Manr">forcible</fex> <t>enlightenment</t> of mankind.</ex>

name: Judge
description:
The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

<ex><fex name="jud">To my mind</fex>, his dialogues with his Vietnamese counterpart were the most trenchant, <t>astute</t> and screamingly funny things Trudeau has ever done</ex>

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer is the person or sentient entity that experiences or feels the emotions.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the general area in which the emotion occurs.  It indicates a range of possible #Stimulus.

name: Stimulus
description: The #Stimulus is the person, event, or state of affairs that evokes the emotional response in the #Experiencer.

name: State
description: The #State is the abstract noun that describes a more lasting experience by the #Experiencer.

name: Expressor
description: The body part, gesture, or other expression of the #Experiencer that reflects his or her emotional state.  They describe a presentation of the experience or emotion denoted by the adjective or noun.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Experiencer s emotion deviates from the norm for the emotion.

name: Parameter
description: The #Parameter is a domain in which the #Experiencer experiences the #Stimulus.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the way in which the #Experiencer experiences the #Stimulus which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>).  #Manner may also describe a state of the #Experiencer that affects the details of the emotional experience.

name: Time
description: The Time when the #Experiencer is has a feeling about the #Stimulus.

name: Duration
description: The #Duration is the amount of time for which the #Experiencer is affected by the #Stimulus, #Topic, or #State.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer is the person or sentient entity that experiences or feels the emotions.

name: Stimulus
description: The #Stimulus is the person, event, or state of affairs that evokes the emotional response in the #Experiencer.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Experiencer s emotion deviates from the norm for the emotion.

name: Parameter
description: The #Parameter is a domain in which the #Experiencer experiences the #Stimulus.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the way in which the #Experiencer experiences the #Stimulus which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>).  #Manner may also describe a state of the #Experiencer that affects the details of the emotional experience.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Experiencer  can be described as having said emotion.

name: Communicator
description:
The person who uses language in the written or spoken modality to convey a #Message to another person. 

<ex><fex name="Communicator">Her father</fex> never <t>mentioned</t> it.</ex>

name: Message
description:
A proposition or set of propositions that the #Communicator wants the #Addressee to believe or take for granted. 

<ex>A CBS report did <t>mention</t> <fex name="Message">that the First Lady was required to wear a flak jacket for her safety</fex>.</ex>

name: Medium
description:
The physical or abstract setting in which the #Message is conveyed. 

<ex><fex name="Medium">The report</fex> also <t>mentioned</t> contamination problems during the manufacture.</ex>

name: Specified_content
description:
The relevant entity or state-of-affairs that the #Communicator mentions.

<ex>If someone <t>mentions</t> <fex name="Specified_content">things like ration books</fex> , my stomach turns.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The #Manner in which the #Communicator communicates.

<ex>Her mother <t>mentioned</t> <fex name="Manner">casually</fex> that Parr had gone to Belfast.</ex>

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Communicator communicates.

name: Time
description: When the the #Message is mentioned.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Communicator communicates the #Message.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which the #Communicator mentions the #Specified_content.

name: Force
description: The #Force is the body of soldiers that acts in military capacity for the #Possessor. This FE is incorporated in each word in this frame.

name: Possessor
description:
The #Possessor is the nation, institution, or individual who possesses and/or controls the #Force.

<ex>The American invasion, which drew 26000 American troops against <fex name="pos">General Noriega s</fex> <t>army</t>, was the largest US military operation since Vietnam.</ex>
<ex>Unfortunately, <fex name="pos">They</fex> don t <m>have</m> a very strong <t>army</t>.</ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
A characterization of the #Force.

<ex>And while Serbia is keen to invest in its <fex name="des">dilapidated</fex> <t>armed</t> <t>forces</t>, Montenegro wants to introduce a 4000-strong professional army.</ex>

name: Members
description:
The consituent members of the #Force.

<ex>The US has an entirely <fex name="mem">citizen</fex> <t>army</t>.</ex>

name: Domain
description:
The #Domain in which the #Force operates.

<ex>The Persians originally planned to rely solely on their <fex name="dom">land</fex> <t>army</t> to advance beyond Athens.</ex>
<ex>You seem to think that our intelligence and <fex name="dom">covert ops</fex> <t>forces</t> and our military are only able to conduct one mission at a time.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
A (permanent or temporary) #Goal of the #Force.

<ex>Right at this time of emergency, the <fex name="goa">revolutionary</fex> <t>army</t> made one attack after another in their rear, thus adding to their confusion.</ex>

name: Period_of_existence
description: The length of time that the particular military organization has existed.

name: Force
description:
The #Force carries out the operation. Depending on the size of the operation, this may be as few as one individual or as large as the armed forces of a nation.

<ex><fex name="mil">He</fex> died while <m>carrying out</m> counter-IED <t>operations</t>.</ex>

<ex><fex name="mil">US forces</fex> currently <t>operating</t> in Iraq are due to be recalled within the next several months.</ex>

name: Area
description: The #Area in which the #Military is conducting operations.

name: Opponent
description:
The nation, group, or situation which the operation opposes.

<ex><t>Operations</t> <fex name="opp">against Afghanistan</fex> continue to be carried out.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
The #Goal of the operation.

<ex>He was captured in a covert <fex name="goa">arrest</fex> <t>operation</t> carried out by an elite group of highly-trained Marines.</ex>

name: Possessor
description: The #Possessor controls the army and ultimately directs its goals and methods.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the operations are carried out.

name: Duration
description: The length of time over which the operation is carried out.

name: Manner
description: A description of the operation or participants that are not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Military that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: The means by which the #Military carries out its operation.

name: Domain
description:
The #Domain of the operation, e.g., military, intelligence.

<ex>NATO forces are <m>conducting</m> <fex name="dom">military</fex> <t>operations</t> in highly volatile regions.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location of the operation.

<ex>This sort of <t>operation</t> should only be <m>conducted</m> <fex name="pla">in open areas</fex>.</ex>

name: Miner
description: The #Miner searches for mineral #Resources.

name: Resource
description: The #Resource is usually buried in the ground, and is searched for by the #Miner.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Miner searches for the #Resource

name: Means
description: The means by which the #Miner uses to obtain the #Resource.

name: Outcome
description: The success or failure of the attempt to obtain the #Resource by the #Miner.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Miner obtains the #Resource.

name: Wrongdoer
description: This is the person whose #Misdeed is being judged with respect to its morality.

name: Misdeed
description: The assessment of the #Wrongdoer is based on his or her #Misdeed.

name: Time
description: The time at which a #Misdeed is performed.

name: Place
description: The location where a #Misdeed occurs.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Wrongdoer is hoping to accomplish through their #Misdeed.

name: Means
description: An action taken by the #Wrongdoer which accomplishes the #Misdeed.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Misdeed which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a #Wrongdoer that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Money
description: The #Money is used as a medium of exchange.

name: Evaluee
description: This is the person whose #Behavior is being judged with respect to its morality.

name: Behavior
description: The assessment of the #Evaluee is based on his or her #Behavior.

name: Expressor
description: The #Expressor is the body part or action by a body part which is the basis of the evaluation of morality.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the evaluation holds.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Theme
description:
The #Theme is the entity that changes location. Note that it is not necessarily a self-mover.
<ex>The explosion made <fex name="Thm">me</fex> <t>move</t> in a hurry.</ex>

name: Source
description:
The #Source is the location the #Theme occupies initially before its change of location.

<ex>The policeman <t>moved</t> <fex name="Src">away from the door</fex>.</ex>

name: Path
description:
The #Path refers to (a part of) the ground over which the #Theme travels  or to a landmark by which the #Theme travels.

<ex>Jo <t>moved</t> <fex name="Path">past Dad</fex> into the hall.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
The #Goal is the location the #Theme ends up in.

<ex>The car <t>moved</t> <fex name="Goal">into the slow lane</fex>.</ex>

name: Area
description:
#Area identifies the setting in which the #Theme s movement takes place without a specified #Path.

<ex>Emily <t>moved</t> restlessly <fex name="Area">around the room</fex>.</ex>

name: Distance
description:
#Distance is any expression which characterizes the extent of the Motion. 
<ex>The twig <t>floated</t> atop the water <fex name="Dist">for about 100 yards</fex>.</ex>

name: Direction
description: This FE is used for expressions that indicate motion along a line from the deitic center towards a reference point (which may be implicit) that is neither the #Goal of the posture change nor a landmark along the way of the moving part of the body.  Often #Direction is defined with reference to the canonical orientation of the Protagonist, or the orientation imposed by an implicit observer.

name: Speed
description:
This FE is used for the #Speed at which the #Theme moves.

<ex>The ash cloud <t>drifted</t> <fex name="Spd">at twenty-five kilometres per hour</fex>.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
This FE identifies the #Duration of  time for which the Motion takes place.

<ex>The balloon <t>floated</t> <fex name="Dur">for  hours</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time when the Motion occurs.

<ex>A radioactive cloud <t>drifted</t> across Britain <fex name="Time">after the fire at the Windscale nuclear factory</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which the Motion takes place.
<ex>A naval airship <t>drifted</t> <fex name="Manr">wildy</fex> in the stormy sea.</ex>

name: Place
description: The #Place is the general area in which a specific motion (with #Source, #Path, or #Goal) occurs.

name: Area
description:
This FE identifies the general #Area in which motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular or not to consist of a single, linear path.

<ex>Soot-contaminated snow <t>falls</t> <fex name="Area">in Slovakia s mountainous regions</fex>.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
The #Goal is the location the #Theme ends up in (often unintentionally).

<ex>The rivals both <t>fell</t> backwards <fex name="Goal">into empty space</fex>.</ex>

name: Path
description:
#Path refers to (a part of) the ground over which the #Theme travels  or to a landmark past which the #Theme travels.

<ex>The boys <t>plummeted</t> <fex name="Path">down the stairs</fex> into the basement.</ex>

name: Theme
description:
The #Theme is the entity that changes location.

<ex>In 1977, <fex name="Thm"> Nigel</fex> <t>plunged</t> to his death in his car on a mountain road in southern France.</ex>

name: Source
description: The #Source is the location the #Theme occupies before the Motion occurs.  <ex>The man <t>toppled</t> <fex name="Src">from the passenger seat</fex> into the road.</ex>

name: Direction
description:
The direction of motion of the #Theme.  #Direction characterizes the #Path of motion according to some system of orientation, most often that imposed by gravity.

<ex>I hope your egg does n t <t>fall</t> <fex name="dir">down</fex> .</ex>

name: Distance
description:
#Distance identifies a phrase that characterizes the extent of motion of the #Theme.

<ex>The student <t>plunged</t> from a road bridge <fex name="Dist">more than 100 feet</fex> to his death.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
#Duration is  used for the length of time for which the Motion takes place.

<ex>In one storm , 46 inches of rain <t>fell</t> <fex name="Dur">in 24 hours</fex> .</ex>

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which the Motion takes place.

<ex>A few heavy spots of rain <t>fell</t> on the pavement <fex name="Mnr">like coins</fex>.</ex>

name: Speed
description:
This FE identifies the #Speed at which the motion occurs.

<ex>Michelle <t>toppled</t> <fex name="Spd">slowly</fex> to the floor.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time when the Motion occurs.

<ex><fex name="Time">In 1977</fex> Nigel <t>plunged</t> to his death in his car on a mountain road in southern France.</ex>

name: Carrier
description:
The #Carrier is the means of conveyance of the #Theme.

<ex>Nigel <t>plunged</t> to his death <fex name="Car">in his car</fex> on a mountain road in southern France.</ex>

name: Place
description:
This FE identifies the #Place where motion specified by #Source, #Path or #Goal occurs.
<ex><fex name="Place">In the kitchen</fex>, the towel <t>dropped</t> onto the floor.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The extent to which the #Theme crosses boundary as it enters a #Goal region or exits a #Source region.

<ex>Sucking in a deep breath, he <t>plunged</t> <fex name="Degree">fully</fex> into the cold water</ex>

name: Means
description: An event whereby the motion of the #Theme comes about.

name: Theme
description:
The #Theme is the entity that changes location.  In sentences containing a #Cause, the #Theme is typically the NP Object.  In other sentences, the #Theme is normally the External Argument.


<ex><fex name="Theme">Pat</fex> <t>crunched</t> over the fresh snow.</ex>

name: Source
description:
The #Source is any expression which implies a definite starting-point of Motion.

<ex>The train <t>rumbled</t> <fex name="Source">out of the station</fex>.</ex>

name: Path
description:
The #Path is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal.

<ex>The truck <t>roared</t> <fex name="Path">through the tunnel</fex>.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
The #Goal is any expression which tells where the #Theme ends up as a result of the Motion.

<ex>The plates <t>clattered</t> <fex name="Goal">to the floor</fex>.</ex>

name: Area
description:
This FE identifies the general #Area in which motion takes place, used particularly if the motion is understood as following a complex or non-linear path.

<ex>The fly <t>buzzed</t> <fex name="Area">about the room</fex>.</ex>

name: Cause
description: The #Cause describes the reason for the motion. <ex>The glasses <t>clinked</t> across the table <fex name="Cause">during the tornado</fex>.</ex>

name: Distance
description:
The #Distance is any expression which characterizes the extent of Motion.  This frame element occurs very infrequently with Motion_noise verbs.

<ex>The car <t>wheezed</t> <fex name="Dist">the two miles</fex> into town.</ex>

name: Speed
description:
The #Speed is the rate at which the motion occurs.

<ex>My Saab <t>purrs</t> along easily <fex name="Speed">at 80 miles an hour</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The #Manner is the way in which the Motion takes place.

<ex>The drone <t>buzzed</t> <fex name="Manr">curiously</fex> across the room and vanished behind the table.</ex>

name: Means
description:
This FE identifies the #Means by which the #Theme moves in the specified way.

<ex>The autochopper <t>whirred</t> along<fex name="Mns"> by supplementing its onboard power with solar generators</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
This FE identifies the #Degree to which the Motion occurs.

<ex>Suddenly , the pole <t>thumped</t> <fex name="Degr">really hard</fex> into an unseen object.</ex>

name: Place
description: The #Place describes the location of a more specific motion (which has #Source, #Path, #Goal, or #Area).

name: Duration
description:
The period of time for which the #Theme moves under accompaniment of noise.

<ex>From there they <t>roared</t> northward <fex name="Duration">for about 10 minutes</fex> before turning up the beach approach onto A1.</ex>

name: Time
description: The #Time when the motion event takes place.  <ex>The train <t>screeched</t> into the station <fex name="Time">at half past seven</fex></ex>

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for the movement is ongoing.

name: Area
description:
The #Area is the setting in which the #Theme s movement takes place. 

<ex>Emily rose to her feet and <t>moved</t> restlessly <fex name="Area">around the room</fex>.</ex>

name: Cotheme
description:
The #Cotheme is the second moving object, expressed as a direct object or an oblique.

<ex>Pat <t>accompanied</t> <fex name="Cotheme">me</fex> down the street.</ex>
<ex>The squirrel <t>chased</t> <fex name="Cotheme">after the nut</fex>.</ex>

name: Distance
description: The #Distance is any expression which characterizes the extent of motion.

name: Goal
description:
The #Goal is the location the #Theme ends up in.

<ex>The car accelerated and <t>moved</t> <fex name="Goal">into the slow lane</fex>, as he passed.</ex>

name: Path
description:
The #Path refers to (a part of the) ground that the #Theme travels over or to a landmark the #Theme travels past.

<ex>The door opened , and he <t>moved</t> <fex name="Path">past Dad</fex>, into the hall.</ex>

name: Source
description:
The #Source is the location the #Theme initially occupies before its change of location.

<ex>The policeman <t>moved</t> <fex name="Source">away from the door</fex>.</ex>

name: Speed
description:
The #Speed is the rate at which motion occurs.

<ex>The car <t>moved</t> along <fex name="Spd">at 55 miles per hour</fex>.</ex>

name: Theme
description:
The #Theme is the entity that changes location. 

<ex>The explosion made <fex name="Thm">me</fex> <t>move</t> in a hurry.</ex>

name: Mode_of_transportation
description: The #Mode_of_transportation expresses how the motion of the #Theme is effected, by its body or by a vehicle which holds and conveys the #Theme. Vehicles can move in any way and in any medium. They are usually expressed obliquely with  in  or  by .

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time when the motion occurs.

<ex>The truck <t>moved</t> <fex name="Time">at 10 o clock</fex>.</ex>

name: Athlete
description: A player or team that performs the technical-tactical actions.

name: Move
description: Action or move taken by an #Athlete, according to the rules of the sport.

name: Type
description: The kind of move.

name: Theme
description: A physical entity that is participating in non-translational motion.

name: Fixed_location
description:
The point or set of points that define the limits of motion for the #Theme.  For spinning motions, it is the axis, for vibrating it is a boundary, for swinging it is a point.
<ex>Balls <t>spin</t> <fex name="Fix_loc">on their axes </fex>.</ex>
<ex>The window <t>vibrated</t> <fex name="Fix_loc">in the frame</fex>.</ex>

name: Periodicity
description:
The number of times the #Theme returns to a state in a given duration.
<ex>They <t>spun</t> it <fex name="Per">at 1000 rpms</fex>.</ex>

name: Angle
