description: The amount of rotation that the #Theme undergoes.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Theme is in bounded motion.

name: Place
description: The location where the bounded motion happens.

name: Direction
description:
The direction of rotation of the #Theme.
<ex>The dial <t>rotated</t> <fex name="Dir">clockwise</fex> one revolution, then the vault opened.</ex>

name: Manner
description: The #Manner describes the way in which the Theme moves in place.

name: Musical_instrument
description: An artifact made or adpted to produce musical sounds.

name: fe_Uso
description: fe_Uso

name: Entity
description: The #Entity about whom it is asserted that they share a name with a #Namesake.

name: Namesake
description: The person or thing that has the same name as the #Entity.

name: Anchor
description: A domain, often a place or time, in which the #Namesake of the #Entity is located.

name: Descriptor
description: Any temporary or permanent property  of the #Namesake.

name: Entity
description: The entity that #Speakers refer to by using the #Name.

name: Name
description: The linguistic expression by which #Speakers refer to the #Entity.

name: Speaker
description: The person who uses the linguistic expression (#Name) to refer to the referent.

name: Instrument
description: The instrument with which an intentional act is performed.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which an intentional act is performed.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Name_source
description: It is the person or thing whose name was chosen by the #Speaker to give to the #Entity.

name: Manner
description: It is the #Manner of performing an action.

name: Means
description: An action the #Speaker takes in order to accomplish the name conferral.

name: Natural_disaster
description: Natural phenomenon that may cause damage to the #Place where the #Tourist is staying.

name: Place
description: Where #Tourist experiences the #Natural_disaster.

name: Duration
description: The period of duration of the #Natural_disaster.

name: Time
description: When the #Natural_disaster happens.

name: Means
description: Actions or means that enable the stay of #Tourist in a given locality.

name: Source
description: The starting point of trip. Generally, it is the place where the #Tourist lives and to where she will return after the stay at the touristic destination.

name: Manner
description: How the #Natural_disaster happens.

name: Means_of_transportation
description: The means of transportation used by the #Tourist when the #Natural_disaster happens..

name: Description
description: Specific features of the #Natural_disaster or of the #Tourist.

name: Victim
description: Those affected by the disaster.

name: Locale
description: A stable bounded area.

name: Constituent_parts
description: Salient parts of the #Locale.

name: Relative_location
description: A place that a #Locale is located with respect to.

name: Natural_phenomenon
description: A non-artificial event that occurs without human interference.

name: Place
description: Where the natural phenomenon occurs.

name: Time
description: When the phenomenon occurs.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time the phenomenon lasts.

name: Manner
description: The way the phenomenon happens.

name: Rate
description: The magnitude of the phenomenon.

name: Frequency
description: Number of times the phenomenon occurs.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer requires or believes he/she requires the #Requirement to hold so that the #Dependent will occur.

name: Requirement
description: The entity or state-of-affairs that must be present or obtain in order for the #Dependent to obtain.

name: Dependent
description: The state-of-affairs which cannot hold without the #Requirement.

name: Consequences
description: An undesirable state-of-affairs that results if the #Requirement is not met.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Dependent depends on the presence of the #Requirement.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Cognizer requires the #Requirement.

name: Place
description: The location of the #Cognizer when he/she requires the #Requirement.

name: Negated_proposition
description: The situation which is presented as false overall. The particular focus of negation which contrasts with the #Factual_situation is not separately marked.

name: Factual_situation
description: The situation or part of situation that actually pertains, in contradistinction to the profiled situation in the #Negated_proposition that is asserted not to pertain.  In spoken language and casual written language, but not in normatively edited written texts, the #Factual_situation may be expressed as an unmarked clause immediately preceding or following the #Negated_proposition.

name: Profiled_possibility
description: The situation presented explicitly as a possibility, contrasting with the implicit negated possibility.

name: Anti_consequence
description: The situation that follows as a result of the negated possibility, and is not expected to occur if the #Profiled_possibility holds.

name: Network
description: The system functioning as a unit that is constituted by the #Nodes and #Connections.

name: Nodes
description: The entities that are connected into a #Network.

name: Connections
description: The relationships or physical entities that connect the #Nodes.

name: Noise_maker
description: It identifies the entity or substance that is designed to produce sound.

name: Use
description: The use for which an #Noise_maker is intended.

name: Creator
description: An individual or individuals that bring the #Noise_maker into existence.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which a #Noise_maker comes into existence.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to an #Noise_maker.

name: Type
description: An indication of the subtype of #Noise_maker.

name: Material
description: Any indication of what makes up the #Noise_maker, including components, etc.

name: Ground
description: The location with which the #Noise_maker is associated.

name: Term_1
description: It is the first operand in the non-commutative arithmetic that is modified by #Term_2 (e.g. subtracted by or divided by #Term_2).

name: Term_2
description: It is the second operand of the non-commutative arithmetic which modifies #Term_1 (e.g. subtracts from or divides #Term_1).

name: Calculator
description: The #Calculator is the agentive entity that combines #Term_1 and #Term_2.

name: Term_1
description: It is the first operand in the non-commutative arithmetic that is modified by #Term_2 (e.g. subtracted by or divided by #Term_2).

name: Term_2
description: It is the second operand of the non-commutative arithmetic which modifies #Term_1 (e.g. subtracts from or divides #Term_1).

name: Result
description: The #Result of the non-commutative process combining #Term_1 and #Term_2.

name: Ground
description: The #Ground serves as a basis for describing the location of the #Figure.

name: Figure
description: The #Figure is perceived as located relative to a certain #Ground location. The figure can be an entity or an event.

name: Time
description: The period of time during which the locative relation between #Figure and #Ground obtains.

name: Person
description: The #Person is a non-participant in a #Conflict.

name: Conflict
description: The #Conflict in which the #Person is not fighting.

name: Type
description:
<def-root>The kind of thing which is notable. This may be an event, place, item, or role and is plural.

<ex>Shakespeare is one of the <t>great</t> <fex name="Type">poets</fex>.</ex>

<ex>The Four Seasons is a <t>notable</t> <fex name="Type">hotel</fex>.</ex>

<ex>"Green Eggs and Ham" is one of the <t>great</t> <fex name="Type">children's books</fex>.</ex>

<ex>The US civil war is perhaps the most <t>notable</t> <fex name="Type">of the US's wars</fex>.</ex></def-root>

name: Name
description: The name of the notable entity.

name: Time
description: The time during which the entity is considered notable.

name: Place
description: The geographic area in which the entity is considered notable.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing the deviation of the individual of a certain type from the norm of that type.

name: Arraign_authority
description: The judge or other authority of the court in which the accused person is arraigned.

name: Accused
description: The person being charged with an offense against the law.

name: Charges
description: The crime with which the #Accused is charged.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Element
description: A substance definable in terms of the kind(s) of atoms that make it up.

name: Final_element
description: The type of #Element that results from the process.

name: Initial_element
description: The type of #Element that begins the process.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Element undergoes the transformation.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the Change event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Element's substance is converted to the #Final_element.

name: Cause
description: An event or state that causes the change to take place.

name: Place
description: The location where the nuclear process occurs.

name: Influencing_entity
description: A thing or person whose behavior has an effect on an #Dependent_entity, #Dependent_situation, or #Dependent_variable.

name: Dependent_entity
description: An entity, usually a thing, that is influenced in its behavior by an #Influencing_entity or an #Influencing_situation.

name: Influencing_variable
description: A scalar variable (with unspecified value) which has  an effect on the #Dependent_entity, #Dependent_situation, or #Dependent_variable.

name: Dependent_situation
description: A situation that whose temporal or other characteristics are influenced by an #Influencing_entity, #Influencing_situation, or #Influencing_variable.

name: Dependent_variable
description: A scalar variable, whose value depends on the behavior of an #Influencing_entity, a #Influencing_situation, or an #Influencing_variable.

name: Influencing_situation
description: A situation whose temporal or other characteristics have an effect on a #Dependent_entity, #Dependent_situation, or #Dependent_variable.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Influencing_entity affects the #Dependent_entity.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the influence occurs.

name: Place
description: The location at which the influencing occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Influencing_entity that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Object
description: Object

name: Creator
description: Creator

name: Material
description: Material

name: Type
description: Type

name: Use
description: Use

name: Area_of_knowledge
description: Area_of_knowledge

name: Responsible_party
description: The person who must perform the #Duty.

name: Duty
description: The action that the #Responsible_party is obligated to perform.

name: Consequence
description: The undesirable #Consequence that will result if the #Duty is not performed.

name: Time
description: The time interval during which the #Responsible_party is obligated to fulfill the #Duty.

name: Place
description: A location in which the #Responsible_party has a specified #Duty.

name: Degree
description: The deviation of the requirement from the norm.

name: Purpose
description: The desirable situation which can be brought about by fulfilling the #Duty.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity which is not widely known and rather obscure.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the degree of fame of the #Entity.

name: Duration
description: The length of time during which the #Entity is not famous.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Entity is not famous.

name: Phenomenon
description: The entity or facts that are undeniable given the #Evidence.

name: Attribute
description: The gradable aspect of a #Phenomenon which concerns how likely it is that the #Phenomenon be known. This frame element is incorporated by the lexical units in this frame.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Phenomenon from the norm or from the value for another #Phenomenon in terms of how likely the #Phenomenon would be known.

name: Perceiver
description: The sentient entity for whom perception or cognition of the #Phenomenon is judged to be more or less likely.

name: Evidence
description: A state-of-affairs  that has a bearing on whether the #Phenomenon will be perceived or apprehended cognitively. #Evidence is often metonymically indicated by the mention of an entity whose existence or whose properties are relevant.

name: Direction
description: It is used for all path-like expressions, except those indicating the location of the perceiver, that describe how the perceiver's attention is directed during the act of perception.

name: Rank
description: The #Rank which the #Item occupies.

name: Item
description: The #Item which occupies the #Rank in the hierarchy.

name: Dimension
description: The dimension along which the ranking is defined.

name: Time
description: The time at which/period over which the #Item occupies the #Rank.

name: Comparison_set
description: It is the set of entities ranked in a hierarchy.  The #Item is a member of the set.

name: Offense
description: The illegal act.

name: Victim
description: It denotes the person or entity that is badly affected by the #Offense.

name: Perpetrator
description: The individual who commits the #Offense.

name: Degree
description: It broadly picks out the degree of offense.

name: Offerer
description: The person that begins in possession of the #Theme and offers it to the #Potential_recipient.

name: Potential_recipient
description: The entity that ends up in possession of the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The object which is offered for transfer.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #Offerer offers the #Theme to the #Potential_recipient.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the #Offerer offers the #Theme to the #Potential_recipient.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Offerer offers the #Theme to the #Potential_recipient.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Offerer offers the #Theme to the #Potential_recipient.

name: Manner
description: It is the manner in which the #Offerer offers the #Theme to the #Potential_recipient.

name: Branch
description: The offshoot or branch of the original body which differs from it in some important respect.

name: Original_body
description: The body from which the offshoot is derived.

name: Place
description: The place in which the #Branch is located or where it first forms.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Branch forms or thrives.

name: Predictive_phenomenon
description: It provides evidence for the existence or the nature of the #Outcome of #Future_phenomenon.

name: Future_phenomenon
description: It is that phenomenon that is predicted to occur or have a particular quality.

name: Outcome
description: It identifies those expressions that indicate how the #Future_phenomenon is expected to turn out based on the evidence of the #Predictive_phenomenon.

name: Interested_party
description: It marks expressions that indicate people who are interested in the #Outcome of the #Future_phenomenon.

name: Strength
description: The degree to which the #Predictive_phenomenon predicts the occurrence of the #Future_phenomenon.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the omen is occurring.

name: Place
description:
The location where something good or bad might occur.

<ex>The storm <t>bodes</t> ill for you <fex name="Place">here</fex> .</ex>

name: Entity
description: The part of the #Organism which is undergoing biological development.

name: Organism
description: The living thing whose #Entity is undergoing development.

name: Domain
description: The relevant dimension of development.

name: Prior_state
description: The stage from which the #Entity develops.

name: Post_state
description: The state into which the #Entity develops.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Entity develops.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Entity develops.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the development occurs.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Entity develops.

name: Rate
description: The #Rate at which the #Entity develops.

name: Duration
description: The period over which the #Entity develops.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme whose motion is blocked or free.

name: Useful_location
description: The place or thing that the #Theme is headed towards, despite a potential or actual #Barrier.

name: Barrier
description: An entity that (at least potentially) prevents the #Theme from getting to the #Useful_location.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which a #Theme can easily access the #Useful_location.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Useful_location is or is not accessible.

name: Driver
description: This is the being, typically human, that controls the #Vehicle as it moves.

name: Vehicle
description: This is the means of conveyance controlled by the #Driver. It may move in any way or medium.

name: Source
description: Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion expresses the frame element #Source. In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion.  With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Path
description: Any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal expresses the frame element #Path.

name: Goal
description: Any expression which tells where the moving object(s) ends up as a result of the motion expresses the frame element #Goal. Some particles imply the existence of a #Goal which is understood in the context of utterance.

name: Area
description: It is used for expressions which describe a general area in which motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular and not to consist of a single linear path. Locative setting adjuncts of motion expressions may also be assigned this frame element.

name: Manner
description: Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Distance
description: Any expression which characterizes the extent of motion expresses the frame element #Distance.

name: Means
description: The action performed by the #Driver by which the #Driver achieves directed Transportation.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which the #Vehicle moves.

name: Route
description: The #Route is the road or path that the #Vehicle regularly travels on.

name: Place
description: The #Place describes the location of a more specific motion (which has #Source, #Path or #Goal).

name: Duration
description: The length  of the time interval during which the #Driver operates the #Vehicle.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Driver operates the #Vehicle.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Vehicle crosses a boundary or the extent to which the #Vehicle completes a course.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Driver tries to bring about by the way that they direct the #Vehicle.

name: Operator
description: The #Operator maneuvers the #Vehicle.

name: Vehicle
description: The #Vehicle is directed to move by the #Operator.

name: Source
description: The starting-point of motion.

name: Path
description: Any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal expresses the frame element #Path.

name: Goal
description: Where the #Vehicle ends up as a result of motion.

name: Area
description: It is used for expressions which describe a general area in which motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular and not to consist of a single linear path. Locative setting adjuncts of motion expressions may also be assigned this frame element.

name: Place
description: Where the operation takes place.

name: Time
description: When the operation takes place.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the vehicle operation  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Operator that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An action which enables the #Operator to operate the #Vehicle, or which more directly causes the #Vehicle to operate.

name: System
description: The entity that  the #Operator gets to perform its intended function.

name: Operator
description: The individual who manipulates the substructure of the #System.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Operator runs the #System.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which an #Operator runs the #System.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Operator runs the #System.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an #Operator runs the #System.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the running of the #System  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Operator that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Duration
description: It denotes the length of the time interval in which the #Operator runs the #System.

name: Tester
description: The person who uses  the #Product to see if it is intact or to ascertain its characteristics during operation.

name: Product
description: The entity that the #Tester uses to as certain whether it is intact.

name: Unwanted_characteristics
description: An entity or property whose presence would impair the acceptability or usefulness of the #Product.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Tester intends to accomplish subjecting the #Product to a test of its functioning.

name: Desired_state_of_affairs
description: The desirable state of affairs which the #Tester hopes to find to obtain when using the #Product.

name: Tested_property
description: A variable of behavior of the #Product which is specifically evaluated.

name: Means
description: It is used for a #Means action which the #Tester   carries out in testing the #Product.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the #Tester uses the #Product in order to evaluate its functioning.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the extent  to which the #Tester examines the #Product.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Tester uses  the #Product to evaluate its functioning.

name: Duration
description: The length of the time period during which the #Tester continuously or repeatedly operates the #Product to determine its operational characteristics.

name: Place
description: The location in which the test is carried out.

name: Function
description: A  use to which the #Product is put .

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer is the person whose #Opinion is in question.

name: Opinion
description: The #Cognizer's way of thinking, which is not necessarily generally accepted, and which is generally dependent on the #Cognizer's point of view.

name: Constancy
description: The level of firmness with which the #Cognizer holds an opinion. It refers to the amount of convincing that they would need to change their mind.

name: Manner
description: Any description of how the #Cognizer holds an opinion which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a #Cognizer that also affect their thinking (presumptuously, coldly).

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Cognizer has the #Opinion.

name: Opportunity
description: The situation during which the #Desirable_situation is possible. For nominal LUs, this is generally in the second layer and contains the target.

name: Agent
description: The sentient agent that may or may not participate in the #Desirable_situation.

name: Desirable_situation
description: A situation or event that the #Agent can participating in during the period of the #Opportunity.

name: Image
description: The optical representation of the #Source.

name: Source
description: The entity from which the #Image's form is based on.

name: Type
description: The kind of entity that the #Item belongs to.

name: Starting_point
description: A usually spatial reference point from which the implicit cognizer scans across the members of the #Comparison_set.

name: Basis_of_order
description: A kind of event in which the members of the #Comparison_set, including the #Item, participate in a certain order.

name: Item
description: The entity picked out by the implicit cognizer as occupying a certain place in the ordered #Comparison_set.

name: Comparison_set
description: A set of entities of which the #Item is a member and which are ordered either by the #Basis_of_order or by the order in which the implicit cognizer focuses attention on them.

name: Utterer
description: Utterer

name: Organization
description: The entity of which the individuals are #Members.

name: Members
description: A person belonging to an #Organization.

name: Purpose
description: The reason for which an #Organization is formed.

name: Place
description: It describes the general location where the #Organization operates, but does not indicate the possessor of the #Organization.

name: Utterer
description: The #Utterer participates in a communicative interaction and produces a statement directed to the #Comprehender(s).

name: Comprehender
description: The #Comprehender participates in the communicative interaction with the #Utterer. This is the person (or people) to whom the utterance is addressed.

name: Communicators
description: The #Communicators who participate in the communicative interaction.

name: Entity
description: The item whose #Origin is under discussion.

name: Origin
description: The place or culture where the #Entity was produced.

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer is the person or sentient entity that experiences or feels the emotions.

name: Other
description: The #Other is the person that evokes the emotional response in the #Experiencer.

name: Situation
description: The #Situation is the circumstances or topic about which the #Experiencer feels an emotion.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Experiencer's emotion deviates from the norm for the emotion.

name: Parameter
description: The #Parameter is a domain in which the #Experiencer experiences the feelings of the #Other.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the way in which the #Experiencer experiences the feelings of the #Other which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). The #Manner may also describe a state of the #Experiencer that affects the details of the emotional experience.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Experiencer feels for the #Other.

name: Entity
description: Concrete or abstract entity that does not exist after the event.

name: Place
description: This is the Place where the #Entity (saliently) does not exist.

name: Time
description: A point at which the #Entity (saliently) does not exist.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the length of time before the #Entity comes into existence again.

name: Offender
description: It denotes the offender that seeks or gets the pardon.

name: Authority
description: It is the organization or person that grants the pardon.

name: Offense
description: It denotes the the illegal act that the #Offender is pardoned for.

name: Time
description: It denotes the time when the pardon is given.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Authority  that accomplishes the pardon.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the act of pardon which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of an #Authority that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Place
description: The location at which the pardoning takes place.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Authority intends to accomplish by pardoning.

name: Decision_maker
description: It marks the person whose objectivity in making assesment is being evaluated.

name: Side_1
description: It marks one of the #Sides in a dispute or one of the alternatives in a situation of choice.

name: Sides
description: It marks phrases jointly expressing both #Sides in a dispute or all of the alternatives in a situation of choice.

name: Side_2
description: The second-mentioned of the #Sides to a dispute or alternatives in a situation of choice.

name: Manifestation_of_bias
description: It marks expressions that indicate how the bias of the #Judge expresses itself in their behavior or actions.

name: Dispute
description: The #Dispute is the situation in which there is some conflict between two sides.

name: Expressor
description: The #Expressor is the body part or action by a body part which indicates the character of the #Decision_maker.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Domain
description: It marks expressions of a #Domain or parameter with respect to which the #Judge exhibits bias or lack thereof.

name: Degree
description: It marks expressions that tell to what extent the #Judge exhibited or lacked bias.

name: Time
description: It denotes the time when the partiality occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner is the way in which the #Decision_maker embodies the bias associated with him or her.

name: Participants
description: The individuals or entities that have been participants in an #Event.

name: Participant_1
description: The #Participant_1 is the grammatically more prominent participant in an #Event with multiple #Participants.

name: Participant_2
description: A grammatically less prominent participant of an #Event with multiple #Participants.

name: Event
description: An #Event with multiple #Participants, who may or may not be involved intentionally.

name: Institution
description: A group, location, or institution conventionally associated with an #Event.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the multiple-participant #Event occurs.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Event involving multiple #Participants occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). When the #Participants are understood agentively frames, it may indicate salient characteristics of them that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly).

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Participants or the Participant_1 intend to accomplish by performing the action indicated by the #Event.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by #Participant_1 or the #Participants that contributes to bringing off the #Event.

name: Degree_of_involvement
description: The extent to which #Participant_1 contributes to the #Event's coming off.

name: Duration
description: It describes the length of time for which participation occurs.

name: Subset
description: A #Subset belonging to the #Group.

name: Group
description: The #Group of entities which includes the #Subset.

name: Whole
description: An undivided entity having all its #Parts.

name: Part
description: It is that which forms a boundary between the #Whole and what is not the object.

name: Orientation
description: This is a property of the #Part that determines the portion of the #Part.

name: Part_prop
description: A property relating to the #Part of a #Whole.

name: Part
description: This element describes the #Part of the larger #Whole.

name: Whole
description: An undivided entity having all its #Parts.

name: Part_prop
description: A property relating to the #Part of a #Whole.

name: Ordinality
description: This is the number of the sequence of #Parts.

name: Part
description: A part of a larger #Whole.

name: Whole
description: An undivided entity having all its #Parts.

name: Part_prop
description: A property relating to the #Part of a #Whole.

name: Part
description: A piece of a larger #Whole.

name: Whole
description: An undivided entity having all its #Parts.

name: Part_prop
description: A property relating to the #Part of a #Whole.

name: Piece
description: A #Piece made of a substance.

name: Substance
description: The #Substance is what the #Piece is made of and may describe the type of larger whole from which it came.

name: Part
description: A #Part of a larger #Whole.

name: Whole
description: An undivided entity having all its #Parts.

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent is the one who passes the #Theme.  The #Agent is generally realized as the External Argument.

<ex><fex name="Agent">Pat</fex> <t>passed</t> me the ball.</ex>

name: Theme
description:
The FE #Theme is generally an NP Object that is passed to the #Recipient.

<ex>Pat <t>passed</t> <fex name="Theme">the ball</fex> to the goalie.</ex>

name: Source
description:
The FE #Source is the starting point of the passing action

<ex>Pat <t>passed</t> the ball <fex name="Source">from behind the defensemen</fex>.</ex>

name: Path
description:
The FE #Path is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor #Goal.

<ex>I <t>passed</t> him the ball <fex name="Path">over the wall</fex>.</ex>

name: Recipient
description:
The FE #Recipient is the entity which possesses the #Theme as a result of the passing.

<ex>Kim <t>passed</t> the salt <fex name="Recipient">to her mother</fex>.</ex>

name: Area
description:
The FE #Area is used for expressions which describe a general area in which passing takes place when the passing is understood to be irregular or not to consist of a single, linear path. Locative setting adjuncts may also be assigned this frame element.

<ex>The team <t>passed</t> the ball <fex name="Area">around the court</fex>.</ex>

name: Result
description:
A resultant state that the #Theme is in at the end of its motion.


<ex>The center <t>passed</t> the ball <fex name="Result">clear of the double-team</fex>.</ex>

name: Initial_state
description:
A previous state that the #Theme was in before the beginning of its motion.

<ex>Paul <t>passed</t> the ball away <fex name="Initial_state">from the danger of the double-team</fex>.</ex>

name: Distance
description:
The FE #Distance is any expression characterizing the extent of motion of the #Theme.

<ex>Pat <t>passed</t> the ball <fex name="Distance">50 meters</fex> to me.</ex>

name: Means
description: The FE #Means indicates the action that is taken that results in the motion of the #Theme

name: Manner
description: The FE #Manner is any expression which describes a property of the motion of the #Theme which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Instrument
description:
An entity saliently involved in the transmission of force from an #Agent to a #Theme.  It may be the #Agent s bodypart, or some kind of device.

<ex>When playing basketball, you should <t>pass</t> <fex name="Ins">with both hands</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place is the general area that provides a setting for a specific motion (with #Source, #Path, or #Goal).

<ex>The players <t>passed</t> the ball to each other <fex name="Place">at the park</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time at which the passing of the #Theme occurs.

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent is the person who acts in a misleading way to create the impression that the #Item is a particular (kind of) #Simulated_entity.

<ex>Most recently, <fex name="agt">Grant Palmer</fex> has <t>palmed</t> himself <t>off</t> as a high-placed "insider" in
the Church.</ex>

name: Item
description:
The #Item is the concrete or abstract entity that the Agent misleadingly represents as a particular (kind of) #Entity.

<ex>From all reports Muhammad <t>passed</t> <fex name="Item">the child</fex> <t>off</t> as his son and behaved accordingly.</ex>

name: Simulated_entity
description:
The #Simulated_entity is a particular individual or a token of a particular type that the #Item is represented as.

<ex>The colleague who stole your idea and <t>passed</t> it <t>off</t> <fex name="Simulated_entity">as her own</fex>? </ex>

name: Audience
description:
The #Audience denotes the people that the #Agent intends to mislead into thinking that the #Item is a particular (kind of) #Simulated_entity.

<ex>Ritchie <t>passed</t> it <t>off</t> <fex name="Audience">to them</fex> as his own original thinking.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any description of the passing off event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including general descriptions comparing events (the same way) and salient characteristics of an Agent that also affect the action (<ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Agent that contributes to the #Item being perceived as a (particular kind of) #Simulated_entity.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by passing the #Item off as a (particular kind of) #Simulated_entity.

name: Place
description:
The #Place is the location that is the setting for the passing off event.

<ex><fex name="Place">In London</fex> she <t>passed</t> herself <t>off</t> as a rich American heiress.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Agent gives the impression that the #Item is the #Simulated_entity.

name: Source
description:
Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of the #Road. In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion. In particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context. 

<ex>The Way <t>descends</t> <fex name="Source">from the City of the Peak</fex> through a dense forest.</ex>

name: Path
description:
The trajectory that would be followed by one moving on the #Road.

<ex>Valencia <t>angles</t> <fex name="Path">across the number streets</fex>.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
Any expression which tells where the fictive mover travelling along a #Road would end up. 

<ex><fex name="Goal">Where</fex> does Interstate 80 <t>enter</t> the city ?</ex>

name: Road
description:
A physical path that a virtual moving entity can be imagined to travel along.
<fex name="Road">The bike trail</fex> <t>zigzagged</t> through the woods.

name: Area
description:
This frame element is used for expressions which describe a general area in which motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular and not to consist of a single linear path.  

<ex>The paths <t>crisscrossed</t> <fex name="Area">the desert</fex>.</ex>

Note that this FE should not be used for any locational modifier which would occur just as naturally with a non-motion predicate, like speech.

name: Path_shape
description:
The configuration formed by the entire #Path along the #Road.
<ex>The cavern <t>descended</t> <fex name="PS">in a spiral</fex>.</ex>

name: Direction
description:
The direction in which a "fictive" mover would travel along a #Road.

<ex>The pass <t>dips</t> <fex name="dir">down</fex> about 2000 feet, and then <fex name="dir">back up</fex> again.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of the kind of motion a hypothetical mover would have (including steadiness, grace, and general comparisons) count as #Manner expressions.  

<ex>Drifting clouds lent a mystical touch while the narrow road <t>twisted</t> <fex name="Manner">crazily</fex> through ancient stone villages on the valley floor.</ex>

name: Distance
description:
Any expression which characterizes the extent of motion expresses the frame element #Distance. 

<ex>The thin line of dirt and gravel <t>wound</t> <fex name="Distance">another ten miles</fex> and on into the Ozarks before it petered out completely.</ex>

name: Means
description:
An state of affairs involving the #Road that allows the #Road to be in the specified configuration.

<ex>As the Condell Road the route <t>skirts</t> the northside of Limerick <fex name="Means">by passing through Westfield s bird sanctuary on the north bank of the River Shannon</fex>.</ex>

name: Speed
description:
The #Speed is the rate at which an imaginary traveler on the #Road would move.

<ex>The road <fex name="Speed">quickly</fex> <t>drops</t> after passing the final turn.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place is where the motion (which is specified by a #Source, #Path or #Goal) is located.

<ex><fex name="Place">In the mountains</fex>, Highway 60 <t>winds</t> and swerves a lot, so we lost a couple of hours from my estimate.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time when the fictive motion takes place.  This may describe the time when the #Road or a particular piece of the #Road existed, or it may implicitly describe the time when an actual motion event occurred on the #Road.

<ex><fex name="tim">Thousands of years ago</fex>, the Roman roads <t>criss-crossed</t> this landscape.</ex>
<ex><fex name="tim">After it reached the edge of the forest</fex>, the road <t>slanted</t> upwards and grew rough.</ex>

name: Path
description:
The series of interconnected locations that the #Theme traverses.

<ex>In insects, blood is confined to vessels during only a portion of its <fex name="pat"><t>circuit</t></fex> through the body.</ex>

name: Theme
description:
The moving object whose motion describes the #Path.

<ex>The thick white line shows <fex name="the">the army s</fex> <t>path</t> from Uzbekistan through Iran, Iraq, Palestine, and into Italy.</ex>

name: Source
description:
The #Source is one of the #Endpoints treated as a source.

<ex>The Cassini spacecraft will travel 3.5 billion kilometers (2.175 billion miles) along its <t>path</t> <fex name="Src">from Earth</fex> to Saturn.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
The #Goal is the endpoint of the #Path.

<ex>The Cassini spacecraft will travel 3.5 billion kilometers (2.175 billion miles) along its <t>path</t> from Earth <fex name="Goal">to Saturn</fex>.</ex>

name: Endpoints
description:
The #Endpoints are two (or more) named endpoints of the #Path.

<ex>This Pacific typhoon traveled far inland, knocking down everything in its <t>path</t> <fex name="Endpoints">between Los Angeles and Denver</fex>.</ex>

name: Characteristic
description:
The #Characteristic is a characteristic(s) of the #Path.

<ex>Unlike Hubble, Compton was not designed to be serviced by astronauts in its <fex name="Char">270
mile</fex> <t>orbit</t>.</ex>

name: Landmark
description:
An entity relative to which the #Theme moves on its #Path .


<ex>Lenny killed at least nine people and caused millions of dollars in damage on
its <t>course</t> <fex name="Landmark">past 16 Caribbean islands</fex>.</ex>

name: Direction
description:
The #Direction is the direction or directions the #Path runs.

<ex>There was huge relief that Hurricane Emily s projected <fex name="Dir">westward</fex>
<t>path</t> across the Caribbean is likely to track to the south of oil and gas fields.</ex>

name: Ground
description:
A setting location through which the #Path goes.

<ex>Hurrican Dennis was blamed for five deaths in Florida and Georgia -- but was much more
brutal in its <t>path</t> <fex name="gro">across the Caribbean</fex>.</ex>

name: Length
description:
The #Length is the distance the #Path extends.

<ex>The bolt traveled smoothly in its <fex name="Length">short</fex> <t>path</t> through the air to Santa.</ex>

name: Patrol
description:
The person (or group) who inspects the #Ground to see that it is safe.

<ex><fex name="pat">Detective Jones</fex> <t>patrolled</t> the northern half of the building.</ex>

name: Ground
description:
The area that the #Patrol inspects with to ensure its safety.

<ex>Four soldiers with submachine guns <t>patrolled</t> <fex name="gro">the room</fex>, and an officer made his rounds at frequent intervals.</ex>

name: Unwanted_entity
description:
An entity whose presence would impair the desirability or safety of the #Ground.

<ex>Security guards <t>patrolled</t> <fex name="unw">for intruders</fex> while the game was in progress.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The desired outcome of the patrolling. Normally this constituent is a PP Complement headed by <ment>for</ment>, or a <ment>to</ment>-marked VP Complement.

<ex><t>Patrol</t> all unlit areas <fex name="pur">to ensure no one is hiding there</fex>.</ex>

name: Desired_state_of_affairs
description:
The desirable state of affairs which the #Patrol hopes to ensure by visiting #Ground.

<ex>All our grounds are regularly <t>patrolled</t> <fex name="des">for safety</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
This FE is used for the #Means by which the #Patrol examines  the #Ground.

<ex><t>Policing</t> your neighborhood <fex name="mea">by walking your block and asking about new or unusual things</fex> can significantly improve your and your neighbors  safety.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Patrol inspects the #Ground.

<ex>My officers have been <fex name="man">bravely</fex> <t>patrolling</t> that estate, on behalf of the community which we serve, and will continue to do so.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
This FE identifies the extent  to which the #Patrol examines the #Ground.

<ex> This section is <fex name="deg">thoroughly</fex> <t>policed</t> by the correctional officers every morning and evening.</ex>

name: Time
description:
>The #Time when the #Patrol examines the #Ground.

<ex>Officers<t>policed</t> the parade grounds <fex name="tim">during the Memorial day events.</fex> .</ex>

name: Instrument
description:
An entity used by the #Patrol to scrutinize the #Ground.

<ex>Scouts <t>patrolled</t> the beaches <fex name="inst">with binoculars</fex>, looking for aircraft.</ex>

name: Members
description:
An indication of the members of the patrol.

<ex>We <t>patrolled</t> the area <fex name="mem">with thirty soldiers</fex>.</ex>

<ex><fex name="mem">Our</fex> <t>patrol</t> was ambushed just outside the village.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The length of time of the patrol.

<ex>We ve been <t>patrolling</t> <fex name="dur">for hours</fex> and haven t even seen anyone.</ex>

name: Vehicle
description:
The #Patrol may move around in a #Vehicle.

<ex>We typically <t>patrolled</t> this area <fex name="veh">in heavily armored cars</fex>.</ex>

name: Possessor
description:
The #Possessor is the organization (usually a nation or group of nations) that orchestrates the patrol.

<ex>The bombmaker was found by a <fex name="pos">NATO</fex> <t>patrol</t>.</ex>

name: Entities
description: The entities whose interrelations form the pattern.

name: Name
description: The name of the pattern, such as "wing-T".

name: Descriptor
description: A descriptor of the pattern, such as "regular".

name: Money
description: It is the thing given in exchange for goods in a transaction.

name: Tourist
description: The #Tourist wants the #Services and offers #Money to an #Operator in exchange for them.

name: Services
description: The services are anything which is exchanged for money in a transaction.

name: Operator
description: The #Operator offers the #Services and exchanges them for #Money from a #Tourist.

name: Means
description: The means by which a commercial transaction occurs.

name: Rate
description: In some cases, price or payment is described per unit of goods.

name: Unit
description: It is any unit in which goods or services can be measured.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: A description of the transfer not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a buyer, seller, or exchangers that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the buyer, seller, or exchangers wish to bring about by participating in the exchange.

name: Person
description: The #Person is the human being.

name: Individual
description:
The #Individual who is referred to in terms of their place along the political spectrum.

<ex>Why the <t><fex name="Individual">Left</fex></t> has lost credibility.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location in which the #Individual resides.

<ex>We need to reshape the agenda of the <t>left</t> <fex name="Place">in Hungary</fex>.</ex>

name: Domain
description:
A set of issues that is used to identify a sub-set of the group members.


<ex>So where, oh where, can Democrats find a candidate who is a <fex name="Domain">fiscal</fex> <t>conservative</t>, a social moderate and well-liked in the West?</ex>

name: Origin
description:
The #Origin is the place where the #Individual was born or lived a salient part of her or his life.

<ex>We won the cold war and a lot of the <fex name="ori">French</fex> <t>left</t> has never gotten over that little fact of life.</ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
The #Descriptor is a temporary condition of the #Individual.

<ex>I m another one of those <fex name="Descriptor">angry</fex> <t>conservatives</t> that everyone hates!</ex>

name: Persistent_characteristic
description: The #Persistent_characteristic is a physiological characteristic or personality trait of the #Individual which is conceived of as persisting over time.

name: Age
description:
The #Age is the length of time the #Individual has been alive.

<ex>There is a history of <fex name="Age">young</fex> <t>leftists</t> gaining publicity and buzz.</ex>

name: Ethnicity
description: The #Ethnicity is the religious, racial, national, socio-economic or cultural group to which the #Individual belongs.

name: Position_qualifier
description: A phrase that indicates more precisely the location in political space of the #Individual relative to the center of the region designated by the target.

name: Person
description: The human being of a certain age.

name: Age
description: The #Age is the length of time the #Person has been alive.

name: Origin
description: The #Origin is the place where the #Person was born or lived a salient part of her or his life.

name: Persistent_characteristic
description: The #Persistent_characteristic is a physiological characteristic or personality trait of the #Person which is conceived of as persisting over time.

name: Descriptor
description: The #Descriptor is a temporary condition of the #Person.

name: Ethnicity
description: The #Ethnicity is the religious, racial, national, socio-economic or cultural group to which the #Person belongs.

name: Context_of_acquaintance
description:
An expression indicating the context with which the #Person is associated.

<ex>Hey look, it s that <t>kid</t> <fex name="coa">from the restaurant</fex>.</ex>

name: Perceiver
description: The FE #Perceiver refers to someone whose cognitive state or experience (e.g. knowledge, beliefs, ideas judgments or classifications) is being described.

name: Phenomenon
description:
#Phenomenon is experienced by the #Perceiver. 

<ex>Kim <t>perceived</t>  <fex name="Phenomenon">a flaw</fex>.</ex>

name: Perceiver_agentive
description: The #Perceiver_agentive performs some action in order to have a perceptual experience.

name: Phenomenon
description: The #Phenomenon indicates the entity or phenomenon to which the #Perceiver_agentive directs his or her attention in order to have a perceptual experience.

name: Body_part
description: It identifies the part of the body used as a sensory organ of the #Perceiver_agentive.

name: Direction
description: The #Direction is used for all path-like expressions that describe how the perceiver's attention is directed during the act of perception, with the exception of those indicating the location of the #Perceiver_agentive (which would be marked #Location_of_perceiver).

name: State
description: It is the location, activity, or other characteristic of the #Phenomenon.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner expressions may be of lexicographic interest if they describe properties of active perception.

name: Means
description: The #Means indicates the tool or method the #Perceiver_agentive is using to actively perceive the #Phenomenon.

name: Time
description: When the activity of attempting to perceive occurs.

name: Purpose
description: Some action that the #Perceiver_agentive is trying to accomplish by directing their own attention.

name: Place
description: The general location within which the act of perception takes place.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of  time for which the Perception takes place.

name: Ground
description: It is the perceptual background against which the #Phenomenon is experienced by the #Perceiver_agentive.

name: Obscuring_medium
description: The #Obscuring_medium is the medium through which the #Phenomenon makes itself perceivable to the #Perceiver_agentive. This is similar to the #Direction, but occurs in the opposite direction and implies a movement of the #Phenomenon.

name: Experiencer
description: The Experiencer is the being who has a physical experience on some part of his  or her body, or internally. Often information about this frame element is incorporated as a possessive determiner into the constituent expressing the Body Part, in which case it is not tagged separately (from Body Part), as shown below: My legs <t>hurt</t>! Sometimes, however, this frame element is expressed as an External Argument in its own right:  <fex name="Experiencer">I</fex> <t>hurt</t> all over! Here, the phrase <ment>all over</ment> can be considered a kind of generalized Body Part expression, and the pronoun <ment>I</ment> expresses the Experiencer independently. With nouns and adjectives in this frame, the separate expression of the Experiencer is more common: <fex name="Experiencer">I</fex> have a <t>pain</t> in my leg.

name: Body_part
description: This FE is the location on the body where the physical experience takes place, typically expressed as External Argument, often as PP complement: <fex name="Body_part">My legs</fex> are a little <t>sore</t>. I m a little <t>sore</t> <fex name="Body_part">in my legs</fex>.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Perceiver_passive
description: This FE is the being who has a perceptual experience, not necessarily on purpose. It is typically expressed as an External Argument.

name: Phenomenon
description: This FE is the entity or phenomenon that the perceiver experiences with his or her senses. It is typically expressed as Object with verbs.

name: Body_part
description: The #Body_part is the location on the #Perceiver_passive s body where the perceptual experience  takes place.  It is typically expressed in a PP. This Frame Element occurs less frequently than others, because many target words imply that a particular part of the body is involved (e.g. smelling must be done with the nose). However, the verb feel does take this Frame Element, because touch is not localized on the body the same way other modalities are. #Body_part may be expressed in other modalities when it adds specificity to what is implied by the target word in question.

name: Direction
description:
This frame element is used for all path-like expressions, except those indicating the location of the perceiver (see above), that describe how the perceiver s attention is directed during the act of perception.
<ex>The detective could easily <t>see</t> <fex name="Direction">into the house</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The detective <t>heard</t> their conversation <fex name="Direction">through the wall</fex>.</ex>

name: State
description:
#State is the location, activity, or other characteristic of the #Phenomenon.

<ex>I <t>saw</t> the baker <fex name="State">baking his special peanut butter pie</fex></ex>.

<ex>I <t>overheard</t> the cat <fex name="State">in the cupboard</fex></ex>.

<ex>I <t>heard</t> fear <fex name="State">in his voice</fex></ex>.

name: Manner
description:
Manner expressions may be of lexicographic interest if they describe properties of perception as such: <ment>clearly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>, etc.

<ex>Pat <t>heard</t> the shot <fex name="Manner">clearly</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The #Degree indicates the degree to which the Perception is experienced.

<ex>A nightmare creature, <fex name="Degr">barely</fex> <t>perceived</t> in the swirling dense smoke, was beating at the flames coming from its own body.</ex>
<ex>Older people <t>perceive</t> <fex name="Degr">less well</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The action whereby the Perceiver perceives.

<ex>He <t>saw</t> it <fex name="Mns">by looking out the window</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Perceiver_passive or the #Body_part perceives the #Phenomenon.

name: Place
description: The general location within which the act of perception takes place.

name: Ground
description:
The #Ground is the perceptual background against which the #Phenomenon is  experienced (or not experienced) by the #Perceiver_passive.  It can be distinguished from locative postnominal modifiers of the #Phenomenon in negative contexts.
<ex>Pat didn t <t>see</t> Kim  <fex name="Ground">behind the bar</fex>.</ex>
In this example, it is implied that Pat looked behind the bar and did not find Kim there.

name: Obscuring_medium
description:
The #Obscuring_medium is the medium through which the #Phenomenon makes itself perceivable to the #Perceiver_passive.  This is similar to the #Direction, but occurs in the opposite direction and implies a movement of the #Phenomenon.

<ex>My mother <t>heard</t> the scream <fex name="Obscuring_medium">through the attic window</fex></ex>.

name: Person
description: The #Person is the human being. ex:Smithers is a brilliant actor. That actor was terrible. (Note that the Person FE is incorporated in the LU actor.n, so the FE need not be explicitly marked unless an overy Person is named.)

name: Origin
description:
The #Origin is the place where the #Person was born or lived a salient part of her or his life.

<ex>Sir Alec Guiness was a <fex name="Ori">British</fex> <t>actor</t> until his death.</ex>

name: Persistent_characteristic
description:
The #Persistent_characteristic is a physiological characteristic or personality trait of the #Person which is conceived of as persisting over time.

<ex>Billy Throb is a  <fex name="psc">swarthy</fex> <t>actor</t> who frequently plays in scary movies.</ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
The #Descriptor is a temporary condition of the #Person.

<ex>Hundreds of <fex name="desc">angry</fex> <t>actors</t> were protesting against the new contract</ex>

name: Age
description:
The #Age is the length of time the #Person has been alive.

<ex>I need help with the name of an <fex name="age">old</fex> <t>actor</t></ex>

name: Ethnicity
description:
The #Ethnicity is the religious, racial, national, socio-economic or cultural group to which the #Person belongs.

<ex>She s one of the most famous <fex name="eth">black</fex> <t>actresses</t> around today</ex>

name: Context_of_acquaintance
description:
An expression indicating the context with which the #Person is associated.

<ex>Is she the <t>actress</t> <fex name="coa">from the movie we saw last night</fex>?</ex>

name: Rank
description:
#Rank is the position in a hierarchy that a #Person occupies within a performance.
 	
<ex>Robin is the <fex name="rnk">lead</fex> <t>actress</t> in La Notte.</ex>

name: Place_of_employment
description:
This FE identifies the Place where the #Person works.

<ex><t>Actors</t> <fex name="poe">at the Theater on the Square</fex> went on strike</ex>

name: Employer
description:
The #Employer gives compensation to an #Person for their work.

<ex>Margaret s fortunes improved in 1949 when she joined a host of young <fex name="emp">MGM</fex> <t>actresses</t></ex>

name: Type
description:
This FE identifies the #Type of performer the #Person is.


<ex>Smithers is a <fex name="typ">stage</fex> <t>actor</t></ex>

name: Compensation
description:
The #Compensation is the payment that the #Person receives for performing a task.

<ex>Barney Smith is a <fex name="com">highly-paid</fex> <t>actor</t></ex>

name: Contract_basis
description:
The #Contract_basis describes the conditions of employment with respect to permanency, hours per time period, or payment basis.

<ex>Smithers is a <fex name="cb">part-time</fex> <t>actor</t> at the National Theater </ex>

name: Role
description: It identifies one of the possible relations that the #Performer can have to the #Performance. The #Role(s) a #Performer has in the #Performance will determine which parts of the #Script should be performed by the #Performer, as the #Script is written in terms of which #Role (s) each set of instructions applies to. In the fields of theater, movies, ballet, and opera, a #Role generally corresponds to a character in the story of the #Script, while other types of performance may use more general #Roles like lead violinist.

name: Person
description:
A sentient being or group of beings that is prosperous or well known after being involved in some #Endeavor.

<ex><fex name="Person">He</fex> became a <t>success</t> at the age of 25.</ex>

name: Endeavor
description:
An event that the #Person is involved in which leads to their state of prosperity or renown.

<ex>Looking back, I had a very <t>successful</t> <fex name="Endeavor">career</fex>.</ex>

name: Time

The time when the #Entity is determined to be successful.

<ex>After 20 years of hard work, he finally <t>made it</t> as an artist <fex name="Time">in  84</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree

A qualification of the level of success that the #Entity achieves.

<ex>He had an <fex name="Degree">extremely</fex> <t>successful</t> career.</ex>

name: Field
description:
The area in which the <fex name="">Person</fex> achieves success.

<ex>Winfried became <t>successful</t> <fex name="F">in business</fex>.</ex>

name: Artifact
description:
This FE identifies the entity or substance that is designed to have a particular #Use.

<ex>The first of the two <t><fex name="Artifact">drawings</fex></t> by Parmigianino recently acquired for the National Gallery is a study for the Madonna dal collo lungo.</ex>

name: Use
description:
The use for which the #Artifact is intended.

<ex>The author s lucid text and <fex name="Use">instructional</fex> <t>drawings</t> provide a strong foundation in the basic and functional anatomy of the pain s region.</ex>

name: Creator
description:
An individual or individuals that bring the #Artifact into existence.

<ex><fex name="Creator">Italian</fex> <t>paintings</t> include an allegorical work by Garofalo which was mentioned in Vasari  s ` Vite   .</ex>

name: Time_of_creation
description:
The time at which an #Artifact comes into existence.

<ex>Here s a <fex name="Time_of_creation">1987</fex> <t>photo</t> of how the Union School building had deteriorated after many years of neglect.</ex>

name: Name
description:
The term used to refer to an #Artifact.

<ex>In his <t>painting</t> <fex name="Name">The Fall of Man</fex> Albrecht went through a hard time trying to achieve a geometrical figure of two beings known as man and woman.</ex>

name: Type
description:
An indication of the subtype of #Artifact.

<ex>The <fex name="Type">Impressionist style</fex> <t>paintings</t> of 1896-7 are rare but of great interest</ex>

name: Material
description:
Any indication of what makes up the #Artifact, including components, ingredients, etc.

<ex>The exhibition also features a <fex name="Material">marble</fex> <t>statue</t> of a naked Aphrodite crouching at her bath</ex>

name: Represented
description:
The entity--which may be a thing, an action or a state--that is represented by the #Artifact.

<ex>I was able to take a fine <t>photo</t> <fex name="rep">of his arrival</fex>.</ex>

name: State_of_represented
description:
A characterization of the state in which the #Represented entity is portrayed.

<ex>Within the church is the <t>painting</t> of Virgin Mary <fex name="sta">sitting on the throne holding a child among various saints</fex>.</ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
This FE identifies a characteristic, description, or evaluation of the #Artifact.

<ex>The cover features a <fex name="Descriptor">horrible</fex> <t>photo</t> of the man.</ex>

name: Entity
description: A thing (either abstract or physical) that exists with some degree of permanence.

name: Place
