name: Perpetrator
description: This is the person (or other agent) who forcibly seizes control over a vehicle to gain some end.

name: Vehicle
description: This is the means of transportation which gets under the control of the perpetrator. Example: The terrorists hijacked <fex name="Vehicle">the plane</fex>.

name: Victim
description:
This FE describes the people that are suffering as a result of the #Perpetrator s action. 
<ex>The rebels skyjacked a plane <fex name="Victim">with 89 passangers</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Event
description: The unlawful seizure of a #Vehicle by a #Perpetrator.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Perpetrator by which the seizure of the #Vehicle is accomplished.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Goal
description: This is the place to which the vehicle is directed.

name: Source
description: This is the place from which the vehicle is taken away.

name: Purpose
description:
The action that the #Perpetrator is trying to accomplish by piracy.

<ex>We have <t>hijacked</t> this plane <fex name="Purpose">just to show how easy it is</fex>.</ex>

name: Instrument
description:
An object that the #Perpetrator uses in taking control of the #Vehicle.

<ex>The plane was <t>hijacked</t> <fex name="Instrument">with knives</fex></ex>

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent is the person (or other force) that causes the #Theme to move.

<ex><fex name="Agent">The waiter</fex> <t>placed</t> the food on the table.</ex>

name: Theme
description:
The #Theme is the object that changes location during the Placing.

<ex>The waiter <t>placed</t> <fex name="Theme">the food</fex> on the table.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
The FE #Goal is the location where the #Theme ends up. This FE is profiled by words in this frame.  
<ex>The waiter <t>placed</t> the food <fex name="Goal">on the table</fex>.</ex>

name: Cause
description: <ex>Grass , which is sown with clover , provides rich pasture for cattle in summer and the clover is <fex name="Cause">another plant which</fex> <t>puts</t> nitrogen into the soil .</ex>

name: Source
description:
The #Source is the initial location of the #Theme, before it changes location. 
<ex>Her mother <t>shelved</t> the cans <fex name="Src">from the countertop</fex>.</ex>

name: Path
description:
Any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal expresses the frame element #Path. In this frame, #Path expressions almost always have a <ment>via</ment>-sense.

<ex>The mail carrier <t>stuck</t> the letters <fex name="Path">through the slot</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any expression which describes a property of the placing action which is not directly related to the trajectory of the #Theme s motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

<ex>The chef <t>packaged</t> the food <fex name="Manner">carefully</fex> into take-out containers.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The #Means is an act whereby the #Agent achieves the placing of the #Theme.

<ex>The Egyptians <t>set</t> it in place <fex name="Mns">by simple levering</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: The #Place indicates where the Placing occurs.

name: Time
description:
#Time is when the Placing occurs

<ex>Smithers had <t>placed</t> the table there <fex name="Time">the night before</fex>.</ex>

name: Area
description:
The #Area is the setting into which the #Theme is placed.


<ex>She emptied a wash basket full of towels and <t>deposited</t> them <fex name="Area">around the house</fex>.</ex>

name: Distance
description:
This FE is any expression which characterizes the extent of motion.  

<ex>I <t>plunged</t> my hands <fex name="Distance">wrist deep</fex> in the fragrant herbs and rubbed the dry fragments between the fingertips</ex>

name: Speed
description:
The #Speed is the rate at which Placing occurs.

<ex>Smithers <t>put</t> his book down <fex name="Speed">quickly</fex> and turned around.</ex>

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the actor who instigates the filling.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the physical object or substance which changes location. <ex><fex name="Agent">Rev. Lovejoy</fex> <fex name="Manner">carefully</fex> <t>brushed</t> <fex name="Goal">the rolls</fex> <fex name="Theme">with butter</fex>. </ex>

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is the area or container being filled. Goal is generally the NP Object in this frame.

name: Cause
description: An event which brings about the filling of the #Goal.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the location where the #Theme begins its motion. <ex><fex name="Agent">Josef</fex> <t>filled</t> <fex name="Goal">his flask</fex> <fex name="Source">from the whiskey bottle</fex>.</ex>

name: Path
description: The #Path is the trajectory of the motion.  <ex><fex name="Agent">Jess</fex> <t>filled</t> <fex name="Goal">the container</fex> <fex name="Path">through a small hole in the lid</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: #Degree to which the filling occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the filling occurs.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the filling occurs.

name: Time
description: When the filling occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the filling takes place.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which the filling occurs.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the entity that traverses the trajectory.

name: Source
description: The #Source profiles the region where the #Theme has travelled from (i.e. the region where the #Theme s movement began).

name: Path
description: The #Path is the region upon which the #Theme travels. It is any region in between the #Source (where the #Theme departed from) and the #Goal (where the theme will eventually arrive).

name: Goal
description: The #Goal profiles the region at the end of the #Theme s #Path. This is the region where the #Theme movement stops.

name: Descriptor
description: The #Descriptor provides additional information that characterizes one or more of the aspects of the trajectory: the #Source, the #Path, or the #Goal.

name: Tourist
description: Person or group seeking information to prepare the #Touristic_activity.

name: Touristic_activity
description: Programming made by the #Tourist to organize entertainment activities in which she will engage during the trip. It also includes procedures such as obtaining documents and purchasing airline tickets.

name: Place
description: Where the #Tourist plans the #Touristic_activity

name: Destination
description: Where the #Tourist intends to arrive.

name: Purpose
description: Any specific action that #Tourist wants to accomplish with the #Touristic_activity, such as entertainment and leisure, for example.

name: Source
description: The starting point of trip. Generally, it is the place where the Tourist lives and to where she will return after the stay at the touristic destination.

name: Means
description: Actions or means that enable the planning of the #Touristic_activity.

name: Manner
description: How the #Tourist plans the #Touristic_activity.

name: Time
description: When the planning of the #Touristic_activity happens.

name: Duration
description: The duration of the planning process.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent plants the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: #Theme is the item planted by the #Agent.

name: Ground
description: The #Ground is the background or context to which the #Agent pays attention in his agricultural efforts.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument is used by the #Agent as a tool to help obtain the #Theme. (This tool is not limited to typical artifacts and can be hands, arms, and other atypical hunting and fishing instruments.)

name: Duration
description: For what length of time the #Agent plants the #Theme.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Agent plants the #Theme.

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the #Means by which the #Agent plants the #Theme.

name: Outcome
description: The failure or success of an attempt.

name: Place
description: The greater geographic location where the #Agent plants the #Theme.

name: Time
description: When the planting event occurs.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by planting the <fex name="Theme">Theme</fex>.

name: Frequency
description: How often the #Agent cultivates the #Theme.

name: Degree
description: This frame element selects some gradable attribute and modifies the expected value for it.

name: Plant
description: The living organism belonging to the kingdom Plantae.

name: Characteristic
description: A quality of the #Plant.

name: Descriptor
description: A characterization of the #Plant not covered by another frame element.

name: Origin
description: The location from which the #Plant originated.

name: Play_activity
description: Play_activity

name: Toy
description: Toy

name: Description
description: Description

name: Frequency
description: Frequency

name: Result
description: Result

name: Manner
description: Manner

name: Purpose
description: Purpose

name: Time
description: Time

name: Place
description: Place

name: Mean
description: Meio

name: Question
description:
The #Question is an open proposition the answer to which is under dispute.

<ex>The <t>issue</t> is <fex name="que">who will have control of Iraq s rich oil resources</fex>.</ex>

name: Group
description: The #Group are the persons or organizations who have different points of view on the #Question.

name: Status
description:
The Frame Element #Status is used for expressions that indicate the relative importance of a #Question with respect to the other topics that are disputed.


<ex>The <fex name="sta">main</fex> <t>issue</t> is where the revenue is coming in from.</ex>

name: Domain
description:
The area of human experience which the #Question concerns.

<ex>The third sector of the Master Plan explores the important <fex name="dom">economic</fex> <t>issue</t> of tourism.</ex>

name: Context
description:
A state or event within which the #Question arises as a problem for the #Group.

<ex>The <t>question</t> <fex name="Context">in Argentina s case</fex> is what exchange rate is appropriate now.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time interval during which the #Question exists as a problem for the #Group.

<ex>The <t>issue</t> <fex name="tim">at the time</fex> was whether or not to relocate the Rennes-based part of
the team to California.</ex>

name: Police
description: It refers to buildings, institutions and individuals who represent the forces of public security of some #Place.

name: Place
description: Geographic location visited by the #Tourist, in which is the #Police.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group that resorts to the #Police at some #Place.

name: Purpose
description: Some specific action that is made possible by the existence of the #Police.

name: Type
description: Specific type of the #Police.

name: Activists
description: The person or group of people that act out against the #Institution in an attempt to have their #Demands fullfilled.

name: Institution
description: The #Institution is the company, factory, political party / institution, or entity that yields authority over the #Activists.

name: Demands
description: The #Demands are the guarantee(s) given by the #Institution to the #Activists that act to correct or address the issues or state of affairs that were grievous to the #Activists.

name: Duration
description: The #Duration is the length of time that the political action takes to be resolved.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the political action is carried out.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Activists carry out the political action.

name: Place
description: The #Place is the location where the political action occurs.

name: Type
description:
This FE is the subtype of the general category of action taken by the #Activists against the #Institution.  

<ex>The <fex name="Type">hunger</fex> <t>strike</t> lasted for three weeks.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time at which a protest takes place.

name: Locale
description: A stable bounded area.  It is typically the designation of the nouns of Locale-derived frames.

name: Constituent_parts
description: The materials or #Constituent_parts that make up a #Locale.

name: Container_possessor
description: The location that the #Locale is a part of.

name: Name
description: the #Names of #Locales.

name: Relative_location
description: A place that a Locale is located with respect to.

name: Descriptor
description: Any description, characteristic, or property of the #Locale which is not covered by more specific FEs.

name: Population
description: The people living in the jurisdiction of the locale.

name: Evaluee
description:
The person or object that is being evaluated for its desirability.

<ex>I heard he s a <t>cool</t> <fex name="Evaluee">guy</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
A description of how desirable the #Evaluee is.

<ex>Hanna Montana is <fex name="Degree">really</fex> <t>cool</t>.</ex>

name: Judge
description:
The person who decides how desirable the #Evaluee is.

<ex>Knitting is <t>cool</t> <fex name="Judge">to your grandma</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time when the Evaluee is judged to be desirable.

<ex>Go-go boots were <t>popular</t> <fex name="Time">in the 60s</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The geographic area where an #Evaluee is considered desirable.

<ex>Electronica is <t>all the rage</t> <fex name="Place">in Europe</fex>.</ex>

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person who acts in a misleading way to create the impression that they are a particular individual or type of #Simulated_entity.

name: Simulated_entity
description: The type or individual that the #Agent gives the impression of being.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the posing event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including general descriptions comparing events (the same way) and salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (<ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>).

name: Means
description:
An intentional action performed by the #Agent that contributes to the his or her being perceived as a particular (kind of) #Simulated_entity.

<ex>Some activists <t>posed</t> as delegates <fex name="Means">by wearing suits</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by posing as a particular (kind of) #Simulated_entity.

<ex>He <t>posed</t> as a Hurricane Katrina evacuee <fex name="pur">in order to get food, clothing and money from Good Samaritans in Shreveport</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: The location where the #Agent gives the impression that they are the #Simulated_entity.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Agent impersonates the #Simulated_entity.

name: Item
description: It identifies the entity whose scalar property is specified.

name: Variable
description: It is the scalar property that the #Item possesses.

name: Value
description: The position or range of positions on the scale that the Item occupies. This is normally implicit in the LU.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the scalar property of an #Item holds with respect to some #Variable.

name: Domain
description: It describes the set of #Items for which the #Variable  s position is determined.

name: Owner
description: The entity that owns a posession.

name: Possession
description:
The thing which is owned by the Owner.
Ex.:  I <t>have</t> <fex name="Possession">twenty bucks</fex>.
(This does not include bodyparts or medical conditions, but does include intellectual property, etc.)

name: Manner
description: The way that the #Owner possesses the #Possession.

name: Time
description: This FE indicates the #Time interval during which the #Owner has a possession.

name: Possible_event
description: The #Possible_event has met its preconditions, and will occur if some further #Condition holds.

name: Condition
description:
The state-of-affairs that does not hold, but if it did, the #Possible_event would occur.

<ex><fex name="Condition">If he wants</fex> , he <t>can</t> have all the fishsticks .</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time at which the #Possible_event can occur.

<ex>You <t>can</t> come in <fex name="Time">now</fex>.</ex>

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent is the individual whose body is in a particular posture.  The #Agent FE is generally expressed as the external argument of verbs: 
<ex><fex name="Agent">Kim</fex> was <t>kneeling</t> by the window.</ex>

name: Location
description:
A description of the position of the #Agent.  The #Location of the #Agent is frequently expressed and generally occurs as a PP Complement: 
<ex>Kim was <t>kneeling</t> <fex name="Location">by the window</fex>.</ex>

name: Point_of_contact
description:
The part of the body that provides support to the #Agent s body in the posture.

<ex>I <t>stood</t> <fex name="poc">on my heels</fex> and looked out the window</ex>

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Time
description:
This FE indicates the Time interval during which the #Agent held a certain posture.

<ex> <fex name="Time">Yesterday evening</fex> he was <t>sitting</t> in his armchair as usual</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The length of time for which the #Agent holds the posture.

<ex> I could have <t>stood</t> there <fex name="Duration">all afternoon</fex></ex>

name: Recipient
description: The individual that has just come into possession of the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The entity which has just come into the possession of the #Recipient.

name: Manner
description: The way that the #Recipient has the #Theme

name: Time
description: This FE indicates the #Time interval during which the Post_getting event occurs.

name: Donor
description: The individual that has just given the #Theme to the #Recipient and no longer has the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The entity that the #Donor has just given to the #Recipient.

name: Recipient
description: The individual that has just come into possession of the #Theme.

name: Manner
description: The way that the #Donor lacks the #Theme.

name: Time
description: This FE indicates the #Time when the Post_giving event occurs.

name: Owner
description: The entity that no longer owns the posession.

name: Possession
description:
The thing which was owned by the #Owner.
(This does not include bodyparts or medical conditions, but does include intellectual property, etc.)

name: Manner
description: Any description of the possession state which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Time
description: This FE indicates the #Time when the Post_lose_possession event occurs.

name: Time
description: Time

name: Recipient
description: The person who has just acted to come into possession of the #Theme.

name: Donor
description: The person who has just given the #Theme to the #Recipient.

name: Theme
description: The entity that changes possession, beginning in the possession of the #Donor and ending up with the #Recipient.

name: Manner
description: The way that the #Recipient has the #Theme

name: Time
description: This FE indicates the #Time when the Post_giving event occurs.

name: Donor
description: The individual that has just given the #Theme away.

name: Theme
description: The entity which has ended up in the possession of the #Recipient

name: Recipient
description: The individual that has ended up with the #Theme.

name: Manner
description: The way that the #Donor possesses the #Theme.

name: Time
description: This FE indicates the #Time when the Post_transfer event occurs.

name: Action
description: It identifies the #Action that the #Agent performs intentionally in order to prepare for a later #Occasion.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent performs the #Action in preparation for later performances of the same type.

name: Occasion
description: The later enactment or enactments that the #Agent expects to perform. Note that the #Agent does not have to have specific #Occasions in mind.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the practicing occurs.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which an #Agent performs an intentional act.

name: Time
description: It identifies the time when the #Agent practices.

name: Means
description: It identifies the #Means by which an #Agent  practices.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the practicing which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the #Action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Evaluee
description: The #Behavior of the #Evaluee is being judged as worthy of a particular reaction.

name: Behavior
description: It indicates the #Behavior on which the assessment of praiseworthiness is based.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the judgement or reaction is deserved.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Prank
description: The #Prank is a device, strategy, or system designed to mislead and cause harm and amusement to a #Victim (and possibly others observing the prank).

name: Joker
description: The #Prank is orchestrated by a #Joker.

name: Victim
description: The #Joker intends to mislead and cause harm to the #Victim by means of the #Prank.

name: Descriptor
description: A description of the #Prank.

name: Theme
description: A valuable entity which might fall and be damaged.

name: Falling_event
description: The event of falling, incorporated in the LUs of this frame.

name: Dangerous_entity
description: An entity which may cause the #Theme to fall.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing the deviation of the actual level of precariousness from the expected value given the #Theme and the state indicated by the target itself.

name: Place
description: A particular location in which the #Theme is at risk of falling. Frequently, it is to be inferred that the characteristics of the location put the #Theme in danger.

name: Time
description: The time period during which the #Theme is in danger of falling.

name: Location
description: The location where the #Theme is supported.

name: Precipitation
description: The water in liquid or solid form that falls from the sky is the Precipitation. This FE is incorporated in many LUs in this frame.

name: Place
description: The area which experiences precipitation.

name: Time
description:
When the event occurs.
<ex>It will probably be <t>raining</t> <fex name="Time">at five o clock</fex>.</ex>

name: Rate
description:
The Quantity of Precipitation that falls within a certain Duration.
<ex>It <t>rains</t> <fex name="Rate">only half an inch per year</fex> around here.</ex>

name: Quantity
description:
The Quantity is the amount of Precipitation that has fallen in a precipitation event or events.  It is usually measured as the height that the Precipitation attains if prevented from further movement.
<ex>It <t>rained</t> <fex name="Quantity">six inches</fex> last night.</ex>

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which the precipitation event lasts.

name: Manner
description:
The way in which the precipitation falls.
<ex>It <t>drizzled</t> <fex name="Manner">softly</fex>.</ex>

name: Temperature
description:
This FE identifies the temperature of the precipitation.
<ex>I was standing in the <fex name="Temperature">cool</fex> <t>drizzle</t>.</ex>

name: Experiencer
description:
The #Experiencer is in an undesirable #Situation.

<ex><fex name="Exp">The insurers</fex> <m>ended up</m> <m>in</m> a <t>bind</t>.</ex>

name: Situation
description:
This FE identifies the undesirable #Situation the #Experiencer is in.
<ex>They found themselves <m>in</m> a quite <fex name="Situation">a fix</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The company <m>was</m> definitely <m>in</m> <fex name="Situation">dire straits</fex> from the dollar s inflation.</ex>

name: Time
description:
Thiis FE identifies the #Time when the #Situation is in effect.

<ex><fex name="Time">Yesterday s</fex> <t>predicament</t> was a little too exciting.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location where the #Situation occurs.

<ex>The <t>trouble</t> <fex name="pla">in America</fex> is only going to get worse.</ex>

name: Speaker
description:
The #Speaker makes a prediction.

<ex>The institute <t>forecast</t> an increase in leisure spending of 15 per cent.</ex>

name: Eventuality
description:
This FE marks expressions that indicate an event or state that is predicted to occur or hold at a future time. A single #Eventuality may be expressed discontinuously in a raising construction. This FE is also used for expressions that denote entities with variable attributes about which the #Speaker makes predictions. 

<ex> <t>Predicting</t> <fex name="Eventuality">the weather</fex> is risky business.</ex>
<ex><t>Predicting</t> <fex name="Eventuality">the numbers of disabled elderly</fex> into the future is problematic as it depends upon the projection forward of current patterns of disability .</ex>
<ex> Wang<t>forecasts</t> <fex name="Eventuality">a 9 per cent increase in state revenue</fex></ex>
<ex> <fex name="Eventuality">The European market</fex> is  <t>forecast</t> <fex name="Eventuality">to grow 18.1%</fex>.</ex>

name: Medium
description:
The #Medium is the physical entity or channel used by the #Speaker to transmit the prediction.

<ex>The events that would occur over the next several years had been <t>predicted</t> <fex name="med">in the Bible</fex>.</ex>

<ex><fex name="med">Her texts</fex> <t>predict</t> the future.</ex>

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the subject matter to which the prediction pertains. It is normally expressed as a PP Complement headed by <m>about</m>.

name: Evidence
description:
This Frame Element marks expressions that denote a set of facts on the basis of which the #Speaker makes the prediction.

<ex>Violence was  <t>predicted</t> <fex name="Evidence">on the basis of disorder at demonstrations in Paris</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time when the prediction is made.

<ex>John <t>predicted</t> <fex name="Time">last year</fex> that he would be finished by October.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place where the #Speaker makes the prediction.

<ex> Greenman <t>predicted</t> <fex name="Place">at a small dinner party</fex> that the market would rise again.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
#Manner marks any description of the #Speaker s prediction making  that is not covered by more specific FEs. 

<ex>Smeagol <fex name="Mnr">confidently</fex> <t>predicted</t> that he would win the race.</ex>
<ex>One commentator <fex name="Manner">rashly</fex> <t>predicted</t> that the fad for adaptions wouldn t last much longer</ex>

Note that this FE does not cover modifiers such as  correctly  or  accurately .

name: Time_of_eventuality
description:
This frame element marks expressions that indicate forwhat future time an #Eventuality is predicted.

<ex> Cocoa stocks reached a record 1.2m tonnes and a seventh year of surplus is <t>forecast</t> <fex name="Time_of_eventuality">for the year to September 1991</fex>.</ex>

name: Accuracy
description:
This FE indicates the #Accuracy of the prediction.
<ex>Compary president Randall Johnson <t>predicted</t> <fex name="Accuracy">correctly</fex> that a major reworking of infrastructure would be necessary.</ex>
<ex>It is hard to <t>forecast</t> <fex name="Accuracy">with a high degree of certainty</fex> what the weather will be like past two or three days.</ex>

name: Means
description:
An act whereby the #Speaker makes a prediction.

<ex>My regular psychic <t>fortells</t> my future <fex name="mea">by examining the configuration of spent coffee grounds</fex>.</ex>

name: Experiencer
description: The #Experiencer is the person (or sentient being) who wishes for the #Event to occur.

name: Event
description: The change that the #Experiencer would like to see.

name: Focal_participant
description: This is the entity that the #Experiencer wishes to be affected by some #Event.

name: Location_of_event
description: The #Location_of_event is the place involved in the desired #Event.

name: Contrast
description:
An alternative #Event or #Focal_participant that is less desirable for the #Experiencer.

<ex>I always <t>preferred</t> trackballs <fex name="con">over mouses</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: The #Degree is the extent of the #Experiencer s Desiring.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Experiencer desires something.

name: Purpose_of_event
description: The #Purpose_of_event is the purpose pertaining to the desired #Event.

name: Time_of_event
description: The time that the #Event would ideally occur.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the #Experiencer desires something.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.  Note that this FE is of extremely rare occurrence in this frame.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which the #Experiencer has desired something.

name: Profiled_possibility
description: The situation presented explicitly as a possible for agents to influence that leads to a better situation, contrasting with the implicit #Opposite_possibility that leads to a worse situation.

name: Positive_consequence
description: The preferable situation that follows from the #Profiled_possibility.

name: Undesirable_consequence
description: The less desirable situation that follows as a result of the #Opposite_possibility.

name: Opposite_possibility
description: The implicit situation that is mutually exclusive with the #Profiled_possibility.  It is presented as leading to a less desirable situation, the #Undesirable_consequence.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent uses the #Preparatory_act to achieve a #Purpose.

name: Preparatory_act
description: The action performed by the #Agent that is a preliminary to the achievement of the #Purpose. The #Preparatory_act may also be expressed by a result of such an act.

name: Purpose
description: The ultimate goal or purpose of the #Agent, which the #Preparatory_act enables.

name: Preparatory_phase
description: The part of the larger process that is preliminary to the achievement of the #Purpose.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Preparatory_act is distant from the achievement of the #Purpose.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Preparatory_act takes place.

name: Place
description: The place where the #Preparatory_act takes place.

name: Athlete_1
description: Person or team that represents a country in the #Competition.

name: Athlete_2
description: The second person or team that represents a country in the #Competition.

name: Athletes
description: Individuals or teams representing their respective countries in a #Competition.

name: Groups
description: Groups of athletes or teams that play against each other.

name: Competition
description: The tournament being played.

name: Duration
description: The period of time during which the competition occurs.

name: Degree
description: How intensily squads play against each other.

name: Venue
description: The venue of the competition, specially when the place was built with the purpose of hosting a competition.

name: Place
description: Where the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: The way the participants compete.

name: Means
description: The actions taken by the squads to go through the group stage.

name: Time
description: The period of time when the competition occurs.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity whose existence at the #Location is confirmed.

name: Location
description: The #Location of the #Entity. The #Location is conceived as a ground for an event of inspection to determine the presence of the #Entity.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Entity is present at the #Location.

name: Duration
description: The time period during which the #Entity is present. In cases where the #Entity is sentient, there may be an inference that the #Entity's intent is to be present so as to participate in the event.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Entity is present.

name: Mitigating_situation
description: The #Mitigating_situation is the situation that actually occurs. it is presented in a discourse to mitigate the fact that a better situation did not occur - since the fe is still preferable to an even worse situation.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person performing the intentional act that leads to the preservation.<ex><fex name="Agt">Arlene</fex> <t>pickled</t> the cucumbers.</ex>

name: Medium
description: #Medium is the substance in which the #Patient might be  submerged to be preserved. <ex>Tess <t>pickled</t> the beets <fex name="Medium">in vinegar</fex>.</ex>

name: Patient
description: The #Patient is organic matter that undergoes the preservation.<ex>Tess <t>pickled</t> <fex name="Patient">the beets</fex> in vinegar.</ex>

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which an an #Agent performs the Preserving.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Agent preserves the #Patient.<ex>Hannah <t>cured</t> the shrimp <fex name="Means">by injecting them with brine</fex>.</ex><ex>This salami was <t>cured</t> naturally <fex name="Means">in salt</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Agent preserves the #Patient.<ex>Jake <fex name="Manner">painstakingly</fex> <t>embalmed</t> the next body.</ex>

name: Place
description: The #Place where the preserving occurs.<ex>Mr. Amber <t>embalmed</t> the woman s body <fex name="Place">in Turkey</fex> in 1922.</ex>

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Agent preserves the #Patient.<ex>Mr. Amber <t>embalmed</t> the woman in Turkey <fex name="Time">in 1922</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Agent preserves the #Patient.<ex>Jude <t>pickled</t> the onions <fex name="Purpose">to increase their potency</fex>.</ex>

name: Duration
description: The amount of #Time for which the process of Preserving is ongoing.<ex>...oak <t>cured</t> <fex name="Dur">for eight years</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the <fex name="Patient">Patient</fex> is preserved from decaying.  <ex> The corpse had been <t>mummified</t> <fex name="Degree">completely</fex>.</ex>

name: Speaker
description:
The person who uses language in the written or spoken modality to convey a deceptive Message to the Addressee.
<ex><fex name="Speaker">Politicians</fex> do nothing but <m>tell</m> <t>lies</t> about money.</ex>

name: Addressee
description:
The person that receives a Message from the Speaker. 
<ex>You re <t>kidding</t> <fex name="Addressee">me</fex>!</ex>
<ex>Satan <t>lies</t> <fex name="Addressee">to everyone, including himself</fex>.</ex>

name: Topic
description:
#Topic is the entity to which the proposition or propositions  relate, that they are about. 
<ex>You <t>deceived</t> me <fex name="Topic">about the location of the diamonds</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: The location at which the deception occurs.

name: Time
description: The time at which the deception occurs.

name: Means
description: The (communicative) action performed by the #Speaker in order to deceive the #Addressee.

name: Duration
description: The length of <fex name="Time">Time</fex> that the <fex name="Speaker">Speaker</fex> spends on the <fex name="Topic">Topic</fex>.

name: Purpose
description: The goal of the <fex name="Speaker">Speaker</fex> s deceit of the #Addressee

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the <fex name="Speaker">Speaker</fex> deceives the <fex name="Addressee">Addressee</fex> about the <fex name="Topic">Topic</fex>.

name: Frequency
description: This FE describes how often the #Speaker discusses the #Topic with the #Addressee.

name: Potential_hindrance
description: The #potential_hindrance is the force which keeps the #event from happening, or does not.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the sentient being which keeps the Event from happening.

the #potential_hindrance is the force which keeps the #event from happening, or does not prevent it.

The #Possession is the thing which is owned by the #Owner.

<ex><fex name="Owner">I</fex> <t>have</t> <fex name="Possession">twenty bucks</fex>.</ex>
(This does not include bodyparts or medical conditions, but does include intellectual property, etc.)

name: Possession
description: Possession

name: Manner
description: Any description of the possession state which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Manner

name: Product
description: A commodity, item, or service being sold by the #Seller at a certain #Price.

name: Price

name: Seller

name: Buyer

name: Descriptor

name: Penal_institution
description: The locale which serves to confine individuals, generally for the purpose of punishment. This FE is incorporated in each LU in this frame.

name: Operator
description:
The Frame Element #Operator marks expressions that indicate which level of government operates the Penal Institution.

<ex>Smithers had to serve time in <fex name="Operator">federal</fex> <t>prison</t>.</ex>

name: Inmates
description:
#Inmates marks expressions that indicate the group of people a Penal Institution is intended to hold.

<ex>Monica served time in the Tennessee <t>Prison</t> <fex name="Inmates">for Women</fex>.</ex>

name: Name
description:
This FE marks expressions that are the #Name of a Penal Institution.

<ex>Kolimov visited the <fex name="Name">Willy C. Peterson</fex> State <t>Prison</t>.</ex>

name: Location
description:
This FE marks expressions that indicate the #Location of the Penal Institution.

<ex>Carruthers spent three years in <fex name="Location">Fort Pulaski</fex> State <t>Prison</t>.</ex>

name: Security
description:
The level of security maintained at the prison.
<ex>He was held in a <fex name="Sec">maximum security</fex> <t>Prison</t>.</ex>

name: Part
description:
A subpart of the #Penal_institution.

<ex>You really expect me to run a <t>prison</t> <fex name="Part">with only ten cells</fex>?</ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
This FE is used to describe a salent characteristic of the #Penal_institution not otherwise specified.
<ex>They held him for years in an <fex name="desc">isolated</fex> <t>prison</t>.</ex>

name: Odds
description: A numerical representation of the probability that a #Hypothetical_event will occur.

name: Position
description: A metaphorical representation of the position on the scale of likelihood that the #Hypothetical_event will occur.

name: Hypothetical_event
description: The event that is expected to happen with a certain likelihood.

name: Alterant

name: Material

The #Material is altered by the #Agent in some useful way.
<ex>Stu <t>treated</t> <fex name="Mat">the lumber</fex> with magical waterproofing fairydust.</ex>

name: Purpose

The purpose for which the #Agent processes the #Material.
<ex>He <t>treated</t> the exterior of the house with waterproofing <fex name="Pur">to protect his valuable peanut butter collection.</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Materials are processed, often a purpose-built facility such as a tannery or water treatment plant.

name: Time
description: The point in time or period during which the treatment of the #Material takes place.

name: Manner
description:
A holistic description encompassing all the details of an act of processing, often indicated by giving a characteristic of the #Agent that affects the action.

<ex>Botulinum can not be <t>weaponized</t> <fex name="Manner">the same way</fex> .</ex>

name: Vehicle

name: Manner
description: Any description of the delivery event  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Deliverer that affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Deliverer hopes to bring about by delivering to the #Purchaser.

name: Explanation

name: Place

The #Speed at which the #Deliverer delivers the #Goods.

<ex>This service is for our clients who need <fex name="spe">speedy</fex> <t>delivery</t> of their goods.</ex>

name: Source

name: Means

name: Path
description: The path along which the #Goods move while being delivered.

name: Developer

The person who develops the #Product.

<ex><fex name="Dev">Elsa</fex> <t>developed</t> a new line of facial products.</ex>

The entity which is developed by the #Developer.

<ex><fex name="Product">Dr. Pepper</fex> was <t>developed</t> in Texas.</ex>

name: Company

The organization for which the #Developer develops the #Product.

<ex>Wilhelm <t>developed</t> the software <fex name="Company">for Microsoft</fex>, but they rejected it.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location where the #Product is developed by the #Developer.

<ex>Gabriela <t>developed</t> her new line of fashion <fex name="Place">in Milan</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time when the #Product is developed by the #Developer.  

<ex>The <t>development</t> of unique, high-quality writing instruments <fex name="Time">in the late 1990s</fex> saved the company from going bankrupt. </ex>

name: Manner
description:
The manner in which the Product is developed.

<ex>High-quality products must be <t>developed</t> <fex name="M">quickly</fex> by employees.</ex>

name: Use
description:
The use for which the #Product is intended.

<ex>This product was <t>developed</t> <fex name="Use">for underwater photography</fex>.</ex>

name: Developer
description: The #Developer is the person who develops the #Entity.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity is the item developed by the #Developer.

name: Time

name: Place
description: The location where the #Entity is developed.

name: Company
description: The organization for which the #Entity is developed by the #Developer.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Developer develops the #Entity.

name: Brand
description:
The company that produces the #Collection of #Products.

<ex>Did you see the new <fex name="Brand">Kate Spade</fex> <t>line</t>?</ex>

name: Collection
description:
The set of #Products produced by the #Brand.

<ex>They re so damn rich, they could buy this whole <fex name="Coll"><t>line</t></fex> without batting an eyelash.</ex>

name: Products
description:
The individual items produced by the #Brand.

<ex>Jaques just showed us his Fall <t>line</t> <fex name="Products">of cocktail dresses</fex>.</ex>

name: Designer
description:
The person who designs the #Collection. 

<ex>Did you see <fex name="D">Louis </fex> new <t>line</t>?</ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
A characteristic of the #Collection or individual #Products.

<ex>His <fex name="Desc">debut</fex> <t>collection</t> had brilliant crisp white shirts, beautiful eveningwear, and denim that was a little suspect.</ex>

name: Collection_name
description:
The name of the #Collection of #Products produced by the #Brand.

<ex>The Greenwich armchair from Barnsley House s <fex name="Name">Winterthur</fex> <t>collection</t> is a must for those looking for sturdy yet stylish garden furniture.</ex>

name: Entity
description:
The object that undergoes change.

<ex><t>Advances</t> <fex name="ent">in marketing techniques</fex> have since rendered it obsolete.</ex>

name: Prior_state
description:
The former state of the #Entity.

<ex>I think we have <t>advanced</t> somewhat <fex name="pri">from that way of thinking</fex> .</ex>

name: Post_state
description:
The state of the #Entity following an advance.

<ex>The roads have now <t>advanced</t> <fex name="pos">to a level of perfection not seen since Rome</fex> .</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time at which the progress occurs.

<ex><fex name="tim">When</fex> did the X-wing <t>progress</t> beyond the drawing board?</ex>

name: Rate
description:
The rate at which the change happens.

<ex>His captaincy has <fex name="rat">slowly</fex> <t>matured</t> until he has made us forget the sulky Nasser Hussian era</ex>

name: Manner
description:
A description of the progress, generally a description comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). 

<ex>Recovery in our major overseas markets has <t>progressed</t> <fex name="man">tentatively</fex> and increased spending by consumers and government does not appear to be benefiting this .</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The period over which the progress occurs.

<ex>Screwcap wine seals enable bottle maturation, and provide ideal conditions for <t>maturation</t> of wines <fex name="dur">over a long period of time</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The amount of advancement that the #Entity has attained.

<ex>Robert s music is <t>developing</t> <fex name="deg">further</fex> as he hones
his live set to bring in the diverse elements of pan-African music.</ex>

name: Domain
description:
The relevant dimension of development.

<ex>Why have we <t>developed</t> <fex name="dom">economically</fex> as we have? </ex>

name: Place
description: The location where the Progress occurs.

name: Principle
description:
A moral, legal, or social norm which rules a #State_of_affairs to be inadmissible behavior or an outcome of behavior.

<ex><fex name="Prin">The Establishment Clause of the First Amendment</fex> plainly <t>prohibits</t> the
establishment of a national religion by Congress.</ex>

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the prohibiting occurs.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the prohibiting occurs.

name: Agent
description:
The individual or organization that carries out the project.

<ex>The <fex name="age">DOE</fex> Human Genome <t>Program</t> also has developed high-throughput approaches to identifying is-regulatory sequences in the human and other genomes</ex>

name: Field
description:
An area of human endeavor, typically scientifc in nature, in which the #Agent s #Activity falls. 

<ex>Several <t>projects</t> <fex name="fie">in computational linguistics</fex> have recently stalled due to lack of funding .</ex>

name: Activity
description:
What the #Agent (an individual or the members of an organization) are dedicated to doing.

<ex>The <fex name="act">New Car Assessment</fex> <t>Program</t> (NCAP) is dedicated to helping the public buy a safer car. </ex>

name: Goal
description:
The larger aim that the #Agent is pursuing by carrying out certain coordinated measures.

<ex>The <t>program</t> <fex name="goa">to analyze the composition of Titan s sludge</fex> is nearly complete.</ex>

name: Salient_entity
description:
An entity (abstract or concrete) which is involved in an implicit #Activity.

<ex>Iran has vowed to continue its <fex name="sal">nuclear</fex> <t>program</t> and is demanding that sanctions against it should be lifted .</ex>
<ex>The DOE <fex name="sal">Human Genome</fex> <t>Program</t> also has developed high-throughput approaches to identify cis-regulatory sequences in the human and other genomes, based on shared </ex>

name: Project
description: The ongoing plan of action which allows the #Agent to pursue the #Activity.

name: Name
description:
A name given to the project for identification.

<ex>Our agency is responsible for administering the <fex name="nam">WIC</fex> <t>Program</t></ex>

name: Manner
description: A description of the manner in which the #Agent performs the #Activity associated with the program.

name: Duration
description:
The length of time over which the project is lasts or is slated to last.

<ex>The government has initiated yet another <fex name="dur">seven-year</fex> <t>program</t>.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Project is ongoing.

name: Place
description: The location where a #Project is pursued.

name: Attribute
description: The #Attribute is the number of entities that make up the #Set.

name: Set
description:
The group of entities, possibly construed as a collective, whose number changes.

<ex><fex name="set">The union s membership</fex> has <t>dwindled</t> from 1.5 million in 1979 to a little more than 600000 today.</ex>

name: Difference
description:
The number of entities by which the #Set increases or decreases.

<ex>Jaffna s student population has <t>dwindled</t> <fex name="Diff">by more than a hundred</fex>.</ex>

name: Final_number
description:
The number of entities in the #Set afterwards.

<ex>Church of England baptisms have <t>dwindled</t> from 365000 in 1940 <fex name="val2">to 150000 in 1995</fex>.</ex>

name: Initial_number
description:
The initial number of entities in the #Set.

<ex>The number of Medline searches has greatly <t>proliferated</t> <fex name="val1">from 7 million</fex> to 120 million.</ex>

name: Initial_state
description:
A description that presents the #Set s state before the change in the number of entities making it up as an independent predication.


<ex>The human population has <t>dwindled</t> <fex name="inis">from being world dominators</fex> to simple survivors.</ex>

name: Final_state
description:
A description that presents the #Set s state after  the change in the #Attribute s value as an independent predication.


<ex></ex>

name: Path
description:
Any expression that gives information about points on the number scale that the #Set traverses between the starting and ending point of its movement.

<ex>The top three pulled away from the pack as the laps <t>dwindled</t> <fex name="Path">down</fex>.</ex>

name: Speed
description:
The rate of change of the value.


<ex>Those systems proved popular, and they <fex name="Speed">quickly</fex> <t>proliferated</t>.</ex>

name: Correlated_variable
description:
The #Correlated_variable is an ordered progression of positions or values (most often a sequence of spatial locations) that the (dependent) #Attribute is measured against. The #Correlated_variable is metaphorically mapped onto the progression of time, and in the absence of this FE, changes in the number in the #Set are simply measured against (forward-directional) time.
<ex>Mushrooms and deep moss proliferate as you get deeper into the trail.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs,  secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>).

name: Degree
description:
#Degree to which event occurs.

<ex>Our supply had <fex name="Degr">completely</fex> <t>dwindled</t> with our war fatalities and we needed a small supply on hand.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time is the time-frame in which the change in number occurs.

<ex>Oh, my aching software: Worms and viruses <t>proliferated</t> <fex name="Time">in 2003</fex>.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The length of time over which the change takes place.


<ex>Cellular phone and paging device ownership by adolescents has <t>proliferated</t> <fex name="Dur">over the past years</fex>.</ex>

name: Initial_correlate
description:
The value, location, or state-of-affairs that corresponds to the #Initial_number of entities in the #Set.

<ex><fex name="cor1">From California</fex> to Massachusetts, these predators <t>proliferate</t>
uncontrollably and unsustainably.</ex>

name: Final_correlate
description:
The value, location, or state-of-affairs that corresponds to the #Final_number in the #Set.

<ex>From California <fex name="cor2">to Massachusetts</fex>, these predators <t>proliferate</t>
uncontrollably and unsustainably.</ex>

name: Place
description: A location where the #Set changes in number.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity for which the saliency #Attribute is appropriate and under consideration.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of the #Entity which is under discussion, namely perceptual salience.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the prominence from the norm or from the value for another #Entity.

name: Place
description: It refers to the location where the #Entity has a prominence of some #Attribute.

name: Entity
description: The name of a particular entity that otherwise might be interpreted as having a broader reference.

name: Intended_referent
description: The entity that the speaker intends to refer to using the #Entity in a more restricted sense. The #Intended_referent is typically a part of the referent that the hearer might have identified based on the broader use of the #Entity.

name: Criteria
description: A representation of the conditions upon which membership to a #Subset of a #Group is determined.

name: Subset
description: The members of a #Group that fulfill particular #Criteria to belong to a #Subset of the #Group.

name: Ratio
description: The numerical representation of the size of the #Subset relative to the size of the #Group.

name: Group
description: A general collection of entities which are judged against the #Criteria to determine membership in a #Subset.

name: Descriptor
description: A description of how the #Ratio compares to expectations.

name: Denoted_quantity
description: The quantity denoted by phrases headed by the Target.

name: Mass
description: A substance that is being quantified.

name: Individuals
description: A collection of entities, either quantifiable physical beings or quantifiable units whether physical or not.

name: Reference_quantity
description: A relatively precise quantity in some oft-used form that is used as the basis for defining the #Denoted_quantity.

name: Degree
description: It selects some gradable attribute and modifies the expected value for it.

name: Protection
description:
The person, entity, or action that prevents harm to an #Asset.

<ex><fex name="pro">The tabloid s deal with the woman</fex> <t>shielded</t> Schwarzenegger.</ex>

name: Danger
description:
A situation that could damage the #Asset.


<ex>Other nations tended to muffle or modulate their occasional annoyance with the
country that was their <t>shield</t> <fex name="Danger">against the Soviet threat</fex>.</ex>

name: Asset
description:
Something desirable possessed by or directly associated with the #Protection which might be lost or damaged.

<ex>Almost 10 years later, that agreement <t>insulated</t> <fex name="Asset">Microsoft</fex> from liability on copyright claims over the graphical user interface (GUI).</ex>

name: Place
description:
The place where the #Danger threatened the #Asset.



<ex>To make his way on a foreign soil, he needed different guardians from those that <t>protected</t> him <fex name="Place">in his own birthplace</fex> .</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time when the #Danger threatens.

<ex>Regardless of the distribution media, USPTO information is <t>safeguarded</t> <fex name="Time">before, during, and after dissemination</fex> from improper access and modification.</ex>

name: Means
description:
An event involving the #Protection that removes the #Asset from potential harm through the #Danger.

<ex>Jackson <t>secured</t> the flank <fex name="mea">by timely charging the enemy and driving him back</fex>.</ex>

name: Instrument
description:
An entity directed by a volitional agent acting as a #Protection which interacts with an undergoer to accomplish the security of the #Asset from harm by the #Danger.

<ex>Your Brake Pads Parts order is encrypted and <t>safeguarded</t> <fex name="ins">with the latest
SSL technology</fex> for a protected and secure shopping experience!</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the protecting event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (<ment>hard</ment>, <ment>softly</ment>), secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In cases of agentive #Protection, it may indicate salient characteristics of an agent that also affect the action (<ment>carefully</ment>).

<ex>Finally, I thank all of the curators of all of the museums around the world who
have <fex name="man">carefully</fex> <t>protected</t> the Ivory-billed specimens in their care.</ex>

name: Protester
description:
The individual (or individuals) who holds an opinion on an Issue or Side.

<ex>On 8 May a <fex name="pro">student</fex> <t>demonstration</t> was attended by a large number of workers.</ex>

name: Issue
description:
The matter, usually concerning a course of action, which the #Protester has an positive or negative opinion about.

<ex>Hundreds gathered this afternoon to <t>demonsrate</t> <fex name="Issue">for women s rights</fex>.</ex>

name: Side
description:
The party or individual (generally associated with a particular position on an #Issue) that the #Protester sides with.

<ex>Violent <t>protests</t> <fex name="sid">against the government</fex> are sure to break out.</ex>

name: Action
description:
An action taken by a Side or a view that the Side takes on an issue which the #Protester either supports or opposes.

<ex>Several hundred Tibetans, already worried by inflation, took to the streets to <t>protest</t> <fex name="Action">at the new measures</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Protester supports or opposes something, or expresses views on the #Issue.

name: Time
description: The time period during which the Protesters express their opinions.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the a Protest which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the Protester that affect the action (reluctantly, meekly).

name: Place
description: The location where the #Protester takes #Sides on an #Issue .

name: Duration
description:
The length of time of the protest.

<ex>The <fex name="dur">month-long</fex> <t>protest</t> is slowly losing momentum.</ex>

name: Means
description: An action taken by the #Protester in order to communicate their dissatisfaction with the actions of the other #Side of an issue.

name: Purpose
description: The situation that the #Protester hopes to bring about through their protest.

name: Host
description: The #Host is the individual (or group of individuals) that own or control the #Residence and allow the  #Lodger to temporarily stay there.

name: Lodger
description: The #Lodger is the individual who is given permission to lodge in the #Residence.

name: Residence
description: The location controlled by the #Host which the #Lodger stays at temporarily.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the #Host provides a Residence to the #Lodger

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the #Host provides a temporary #Residence.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the provision of lodging which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of the #Host that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Means
description:
An action of the #Host whereby they communicate or enact the granting of permission to stay in the Residence.

<ex></ex>

name: Profiled_region
description: A region of space located relative to a #Ground that is maximally relevant near the #Ground, with decreasing applicability away from the #Ground.

name: Ground
description: An entity whose location is relatively well-known and which, thus, can serve as a land-mark to identify the #Profiled_region.

name: Degree
description: The amount of deviation from an idealized expected distance of the #Profiled_region from the #Ground.

name: Institution
description: A permanent organization with a socially important purpose.

name: Domain
description:
The concern of the #Institution-- broadly speaking, the aspect of society that they affect.

<ex>At one emergency <fex name="dom">financial</fex> <t><fex name="ins">service</fex></t>, I double-checked people s math to make sure they weren t blowing the budget.</ex>

name: Target_group
description:
The members of the public whom the #Institution is intended to serve.

<ex>PG & E was the electric <t>service</t> <fex name="tar">for much of the West Coast</fex>.</ex>

name: Service_action
description:
The action performed or enabled by the #Institution for the #Target_group.

<ex>Reach Out ! is a <t>service</t> <fex name="ser">for helping young Australians through tough times</fex>.</ex>

name: Publisher
description: The entity that acts on behalf of the #Author to release the #Work to the public.

name: Work
description: The creation of the #Author that is made public by the #Publisher.

name: Author
description: The person or entity that is responsible for the detailed construction of the content of the #Work.  It is normally expressed in place of the #Publisher FE, but the #Publisher may cooccur with #Author, appearing as an adjunct.

name: Medium
description: The format utilized by the #Author to create the #Work.

name: Time
description: The date when the #Work is available or is expected to be available.

name: Audience
description: The subset of the population that the #Work is targeted towards or released to.

name: Purpose
description: The situation that the #Author or #Publisher hopes to bring about by publishing.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Publisher releases the work.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the action that clarifies, in a holistic way, the details of how the publication event unfolded, including comparisons to other events ( the same way ) and states of performers of the action that influence the act itself ( peevishly ).

name: Means
description: The action taken by the #Author or #Publisher that makes the #Work publicly available.

name: Perceiver
description:
The being who has a perceptual experience, generally construed to be not on purpose. 

<ex>When she looked back, <fex name="Perceiver">Maria</fex> <t>glimpsed</t> an arm clawing around the corner.</ex>

name: Phenomenon
description:
The entity or phenomenon that the perceiver experiences with his or her senses. It is typically expressed as Object with verbs.

<ex>The waiter <t>glimpsed</t> <fex name="Phenomenon">a fly</fex> disappearing under the surface of the soup.</ex>

name: Body_part
description:
The #Body_part is the location on the body where the perceptual experience  takes place.  It is typically expressed in a PP.

<ex>Mata Hari turned to her lawyer as <fex name="BodP">her eyes</fex> <t>glimpsed</t> the blindfold.</ex>

name: Direction
description:
This frame element is used for all path-like expressions, except those indicating the location of the perceiver (see above), that describe how the perceiver s attention is directed during the act of perception.

<ex>Hard to be certain what I <t>glimpsed</t> <fex name="Direction">through the crack of the door</fex>.</ex>

name: Ground
description:
The perceptual background against which the #Phenomenon is  experienced (or not experienced) by the #Perceiver. 

<ex>Had he caught a <t>glimpse</t> of her face <fex name="Ground">among the crowd</fex>?</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of properties of perception, such as: <ment>clearly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>, etc.

<ex>Pat <fex name="Manner">secretly</fex> <t>glimpsed</t> the designs for a new headquarters.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The #Degree indicates the degree to which the Perception is experienced.

<ex>A nightmare creature, <fex name="Degr">barely</fex> <t>glimpsed</t> in the swirling dense smoke, was beating at the flames coming from its own body.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The action whereby the #Perceiver perceives.

<ex>He just <t>glimpsed</t> the car <fex name="Mns">by craning his neck</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: The #Time, generally construed as punctual, at which the #Perceiver or the #Body_part perceives the #Phenomenon.

name: Agent
description: The volitional actor who intends to achieve a goal.

name: Goal
description: The action or state of affairs that the #Agent wants to achieve.

name: Means
description: A #Means is an object or action that is used or designed to achieve a particular #Goal.

name: Attribute
description: It marks expressions that indicate an #Attribute for which it is the #Agent's goal that it have or reach a particular #Value.

name: Value
description: It marks expressions that indicate which #Value the #Agent wants the #Attribute to reach.

name: Time
description: It expresses a time period during which an #Agent had a particular #Goal.

name: Agent
description:
The individual or group that causes the #Fire to no longer burn.

<ex><fex name="Agent">The firefighters</fex> <t>extinguished</t> the wildfire.</ex>

name: Fire
description:
The combustion process that the #Agent causes to end.

<ex>It took four days before <fex name="Fire">the fire</fex>was <t>extinguished</t>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the state of an #Agent that affects the nature of the event as the #Agent brings about the end of the #Fire.

<ex>The firefighters <fex name="Manner">heroically</fex> <t>extinguished</t> the flames.</ex>

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the #Agent puts out the #Fire.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the #Fire goes out.

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the #Means by which an #Agent puts out a #Fire

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the #Purpose for which an #Agent puts out the #Fire.

name: Degree
description: This FE describes the how near the #Agent is to puting out the #Fire.

name: Entity
description: Entity

name: Attribute
description: Attribute

name: Value
description: Value

name: Quantity
description: The #Quantity-denoting the target word.

name: Mass
description: A substance that is being quantified.

name: Individuals
description: A collection of entities.

name: Q_prop
description: A property of the #Quantity.

name: Degree
description: It selects some gradable attribute and modifies the expected value for it.

name: Entity
description: It identifies the concept or substance being quantified by a #Quantity.

name: Quantity
description: It identifies the #Quantity-denoting target word.

name: Value
description: It identifies the numerical amount of the #Entity.

name: Arguers
description: A group of people in an argument.

name: Arguer1
description: A person who is arguing with #Arguer2.

name: Arguer2
description: The person who is being argued with by #Arguer1.

name: Issue
description: The thing the #Arguers are arguing over or about.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time that the #Arguers spend in the altercation.

name: Manner
description: A description of the dispute which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Arguers that affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: The action that the #Arguers perform in order to quarrel with each other.

name: Medium
description: The equipment, language, or other entity that the #Arguers use to pursue their argument.

name: Amount_of_discussion
description: The degree to which the argument has been finished.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Arguers or #Arguer1 hope to bring about.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Arguers quarrel.

name: Time
description: The time when the argument takes place.

name: Speaker
description: The person asking a question.

name: Addressee
description: The #Addressee is the person to whom the #Message is directed.

name: Message
description: The #Message, or content of the question, usually takes the form of a direct quote or an embedded question with a verb.

name: Topic
description: It occurs very frequently in this frame with both noun and verb targets.

name: Medium
description: It is the physical entity or channel used by the #Speaker to transmit the question.

name: Manner
description: It is the #Manner of performing the request.

name: Time
description: The time at which the questioning occurs.

name: Employee
description: The person who is obligated to perform some task in order to receive compensation.

name: Employer
description: The person (or institution) in whose employ the #Employee stood.

name: Field
description: The #Field that one works in.

name: Position
description: The label given to a particular type of service that the employee quits.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which an #Employee leaves the job.

name: Place
description: It identifies the place where the #Employee quits the employment of the #Employer.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which an #Employee quits the employment of the #Employer.

name: Time
description: It identifies the Time when an #Employee quits the employment of the #Employer.

name: Means
description: The means whereby the act of quitting is accomplished.

name: Self_mover
description: This is the entity which moves under its own power.

name: Source
description: Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion expresses the frame element #Source. In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion. In particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Path
description: A relation to a landmark that describes the trajectory in the midst of the motion.  (It is thus neither a #Source nor the #Intended_goal.)

name: Intended_goal
description: Any expression which tells where the #Self_mover intends to end up as a result of the motion.

name: Manner
description: Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Means
description: An event involving the #Self_mover that results in the #Self_mover moving in the specified way.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which the #Self_mover moves.

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the motion (which is specified by a #Source, #Path or #Goal) is located.

name: Direction
description: The direction in which the #Self_mover goes.

name: Time
description: The time at which the motion takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Self_mover wishes to bring about.

name: Vehicle
description: The device or body part that serves to move the #Self_mover.

name: Distance
description: The distance from the #Source that the #Self_mover ends up.

name: Person
description: The Person whose race is being described.

name: Guardian
description: Guardian

name: Child
description: child.

name: Event
description: A type of occurrence whose effects extend a certain distance.

name: Participant
description: An entity that is conceived as driving the #Event.

name: Instrument
description: An entity which is deployable by the #Participant to interact with things within a certain distance.

name: Distance
description: The spatial extent over which the #Participant can interact in an #Event.

name: Rank
description: The #Rank itself, usually denoted by the noun.

name: Item
description: An entity which holds a particular #Rank.

name: Entity
description: The item which is described in terms of its expectedness in the context.

name: Perpetrator
description: This is the person who forces another person to have sexual intercourse with him or her against the other person s will.

name: Victim
description: This is the person who is forced to engage in sexual intercourse against his or her will.

name: Event
description: The rape of a #Victim by the #Perpetrator.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Means
description: An act performed by the #Perpetrator by which the sexual crime is accomplished.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description:
The #Time when the event occurs.

<ex>The lawyer said the woman was <t>raped</t> <fex name="Time">on a night of madness</fex> </ex>

name: Instrument
description: This FE is any object used to commit the crime.

name: Protagonist
description:
The #Protagonist acts or is apt to act with some degree of consideration regarding the circumstances and possible consequences of an #Action he or she may perform.

<ex>I feel that most do, but typically <fex name="pro">people</fex> <m>are</m> <t>rash</t>, and often reach anger and hostility quickly.</ex>
<ex>I think it <m>was</m> <t>patient</t> <fex name="pro">of me</fex> <fex name="act">to wait another month</fex>.</ex>

name: Action
description:
The #Action is carried out by the #Protagonist with or without regard for the circumstances under which it is performed or consideration of possible consequences.

<ex><fex name="act">What he did</fex> <m>was</m> <t>impetuous</t> and quite irrational - some might say ill-considered.</ex>
<ex>Caryn thinks Tom made a <t>rash</t> <fex name="act">choice</fex> by electing to move to the new camp.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The period of time when the #Protagonist acts with (or without) consideration regarding an #Action.

<ex><m>Were</m> n t you <t>impetuous</t> <fex name="tim">when you were young</fex>?</ex>

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Action of the #Protagonist deviates from the expected in its rashness.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Event
description:
The #Event whose #Rate is being described. 

<ex>He was <t>rapidly</t> <fex name="Event">losing his patience</fex>.</ex>

name: Rate
description:
The #Rate at which something happens during an #Event.

<ex>Anthony marveled at the <t>rapid</t> <fex name="Rate">rate</fex> of production.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
How much the #Rate deviates from a neutral or expected standard.

<ex>It was followed by an <fex name="Degree">extremely</fex> <t>rapid</t> deterioration of order.</ex>

name: Agent
description:
A participant in an #Event that is responsible for its unexpected #Rate.

<ex><fex name="Agent">She</fex> was really <t>fast</t> at shorthand.</ex>

name: Event
description:
The #Event that occurs at a certain Rate. 

<ex><fex name="Event">Production</fex> <t>rates</t> have risen in the last year.</ex>

name: Rate
description:
How much a particular salient quantity involved in an #Event changes over time.
<ex>His heart <t><fex name="Rate">rate</fex></t> quickened.</ex>

name: Entity
description:
A participant in the #Event who is responsible for the indicated #Rate.
<ex>The mating <t>rate</t> <fex name="Entity">of cats</fex> has dropped dramatically.</ex>

name: Descriptor
description:
Any characterization of the #Rate that is not covered by another more specific FE.

<ex>This camera is capable of shooting at <fex name="Descriptor">high</fex> <t>speeds</t>.</ex>

name: Type
description:
A name of the #Rate of or description of the particular category the #Rate belongs to.

<ex>His <fex name="Type">heart</fex> <t>rate</t> was unusually fast.</ex>

name: Degree
description: #Degree compares the given rate for the standard or familiar rate for a given #Event.

name: Ratifier
description:
The individual or body that confirms a Proposal negotiated or created by another party, causing it to become binding in a jurisdiction represented by the #Ratifier.  In the case of direct democratic ratification, the jurisdiction and the #Ratifier are the same.

<ex>If <fex name="rat">we</fex> <t>ratify</t> Management  s plan , we  ll have to take a drug test every week !</ex>

name: Proposal
description:
The idea or course of action proposed by another individual or body which the #Ratifier endorses and makes binding.

<ex>President Aleksander Kwasniewski <t>ratified</t> <fex name="pro">protocols to the Europol Convention</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the #Ratifier makes the #Proposal binding.

name: Place
description:
The #Place is where the #Ratifier ratifies the #Proposal.

<ex></ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the allowing which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of the #Ratifier that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>). 

<ex>It is no coincidence that the EU, on behalf of its 25 member states, has <fex name="man">eagerly</fex>
<t>ratified</t> Rotterdam and other treaties, no doubt seeing it as the perfect opportunity.</ex>

name: Means
description:
An action of the #Ratifier whereby they make binding the #Proposal.

<ex>After Inuit approve the Labrador Inuit Land Claim Agreement, the province will <t>ratify</t>
it <fex name="mea">by submitting it to the provincial cabinet for approval, and then signing it</fex>.</ex>

name: Reader
description: The one who examines a #Text to understand it.

name: Text
description: The entity that contains linguistic symbols.

name: Topic
description:
The idea that an implicit #Text or texts focuses on.

<ex>I love <t>reading</t> <fex name="top">about history</fex> .</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any description of the reading event that implicates details of how the event unfolds or is carried out (e.g. "the same way"); additionally used for descriptions of the #Reader that also affect the event (e.g. "eagerly").

name: Means
description:
An act that allows the #Reader to read in the specified manner.
<ex>I <t>skimmed</t> the book <fex name="Mns">by reading just the section headings and the first sentences after</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose is the reason for which the #Reader reads the #Text.

name: Time
description:
When the reading event takes place.
<ex>Charlie often <t>reads</t> the newspaper <fex name="Time">at night</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
Where the reading event takes place.
<ex>Surprisingly, few of the students <t>read</t> much at all <fex name="Place">in the designated reading rooms</fex>.</ex>

name: Addressee
