<ex><fex name="tim">During summer of 1999</fex>, I did <t>research</t> using a technique called "Path Integral Monte
Carlo", to simulate quantum particles.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The experimentations, observations, or other procedures performed by the #Researcher in order to find an answer to the #Question.

<ex>The workgroup has <t>researched</t> this issue <fex name="mea">by reviewing the basin plans of other regions and other various sources</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of the Researcher that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully). 

<ex>The West Chicago Park District <fex name="man">carefully</fex> <t>researched</t> how much of an increase was
needed to accomplish all of our goals.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
#Purpose indicates an action that the #Researcher intends to accomplish by performing research.

<ex>We <t>research</t> this fungus <fex name="pur">to fight ailments in tobacco and tomato fields</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The physical place where the research is carried out.

<ex>Johnson and Randall s <t>research</t> <fex name="pla">in Africa</fex> has proven extremely valuable.</ex>

name: Client
description: The entity that contacts the #Organization about retainment of #Services.

name: Services
description: The goods or labor that the #Client requests the #Organization preserve for future consumption or rendering.

name: Organization
description: The entity that enters into its records the request of the #Client to retain #Services in the future.

name: Booker
description: The link between the #Client and #Organization, e.g. a travel agent.

name: Scheduled_time
description: Scheduled_time

name: Scheduled_time
description:
<def-root>The future point in time when the <fen>Client</fen> arranges for the <fen>Organization</fen> to provide <fen>Services</fen>.

<ex>She <t>reserved</t> the room for the meeting <fex name="Scheduled_time">for Tuesday</fex> .</ex></def-root>

name: Manner
description: Manner

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event as a whole ("the same way") or a characteristic of the #Booker during the action that holistically affects the event ("sloppily").

name: Place
description: The location the #Booker performs the action.

name: Purpose
description: The situation that the #Booker intends to bring about by reserving.

name: Means
description: An action or methodology used by the #Booker to bring the reservation about.

name: Time
description:
The time at which the reserving event takes place.

<ex>I booked the room for Monday <fex name="Time">only on Tuesday</fex> .</ex>

name: Deformer
description:
The #Deformer is the one who does the reshaping.

<ex><fex name="Def">The lieutenant</fex> <t>crushed</t> it angrily with his boot before looking back at Hencke.</ex>

name: Patient
description: The #Patient is the entity acted on and that undergoes a change.  <ex>Jack plucked the flower out of his morning coat and closed his fist slowly over it , <t>crushing</t> <fex name="Patient">it</fex> into a pulp.</ex>

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is an animate or inanimate entity, a force, or event that produces an effect. Volitionality is not a necessary characteristic of #Causes.  <ex><fex name="Cause">The strong winds</fex> <t>deformed</t> the structure of the outhouse.</ex> <ex><fex name="Cause">The rockslide</fex> <t>squashed</t> our summer villa.</ex>

name: Configuration
description: A state that holds of the #Patient or a relation that holds among the constituent parts of the #Patient as a result of the arranging action.

name: Instrument
description: This FE identifies the #Instrument with which the #Deformer affects the #Patient.  <ex>The lieutenant <t>crushed</t> it angrily <fex name="Ins">with his boot</fex> before looking back at Hencke.</ex>

name: Manner
description: The FE #Manner identifies the manner in which an #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.  <ex>The lieutenant <t>crushed</t> it <fex name="Mnr">angrily</fex> with his boot before looking back at Hencke.</ex>

name: Means
description: The FE #Means identifies the means by which the #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.

name: Place
description: The #Place indicates where the #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.

name: Time
description: The FE #Time identifies when the #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.  <ex>The lieutenant <t>crushed</t> it angrily with his boot <fex name="Time">before looking back at Hencke</fex>.</ex>

name: Resistant_surface
description: The #Resistant_surface is the surface against which a #Deformer presses the #Patient.  <ex>Michael <t>flattened</t> the can <fex name="Res_surf">against his head</fex> . </ex> <ex>She <t>crushed</t> her cigarette <fex name="Res_surf">in the ashtray</fex> and stood up to go.</ex>

name: Locus
description:
The #Locus is the locus of the reshaping action; it is essentially a simultaneous #Instrument and #Resistant_surface.

<ex>Russell <t>crumpled</t> the paper cups <fex name="Locus">in his fist</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Patient is reshaped. <ex>The steamroller <t>flattened</t> my shoes <fex name="Degr">completely</fex>.</ex>

name: Resident
description:
The individual(s) that reside at the #Location.

<ex><fex name="Res">Hannah</fex> <t>lives</t> in San Francisco.</ex>

name: Location
description:
The place in which somebody resides.

<ex><fex name="Res">Sue</fex>  <t>lives</t> <fex name="Location">in Berkeley</fex>.</ex>

name: Co-resident
description: A person or group of people that the resident is staying with or among.\n\n<ex><fex name="Res">Boris</fex> still <t>lives</t> <fex name="Co_resident">with his parents</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Means
description:
An act of the #Resident that enables them to reside in the #Location.

<ex>He <t>dwelt</t> in the wild for years <fex name="Means">by foraging nuts and berries and occasionally stealing</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: This FE refers to the #Time when the #Resident resides.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent finds the solution or explanation to the outstanding mystery or #Problem.

name: Problem
description: The #Problem is the predicament or mystery that is resolved.

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is the non-Agentive event or state of affairs that brings about the resolution of the #Problem.

name: Means
description: The #Means is an intermediate action taken by the #Agent in order to resolve the #Problem.

name: Time
description: It indicates the #Time at which the #Problem is resolved.

name: Place
description: It indicates the location at which the #Problem is resolved.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Agent or #Cause resolves the problem.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the resolution, such as secondary effects (quietly) or comparisons of events (the same way). In agentive cases,  #Manner may also describe salient characteristics of the #Agent which affect the action.(carefully, diligently, deliberately etc. )

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument is an entity used for resolving the #Problem.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the length of time taken to resolve a #Problem.

name: Medium
description: It identifies the physical or abstract setting in which the #Problem is resolved.

name: Purpose
description: The state of affairs that the #Agent is trying to bring about by solving the #Problem in the specified way.

name: Speaker
description:
The #Speaker is the person who communicates the reply or response. 

<ex><fex name="Speaker">Iran</fex> on Saturday <t>rejected</t> Europe s proposal for ending the standoff over Tehran s nuclear program.</ex>

name: Interlocutor
description:
This is the person who made the #Proposal to the #Speaker and to whom the #Speaker communicates  their response. This frame element stands in for the #Proposal and is only licensed when the #Proposal  can be understood from the context.

<ex>But senior SLN officials had <t>rebuffed</t> <fex name="int">the man who is ever so willing to please
the guerrillas</fex>.</ex>

name: Proposal
description:
The #Proposal is the prior communication or action to which a response is given.

<ex>Dr. Carolyn Herrington has <t>accepted</t> <fex name="pro">our offer to become Dean of the College of Education</fex> .</ex>

name: Medium
description: As with #Medium in other Communication frames, the physical entity or channel used to communicate can be expressed, usually as a PP Complement headed by "on" or "in".

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including  secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may indicate salient characteristics of the Speaker that affect the action (<ment>presumptuously</ment>, <ment>coldly</ment>, <ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>).

<ex>Moreover, as with Surrey, myths have proliferated, such as that Oxford <fex name="Manr">cruelly</fex> <t>rejected</t> his wife in 1576.</ex>

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the #Means by the #Speaker responds to the #Proposal .  <ex>Others, I would say have actually <t>turned</t> me <t>down</t> <fex name="Mns">by not replying and not responding</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location in which the #Speaker  makes a verbal response.


<ex>Legislation that would have required smaller school districts to share administrators has been <t>rebuffed</t> repeatedly <fex name="pla">in the Oklahoma House of Representatives</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time interval during which the #Speaker makes their verbal response.

<ex>This must make <fex name="tim">yesterday s</fex> Taliban <t>rebuff</t> all the more wounding.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
An action that the #Speaker intends to accomplish by making a verbal response.

<ex>He was asked to join the National Assembly ruling party, but repeatedly <t>turned</t>
them <t>down</t> <fex name="pur">in order to continue his work as a journalist</fex>.</ex>

name: Role
description:
#Role denotes the capacity in which the #Interlocutor is judged.

<ex>The Policy Committee had
<t>rejected</t> her <fex name="rol">as a candidate for chronic dialysis</fex> because of her young age. .</ex>

name: Responding_entity
description:
A non-agentive entity that is impinged upon by a #Trigger event to which they respond.

<ex><fex name="res_e">This plastic</fex> <t>responds</t> well to pressure.</ex>

name: Trigger
description:
An event that impinges upon the #Agent or #Responding_entity and produces a #Response from it.

<ex> How has the modern welfare state <t>responded</t> <fex name="tri">to the needs of working class women</fex>, and why? </ex>

name: Agent
description:
The intentional #Agent that is impinged upon by a #Trigger event to which they respond.

<ex>Once again <fex name="age">the Government</fex> is <t>responding</t> to a crisis with measures that will only harm patients</ex>

name: Response
description:
The means action whereby the #Agent responds to the Trigger.

<ex>The diocese <t>responded</t> <fex name="res">by taking the property</fex></ex>

name: Time
description: The point in time when the #Agent or #Responding_entity manifests its #Response to the #Trigger .  <ex>Israel <t>responded</t> <fex name="Time">yesterday</fex> to the killing of 22 people by Palestinian suicide bombers with a helicopter attack</ex>

name: Manner
description:
A characterization of the #Responding_entity, #Agent, or their #Response action.

<ex>The government agencies <t>responded</t> <fex name="man">slowly</fex> and without much effort.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location in which the #Response action takes place.

<ex>The auto industry has <t>responded</t> <fex name="Place">in the U.S., but particularly in Asian and European markets</fex> by manufacturing an entry-level segment of cars that is more appealing, better looking, and safer than in the past.</ex>

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by performing the #Response action.

name: Responding_entity
description: A non-agentive entity that is impinged upon by a #Trigger event to which they respond.

name: Trigger
description: An event that impinges upon the #Agent or #Responding_entity and produces a #Response from it.

name: Response
description: The means action whereby the #Agent responds to the #Trigger.

name: Agent
description: The intentional #Agent that is impinged upon by a #Trigger event to which they respond.

name: Manner
description: A characterization of the #Responding_entity, #Agent, or their #Response action.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Response action takes place.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by performing the #Response action.

name: Time
description: The point in time when the #Agent or #Responding_entity manifests its #Response to the #Trigger .

name: Agent
description: The #Agent performs the intentional act.

name: Act
description: This FE identifies the #Act that the #Agent performs intentionally.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the place where the intentional act occurs.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the time when the #Agent acts intentionally.

name: Degree
description:
The degree to which the #Agent bears responsibility for performing the #Act.

<ex>She was <fex name="deg">entirely</fex> <t>responsible</t> for the prank.</ex>

name: Part
description:
A #Part of a larger #Whole that has been mentioned in prior discourse or is available in the discourse setting.


<ex>the GP had stipulated counselling as a <t>complement</t> <fex name="Part">to medication</fex></ex>

name: Rest
description:
The previously unmentioned part of the #Whole.


<ex>You should try to persuade the <t><fex name="Rest">rest</fex></t> of the family to do so whatever their personal opinions</ex>

name: Whole
description: The larger entitiy or group that is fully made up of the #Part and the #Rest.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent makes an attempt to achieve a #Goal.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is what the #Agent attempts to achieve.

name: Role
description: A participant function in a particular event or in events of a particular kind.

name: Action
description: This FE identifies the means by which the #Goal is achieved (or not).

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the attempt succeeds or fails.

name: Place
description: The place where an attempt succeeds or fails..

name: Circumstances
description: This FE is applied to expressions which indicate the prevailing physical conditions for the event, or some concurrent states of affairs.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Action succeeds or fails.

name: Protagonist
description:
The being or entity that becomes living again.

<ex>If <fex name="pro">the Lord</fex> <t>resurrected</t> in three days, surely he could relieve my back pain in, say, a week.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time at which the resurrection occurs.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Protagonist returns from the dead.

name: Agent
description:
The person who has possession of the #Theme.

<ex>At all times <fex name="Agent">the Saxon government</fex> <t>held</t> <t>on</t> <t>to</t> its insistently practiced political tradition. </ex>

name: Theme
description:
The entity which the #Agent possesses for a #Duration.

<ex>Once you ve got a War Bond, <t>hang</t> <t>on</t> <t>to</t> <fex name="Theme">it</fex> for the full ten years of its life.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The amount of time for which the #Agent is in possession of the #Theme.

<ex>The man who hates his life will <t>keep</t> it <fex name="Dur">for eternal life</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location where the #Agent keeps the #Theme.

<ex>He will <t>retain</t> <fex name="Place">in his heart</fex> the memory of the vast Holocaust.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The way the #Agent retains possession of the #Theme.

<ex>I knew these gifts were not meant to be <t>kept</t> <fex name="Man">selfishly</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time at which the #Agent has possession of the #Theme.

<ex>Margerite <t>held</t> <t>on</t> <t>to</t> the key <fex name="Time">on Wednesday</fex> until I returned to pick it up.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The means by which the #Agent retains the #Theme.

<ex>If Britian had focused on India, could it have <t>retained</t> it <fex name="Means">by force</fex>?</ex>

name: Speaker
description:
The #Speaker is the sentient entity that reveals  the #Information (whether spoken or written). 

<ex><fex name="spe">Kornfeldt</fex> <t>revealed</t> that he had embezzled more than twice the amount his company owned.</ex>

name: Information
description:
The #Information is the FE that identifies the content of what the #Speaker is revealing to the #Addressee.  It can be expressed as a clause or as a noun phrase.

<ex>You shouldn t <t>reveal</t> <fex name="inf">any murders you ve been involved in</fex>, if you know what I mean.</ex>

name: Topic
description:
The #Topic is the subject matter about which the #Speaker is speaking. It normally only appears with noun targets, or in special constructions.

<ex><t>Revelations</t> <fex name="top">about the coming of the Christ</fex> surfaced in early Mediaeval times.</ex>

name: Medium
description:
#Medium is the physical entity or channel used by the #Speaker to transmit the statement.
<ex>Kim <t>confided</t> in me <fex name="Medium">over the phone</fex>.</ex>

name: Addressee
description:
The #Addressee is the person to whom the #Information is revealed. 

<ex>Evelyn <t>confessed</t> <fex name="add">to Barney Holesum</fex> about what had happened.</ex>
<ex>An unknown intern in the White House <t>leaked</t> the "lunch menu" <fex name="add">to the press</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any description of the revelation which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (<ment>probably</ment>, <ment>presumably</ment>, <ment>mysteriously</ment>), secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Speaker that also affect the revelation (<ment>presumptuously</ment>, <ment>coldly</ment>, <ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>, <ment>carefully</ment>, <ment>maliciously</ment>).

name: Completeness
description:
The degree to which #Information is revealed.

<ex>When she confessed, she confessed <fex name="com">completely</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
An act whereby the #Speaker makes a revelation.
<ex>He <t>revealed</t> his true feelings about the matter <fex name="mea">by giving her the thumbs-up behind his back</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time when the revelation is made.

name: Place
description:
The FE specifies the place where the #Information is revealed.

<ex>According to the report, he <t>confessed</t> to eating onions and gargling with generic mouthwash <fex name="pla">at the station</fex>.</ex>

name: Avenger
description:
The #Avenger exacts revenge from the #Offender for the #Injury.

<ex> <fex name="Avenger">We</fex> want to <t>avenge</t> her. </ex>

name: Offender
description:
The #Offender has committed the earlier #Injury for which the #Avenger seeks revenge.

<ex>Jo had the affair as a kind of <t>revenge</t> <fex name="Offender">against Pat</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Marie took terrible <t>revenge</t> <fex name="Offender">on Trevor</fex>.</ex>

name: Punishment
description:
The #Avenger carries out a #Punishment in order to exact revenge on the #Offender.

<ex>The team took <t>revenge</t> <fex name="Punishment">with a resounding victory</fex>.</ex>

name: Injury
description:
The #Injury is the injurious action committed by the #Offender against the #Injured_Party. This Frame Element need not always be realized, although it is conceptually necessary. 

<ex>The team sought <t>revenge</t> <fex name="Injury">for their 4-1 defeat last month</fex>.</ex>

name: Injured_party
description:
This frame element identifies the constituent that encodes who or what suffered the #Injury at the hands of the #Offender. Sometimes, an abstract concept such a person s honour or their blood is presented as the element that has suffered the #Injury. These also constitute instances of  #Injured_party 

<ex>Sam s brothers <t>avenged</t> <fex name="Injured_party">him</fex>.</ex>
<ex>We will decide later how to <t>avenge</t> <fex name="Injured_party">the blood of the fallen</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
This FE identifies the #Degree to which an event occurs.
<ex>Marie took <fex name="Degree">terrible</fex> <t>revenge</t> on Trevor.</ex>

name: Instrument
description: This FE identifies the #Instrument with which the revenge is performed.

name: Manner
description:
This frame element refers to the #Manner in which the #Avenger exacts their revenge from the #Offender.

<ex>They took <fex name="Manner">brutal</fex> <t>revenge</t> on the criminal.</ex>

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the revenge occurs.

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the #Purpose for which the revenge is performed.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the revenge occurs.

name: Duration
description: The length of time that the #Avenger seeks revenge for the #Injury.

name: Agent
description: The individual or group within a society that overturns the #Current_leadership.

name: Current_leadership
description:
The people currently in power, whom the #Agent attempts to overthrow.

<ex>She fomented <t>revolution</t> <fex name="curl">against the Romans</fex>.</ex>

name: Current_order
description:
The currently-existing system of authority or government.

<ex><t>Toppling</t> <fex name="curo">the capitalist government</fex> was their first goal.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location of the revolution.

<ex>A series of <t>revolutions</t> <fex name="pla">in the eastern part of the continent</fex> made long-distance travel all but impossible.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time when the revolution takes place.

<ex>China s <fex name="tim">20th-century</fex> <t>revolutions</t> have yet to have their full impact on global politics.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The means by which the revolution is carried out.

<ex>The infantry launched an <fex name="mea">armed</fex> <t>mutiny</t> over low pay and poor living conditions.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The degree to which the #Agent defeats and removes the #Current_leadership or removes the #Current_order.

<ex>After years of back-and-forth fighting it seems unlikely that they will ever <fex name="deg">decisively</fex> <t>overthrow</t> the current regime.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
A description of the #Agent or revolution not covered by more specific FEs.

<ex>Ten years later, after another jail sentence, he led the Civil Forum movement to victory in Czechoslovakia s <fex name="man">peaceful</fex> <t>revolution</t>.</ex>

name: Evaluee
description:
#Evaluee is the person or thing about whom/which a judgment has made and to whom reward/punishment is dealt. With verbs, the #Evaluee is typically expressed as Object.
<ex>The boss <t>rewarded</t> <fex name="Eval">you</fex> for your diligence.</ex>

name: Reason
description: Typically, there is a constituent expressing the #Reason for the #Agent s judgment. It is usually a  for -PP, e.g. <ex>I <t>punished</t> him <fex name="Reas">for his impudence</fex>.</ex>

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent is the person doing the rewarding or punishing.
<ex><fex name="Agt">Jake s</fex> <t>rewards</t> to his best workers were very generous.</ex>

name: Response_action
description:
The reward or punishment given to the #Evaluee by the #Agent.
<ex>If a person be guilty of impiety let him be <t>punished</t> <fex name="Action">with death</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: #Manner of performing the reward or punishment.

name: Means
description:
The action that is taken that results in punishement/reward.
<ex>His parents <t>disciplined</t> him <fex name="Mns">by taking away his toys</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The Bar Association <t>rewarded</t> her <fex name="Mns">by hosting a lunch in her honor</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which the reward or punishment is carried out.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose of the reward or punishment.

name: Degree
description: #Degree of reward or punishment.

name: Depictive
description: Depictive

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the entity which moves by means of the #Vehicle.

name: Vehicle
description: The #Vehicle is the means of conveyance of the #Theme.

name: Source
description: Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion expresses the #Source.

name: Path
description: The #Path describes the trajectory of the motion.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is the endpoint of the trajectory of motion.

name: Area
description: The #Area is the location where the motion takes place.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner describes a property of the motion not related to its trajectory.

name: Distance
description: The #Distance is the extent of the motion.

name: Duration
description: The #Duration is the amount of time the motion takes.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which the motion occurs.

name: Road
description: The #Road is the thoroughfare on which the #Vehicle travels.

name: Route
description: The #Route is the usual path that the #Vehicle travels.

name: Time
description: When the riding takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Theme rides a vehicle.

name: Protagonist
description:
The #Protagonist who is exerting effort to meet the pre-conditions for participating in the #Activity.

<ex>How <fex name="pro">a small hospital</fex> <t>rose</t> to the challenge of a legionella outbreak.</ex>

name: Activity
description:
The #Activity that the #Protagonist expends efforts towards.

<ex>She <t>rose</t> <t>to</t> <t>the</t> <t>occasion</t> <fex name="act">of bringing up her children single-handed even as a woman who was not educated except a few years in Primary school</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The extent to which the #Protagonist exceeds or falls short of the minimum requirements for participating in the #Activity as a result of expending effort to get themselves ready.

<ex>I m used to second books not living up the promise of the first, but Nero Blanc <fex name="deg">fully</fex> <t>rose</t> to the challenge.</ex>

name: Means
description:
An action performed by the #Protagonist which enables them to overcome the difficulties and engage in the #Activity.

<ex>Learn how one small shop <t>rose</t> to the challenge <fex name="mea">through the use of gift tables</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time at which the #Protagonist through expenditure of effort becomes capable of engaging in the #Activity.  

<ex>A president for whom the jury was still out for many Americans first appeared shaken, but <fex name="tim">then</fex> <t>rose</t> to the</ex> crisis.

name: Place
description:
The location in which the #Protagonist expends effort to become capable of engaging in the #Activity.

<ex>Students from a number of Metropolitan schools <t>rose</t> to the challenge <fex name="pla">at DMIT s Panorama Campus</fex> on Friday 22nd August and spent the day  participating in an annual  Taste of Engineering  activity.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (<ment>probably</ment>, <ment>presumably</ment>, <ment>mysteriously</ment>), general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Protagonist that also affect the action (<ment>eagerly</ment>).

<ex>Despite all odds the brave Macedonian people heroically <t>rose</t> to the task <fex name="man">with valour</fex>.</ex>

name: Situation
description:
The #Situation which may lead to a harmful event.

<ex>Most people agree, <fex name="Situation">going over 100mph</fex> <m>is</m> <t>unsafe</t>.</ex>

name: Asset
description:
Something judged to be desirable or valuable which might be lost or damaged.

<ex>Honey is not <t>safe</t> <fex name="Asset">for babies</fex>.</ex>

name: Dangerous_entity
description:
A concrete or abstract entity which may come to cause the loss of, or damage to the Asset.

<ex><fex name="Dangerous_entity">That man</fex> is a <t>risk</t>!</ex>

name: Degree
description:
A modifier expressing the deviation of the actual level of security from the expected value given the #Situation and the state indicated by the target itself.

<ex>Rogue nations <m>are</m> our <fex name="Degree">greatest</fex> <t>threat</t>.</ex>

name: Place
description: A particular location for which the #Situation is safe. Frequently, it is to be inferred that the characteristics of the location make various #Situations safe or unsafe.

name: Time
description: The time period during which the #Situation has the specified level of safety.

name: Circumstances
description: The #Circumstances in which an #Asset is at risk.

name: Asset
description: Something judged to be desirable or valuable which might be lost or damaged.

name: Harmful_event
description: An event that may occur or a state which may hold which could result in the loss of or damage to the #Asset.

name: Situation
description: The #Situation under which the #Asset is safe or unsafe.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing the deviation of the actual level of security from the expected value given the #Asset, the #Situation, and state indicated by the target itself.

name: Time
description: The #Time during which the degree of safeness holds.

name: Place
description: The #Place at which the degree of safeness holds.

name: Leader
description:
This is the religious or cultural leader who performs and/or leads the rite.

<ex><fex name="Ldr">The medicine man</fex> performs this <t>ritual</t></ex>

name: Member
description:
The FE #Member describes the member of the religious or cultural group who participates in/undergoes the rite.

<ex><fex name="Mbr">Joe</fex> received <t>communion</t>.</ex>

name: Organization
description:
#Organization identifies the institution in which the rite is prescribed.

<ex>His <t>baptism</t> <fex name="Org">into the Catholic Church</fex> is scheduled for next Sunday.</ex>

name: Instrument
description:
This FE identifies the #Instrument used to perform a particular rite.

<ex>We <t>baptise</t> children <fex name="Instrument">with holy water</fex></ex>

name: Desired_state_of_affairs
description:
This FE identifies the state which the rite is hoped or intended to bring about.
<ex>They performed a <fex name="DesS">fertility</fex> <t>ritual</t>.</ex>

name: Type
description:
The type of ritual or ceremony being performed.

<ex>We performed the traditional <fex name="Type">marriage</fex> <t>rites</t></ex>

name: Object
description:
This FE indicates an object on which a rite is performed.

<ex>The priest <t>blessed</t> <fex name="Obj">the wine</fex></ex>

name: New_status
description:
Rites may confer a #New_status on a participant (e.g. rank, membership).

<ex>Elliott was almost <t>ordained</t> <fex name="NStat">as a priest</fex></ex>

name: Guardian
description:
The #Guardian is the member of the #Organization who instigates the rite for someone of which they are a guardian.

<ex><fex name = "Guardian">Mr. and Mrs. Wilson</fex> <t>baptized</t> their son.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The action that is taken to perform the ritual.

<ex>A building is <t>consecrated</t> <fex name="Mns">by anointing the doorposts with special oil and saying certain prayers</fex></ex>

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing the rite

name: Time
description: When the rite is performed

name: Place
description: Where the rite takes place.

name: Roadway
description: The #Roadway is the roadway that connects locations.

name: Source
description: The #Source is one of the #Endpoints treated as a source.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is one of the #Endpoints of the #Roadway treated as a goal.

name: Endpoints
description: The #Endpoints are two (or more) named endpoints of the #Roadway.

name: Characteristic
description: The #Characteristic is a characteristic(s) of the #Roadway.

name: Name
description: The #Name is the name of the #Roadway.

name: Path
description: This is the setting through which the #Roadway goes.

name: Use
description: The #Use is the purpose of the #Roadway.

name: Direction
description: The #Direction is the direction or directions the #Roadway runs.

name: Relative_location
description: The #Relative_location is where the #Roadway is located.

name: Material
description: The #Material is what the #Roadway is constructed from.

name: Frequency_of_use
description: The #Frequency_of_use is the state of the #Roadway with regard to the number of people who are using the #Roadway or typically use it.

name: Abundant_entities
description: The #Abundant_entities are the entities which occupy the space denoted by the #Roadway.

name: Length
description: The #Length is the distance the #Roadway extends.

name: Part
description: A subpart of the #Roadway.

name: Perpetrator
description: The #Perpetrator is the person (or other agent) that takes the #Goods away by force or threats.  <ex><fex name="Perpetrator">Leslie</fex> <t>robbed</t> Kim of her watch.</ex>

name: Victim
description:
The #Victim is the person (or other sentient being or group) that owns the #Goods before they are taken away by the #Perpetrator.

<ex>Leslie <t>robbed</t> <fex name="Victim">Kim</fex> of her watch.</ex>

name: Source
description:
Source is the initial location of the goods, before they change location.
<ex>Leslie and Kim <t>robbed</t> <fex name="Source">a bank</fex></ex>
This FE is realized in compound nouns as follows:
<ex><fex name="Source">bank</fex> <t>robbery</t></ex>

name: Goods
description:
The #Goods are anything (including labor, time, or legal rights) that can be taken away.

<ex>Leslie <t>robbed</t> John <fex name="Goods">of his watch</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The #Means indicates the means by which the Robbery takes place.

<ex>John <t>mugged</t> his victim <fex name="Means">by holding a toy gun to his head</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The #Manner describes the way in which the Robbery took place.

<ex>He was known for committing <fex name="Manner">violent</fex> <t>muggings</t> on schoolchildren</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place is where the Robbery occurs.

<ex>They <t>robbed</t> a bank <fex name="Place">in North Berkeley</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time indicates when the Robbery occurs.

<ex>They <t>ROBBED</t> a bank in North Berkeley <fex name="Time">last May</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The action that the #Perpetrator is trying to accomplish by the robbery.

<ex>They used to <t>rob</t> folks <fex name="Purp">just to see the expression on their faces</fex>.</ex>

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent is the sentient being who manipulates the #Rope.

<ex><fex name="Agent">Melissa</fex> <t>braided</t> Jessica s hair.</ex>

name: Rope
description:
The basically linear object which is manipulated by the #Agent to produce a #Knot.

<ex>He <t>tied</t> <fex name="Rope">an electrical cable</fex> around the trunk and his neck before hanging himself .</ex>

name: Knot
description:
The stable configuration of a #Rope which results from tying.

<ex>Jake <t>tied</t> the cravat <fex name="Knot">into an acceptable knot</fex>.</ex>

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument with which the #Rope is manipulated.

name: Place
description: Where the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.

name: Purpose
description:
The #Purpose for which the manipulation of the #Rope takes place. 

<ex>Prof. Frink <t>braided</t> my hair <fex name="Purpose">to make me look beautiful</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
When the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.

<ex>Terri <t>tied</t> the rope around her waist <fex name="Time">before scrambling up the side of the mountain</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.

name: Manner
description:
#Manner in which the manipulation of the #Rope takes place.

<ex>John <t>knotted</t> the tie <fex name="Manr">tightly</fex> around his neck.</ex>

name: Patient
description: The #Patient is the entity that undergoes a change.  <ex><fex name="Patient">The leaves</fex> <t>rotted</t> into a mass of slime.</ex> <ex><fex name="Patient">The dresses</fex> <t>decayed</t> from their former beauty.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place is where the rotting occurs.

<ex>Any traces of uneaten food will <t>decompose</t> <fex name="Place">in your tank</fex> and foul the water.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time indicates when the rotting occurs.

<ex><fex name="Time">Before he could get to the specimen</fex> , its entrails had <t>decomposed</t> so badly that they had to be thrown away.</ex>

name: Initial_state
description: The #Initial_state is the original state of the #Patient.  <ex>The dresses <t>decayed</t> <fex name="I_state">from their former beauty</fex>.</ex>

name: Duration
description: The #Duration indicates the amount of time for which the #Patient rots.  <ex>That thorn had been there , <t>festering</t>, <fex name="Dur">for months</fex>.</ex>

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which the #Patient changes.  <ex>A dead snail <t>decomposes</t> <fex name="Spd">very rapidly</fex>, fouling the water badly.</ex>

name: Degree
description: The #Degree expressions that indicate to what degree the #Patient has changed.  <ex> Its entrails had <fex name="Degree">totally</fex> <t>decomposed</t>.</ex> <ex>Before he could get to the specimen , its entrails had <t>decomposed</t> <fex name="Deg">so badly that they had to be thrown away</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the Rotting event  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  secondary effects (horribly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

<ex>The soldiers  wounds <t>festered</t> <fex name="Manner">slowly</fex></ex>

name: Protagonist
description: The person who is at risk of some #Bad_outcome

name: Bad_outcome
description:
A situation that the #Protagonist would like to avoid.
<ex>There was no <t>risk</t> <fex name="Bad">of his returning</fex>.</ex>

name: Asset
description:
Something desirable possessed by or directly associated with the #Protagonist which might be lost or damaged.
<ex>The <t>risk</t> <fex name="Asset">to his reputation</fex> was significant.</ex>

name: Action
description:
The #Action that creates the risk.
<ex><fex name="Action">Implementing this program</fex> <supp>runs</supp> the <t>risk</t> of offending our core constituents.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The place where there is risk.
<ex>There is always some <t>danger</t> to rich men <fex name="Place">in a bar like this</fex>.</ex>

name: Severity
description:
The probability of something bad happening to the #Protagonist.
<ex>If he is uncertain of right and wrong, he is in <fex name="Sev">dire</fex> <t>peril</t> of losing his immortal soul.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time when the risk pertains. ex:Even after the end of Apartheit we still run the of letting racism continue forever.

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent gives up the #Asset in hopes of receiving a greater #Benefit.

<ex><fex name="age">We</fex> never <t>sacrifice</t> quality for price.</ex>

name: Asset
description:
The item which is sacrificed by the #Agent.

<ex>We never <t>sacrifice</t> <fex name="ass">quality</fex> for price.</ex>

name: Benefit
description:
The #Agent hopes to receive or gain advantage from the #Benefit as a result of giving up the #Asset.

<ex>We never <t>sacrifice</t> quality <fex name="ben">for price</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The way that the #Agent sacrifices the #Asset.

<ex>So many people <fex name="Manr">gladly</fex> <t>compromise</t> comfort to look more attractive.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE indicates the #Time when the #Agent gives up the #Asset.

<ex><fex name="Tim">In wartime</fex> much was <t>compromised</t> in favor of security</ex>

name: Sanction
description: The punishment or penalty to the #Athlete or the team corresponding to the violation of a rule in the sport.

name: Punished_athlete
description: Individual or team that commits the infraction in a #Sport on who the sanction falls.

name: Referee
description: Person or group responsible for the application of the #Sanction.

name: Beneficiary_athlete
description: Athlete or team benefited by the application of the #Sanction.

name: Sport
description: Physical activity practiced by an #Athlete, which can be performed in the form of a competition. Such activity is governed by rules, makes use of sports equipment and occurs in a sports facility. It can be practiced individually or in teams.

name: Duration
description: The length of time the #Sanction applies to the #Athlete or team in a #Sport.

name: Agent
description: The volitional #Agent who is in line with a #Standard.

name: Entity
description: The non-agentive #Entity that is in line with a #Standard.

name: Event
description: An occurrence or action that brings about the satisfaction or nonsatisfaction of a #Standard.

name: Standard
description: The condition or requirement that the #Agent, #Entity, or #Event satisfy (or not).

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Standard is satisfied.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Standard is satisfied.

name: Time
description: The #Time in which satisfaction of the #Standard occurs.

name: Collection
description:
The #Collection whose #Quantity is under consideration.

<ex>Relax, <fex name="col">oil supplies</fex> <m>are</m> <t>plentiful</t>.</ex>

name: Quantity
description:
The feature of an #Collection which is under discussion. This FE is incorporated by all the lexical units in this frame.

<ex>The majority of specimens were poorly represented, as judged by the small size of mature plants, the immaturity of thalli or <t>scarceness</t> <fex name="qua">in occurrence</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location in which the #Collection occurs.

<ex>Northern Pike are <t>plentiful</t> <fex name="pla">in Perrault Lake</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Measure from the norm or from the value for another #Collection.

<ex>Iron is <fex name="deg">very</fex> <t>scarce</t> inside the human body, so pneumococcal bacteria have mechanisms to obtain iron more easily.</ex>

name: Measure
description: The measure of the #Quantity, which is incorporated by the lexical units.

name: Agent
description:
The sentient being who schedules an #Event to take place at a #Time and #Place.

<ex><fex name="Agent">I</fex> <t>set</t> <t>up</t> a meeting with Carlos on Monday.</ex>

name: Event
description:
The incident that the #Agent has scheduled to take place at a #Time and #Place.

<ex>I d like to <t>set</t> <t>up</t> <fex name="Event">a meeting with Mr. Hofmann</fex>.</ex>

name: Scheduled_time
description:
The time at which the #Event is scheduled to take place.

<ex>Maria <t>scheduled</t> the appointment <fex name="Scheduled_time">for Monday</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location where the #Agent has scheduled the #Event to take place.

<ex>Gina <t>scheduled</t> a dentist appointment for Monday <fex name="Place">in Berkeley</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The means used by the #Agent in order to schedule the #Event.

<ex>Chad always <t>schedules</t> his appointments <fex name="Means">via email</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The <fex name="Agent">Agent s</fex> motivation for scheduling the #Event.

<ex>My boss <t>scheduled</t> a meeting <fex name="Purpose">to let us know how great we were doing</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The way in which the #Agent schedules the #Event. 

<ex>Jackie <fex name="Manner">hastily</fex> <t>scheduled</t> an appointment with a psychologist this evening.</ex>

name: Time
description: This FE describes the time at which the scheduling occurs.

name: School_Supply
description: School_Supply

name: Creator
description: Creator

name: Material
description: Material

name: Name
description: Name

name: Creation_Time
description: Creation_Time

name: Type
description: Type

name: Usage
description: Usage

name: Event
description: The state-of-affairs that affects a set of entities.

name: Salient_entity
description: The entity which enables or causes the #Event being judged.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of an #Salient_entity which is under discussion.

name: Searcher
description:
The person who is looking all over the #Ground for the #Sought_entity.

<ex><fex name="sea">They</fex> first gained entry into the house of Raja Rao, who resides on the ground floor and <t>ransacked</t> the house for valuables.</ex>

name: Ground
description:
The location that the #Searcher covers in looking for the #Sought_entity.

<ex>I had never really seen much on the bigfoot subject or I would have <t>scoured</t> <fex name="gro">the area</fex> for signs and looked for droppings</ex>

name: Sought_entity
description:
The entity that the #Searcher wants to find.

<ex>Coast Guard and Navy ships and aircraft <t>combed</t> the area <fex name="sou">for the six aircraft</fex></ex>

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Searcher scrutinizes the #Ground.

<ex>We <fex name="man">carefully</fex> <t>scoured</t> the road for what damaged all of those tires and we finally found it- a piece of nasty, barbed wire, laying across the road.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
This FE specifies the length of the interval during which the scouring activtiy takes place.

<ex>He <t>combed</t> the area <fex name="dur">for hours</fex> that night looking for the dogs and has been searching ever since.</ex>

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree to which the #Searcher scrutinizes the #Ground.

name: Instrument
description:
An entity manipulated by the #Searcher to examine the #Ground.

<ex>They <t>scoured</t> the entire beach <fex name="ins">with a metal detector</fex>, but found nothing.</ex>

name: Means
description: The action of the #Searcher that allows them to search the #Ground.

name: Purpose
description:
The state-of-affairs that the #Searcher hopes to bring about by searching a #Ground.

<ex>We <t>scoured</t> the entire book <fex name="pur">to find this supposed evidence</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Searcher scoures the #Ground.

name: Cognizer
description:
The #Cognizer pays attention to an entity in order to discover something about it. 

<ex><fex name="Cognizer">Leslie</fex> <t>examined</t> the glass for cracks.</ex>

name: Ground
description:
The #Cognizer pays attention to the #Ground, so named because it serves as the background or context for the #Phenomenon. 

<ex>Leslie <t>examined</t> <fex name="Ground">the glass</fex> for cracks.</ex>
<ex>Kim <t>searched</t> <fex name="Ground">the woods</fex> for mushrooms.</ex>

name: Phenomenon
description:
The entity that the #Cognizer is alert for in the #Ground.

<ex>Leslie <t>examined</t> the glass <fex name="Phenomenon">for cracks</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Kim <t>searched</t> the woods <fex name="Phenomenon">for mushrooms</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Cognizer scrutinizes the #Ground.

name: Means
description: The action of the #Cognizer which allows them to scrutinize the #Ground.

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree to which the #Cognizer scrutinizes the #Ground.

name: Instrument
description:
An entity directed by the #Cognizer  that interacts with the #Ground to accomplish the scrutiny.

<ex>The temperature controller <t>monitored</t> the temperature <fex name="ins">with a calibrated silicon diode</fex>.</ex>

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer pays attention to an entity in order to discover something about it.

name: Ground
description: The #Cognizer pays attention to the #Ground, so named because it serves as the background or context for the #Phenomenon.

name: Medium
description: The #Medium is the piece of text or work in which the #Cognizer pays attention to an entity in order to discover something about it.

name: Instrument
description: An entity directed by the #Cognizer that interacts with the #Ground to accomplish the scrutiny.

name: Manner
description: It identifies the #Manner in which the #Cognizer scrutinizes the #Ground.

name: Means
description: It is used for the #Means by which the #Cognizer to scrutinize the #Ground.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Cognizer is scrutinizing the #Ground.

name: Cognizer
description:
The #Cognizer pays attention to the #Ground in order to find instances of a type of #Phenomenon.

<ex><fex name="Cognizer">Leslie</fex> <t>examined</t> the glass for cracks.</ex>

name: Ground
description:
The #Cognizer pays attention to the #Ground, so named because it serves as the background or context for the #Phenomenon. 

<ex>Leslie <t>examined</t> <fex name="Ground">the glass</fex> for cracks.</ex>
<ex>Kim <t>searched</t> <fex name="Ground">the woods</fex> for mushrooms.</ex>

name: Phenomenon
description:
The entity that the #Cognizer is alert for in the #Ground.

<ex>Leslie <t>examined</t> the glass <fex name="Phenomenon">for cracks</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Kim <t>searched</t> the woods <fex name="Phenomenon">for mushrooms</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Cognizer scrutinizes the #Ground.

name: Means
description: The action of the #Cognizer which allows them to scrutinize the #Ground.

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree to which the #Cognizer scrutinizes the #Ground.

name: Purpose
description:
The event that the #Cognizer hopes to bring about by looking for the #Phenomenon.

<ex>You should <t>inspect</t> your mail <fex name="Purp">to determine the outcome of the module transfer</fex>.</ex>

name: Instrument
description:
An entity directed by the #Cognizer  that interacts with the #Ground to accomplish the scrutiny.

<ex>The temperature controller <t>monitored</t> the temperature <fex name="ins">with a calibrated silicon diode</fex>.</ex>

name: Phenomenon
description: The #Phenomenon is the activity, state or object that is purposefully hidden from the awareness of a potential cognizer.

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree to which the #Phenomenon is hidden from cognizers.

name: Time
description:
A period of #Time during which the #Phenomenon is hidden from the awareness of potential cognizers.

<ex>There was stuff in there that was  <t>secret</t>  <fex name="Time">in the 1980s</fex>, but has since become pretty common knowledge.</ex>

name: Cognizer
description:
The #Cognizer is the person who might become aware of the #Phenomenon if it was not concealed.


<ex>Moreover, the blood and decorations were sacred and could only be removed in
a procedure which was <t>secret</t> <fex name="cog">from women</fex></ex>

name: Cognizer_agent
description:
The person who attempts to find the Sought_entity.
<fex name="Cognizer_agent">John</fex>  <t>looked</t> for his pencil.

name: Sought_entity
description:
This is the entity that the Ground may contain. Typically, it is expressed as a<ment>for</ment>-PP. 
Leslie <t>examined</t> the glass <fex name="Sought_entity">for cracks</fex>. 
Kim <t>searched</t> in the woods <fex name="Sought_entity">for mushrooms</fex>. 
Some words in this frame allow alternate expressions of the Ground and the Sought_entity:  We searched the yard for my contact lens. We searched for my contact lends in the yard.

name: Ground
description: This is the entity to which the Cognizer pays attention. It is referred to as <t>Ground</t> because it serves as the background or context for the Phenomenon. This FE can be expressed as an NP Object or as a PP Complement: Leslie <t>examined</t> <fex name="Ground">the glass</fex> for cracks. Kim <t>searched</t> <fex name="Ground">in the woods</fex> for mushrooms.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Means
description:
An act of the #Cognizer_agent that allows them to look for the #Sought_entity.
<ex>They <t>foraged</t> for clams <fex name="Mns">by visiting the pools at low tide</fex>.</ex>

name: Outcome
description: The failure or success of an attempt.

name: Place
description:
A spatial setting larger than the Ground in which the Seeking event occurs.

<ex><fex name="Place">In Paris</fex> police were <t>hunting</t> for suspects in two of the city s southerns suburbs today</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the time when the Seeking occurs.

<ex>The police were <t>hunting</t> for evidence in my house <fex name="Time">yesterday</fex></ex>

name: Purpose
description:
An action that the Cognizer intends to accomplish by performing the search.

<ex>Police were <t>hunting</t> for evidence in my house <fex name="Purpose">to mislead their real suspect about the state of the investigation</fex></ex>

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the amount of effort put into an attempt.

name: Agent
description:
The #Agent makes an attempt to achieve a #State_of_affairs or to  obtain a #Sought_entity.

<ex><fex name="age">Those states</fex> <t>sought</t> a remedy that would substantially change the company s business
practices.</ex>

name: Sought_entity
description:
The entity that the #Agent attempts to acquire.

<ex>Or the monstrous Saddam, who filled mass graves to bursting, invaded two neighboring countries, and avidly <t>sought</t> <fex name="sou">weapons of mass destruction</fex>.</ex>

name: State_of_affairs
description:
A state or event that the #Agent wants to bring about. The Agent may but need not be a participant in that #State_of_affairs.

<ex> His enemies <t>sought</t> <fex name="soa">his destruction</fex>.</ex>

name: Outcome
description:
The #Outcome is the failure or success of an attempt to acquire a #Sought_entity.

<ex>WWDA also <fex name="out">successfully</fex> <t>sought</t> funding from Office of the Status of Women</ex>

name: Means
description:
This FE identifies the #Means by which an attempt at achieving a #State_of_affairs or at acquiring the #Sought_entity is made.

<ex>Agassi <t>sought</t> relief <fex name="Means">by taking Advil</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
This FE identifies the amount of effort put into an attempt.

<ex>He also <t>sought</t> <fex name="Degr">intensely</fex> to know more of Christ.</ex>

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the attempt occurs.

name: Place
description:
The place where the #Agent is seeking to achieve a particular #State_of_affairs or to acquire a #Sought_entity.

<ex>The disclosure came as prosecutors successfully <t>sought</t> <fex name="Place">in federal court</fex> to keep Luise Garofalo behind bars.</ex>

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Agent makes the attempt.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by bringing about a particular #State_of_affairs or acquiring the #Sought_entity.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer realizes the existence of a deception and is not misled by it.

name: State_of_affairs
description: The #State_of_affairs is intended to be perceived and taken to be true even though it is not.

name: Focal_entity
description: The #Focal_entity is a part of the deception (possibly also the agent behind it) which is perceived by the #Cognizer to be misleading.

name: Means
description: An act performed by the Cognizer which enables them to figure something out.

name: Medium
description: Medium is the text created by the Cognizer to communicate that they came to believe a specified State_of_affairs.

name: Topic
description: Some verbs in this frame may occur with postverbal Topic expressions

name: Degree
description: The Degree to which the Cognizer comes to understand the State_of_affairs.

name: Depictive
description: Depictive phrase describing the Cognizer.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Place
description: The location at which the Cognizer realizes the State_of_affairs.

name: Time
description: The time at which the Cognizer discovers the State_of_affairs.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent who tries to keep an #Event from taking place.

name: Event
description: The #Event is the action or state of affairs that the #Agent wishes to prevent.

name: Degree
description: It selects some gradable attribute and modifies the expected value for it.

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the #Agent attempts to prevent the #Event from taking place.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the #Agent prevents the #Event from taking place.

name: Self_mover
description: It is the living being which moves under its own power. Normally it is expressed as an external argument.

name: Source
description: It is used for any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion.In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion.  With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Path
description: It is used for any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal.

name: Goal
description: It is used for any expression which tells where the #Self_mover ends up as a result of the motion.

name: Area
description: It is used for expressions which describe a general area in which motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular and not to consist of a single linear path.  Note that this FE should not be used for cases when the same phrase could be used with the same meaning with a non-motion target, since these should be annotated with the #Place FE.

name: Direction
description: The direction that the #Self_mover heads in during the motion.

name: Manner
description: Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory or rate of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Distance
description: Any expression which characterizes the extent of motion expresses the frame element #Distance.

name: Time
description: The time when the motion occurs.

name: Speed
description: The rate at which the location of the #Self_mover changes with respect to time.

name: Means
description: An act whereby the #Self_mover achieves movement.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.

name: Purpose
description: It identifies the purpose for which a #Self_mover moves.

name: Place
description: The #Place is the location within which a defined motion takes place.  Any specified or implied  #Source, #Path or #Goal should designate a location contained with the #Place. This FE can be differentiated from #Area by the fact that the annotated phrase can be used in the same meaning with non-motion targets.

name: Path_shape
description: The shape of the overall #Path travelled by the #Self_mover.

name: Sender
description: This is the person who initiates the movement of the #Theme and, unlike Carrying, does not accompany it.

name: Goal
description:
The end of the path and intended goal of the sending.
I <t>sent</t> the logs <fex name="Goal">to the shed</fex>.

name: Theme
description:
The objects being sent.
I mailed <fex name="Theme">the books</fex> <fex name="Goal">to Alaska</fex>.
Note that #Theme may be multiply instantiated.
They <t>mailed</t><fex name="Theme">a questionnaire</fex> <fex name="Theme">with a return envelope</fex>.

name: Transport_means
description:
The mode of sending employed.
I <t>shipped</t> <fex name="Theme">the crops</fex> <fex name="Transport_means">by bigrig </fex>.

name: Recipient
description:
This is the recipient of the sent #Theme.
<fex name="Sender">Tess</fex> <t>mailed</t> <fex name="Theme">a letter</fex> <fex name="Recipient"> to Abby</fex>

name: Path
description:
Path along which movement occurs.
I  shipped the books <fex name="Path">along Interstate 65</fex>.

name: Source
description:
The beginning of the path, similar to source except that it serves to define the path.
I sent wood <fex name="Source">from Illinois</fex> <fex name="Goal">to California</fex>.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Distance
description: This FE is any expression characterizing the extent of motion of the Theme. Pat <t>threw</t> the Javelin <fex name="Distance">50 meters</fex>.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Purpose
description:
The #Purpose of the sending.
<ex>Rachel <t>sent</t> the letter to her mother <fex name="Purpose">to let her know about the marriage</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
When the sending takes place
<ex>I <t>sent</t> the letter to you <fex name="Time">last week</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
A spatial setting encomnpassing the Source location, where the Sending event takes place.

<ex>Barney <t>posted</t> the letter on Monday <fex name="Place">in Athens</fex></ex>

name: Perceiver_passive
description: This FE is only expressed with certain nouns in this frame, and then only with the help of a support verb.

name: Source
description: This is the entity or phenomenon which gives rise to the sensation. In cases of veridical sensation, this FE is not typically distinguished from #Percept.

name: Percept
description:
The FE #Percept is used for phrases that express the characteristic property of a sensation. Typically this characteristic property is described with reference to the entity or phenomenon that produces the sensation---that  is why this FE can be difficult to distinguish from Source. It is possible for Source and Percept to be expressed separately, however: 
<ex><fex name="Source">This herb</fex> <gov>gives off</gov> a <t>smell</t> <fex name="Percept">of garlic</fex>.</ex>
 In cases in which it is impossible to distinguish between Source and Percept, Percept is used as the default FE.

name: Body_part
description:
This FE is assigned to phrases expressing the body part in which a sensation is located. Since touch is the least localized of sense modalities, words relating to haptic sensations are the ones most likely to occur with this FE: 
<ex>I have a tingling <t>feeling</t> <fex name="Body_part">in my hands</fex>.</ex>
 Words for other sense modalities can occasionally express this FE as well:
<ex>There is a bitter <t>taste</t> <fex name="Body_part">on the back of my tongue</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The ringing <t>sound</t> <fex name="Body_part">in my left ear</fex> distracted me during class. </ex>

name: Ground
description: This FE is the perceptual background against which the Phenomenon is experienced by the Perceiver.

name: Descriptor
description: <def-root>A characterization of the sensation not covered by a more specific FE.</def-root>

name: Time
description: The #Time when the sensation is perceived.

name: Degree
description: This FE describes how strong the sensation is.

name: Convict
description:
The #Convict is given a #Sentence by the #Court.
<ex>Judge Duncan <t>sentenced</t> <fex name="Convict">Marty</fex> to five years under house detention.</ex>

name: Court
description:
The #Court imposes a #Sentence on a #Convict.
<ex><fex name="Court">Judge Duncan</fex> <t>sentenced</t> Marty to five years under house detention.</ex>

name: Sentence
description:
The #Sentence is imposed on the #Convict by the #Court.
<ex>Judge Duncan <t>sentenced</t> Marty <fex name="Sentence">to five years under house detention</fex>.</ex>

name: Term_of_sentence
description:
This FE denotes the duration of the sentence.
<ex><fex name="Convict">Tom</fex> will recieve a <fex name="Sentence"><t>sentence</t></fex> <fex name="Term_of_sentence">of five years</fex>.</ex>

name: Offense
description:
The illegal action of which the #Convict has been found guilty and for which they are punished.

<ex>A pet store owner was <t>sentenced</t> <fex name="off">for illegaly smuggling protected reptiles</fex>.</ex>

name: Type
description:
This FE denotes the type of sentence.
<ex><fex name="Convict">He</fex> will receive a <fex name="Type">prison</fex> <fex name="Sentence"><t>sentence</t></fex> if convicted.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The Time when the #Convict is sentenced.

<ex>He will be <t>sentenced</t> <fex name="tim">at a later date</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location of the sentencing #Court.

<ex>Biancaniello will be <t>sentenced</t> <fex name="pla">in San Francisco</fex> later this summer.</ex>

name: Sent_item
description:
The objects being sent.


<ex>Today the <fex name="sen"><t>post</t></fex> contained a pair of brand new tyres from Continental.</ex>

name: Sender
description:
This is the person or organization who initiates the movement of the #Sent_item and, unlike in the case of Carrying, does not accompany it.

<ex>Today s <t>mail</t> <fex name="Sender">from eBay</fex> brought me a copy of this book.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
The end of the path and intended goal of the sending.

<ex>My <t>shipment</t> <fex name="Goal">to Australia</fex> was received in 10 days.</ex>

name: Source
description:
The beginning of the path, similar to source except that it serves to define the path.

<ex><t>Mail</t> <fex name="Source">from England</fex> to our office is sent registered mail.</ex>

name: Transport_means
description:
The mode of sending employed.

<ex>We promise to expedite your <fex name="tra">air</fex> <t>mail</t> as agreed.</ex>

name: Recipient
description:
This is the recipient of the sent #Sent_item

<ex>He went to the study and examined <fex name="Recipient">his</fex> mail</ex>

name: Place
description:
The  place in which the Sent_item is located.

<ex>After that, I notice the <t>mail</t> <fex name="Place">on the table</fex>.</ex>

name: Whole
description:
The #Whole is a single entity or an aggregate of entities which is separated into #Parts.  It is usually the NP Object of a target verb. 
<ex>The directors <t>split</t> <fex name="Whole">the company</fex> in two.</ex>
<ex> The teacher <t>divided</t> <fex name="Whole">the children</fex> into groups. </ex>

name: Parts
description:
This refers collectively to the Parts resulting from separation of a Whole:
<ex>The directors <t>split</t> the company <fex name="Parts">in two</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The teacher <t>divided</t> the children <fex name="Parts">into groups</fex>.</ex>
 <ex>The teacher <t>separated</t> the children <fex name="Parts">from each other</fex>. </ex>

name: Part_1
description:
Part-1 is the first of two Parts mentioned. This is most often the Object of a verb. 
<ex>First, <t>separate</t> <fex name="Part_1">the yolks</fex> from the whites. </ex>

name: Part_2
description: #Part_2 is the second of two #Parts mentioned. This is usually a PP Complement. First, <ex><t>separate</t> the yolks <fex name="Part_2">from the whites</fex>. </ex>

name: Agent
description:
With causative uses of these verbs, an Agent separates or divides something.  The Agent is usually expressed as the External Argument: 
<ex><fex name="Agent">The researcher</fex> <t>divided</t> subjects into groups. </ex>

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is the non-agent that brings about the separation.

name: Criterion
description:
This frame element expresses a property of the Parts or components of the Whole which is used as the basis for separation. Criterion is typically expressed as a PP headed by <ment>by</ment>, or as a complex PP of the form <ment>on the basis of</ment>.... 
<ex>The researcher <t>divided</t> subjects into groups <fex name="Criterion">on the basis of eye color</fex>.</ex>
As with the frame General.Joining (above), words in this frame can be used statively, as in <ment>The rooms are separated by a partition</ment>, inchoatively, as in <ment>The group separated</ment> or causatively, as in <ment>I separated the laundry</ment>.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Means
description:
An act of the #Agent that accomplishes the separation.
<ex>You can <t>bisect</t> an angle <fex name="Mns">by drawing three circles</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time when the separation occurs.
<ex>I <t>divided</t> the prize money among the winners <fex name="Time">that night</fex>.</ex>.

name: Place
description:
Where the separation occurs.
<ex>You should <t>separate</t> the yolks from the whites <fex name="Place">over the sink</fex>.</ex>

name: Instrument
description:
The #Instrument used to cause the separation.
<ex>I <t>sectioned</t> the block <fex name="Inst">with a knife</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description: The #Agent s intent for separating the #Whole.

name: Entity_1
description: This entity occurs in some sequence with #Entity_2.

name: Entity_2
description: This entity occurs in some sequence with respect to #Entity_1.

name: Entities
description: The #Entities that occur in some temporal order.

name: Relation_type
description: A characterization of the sequence in which the entities occur.

name: Descriptor
description: It identifies a characteristic or description of the sequence.

name: Client
description: Client

name: Suplier
description: Suplier

name: Service
description: Service

name: Purpose
description: Purpose

name: Place
description: Place

name: Time
description: Time

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the entity that occpuies the #Role.

name: Role
description: The #Role that the #Agent occupies.

name: Duration
description: The #Duration of time that the #Agent occupies the #Role.

name: Descriptor
description: The #Descriptor modifies the #Agent .

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Agent served in the #Role.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Agent served in the #Role.

name: Firefighter
description: The #Firefighter is the person making the firebreak.

name: Flame
description: The #Flame is what is created by the #Firefighter.

name: Flammables
description: The Flammables is the the object that is burned in the back fire.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the event occurs.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the event takes place.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a #Firefighter that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Means
description: An event brought about by the #Firefighter that actually makes the #Flammables catch fire.

name: Kindler
description:
The #Kindler is the person performing the intentional act.
<ex> <fex name="Kindler">Mark</fex> <t>started</t> <fex name="Flame">the fire</fex> with a magnifying glass. </ex>

name: Flame
description:
The #Flame is what is created by the Kindler.
<ex><fex name="Kindler">Oscar</fex> <t>started</t> <fex name="Flame">the fire</fex>.</ex>

name: Flammables
description:
The Flamables is the the object that is set on fire by the Kindler.
<ex><fex name="Kindler">Tracy</fex> <t>set</t> <fex name="Flammables">the couch</fex> <t>on fire</t>.</ex>

name: Cause
description:
The cause of the fire.
<ex><fex name="Cause">A spark</fex> <t>ignited</t> <fex name="Flammables">the curtains</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the event occurs.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the event takes place.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a #Kindler that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Means
description: An event brought about by the #Cause or the #Kindler that actually makes the #Flammables catch fire.

name: Self_mover
description: This is the entity which moves under its own power.

name: Source
description: Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion expresses the frame element #Source. In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion. In particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Path
description: A relation to a landmark that describes the trajectory in the midst of the motion.  (It is thus neither a #Source nor the #Intended_goal.)

name: Intended_goal
description: Any expression which tells where the #Self_mover intends to end up as a result of the motion.

name: Manner
description: Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Means
description: An event involving the #Self_mover that results in the #Self_mover moving in the specified way.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which the #Self_mover moves.

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the motion (which is specified by a #Source, #Path or #Goal) is located.

name: Direction
description: The direction in which the #Self_mover goes.

name: Time
description: The time at which the motion takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Self_mover wishes to bring about.

name: Vehicle
description: The device or bodypart that serves to move the #Self_mover.

name: Distance
description: The distance from the #Source that the #Self_mover ends up.

name: Component_entities
description: The entities that function together as a unit.

name: Complex
description: The unit formed by the #Component_entities.

name: Superset
description: The #Superset is the larger collection of entities that includes the #Subset.

name: Subset
description: The #Subset comprises a part of the #Superset.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the inclusion event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the set relation holds.

name: Place
description: The location at which the set relation holds.

name: Offense
description: The #Offense is the action, crime, or event which is described in terms of what legal or punishing action can be taken against the offender.

name: Code
description: The legal #Code under which the severity of the offense is determined.

name: Participants
description: The set of entities engaged in or subjected to sexual contact.

name: Participant_1
description: One party present for sex.

name: Participant_2
description: Another party present for sex.

name: Duration
description: This FE describes the length of time that an entire sexual encounter can last, including but not necessarily implying the length of all stages of the encounter.

name: Manner
description: A description of the sex act which is not covered by more specific FEs. In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of one or more #Participants that also affect the action.

name: Place
description: To be clear: the place FE describes the overall location of the #Participants of the sexual activity and nothing else.

name: Time
description: This FE relates the relative time of occurrence of the sexual activity.

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the justification of a sexual act, for at least one of the #Participants.

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the #Means by which #Participants accomplish a sexual act.

name: Parents
description: The parents who will receive offspring.

name: Father
description: The participant in a sexual relationship who fertilizes an egg.

name: Mother
description: The participant in a sexual relation whose egg is fertilized.

name: Offspring
description: The zygote, in some stage of development.

name: Part
description: A shaped #Part of a larger #Whole.

name: Whole
description: A #Whole which has a shaped #Part.

name: Part_prop
description: A property relating to the shaped #Part of a #Whole.

name: Orientation
description: This is a property of the shaped #Part that situates  the  #Part within the #Whole.

name: Substance
description: A #Substance of which pieces can be extracted.

name: Shape
description: This is the #Shape that the #Substance is in.

name: Shape_prop
description: This describes a property of the #Shape.

name: Count
description: The number of units of the measured #Substance.

name: Protagonists
description:
The jointly expressed participants in the use of the #Entity.

<ex>It was a small house so <fex name="Pros">they</fex> had to <t>share</t> the bed.</ex>

name: Protagonist_1
description:
The participant that is encoded as the subject of an active-form sentence or as a by-PP in a passive, who partakes in the joint usage of the #Entity.

<ex><fex name="Pro1">I</fex> <t>shared</t> my breakfast with the woman on my right, because she had forgotten hers.</ex>

name: Protagonist_2
description:
The participant in the reciprocal event that is coded in a with-PP, who partakes in the usage of the #Entity along with #Protagonist_1.

<ex>When I looked back, Henry was <t>sharing</t> his juice <fex name="Pro2">with his classmate</fex>.</ex>

name: Entity
description:
The object that is shared by the #Protagonists.

<ex>Prices are based on two people <t>sharing</t> <fex name="Entity">a twin room</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time when the #Protagonists share the #Entity.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Protagonists partake jointly in the use of the #Entity.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity to which the #Sharpness attribute is related.

name: Attribute
description: The sharpness feature of the #Entity.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Sharpness from the norm or from the value for another #Entity.

name: Sharpness
description: The #Sharpness value of the #Entity.  This FE is denoted by the adjectives of the frame.

name: Projectile
description: The entity whose rapid, dangerous motion is caused by the Agent and/or Firearm.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person performing the intentional act causing the motion of the #Projectile.

name: Firearm
description: The device used by the #Agent to cause the motion of the #Projectile.

name: Distance
description:
This FE is any expression characterizing the extent of motion of the #Projectile.
