<ex>Pat <t>threw</t> the Javelin <fex name="Distance">50 meters</fex>.</ex>

name: Goal
description: This FE is the point at which the Theme ends up as a result of the motion. Kim <t>threw</t> the cat <fex name="Goal">into the garden</fex>.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Means
description: An act of the #Agent whereby the rapid motion of the #Projectile is achieved.

name: Path
description: This FE is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a Source nor Goal. I <t>pushed</t> the trolley <fex name="Path">along the street</fex>.

name: Source
description: This FE is the starting point of motion. Pat dragged the box <fex name="Source">out of the cupboard</fex>.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Area
description: This frame element is used for expressions which describe a general area in which motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular or not to consist of a single, linear path. Locative setting adjuncts may also be assigned this frame element. Kim <t>pushed</t> the lawnmower <fex name="Area">around the garden</fex>.

name: Place
description:
The location in which the shooting event takes place.

<ex>The bankrobbers were crazy enough to <t>shoot</t> at the clerks with an AK-47 <fex name="Place">inside the bank</fex></ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time when the shooting event takes place.

<ex>The robbers <t>shot</t> at the clerks <fex name="Time">as they ran out of the bank</fex></ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The #Agent s purpose in launching the #Projectile

<ex>We mistook a satellite <t>launched</t> <fex name="pur">to study earthquakes</fex> to be a missile, so we shot it down over the Pacific.</ex>

name: Projectile
description: The entity whose rapid, dangerous motion is caused by the Agent and/or Firearm.

name: Agent
description: The Agent is the person performing the intentional act causing the motion of the Projectile.

name: Firearm
description: The device used by the Agent to cause the motion of the Projectile.

name: Distance
description: This FE is any expression characterizing the extent of motion of the Theme. Pat <t>threw</t> the Javelin <fex name="Distance">50 meters</fex>.

name: Goal
description: This FE is the point at which the Theme ends up as a result of the motion. Kim <t>threw</t> the cat <fex name="Goal">into the garden</fex>.

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Means
description: An act of the #Agent whereby the rapid motion of the #Projectile is achieved.

name: Path
description: This FE is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a Source nor Goal. I <t>pushed</t> the trolley <fex name="Path">along the street</fex>.

name: Source
description: This FE is the starting point of motion. Pat dragged the box <fex name="Source">out of the cupboard</fex>.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Area
description: This frame element is used for expressions which describe a general area in which motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular or not to consist of a single, linear path. Locative setting adjuncts may also be assigned this frame element. Kim <t>pushed</t> the lawnmower <fex name="Area">around the garden</fex>.

name: Place
description:
The location in which the shooting event takes place.

<ex>The bankrobbers were crazy enough to <t>shoot</t> at the clerks with an AK-47 <fex name="Place">inside the bank</fex></ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time when the shooting event takes place.

<ex>The robbers <t>shot</t> at the clerks <fex name="Time">as they ran out of the bank</fex></ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The #Agent s purpose in launching the #Projectile

<ex>We mistook a satellite <t>launched</t> <fex name="pur">to study earthquakes</fex> to be a missile, so we shot it down over the Pacific.</ex>

name: Shopper
description:
The person who attempts to find the #Goods.
<ex><fex name="Shopper">John</fex> <t>shopped</t> for a pencil.</ex>

name: Goods
description: This is the entity that the Ground may contain. Typically, it is expressed as a<ment>for</ment>-PP.

name: Ground
description: This is the entity to which the Cognizer pays attention. It is referred to as the #Ground because it serves as the background or context for the #Goods. This FE is usually expressed as a preposition phrase.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the shopping action is done.

name: Means
description:
An act of the #Shopper that allows them to look for (and perhaps purchase) the #Goods.

<ex>They <t>shopped</t> for hot items <fex name="Mns">by camping out overnight at shopping malls</fex>.</ex>

name: Outcome
description: The failure or success of an attempt.

name: Place
description: A spatial setting larger than the Ground in which the Shopping event occurs.

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the time when the shopping occurs.

<ex>The children were <t>shopping</t> for gifts for their parents <fex name="Time">before Christmas</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description: An action that the Shopper intends to accomplish by performing the search.

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the amount of effort put into shopping.

name: Lender
description: The original owner and soon to be #Lender of the #Assets.

name: Assets
description: The financial #Assets being traded.

name: Intermediary
description: The entity that is the borrower to the #Lender and the seller and later repurchaser to the #Market.

name: Market
description: The aggregate selling place of many types of financial stocks, bond, securities, etc. The #Market is also a metonym for the people who buy the #Assets.

name: Purpose
description: The situation that the #Intermediary wishes to bring about by short selling.  Because this concept is associated with finance, the #Purpose is normally to earn a profit.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the time at which the #Intermediary engages in short selling.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the place at which the short selling occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Intermediary that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the Means by which an #Intermediary acts intentionally.

name: Astronomical_entity
description:
An entity which is periodically visible from the earth s surface.


<ex>Heku left one morning as <fex name="ast">the sun</fex> <t>rose</t> along the plain.</ex>

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is the location above the horizon that the #Astronomical_entity ends up in.

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which the motion of the  #Astronomical_entity takes place. It covers any description of the appearance  which is not covered by more specific FEs such as #Speed,  including general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>), and aesthetic judgements of the event .

<ex>The sun <t>rose</t> <fex name="man">beautifully</fex>, but the air was cold.</ex>

name: Path
description:
The sequence of locations that the #Astronomical_entity traverses as it comes over the horizon.

<ex>A pale copper sun <t>rose</t> <fex name="pat">through a sea of muted cloud layers</fex>, and now there is no afterglow at all.</ex>

name: Speed
description:
This FE identifies the #Speed at which the #Astronomical_entity comes into view.


<ex>In the summer, the sun <t>comes up</t> <fex name="spe">quickly</fex>, and you?ll need to work fast. </ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time when the #Astronomical_entity appears.

<ex>As the sun <t>came</t> <t>up</t> <fex name="tim">at 5:15 am</fex>, it made the red rocks almost glow.</ex>

name: Source
description:
The #Source is the location the #Astronomical_entity is construed to occupy before coming above the horizon.


<ex>The night passed away, and the sun <t>rose</t> <fex name="Src">from the ocean</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
This FE identifies the #Place from which the motion of the #Astronomical_entity is viewed.

<ex>The very end of the eclipse will be visible as the sun <t>rises</t> <fex name="pla">in some locations in Africa and northeastern North America</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The extent to which the #Astronomical_entity comes into view above the horizon.

<ex>When the sun <t>rose</t> <fex name="deg">fully</fex>, painting the area a beautiful red gold his father would turn to him and smile.</ex>

name: Indicator
description: The phenomenon that signifies the #Indicated.

name: Indicated
description: The phenomenon that is signified by the #Indicator.

name: Reliability
description: It indicates the #Reliability of the #Indicator as a sign of the #Indicated.

name: Descriptor
description: Any description of the #Indicator not covered by a more specific FE.

name: Signatory
description:
The signatory of the #Agreement.

<ex><fex name="sig1">Eisenhower</fex> <t>signed</t> a treaty  with aliens.</ex>

name: Signature
description:
The entity signifying the identity of the #Signatory, resulting from the act of writing on the #Agreement document.

<ex>The Attorney General seemingly never <m>put</m> his <t><fex name="sig">signature</fex></t> on the agreement.</ex>

name: Agreement
description:
The document which encodes the commitment of the #Signatory.

<ex>I <t>signed</t> <fex name="agr">the contract</fex> and now the dealership claims they made a mistake, quoted the price too low and now I have to pay them more money. </ex>

name: Instrument
description:
An entity directed by the #Signatory that interacts with the #Agreement document so as to produce the #Signature.

<ex>He <t>signed</t> the contract <fex name="ins">with a mixture of his own blood and spit</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: The place where the signing occurs.

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (<ment>probably</ment>, <ment>presumably</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of the #Signatory that also affect the action (<ment>happily</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>). 

<ex>Bob <fex name="man">eagerly</fex> <t>signed</t> the contract.</ex>

name: Means
description:
This FE identifies the action whereby the #Signatory achieves the signing of the #Agreement.


<ex>He <t>signed</t> the contract <fex name="mea">by writing his name, Cornelis Wynkoop</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The purpose for which the #Signatory commits to the #Agreement.

<ex><fex name="pur">In order to become a Party</fex> Australia will need to <t>sign</t> the Protocol by 31 March 1998 and then take the binding step of ratification.</ex>

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time at which signature is given.

name: Agent
description: The Agent is the person performing the intentional act.

name: Speaker
description: The sentient entity that is not communicating.

name: Expressor
description: The #Expressor is the #Speaker's voice or other communicative noise emitted by the #Speaker.

name: Instrument
description: The instrument with which an intentional act is performed.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Purpose
description:
The purpose for which an intentional act is performed.
<ex>John <t>quieted</t> the crowd <fex name="Purpose">to reassert his authority</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Means
description: An act whereby the #Agent silences the #Speaker.

name: Topic
description: This is the subject matter to which the Message pertains. It is typically expressed as a PP Complement headed by about.

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the silencing event  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). 

<ex>Kim <t>shushed</t> Pat <fex name="Manner">rather haughtily</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The extent to which the #Agent succeeds in creating silence.

<ex>Valois <t>silenced</t> the crowd <fex name="Degree">completely</fex> with one commanding gesture</ex>

name: Entities
description:
This FE marks constituents that express the set of objects or types whose similarity is at issue. 

<ex> <fex name="Entities">The two painters</fex>  <m>were</m> <t>alike</t> in being unable to draw acceptably . </ex>
<ex>Agbenugba confirms the <t>resemblances</t> <fex name="Entities">between his own experience and that of his protagonist</fex>.</ex>

name: Entity_1
description:
When there is an asymmetry, #Entity_1 is the entity characterized by its similarity to #Entity_2, whose characteristics are assumed to be known.  #Entity_1 is often an external argument.

<ex>In the first phase <fex name="Entity_1">Barthes s approach</fex> <m>has</m> <t>similarities</t> to that of Levi-Strauss.</ex>
<ex><fex name="Entity_1">Our economy</fex> <m>is</m> <t>like</t> a healthy plant after a long drought</ex>
<ex>I found a <t>similar</t> <fex name="ent1">passage</fex> in Tolkien.</ex>

name: Entity_2
description:
When the #Entities are expressed separately, #Entity_2 is the one whose characteristics are assumed to be known; it serves as a basis for establishing characteristics of #Entity_1.

<ex>The results of Method 2 <m>show </m>remarkable <t>similarity</t> <fex name="Entity_2">to those obtained by Method 1</fex></ex>
<ex>Leadbelly s recordings are not <t>dissimilar</t> <fex name="Entity_2">to those of Jimmie Rodgers</fex>.</ex>
<ex>This is a problem <t>different</t> <fex name="ent2">from meltdown</fex> only in degree.</ex>
<ex>Here we see a <t>similar</t> case. <fex name="ent2">DNI</fex></ex>

name: Dimension
description:
This FE marks constituents which express a property in respect to which the similarity of the entities is assessed.

<ex>The disc announced Friday is <fex name="Dimension">physically</fex> <t>similar</t> to current music CDs </ex>

name: Differentiating_fact
description:
A fact about #Entity_1 or the #Entities that reveals how #Entity_1 is the same or different from other entities.  (Note the contrast with  as to .)

<ex>His presidency was <t>different</t> <fex name="Differentiating_fact">in that it offered a way forward for the common man</fex> .</ex>
<ex>Banks primarily <t>differ</t> <fex name="Differentiating_fact">in offering different rates for different risks</fex> .</ex>
<ex>We are all <t>similar</t> <fex name="Differentiating_fact">in having two arms , two legs , a mind , and a heart to feel with</fex> .</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The extent to which entities are similar to each other, in general or with respect to some #Dimension(s)

<ex>The twins are <fex name="Degree">very</fex> <t>similar</t>.</ex>

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the similarity occurs or exists.

name: Place
description: The Place is the general area in which similarity occurs or exists

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the Manner in which Dimension is similar or different

name: Term
description: The linguistic sign that is used for referring to a type of #Entity.

name: Entity
description: The type of #Entity that is conventionally referred to by a #Term.

name: Speaker
description: A speaker or speech community that uses a #Term to refer to a particular #Entity.

name: Entity
description: The type of #Entity that is conventionally referred to by a #Term.

name: Term
description: The linguistic sign that is used for referring to a type of #Entity.

name: Speaker
description: The speaker or speech community that uses a #Term to refer to a particular #Entity.

name: Profiled_event
description: The event which is asserted to occur at the same time as the #Landmark_event.

name: Landmark_event
description: The event or time period whose timing the #Profiled_event is judged against.

name: Events
description: The states-of-affairs which are asserted to be co-timed.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Profiled_event and #Landmark_event coincide.

name: Entity
description: The thing whose size is being considered.

name: Dimension
description:
The feature of an (actual or possible) #Entity that is measured. In literal examples, it essentially must be size, or a word equivalent to size such as bulk.

<ex>The particles were <t>smaller</t> <fex name="Dimension">in size</fex> than expected .</ex>
<ex>Her <fex name="">huge</fex> <fex name="Dimension">girth</fex> interfered with normal daily activities .</ex>
<ex>Chickens hardly have an <t>immense</t> <fex name="Dimension">intellect</fex> .</ex>

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the size of the #Entity deviates from the norm.

name: Standard
description: The size of the #Entity may be compared to the size of a #Standard.

name: Sleeper
description: The entity that is sleeping.

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the sleep occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the sleeping event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, noisily), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Duration
description: It identifies the #Duration of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.

name: Sleeper
description: The #Sleeper is the entity that is sleeping.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the event occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the event occurs.

name: Perpetrator
description: This is the person (or other agent) that illegally takes the goods into or out of a country.

name: Goods
description: The FE Goods is anything (including labor, time, or legal rights) that can be illegally taken into our out of a country.

name: Source
description: The source is the location the goods occupy initially before change of location.

name: Path
description: The path refers to (a part of the) ground the Goods travel over or to a landmark the Goods travel by.

name: Goal
description: Goal is the location the Goods end up in.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Means
description: An act of the #Perpetrator which allows them to smuggle the #Goods.

name: Event
description: The unlawful movement of #Goods.

name: Manner
description:
A description of the #Event not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In most cases, it indicates salient characteristics of a #Perpetrator that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).
<ex>The rebels had <fex name="Manner">secretly</fex> <t>smuggled</t> in several tonnes of explosives.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The action that the #Perpetrator is trying to accomplish by the act of smuggling.

<ex>We <t>smuggled</t> you in here <fex name="Purp">to try to help</fex> but ...</ex>

name: Constant_location
description:
The container, vehicle, or other entity that the #Goods move with and remain stationary with respect to.

<ex>She  ll <t>smuggle</t> them <fex name="Constant_location">in suit cases</fex>.</ex>

name: Distance
description: The distance travelled by the #Goods.

name: Speed
description:
The amount of time per distance travelled by the #Goods.

<ex>They <t>smuggled</t> the bomb <fex name="Speed">swiftly</fex> through customs.</ex>

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is the person performing the soaking.

name: Theme
description:
The #Theme is the entity that changes location. 
<ex> Ellen <t>soaked</t> <fex name="Theme">the beans</fex> <fex name="Medium">in the water</fex>  <fex name="Duration">for 30 seconds</fex> .</ex>

name: Medium
description: #Medium is the substance in which the #Theme is submerged.<ex>Bobby <t>soaked</t> the potatoes <fex name="Medium">in water</fex> overnight.</ex>

name: Duration
description: The amount of time for which the #Theme is soaked.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Agent soaks the #Theme.

name: Container
description:
This FE identifies the #Container that holds the #Theme which is submerged and the #Medium that it is in. 
<ex><t>soak</t> the potatoes <fex name="Container">in a medium-sized pan</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: The #Place where the submerging occurs.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Agent soaks the #Theme.

name: Means
description:
The action of the #Agent that brings about the soaking.

<ex><t>Soak</t> the beans <fex name="Means">by placing the entire package, unopened, in the water</fex>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description: The situation that the #Agent hopes to bring about by soaking the #Theme.

name: Item
description: The #Item is the absorbant friendly thing that takes in the #Substance.

name: Substance
description: The #Substance is the material that is taken in by the #Item.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Item takes in #Substance.

name: Time
description: When the #Item takes in #Substance.

name: Duration
description: For what length of time the #Item is imbued with #Substance.

name: Manner
description: The way in which the #Item soaks in the #Substance.

name: Degree
description: #Degree describes the extent to which a particular absorption event deviates from the norm.

name: Protagonist
description:
The Protagonist is the person whose sociability is being described. 
<ex><fex name="Protagonist">Pat</fex> is <t>sociable</t>.</ex>
<ex>Pat was a very <t>shy</t> <fex name="Protagonist">child</fex>.</ex>
<ex><fex name="Protagonist">Pat</fex> is a <t>loner</t>.</ex>
<ex>Everyone had heard about the <t>recluse</t> <fex name="Protagonist">SLF</fex> who lived on the hill. </ex>

name: Company
description:
The Protagonist may be sociable, shy, outgoing, etc. when with particular Company (specific people or types of people).  Company usually occurs in a PP Complement with a target adjective: <ex>Kim is <t>shy</t> <fex name="Company">of strangers</fex>.</ex> 
<ex>The children are <t>friendly</t> <fex name="Company">to everyone they meet</fex>. </ex>

name: Content
description:
The Protagonist may be sociable, shy, outgoing, etc. when in a particular situation, or about performing some action. 
<ex>Kim is <t>outgoing</t> <fex name="Content">when traveling alone</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Kim is <t>timid</t> <fex name="Content">about meeting new people</fex>. </ex>

name: Manner
description: Manner of performing an action

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Judge
description: Judge

name: Judge
description:
The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

<ex>Pongo is very <t>shy</t>, <fex name="jud">In my opinion</fex>.</ex>

name: Event
description: This FE identifies the event which occurs to create history.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies where the event takes place.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the time when the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Domain
description: The #Domain is (a characterization of) the type of event that is part of the #Event s history.

name: Behavior
description: The #Behavior is the action of the #Individual on which the evaluation of the #Individual s character is based.

name: Individual
description: The #Individual is the person whose #Behavior is being evaluated.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the described Behavior deviates from the norm.

name: Individuals
description: #Individuals have a #Connection with each other.

name: Individual_1
description: #Individual1 has a social #Connection to #Individual_2.

name: Individual_2
description: #Individual2 has a relationship to #Individual_1.

name: Connection
description: #Connection is the personal relationship between #Individuals that keeps them involved in each other s lives.

name: Type
description: #Type is the sub-category to which the #Connection belongs.

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree (strength or closeness) of the #Connection.

name: Evaluee
description:
The #Evaluee is being judged for its quality.


<ex> <fex name="Evaluee">His shirt</fex> seems very <t>common</t> compared to their modern fashions.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
This FE identifies the  #Degree to which the #Evaluee is judged good or bad.

<ex> His shirt seems <fex name="Degree">very</fex> <t>common</t> compared to their modern fashions.</ex>

name: Entity
description: Entity

name: Attendee
description: #Attendee is used for the people who come to the #Social_event.

name: Social_event
description: This FE identifies the #Social_event itself.

name: Duration
description: This FE identifies the #Duration of time for which the #Social_event is ongoing.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the #Social_event occurs.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the #Social_event occurs.

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree to which the #Social_event occurs.

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Social_event occurs.

name: Attendees
description: The #Attendees are the collectively construed participants of the social event.

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree to which the social event occurs.

name: Duration
description: This FE identifies the #Duration of time for which the social event is ongoing.

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the #Manner in which the social event occurs.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the social event occurs.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the social event occurs.

name: Party_1
description: #Party_1 is the grammatically more prominent participant in the social event.  #Party_1 can be one or more individuals.

name: Party_2
description: #Party_2 is the grammatically less prominent participant in the social event.  #Party_2 can be one or more individuals.

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree to which the social event occurs.

name: Duration
description: This FE identifies the #Duration of time for which the social event is ongoing.

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the #Manner in which the social event occurs.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the social event occurs.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the social event occurs.

name: Evaluee
description: The #Evaluee is the person whose #Behavior towards other human beings is being evaluated.

name: Affected_party
description: The #Affected_party is the entity which is positively or negatively treated by the #Evaluee.

name: Behavior
description: The #Behavior is the action of the #Evaluee on which the evaluation of the #Evaluee s character is based.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the situation or person that the #Evaluee s #Behavior responds to or is related to.

name: Expressor
description:
The #Expressor is the body part or action by a body part which indicates the character of the #Evaluee.

<ex>She flashed me a <t>kind</t> <fex name="Expressor">smile</fex>.</ex>

name: Judge
description:
The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the evaluation denoted by the target.

<ex><fex name="jud">In my book</fex>, that wasn t very <t>gracious</t>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: The #Degree is the extent to which the #Evaluee exhibits the particular #Behavior towards others.

name: Manner
description:
The #Manner is the way in which the #Evaluee embodies the characteristic ascribed to her or him.

<ex><fex name = "Evaluee">Lester</fex> was <fex name = "Manner">coldly</fex> <t>polite</t>.</ex>

name: Item
description: An #Item is alone in its category.

name: Type
description: It specifies a category which in principle could apply to multiple items, but which is limited to the #Item.

name: Sound_source
description: An entity that is construed as a single point source emitting sound.

name: Noisy_event
description: An event during which sound is produced.

name: Theme
description: One of  two entities which is construed as moving relative to the other, resulting in either friction or impact. This entity is given greater syntactic prominence.

name: Ground
description: An entity construed as stationary on or against which the #Theme moves, resulting in either friction or impact. This entity is given less grammatical prominence compared to the #Theme and is usually encoded in a spatial prepositional phrase.

name: Themes
description: Two entities that are both moving against each other, resulting in either friction or impact.

name: Location_of_sound_source
description: The place from which the sound emanates.

name: Place
description: The location at which sound is produced. This FE differs from #Location_of_sound_source in that it does not highlight the sound's spreading from its source to the perceiver's location.

name: Manner
description: Certain properties of the sound relating to its production, loudness, etc  may be of lexicographic interest if they describe properties of a sounds.

name: Component_sound
description: The sound perception may be characterized in terms of #Component_sounds.

name: Degree
description: Expressions that indicate the loudness of the sound.

name: Path
description: The #Path along which the sound travels away from the #Sound_source.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity for which the sound level #Attribute is under consideration.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of an #Entity which is under consideration. This FE is incorporated in each LU in the frame.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing the deviation of the #Volume from the norm.

name: Volume
description: A quantity or characterization of the #Entity s sound output with respect to its #Attribute.

name: Sound
description:
A percept produced  in hearing organs by  vibrations which travel through the air or another medium.

<ex><fex name="Sound">Laughter</fex> <t>echoed</t> through the halls</ex>

name: Location_of_sound_source
description:
The location of the Sound_source from which the #Sound travels

<ex>The Prince  s laugh <t>echoed</t> <fex name="Location_of_sound_source">from the corridor</fex>.</ex>

name: Path
description:
The Path of the Sound s movement is any description of its trajectory of motion which is neither a Location_of_sound_source or a Goal.

<ex>A loud bang <t>echoed</t> <fex name="Path">through the valley</fex>.</ex>

name: Sound_source
description:
The point-like entity which produces the #Sound.

<ex>There was muzak <t>echoing</t> <fex name="Sound_source">from cheap speakers</fex>.</ex>

name: Goal
description: A description of the location where the #Sound ends up.

name: Place
description:
A setting in which #Sound movement happens.

<ex>I heard their footsteps <t>echo</t> <fex name="Place">in the hollow cavern</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time when  the #Sound movement occurs.

<ex> <fex name="Time">In the mornings</fex> the harsh , squawking voices of the gulls <t>echo</t> between the channel walls</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The #Manner in which the #Sound moves.

<ex>The scream <t>reverberated</t> around the house <fex name="Manner">like the scream of a soul in pain</fex></ex>

name: Theme
description: The abstract or concrete thing acquired by the #Goal from the #Source.The sun doesn t burn up because its source

name: Source
description:
A concrete or abstract entity from which the #Goal has gotten the #Theme.

<ex><fex name="sou">Dr Kelly</fex> is his <t>source</t> for the specific information relating to phlogiston production.</ex>

name: Goal
description:
An entity or individual that has acquired a #Theme from the #Source.


<ex>The beetles thereby cut off <fex name="goa">the tree s</fex> <t>source</t> of nourishment and it dies.</ex>

name: Trajector
description: The entity that moves (or is conceived of as moving) from the #Source, along the #Path to the #Goal.

name: Source
description: A description of the initial location of the #Trajector, before a motion event begins.

name: Path
description: A description of the intermediate position of the #Trajector, after departing the #Source and before arriving at the #Goal.

name: Goal
description: A description of the location that the #Trajector ends up.

name: Means
description: The action or state-of-affairs that causes the #Trajector to change location.

name: Ground
description: The #Ground serves as a basis for describing the location of the #Figure.

name: Figure
description: The #Figure is perceived as located relative to a certain #Ground location. The #Figure can be an entity or an event.

name: Time
description: The period of time during which the locative relation between #Figure and #Ground obtains.

name: Ground
description:
The #Ground serves as a basis for describing the location of the #Figure.

<ex>The cat is <t>on</t> <fex name="Grnd">the mat</fex>.</ex>

name: Figure
description:
The #Figure is perceived as located relative to a certain #Ground location. The figure can be an entity or an event.

<ex><fex name="Fig">The cat</fex> is <t>on</t> the mat.</ex>

name: Figures
description: The #Figures are items which mutually serve to identify the location of each other.

name: Time
description:
The period of time during which the locative relation between #Figure and #Ground obtains.

<ex>He was <t>against</t> the wall <fex name="tim">on Friday</fex>.</ex>

name: Audience
description: The person or persons to whom the #Speaker delivers their text.

name: Speaker
description: The person who orally delivers a text about a #Topic to a passive #Audience.

name: Topic
description: What the text that the #Speaker produces is about.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner is a description of the #Speaker s speech.

name: Medium
description: This frame element is the #Medium through which the #Speaker communicates.

name: Occasion
description: The #Occasion is the reason a public statement is given.

name: Time
description: The #Time describes when the speaking occurs.

name: Place
description: The #Place describes the location where the speaking occurs.

name: Type
description: The class of items within which the #Instance is made salient.

name: Instance
description: The notable case of the #Type.

name: Entity
description: The #Entity whose #Speed is under consideration.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of an #Entity which is a function of the distance that the #Entity moves in a given duration. With the adjectives of this frame this Frame Element is generally incorporated.

name: Speed
description: A quantity or other characterization of the #Entity s speed.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Speed from the norm.

name: Speaker
description:
The language user who produces a #Sign in some modality.

<ex><fex name="spe">He</fex> insists on <t>mispronouncing</t> my name every time, the bastard!</ex>

name: Sign
description:
An abstract form-meaning pairing.

<ex>My little nephew can t <t>say</t> <fex name="sig">prestidigitation</fex></ex>

name: Judgment
description:
An evaluation of whether the #Formal_realization that the #Speaker produced matches the standard or standard range.


<ex>Finally, I would pay more attention to your "oppinion" if you <t>spelled</t> it <fex name="jud">correctly</fex>.</ex>

name: Formal_realization
description:
The written string, gesture, or vocalized sound sequence that the #Speaker produces.

<ex>The old uncensored editions of the Talmud referred to Jesus as Yeshua censored versions <t>spelled</t> it <fex name="for">as Yeshu</fex> </ex>

name: Part_of_form
description:
A constituent part of the #Formal_realization. 

<ex>You spelled it <fex name="pof">with a "t"</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The way that the #Speaker produces the #Formal_realization.

<ex>You <t>spelled</t> it <fex name="man">the way it sounds</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The time when the #Speaker produces the #Formal_realization.

<ex><fex name="zeit">Today</fex> you <t>spelled</t> it "pjuok". </ex>

name: Sport
description: Physical activity practiced by an athlete and can be performed in the form of a competition. Such activity is governed by rules, making use of sports equipment and taking place in a sports venue. It can be practiced individually or in teams.

name: Discipline
description: A specific type of the sport.

name: Discipline
description: It is subcategory or a set of subcategories of a sport.

name: Subdiscipline
description: A more specific type of the discipline.

name: Equipment
description: The tools used in the venue or by the participants.

name: Type
description: The kind of equipment.

name: Sport
description: The sport discipline being played.

name: Event
description: Each of the sports events that take place during a competition.

name: Athletes
description: The athletes who take part in the match, forming two or more teams.

name: Venue
description: Where the match takes place.

name: Phase
description: The moment of the competition when the event happens.

name: Athlete
description: One who practices the #Sport.

name: Sport
description: Activity practiced by an #Athlete, possibly as a #Competition. This activity is rules-based, uses #Equipment and takes place in a #Venue. It can be practiced individually or in teams.

name: Venue
description: It is the building, structure or place where the competition of some #Sport takes place.

name: Equipment
description: Tool or object used for the #Competition, by the referee or by the athletes.

name: Time
description: When the #Sport's event takes place.

name: Duration
description: The length of time of a #Sport's match.

name: Purpose
description: Some specific reason why the #Athlete wishes to perform the #Sport.

name: Manner
description: Characteristics of the #Athlete when practicing a #Sport.

name: Place
description: Geographic space where there is a #Venue or where the #Sport is practiced.

name: Time
description: One of the temporal divisions of the match.

name: Type
description: The kind of temporal division of the sport.

name: Duration
description: A defined quantity of the period of the time of a sport.

name: Event
description: Each of the sports events that take place during a competition.

name: Venue
description: It is the building, structure or place where a competition of a particular #Sport takes place.

name: Sport
description: A physical activity practiced by a #Athlete and can be performed in the form of a competition. Such activity is governed by rules, uses equipment and occurs in a #Venue. It can be practiced individually or in teams.

name: Place
description: Location where the #Venue is located.

name: Constituent_parts
description: A location or area with specific function within the #Venue.

name: Description
description: The characteristics of the #Venue.

name: Type
description: It indicates the type of #Venue with regard to scope (municipal, international), format (oval, straight), purpose (training), among others.

name: Name
description: The #Name of the venue.

name: Part
description: A given part of a #Venue.

name: Venue
description: The venue itself.

name: Sport
description: The sport played in the venue.

name: Place
description: The place where the #Part is located.

name: Name
description: A proper noun used to name the #Part. Usually it pays tribute to some famous athlete.

name: Type
description: Some aspect of the part that distinguishes it from similar parts.

name: Team
description: The team that occupies a given part of the #Venue.

name: Entity
description: The object that has reached a particular stage of its development.

name: Time
description: The time at which the progress occurs.

name: Manner
description: A description of the stage of progress, frequently an evaluation.

name: Degree
description: The amount of advancement that the Entity has attained.

name: Domain
description: The relevant dimension of development.

name: Protagonist
description: The sentient being who delays action until an #Expected_request has been received.

name: Salient_entity
description: A concrete or abstract entity that the #Protagonist expects to participate in an #Expected_request, typically the party that makes the request of the #Protagonist.

name: Expected_request
description: The #Expected_request is what triggers the #Protagonist to proceed with an appropriate action.

name: Activity
description: The #Protagonist is prepared to conduct an #Activity in response to the #Expected_request.

name: Time
description: The time period during which the #Protagonist is waiting for the request.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Protagonist is waiting.

name: Duration
description: #Duration denotes the length of time from the beginning of the waiting to its end.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the waiting event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including general descriptions comparing events (the same way) and salient characteristics of the #Protagonist that also affect the action (patiently, anxiously).

name: End_point
description: The point in time, defined either as a clock time or in terms of an event that takes place, at which the #Protagonist ends the waiting.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Protagonist intends to accomplish by standing by.

name: Entity
description: A concrete or abstract entity.

name: State
description: The state of an #Entity.

name: Speaker
description: The #Speaker is the sentient entity that produces the #Message (whether spoken or written).

name: Message
description: It identifies the content of what the #Speaker is communicating to the #Addressee.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the subject matter to which the #Message pertains.

name: Medium
description: It is the physical entity or channel used by the #Speaker to transmit the statement.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of performing an action

name: Means

name: Place

name: Degree
description: The #Degree is how generous or stingy the #Resource_controller is judged to be.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Manner
description: A characterization of the way in which the #Resource_controller exhibits stinginess.

description: This FE denotes the #Supply of #Resources. It is incorporated into each LU in this frame.

name: Use

name: Possessor

name: Agent

name: Location
description: The location where the #Theme is kept. Some, though not all, LUs in this frame incorporate this FE.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the storing state which is not covered by more specific FEs, including general descriptions comparing events and salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action.

name: Duration
description: The #Duration is the amount of time for which the #Theme remains in the #Location.

name: Place
description: The #Place indicates where the Storing occurs.

name: Time

name: Area

name: Agent
description: The Agent is the person who is strict or liberal in his/her control over another. This FE is usually the External Argument with predicate adjectives, or the head noun if the adjective is used attributively.

name: Controlled_entity
description: The Agent s strictness may be directed towards or limited to some particular person or group over whom he/she has control.  The Controlled_entity generally occurs in a PP Complement.

name: Controlling_act
description: The Agent s strictness may be manifested in particular behavior.

name: Issue
description: The Agent may be strict or lenient with respect to a particular matter or situation.  Issue occurs in PP Complements, usually headed by about: The city council is strict

name: Medium
description: A Medium of control, such as rules, may also be described as strict or lenient.  Medium may occur with or without the Agent who ultimately has control (i.e. the one who implements or enforces the rules).

name: Expressor
description: The body part or expression of the #Agent that indicates their strictness.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs

name: Area
description: The #Area is the arena in which the #Agent is or is not strict.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner is the way in which the #Agent embodies the strictness associated with him or her.

name: Cognizer
description:
The person who is influenced by the #Situation or #Entity.


<ex>George Gilder would run with this idea later in writing the New Testament of supply-side economics that <t>influenced</t> <fex name="cog">Reagan</fex>. </ex>

name: Situation
description:
A state of affairs--- which can be an event, state or conditions---that has an influence on the #Cognizer.


<ex><fex name="sit">The balmy temperatures</fex> <t>inspired</t> me to write a poem on the advent of spring.</ex>
<ex>Hecker said that although <fex name="sit">the sheer age of the building</fex> <t>inspired</t> him to preserve its heritage aspects he also designed its interiors around the ·clean and fresh· mood of Queensland.</ex>

name: Entity
description:
A person or thing that has an influence on the #Cognizer.

<ex><fex name="ent">The painting</fex> <t>inspired</t> me to take a risk and use the intense green for the sky.</ex>

name: Action
description:
An Action that the #Cognizer decides to carry out as a consequence of the influence of a #Situation or #Entity.


<ex>What factors <t>influenced</t> Nixon <fex name="act">to issue the doctrine</fex>?</ex>

name: Behavior
description:
A #Behavior that the #Cognizer is engaged in independently but whose execution is subsequently influenced by the #Situation or #Entity.

<ex>Attention will also be paid to St. Paul , what <t>influenced</t> him <fex name="beh">in his thinking</fex> and what he wrote in his letters about sex, sexuality, men and women</ex>

name: Product
description:
An entity that stands metonymically for the actions and considerations that produced it.

<ex>Does anyone know what <t>inspired</t> <fex name="pro">this song</fex>? </ex>

name: Agent
description: The #Agent acts to influence a #Cognizer.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the Subjective_influencing event occurs.

name: Place
description:
The location in which one has influence.

<ex><fex name="Entity">Chavez</fex> has much influence <fex name="Place">in South America</fex>.</ex>

name: Domain
description:
The field in which one maintains influence.

<ex><fex name="Entity">Chavez</fex> has much influence <fex name="dom">in South American politics</fex>.</ex>
