name: Body_part
description: A part of the body of the #Experiencer in which the sensation of a temperature is located.

name: Degree
description: How much the actual feeling of temperature deviates from a certain level of warmth.

name: Submittor
description: The person that begins in possession of the #Documents and gives them over into the possession of the #Authority for processing.  <ex>The Human Services financial worker cannot decide if you will get food support benefits until <fex name="Submittor">you</fex> <t>turn</t> <t>in</t> the form and needed verifications.</ex>

name: Authority
description: The individual or organization that ends up in possession of the #Documents and processes them.

name: Documents
description:
The artifacts containing content, typically in the form of text and images, that the Submittor gives to the #Authority.

<ex>Once you have <t>submitted</t> <fex name="doc">the form</fex>, a request to make an oral statement will be
generated based on the information you supplied.</ex>

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #Submittor gives the #Documents to the #Authority.

name: Time
description: The time period during which the #Submittor gives the #Documents to the #Authority.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Submittor gives the #Documents to the #Authority.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Submittor gives the #Documents to the #Authority.

name: Manner
description:
The #Manner is the manner in which the #Submittor gives the #Documents to the #Authority.

<ex>The company <fex name="Man">hastily</fex> <t>submitted</t> the manuscript to three additional reviewers.</ex>

name: Superior
description: The individual in charge of the #Subordinate.

name: Subordinate
description: The individual under the command of the #Superior.

name: Entity
description: The living organism which requires the #Support to survive.

name: Support
description: The resource that the #Entity relies on to survive through a situation.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time that the #Entity survives with the help of the #Support.

name: Degree
description: The degree to which the #Support is responsible for the survival of the #Entity.

name: Substance
description: The undifferentiated entity which is presented as having a permanent existence.

name: Constituents
description: It expresses substances/ingredients that make up the #Substance.

name: Type
description: It indicates what subtype of the general category the #Substance belongs to.

name: Substance
description: The #Substance is the entity which has had its phase altered.

name: Cause
description:
An event or state_of_Affairs that successfully impedes an #Agent or a State_of_affairs.

<ex><fex name="cau">This failure</fex> <t>undermines</t> governmental authority</ex>

name: Counter_actor
description:
A person who intentionally or not acts in such a way that an #Agent or State_of_affairs is impeded.

<ex>Tory rebels queued to warn that <fex name="cou">they</fex> would<t>sabotage</t> efforts to put the treaty through Parliament .</ex>

name: Agent
description:
A person who is intentionally engaged in some #Activity and who is impeded in that #Activity.

<ex>If he is really <t>undermining</t> <fex name="age">me</fex>, then he is a fine friend.</ex>

name: Activity
description: An #Activity that is being impeded.

name: State_of_affairs
description:
A state or event that is ongoing and whose continuance or unfolding is impeded.


<ex>Whenever I try to quit they all try to <t>sabotage</t> <fex name="soa">my efforts</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The extent to which the #Cause or #Counter_actor impede the #Agent or the #State_of_affairs.

<ex>The so-called advantage of a Premier being able to determine an election date is
<fex name="deg">totally</fex> <t>undermined</t> by speculation surrounding the date for the next election.</ex>

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Counter_actor hopes will result from his undermining.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Counter_actor subverts an #Activity.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Counter_actor or #Cause works agains the #Agent.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a #Counter_actor that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Means
description:
An action performed by the #Counter_actor or an event related to the #Cause that enables the subversion.

<ex>They <t>sabotaged</t> our plans <fex name="mea">by cutting off communications between the island and the mainland</fex>.</ex>

name: Communicator
description:
The person who uses language in the written or spoken modality to convey a #Message to another person. 

<ex><fex name="Communicator">Nobody</fex> seems to be able to <t>get</t> the idea <t>through</t> to her that she needs a job!!!!</ex>

name: Addressee
description:
The #Addressee receives a #Message from the #Communicator. 



<ex>According to Masztalics, a good teacher uses experiments to <t>get</t> the point <t>across</t>
<fex name="Add">to the class</fex>.</ex>

name: Message
description:
#Message A proposition or set of propositions that the #Communicator wants the #Addressee to believe or take for granted. 


<ex>He tried to <t>get</t> <t>through</t> to his wife <fex name="Msg">that the debt he s taken on buying stocks poses no risk</fex>.</ex>

name: Medium
description:
The physical or abstract setting in which the #Message is conveyed. 

<ex><fex name="Medium">The article</fex> <t>conveys</t> Mr. Handley s disrespect for those who disagree with him.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The #Manner in which the #Communicator communicates.

<ex>Rais <fex name="Manner">carefully</fex> <t>conveys</t> his own personal faith journey while respecting those who may have distinctly different views or experiences.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The #Means by which the #Communicator communicates.

<ex>She finally <t>got</t> her point <t>across</t> <fex name="Mns">by miming a shark s fin with her hands over her head</fex>. </ex>

name: Time
description:
The time at which the communication takes place.

<ex>Greenspan <t>got</t> his point <t>across</t> <fex name="Time">yesterday</fex> that a measured pace of rate hikes is still the plan.</ex>

name: Adequacy
description:
The degree to which the #Communicator s efforts are effective at making the #Addressee understand and appreciate the #Message.

<ex>The ads <fex name="ade">clearly</fex> <t>got</t> <t>across</t> the need to respect the health of non-smokers.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The action that the agent undertakes to achieve the #Goal.

<ex><fex name="mea">His daring, almost reckless, move</fex> <t>succeeded</t> and he lived to fight another day.</ex>

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is what the agent attempts to achieve by performing the #Means action.

name: Instrument
description:
An entity directed by the agent as part of the #Means action in order to accomplish the #Goal.

<ex> All of my usual source books seemed incomplete, but <fex name="ins">your website</fex> <t>did</t> <t>the</t> <t>trick</t>!</ex>

name: Role
description:
A participant function of an #Instrument or #Means in a particular event or in events of a particular kind.

<ex>The machine was <t>successful</t> <fex name="rol">as a reconnaissance vehicle</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The place where #Means action succeeds or fails.

<ex>A similar strategy, perhaps even bloodier, <t>did</t> <t>the</t> <t>trick</t> <fex name="pla">in El Salvador</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the #Time when the attempt succeeds or fails

<ex> But it <t>did</t> <t>the</t> <t>trick</t> <fex name="tim">at the time</fex>.</ex>

name: Protagonist
description:
The #Protagonist is the deprofiled individual who makes an attempt to achieve a #Goal by performing the #Means action, which may involve using an #Instrument.

<ex>Download also <t>failed</t> <fex name="pro">for me</fex> on both March and May issues. </ex>

name: Degree
description:
This FE identifies the #Degree to which an attempt involving a particular #Means or #Instrument succeeds.

<ex> A 1000 pf cap <fex name="Degree">almost completely</fex> <t>did</t> <t>the</t> <t>trick</t> so I went bigger with what happened to be handy</ex>

name: Containing_event
description: It denotes an event or state of affairs that occurs or holds at a time that includes the time during which the success or failure reported by the target occurs and of which the success or failure is taken to be a part.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent makes an attempt to achieve a #Goal.

name: Goal
description:
The #Goal is what the #Agent attempts to achieve.

<ex>If you don t <t>succeed</t> <fex name="goa">in your subterfuge</fex>, then report back for further orders.</ex>

name: Role
description:
A participant function in a particular event or in events of a particular kind.

<ex>Benedikt was <t>successful</t> <fex name="rol">as a master brewer of beer</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the #Means by which the #Goal is achieved (or not).

name: Degree
description:
This FE identifies the #Degree to which an attempt occurs.

<ex>Your attempt at convincing me has <fex name="deg">utterly</fex> <t>failed</t>.</ex>

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the attempt succeeds or fails.

name: Place
description:
The place where an attempt succeeds or fails.

<ex><fex name="Place">On the bridge</fex> he <t>succeeded</t> in putting the wig on the corpse.</ex>

name: Item
description: The entity whose scalar property is specified.

name: Scale
description: The #Scale is the attribute of the #Item that is being described.<ex>It was <fex name="Scale">hot</fex> <t>enough</t> to ignite the iron.</ex><ex>The workforce is <t>sufficient</t> <fex name="Scale">in number and proficiency</fex> to finish the building in minimum time.</ex>

name: Enabled_situation
description:
This FE identifies the #Enabled_situation by which the critical value is judged.
<ex>Can He make a rock <t>too</t> heavy <fex name="Enabled_situation">for Him to lift</fex>?</ex>
<ex>There s almost <t>enough</t> <fex name="Enabled_situation">for thirty people</fex>.</ex>
<ex>That information <t>sufficed</t> <fex name="Enabled_situation">to convince me</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Finding a parking spot is <t>sufficiently</t> difficult <fex name="Enabled_situation">that you d do better to walk</fex>.</ex>
<ex>This legislation was <t>inadequate</t> <fex name="Enabled_situation">in that it allowed many obvious delinquents to escape prosecution</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: The #Degree frame element indicates a modification of the value indicated by the target.

name: Victim
description: This #Victim is the being or entity that is injured by the #Assailant s suicide attack.

name: Assailant
description: The person (or other self-directed entity) that is attempting physical harm to the #Victim.

name: Weapon
description:
An entity used by the #Assailant to cause damage to the #Victim.

<ex>The <t>suicide attack</t> <fex name="Wep">with a car</fex> killed over a dozen people.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Assailant that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Assailant that accomplishes the assault.

name: Place
description:
This FE identifies the place where the #Assailant makes an assault on the #Victim.

<ex>Last week s <t>suicide bombing</t> <fex name="Place">outside the city</fex> was the first in weeks.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
This FE identifies the purpose for which an #Assailant attacks the #Victim.

<ex>They continue to <t>suicide-attack</t> throughout the city <fex name="Purp">to intimidate and terrorize the population</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the time when the #Assailant attacks the #Victim.

<ex><fex name="Time">Last Tuesday s</fex> <t>suicide attack</t> killed seven and wounded 20.</ex>

name: Source
description: The starting-point of the motion of the #Assailant or projectiles of the #Assailant as they move toward the the #Place that the #Victim is occupying in the attack.  In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion.  With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Path
description: The #Path refers to (a part of) the ground over which the #Assailant travels.

name: Evaluee
description: This Frame Element marks constituents expressing the entity that is judged to be more or less suitable for some #Purpose or #User.

name: Purpose
description:
This Frame Element marks constituents that express the #Purpose for which the #Evaluee is judged to be suitable or unsuitable.

<ex>We need to plan more buildings <t>suitable</t> <fex name="Purpose">for disabled people</fex>.</ex>

name: User
description: This FE marks expressions that indicate a #User to whom #Evaluee is considered suitable or not.

name: Degree
description:
This Frame Element marks constituents that express the #Degree to which the #Evaluee is suitable for the Context.

<ex>Please advise on the <fex name="Degree">most</fex> <t>suitable</t> design </ex>

name: Communicator
description: The #Communicator creates and communicates the summary of the Information.

name: State_of_affairs
description: The #State_of_affairs is summarized by the #Communicator.

name: Medium
description: The textual or other #Medium through which the #Communicator summarizes.

name: Addressee
description: The #Communicator communicates the summary to the #Addressee.

name: Summary
description:
The content that results from the summarization.

<ex>She <t>summarized</t> our involvement <fex name="sum">as a "qualified success"</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Aston <t>boiled</t>the situation <t>down</t> <fex name="sum">to one word: FUBAR</fex>.</ex>

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Communicator makes the #Summary.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Communicator communicates.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the details of the action beyond the identity of the participants and the setting, especially descriptions of the #Communicator that affect the action.

name: Means
description: An action performed by the #Communicator that brings about the communication.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Communicator is attempting to bring about by communicating.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time taken by the #Communicator in creating and conveying the #Summary.

name: fe_supernatural_entity_entity
description: fe_supernatural_entity_entity

name: Supplier
description: The person that begins in possession of the #Theme and causes it to be in the possession of the #Recipient .  <ex>I approve of <fex name="sup">your</fex> having <t>supplied</t> him with a file of soldiers.</ex>

name: Recipient
description:
The entity that ends up in possession of the #Theme.

<ex>VESID also <t>supplied</t> <fex name="rec">him</fex> with an all zone bus pass to help him travel to interviews.</ex>

name: Theme
description:
The object that is given to the Recipient .


<ex>Cromwell merged men from multiple regiments into a single one and <t>provisioned</t>
them <fex name="Thm">with red uniforms</fex> to replace their former regiment colors. </ex>

name: Imposed_purpose
description:
The #Recipient s intended purpose for the #Theme.

<ex>God gave them the promise of victory and <t>equipped</t> them <fex name="Imp">for the battle</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The #Place where the #Supplier gives the #Theme to the #Recipient.

<ex>The Harpley was launched in Launceston on the 2nd February, 1847, and with the exception
of her chain cables, was <fex name="Place">there</fex> <t>supplied</t> with all her materials and stores.</ex>

name: Time
description:
The #Time is when the #Supplier gives the #Theme to the #Recipient.

<ex>In Breidbach, water tankers were <fex name="Time">yesterday</fex> <t>supplied</t> to the community as the main water supply pipe had been washed away.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The #Purpose for which the #Supplier gives the #Theme to the #Recipient.

<ex>Some financial support can be <t>provided</t> <fex name="Purp">in order to help you and
MPI with the product approval process in an efficient and effective way</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
The #Means by which the #Supplier acquires or gives the #Theme to the #Recipient.

<ex>Euell <t>provisioned</t> them <fex name="Mns">by foraging, hunting, and trapping whenever his father was away</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the supplying event  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Supplier that affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

<ex> P&G <fex name="Man">secretly</fex> <t>provided</t> Schwartz with several boxes of documents.</ex>

name: Source
description:
The source of the #Theme.

<ex>We <t>equipped</t> them <fex name="sou">from our own supply of equipment</fex>.</ex>

name: Supporter
description: The #Supporter acts to benefit the #Supported by providing additional strength or stability.

name: Supported
description: The #Supported is given strength through the assistance of the #Supporter.

name: Degree
description:
The measure to which the #Supporter s assistance brings the #Supported added strength and support.

<ex>The physical therapist must <fex name="Degree">totally</fex> <t>support</t> tthe patient during the exercises.</ex>

name: Duration
description:
The time period during which the #Supporter supports the #Supported.

<ex><fex name="Duration">For some seventy years</fex>, this judicial fabrication <t>buttressed</t> racial segregation.</ex>

name: Instrument
description:
An entity used by the #Supporter in service of the #Supported s strength by support.

<ex>The troops used <fex name="Instrument">their shoulders</fex> to <t>support</t> the doors of the keep, as the enemy forces tried to break through.</ex>

<ex>For years, patrons of the organization have <t>supported</t> our bi-weekly tea-times <fex name="Instrument">with their generous donations</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
This FE identifies the #Manner in which a #Supporter supports the #Supported. 

<ex>The British Government <fex name="Manner">happily</fex> <t>buttressed</t> Saddam s appalling oppression of his people</ex>.

name: Means
description:
An action that the #Supporter undertakes in service of the #Supported s strengthening.

<ex>The foundation <t>supports</t> the building <fex name="Means">by distributing the load to the ground below.</fex></ex>

name: Place
description:
This FE identifies the #Place where the support occurs.

<ex><fex name="Place">In England</fex>, economic incentives are <t>buttressed</t> by closing certain overdoctored areas from new practices.</ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies when the support occurs.

<ex><fex name="Time">Early in the twentieth century</fex>, such economic arguments <t>buttressed</t> the creation of a National Park Service.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The situation that the #Supporter wishes to bring about by supporting the #Supported. 

<ex>The porch tower of Saint-Germain-des-Prés is sturdily <t>buttressed</t> <fex name="Purpose">to support the weight of its massive bells</fex></ex>.

name: Standard_item
description: The #Standard_item denotes the entities that are exceeded by the #Item with regard to the #Attribute.

name: Profiled_item
description: The #Profiled_item is the entity that is located closest to the end of the scale evoked by some #Attribute.

name: Attribute
description: The #Attribute is a property that evokes a scale along which the #Item is located closer to one extreme in  comparison to the #Standard_item.

name: Standard_attribute
description: The #Standard_attribute is used when the standard is a specific value on  a scale.

name: Profiled_attribute
description: The #Profiled_attribute is a particular value on a scale which is being compared to an #Attribute or #Standard_item.

name: Extent
description: The #Extent is the degree to which the #Item surpasses the #Standard.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the #Item is higher on the scale than the #Standard.

name: Fugitive
description: The #Fugitive is wanted by the #Authorities and turns himself or herself in to the #Authorities.

name: Authorities
description: The #Authorities are the officials, government or otherwise, who are in charge of initiating the criminal process.

name: Place
description: The #Place is the location where the surrendering occurs.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the #Fugitive surrenders.

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Fugitive surrenders to the #Authorities.

name: Surrenderer
description: The person compelled to transfer the #Theme to the #Recipient.

name: Recipient
description: The entity that ends up in possession of the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The object that changes possession.

name: Place
description: The #Place where the #Surrenderer gives the #Theme to the #Recipient.

name: Time
description: The #Time is when the #Surrenderer gives the #Theme to the #Recipient.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for which the #Surrenderer gives the #Theme to the #Recipient.

name: Means
description: The #Means by which the #Surrenderer gives the #Theme to the #Recipient.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner is the manner in which the #Surrenderer gives the #Theme to the #Recipient.

name: Figure
description:
The #Figure is the entity located with respect to the #Ground.

<ex>He had <fex name="Figure">both hands</fex> wrapped <t>around</t> her arm .</ex>

name: Ground
description: The #Ground is the area that the #Figure surrounds.

name: Profiled_region
description:
The area or zone immediately external to the #Ground.  This FE excludes #Figure and is only used in particular constructions such as the following:

<ex>We looked <fex name="Profiled_region"><t>around</t></fex> the trees .</ex>

name: Time
description: The #Time during which the #Figure is located around the #Ground.

name: Survivor
description: The #Survivor lives through a #Dangerous_situation.

name: Dangerous_situation
description: The #Dangerous_situation is one in which people are likely or expected to be negatively affected.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Survivor (primarily) lives during the #Dangerous_situation.

name: Time
description: The time at which the surviving takes place.

name: Means
description: An action performed by the #Survivor that enables them to live through the #Dangerous_situation.

name: Degree
description: It identifies the #Degree to which the #Survivor survives.

name: Depictive
description: It is a description of the #Survivor, during or after the #Dangerous_situation.

name: Authority
description: The #Authority is the group or person who suspects the #Suspect of criminal activity.

name: Suspect
description: The #Suspect is the target of the #Authority s suspicion.

name: Incident
description: The (typically criminal) #Incident in which the #Suspect is suspected of being involved.

name: Time
description: When the suspecting takes place.

name: Protagonists
description:
All the participants in an event or situation, viewed as symmetrically contributing or participating in the situation.

<ex><fex name="Protagonists">We</fex> are <t>alike</t> .</ex>

name: Symptom
description: Any alteration, physical of psychological, experienced by the #Patient.

name: Patient
description: The Patient is the affected entity.

name: Descriptor
description: Any description of the #Symptom.

name: Condition
description: Medical condition associated to the #Symptom.

name: Body_part
description: The part of the body affected by the #Symptom.

name: Duration
description: How long the #Symptom lasts.

name: Frequency
description: How often the #Symptoms occur.

name: Intensity
description: Describes the intensity of the #Symptom.

name: Component_entities
description: The entities that function together as a unit.

name: Complex
description: The unit formed by the #Component_entities.

name: Function
description: The activity that the #Complex entity performs by virtue of its #Component_entities interacting.

name: Salient_entity
description: The kind of entity that the #Complex operates on as part of its #Function.

name: System
description: The complete entity or system whose complexity is under consideration.

name: Degree
description: The #Dimension provides domain specific information about the #System.

name: Dimension
description: This frame element situates the System within a certain domain.

name: Medical_exam
description: Medical exam that a #Patient needs to undergo.

name: Pacient
description: The entity undergoing the #Medical_exam.

name: Health_professional
description: The Health_professional responsible for ordering or carrying out the exam.

name: Place
description: The place where the exam takes place.

name: Time
description: The moment the exam is carried out.

name: Descriptor
description: Description or additional information about the Medical_exam.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the exam that is not covered by more specific FEs.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose of the exam.

name: New
description: The new filler of the #Role that was previously occupied by the #Old filler.

name: Role
description: The category that the #New and #Old entities fit into as a result of the #Function they serve.

name: Function
description: The (generally desirable) state of affairs that the #New and #Old entities are involved in bringing about.

name: Old
description: The entity that occupied the #Role or served the #Function before the #New filler.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #New takes up the #Role previously occupied by the #Old.

name: Degree
description: A #Degree of replacement is generally only possible when #New entities replace #Old entities in multiple contexts.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).  The rapidity of replacement is also indicated as #Manner.

name: Means
description:
An event or situation that directly caused by the #New entity, allowing it to displace the #Oldentity and fill its #Role.

<ex>Honey <t>substitutes</t> for syrup in this recipe <fex name="Means">by making up the sugar component</fex> .</ex>

name: Duration
description: The amount of time that the #New entity is in the #Role.

name: Agent
description: The person who takes possession of the #Theme.

name: Theme
description: The #Agent takes possession of the #Theme.

name: Source
description: The location of the #Theme prior to the taking.

name: Place
description: Where the taking takes place.

name: Time
description: When the taking takes place.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of the taking.

name: Means
description: The intermediate action taken by the #Agent to take the #Theme.

name: Purpose
description: The #Purpose for the taking.

name: Captive
description: The entity which is captured.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent brings the #Captive into custody.

name: Cause
description: The #Cause is the non-sentient entity which is responsible for restricting the movement or location of the #Captive.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which the #Agent takes the #Captive into custody.

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the action indicated by the target.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Agent that affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the event occurs.

name: Cognizer
description: The individual that holds an opinion on an #Issue or Side.

name: Issue
description: The matter, usually concerning a course of action, which the #Cognizer has a positive or negative opinion about.

name: Side
description: The party or individual (generally associated with a particular position on an #Issue) that the #Cognizer has an opinion about.

name: Action
description: An action taken by a #Side or a view that the #Side takes on an issue which the #Cognizer either supports or opposes.

name: Degree
description: The #Degree to which the #Cognizer supports or opposes something.

name: Time
description: The time period during which the #Cognizer has the indicated point of view towards the #Issue.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the Taking_sides which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Cognizer that affect the action (reluctantly, meekly).

name: Place
description: The location where the #Cognizer takes #Sides on an #Issue .

name: Activity
description: The event which requires some #Time_length for completion.

name: Time_length
description: The amount of time required for the #Activity.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Time_length from the norm.

name: Agent
description: The individual who performs the #Activity.

name: Attribute
description: The durational feature of the #Activity.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Activity takes place.

name: Speaker
description: The #Speaker intends through the use of language to get another person to act.

name: Content
description: The wish for action on the #Addressee s part  that the #Speaker expresses.

name: Addressee
description: The person that the Speaker seeks to influence to act.

name: Means
description: Act of the #Speaker that enables them to persuade the #Addressee.

name: Goods
description: An entity that the #Speaker gets the #Addressee to give to them.

name: Purpose
description: The state of affairs that the #Speaker hopes to bring about.

name: Instrument
description: An entity that the #Speaker manipulates to get the #Addressee to perform the #Content.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Speaker talks the #Addressee into performing the #Content.

name: Agent
description: The person who eats or drinks the #Food.

name: Food
description: The entity being tasted or ingested by the #Agent.

name: Means
description: The method in which the #Food is eaten or drunk if not covered by the #Instrument.

name: Instrument
description: The object that the #Agent uses to try the #Food.

name: Purpose
description: A more specific description of what the #Agent hopes to determine by trying the #Food.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Agent tries the #Food.

name: Place
description: The location where the scene of an #Agent trying #Food occurs.

name: Manner
description: A characterization of the #Agent as they try the #Food.

name: Speaker

description: The #Entity for which the temperature #Attribute is under consideration.

name: Attribute
description: The feature of an #Entity which is under discussion.

name: Temperature
description: A quantity or other characterization of the #Entity s state with respect to the temperature #Attribute.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Temperature from the norm.

name: Trajector_entity
description: The entity that occurs at some time.

name: Landmark_event
description: The event which designates the time at which a trajector occurs.

name: Trajector_period
description: The period that occurs with respect to some other time.

name: Landmark_period
description: The period in which a trajector takes place. This period can be cyclical and, in that case, is interpreted contextually.

name: Trajector_event
description: The event that occurs at some time.

name: Landmark_entity
description: The entity which designates the time of some trajector. Note: this FE is infrequent or non-existent in English and is included for completeness.

name: Process
description: The larger event that is characterized by the recurring Subevents.

name: Subevent
description: The salient, punctual event that is construed as part of a #Process.

name: Pattern

name: Time_period
description: A temporal span conceived of as a whole.

name: Temporary_group
description: The group formed temporarily from a larger group for a particular purpose.

name: Activity
description: This FE describes the activity or responsiblilities from which the #Person is taking a temporary leave.

name: Duration

name: Type
description: The kind of leave being taken by the #Person.

name: Purpose

name: Time

name: Guest
description: The #Guest remains for a relatively short period of time in the #Location.

name: Host
description: The #Host is living at the #Location on a permanent basis, and is allowing the #Guest to stay there.

name: Time

name: Purpose

name: Place

name: Theme

name: Borrower

name: Agreement
description: A mutual commitment to an obligation made by two or more parties.

name: Regulated_entity

name: Requirements

name: Terrorist

name: Victim

name: Means
description: The intermediate action performed by the #Terrorist in order to comit the #Act.

description: The location in time when the #Act takes place.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Act takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The action or state-of-affairs that the #Terrorist is trying to accomplish by commiting the #Act.

name: Instrument
description: The #Instrument is used by the #Terrorist in order to inflict harm or commit the #Act.

It is usually societally recognized for having historical or cultural value, or even for offering either natural or artificial resources. Such benefits and resources can be also regarded as #Attractions by the #Tourist.

name: Agent
description: The entity that acts on another entity.

name: Patient
description: The entity that is being acted on and that may but need not undergo a change.

name: Event
description: An #Event in which an #Agent acts on an entity.

name: Cause
description: An event which causes the #Patient to be affected in some way.

name: Means
description: An act performed by an #Agent that enables them to act upon the #Patient.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the event takes place.

name: Place
description: The location at which the event takes place.

name: Cognizer
description: This is the person who carries out the translation.

name: Source_symbol
description: A symbol or set of symbols representing the #Content in the #Source_representation format.

name: Source_representation
description: The representation system in which the #Content pre-exists.

name: Target_symbol
description: A symbol or set of symbols representing the #Content in the #Target_representation format.

name: Target_representation
description: The representation system into which the #Content is rendered by the #Cognizer.

name: Content
description: The information that is meant to be represented by the #Source_symbol and #Target_symbol.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the translation event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of the Cognizer that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Cognizer which accomplishes the translation of the #Content.

name: Time
description: This Frame Element marks expressions that indicate when a certain Categorization was made.

name: Equivalence
description: An assessment of how equivalent the #Source_representation and the #Target_representation are.

name: Medium
description: The Medium is a text produced by the #Cognizer in which she uses a #Target_symbol to express #Content from a #Source_representation system.

name: Place
description: The location where the translation takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Cognizer hopes to bring about by translating.

name: Transit
description: Buildings (airports, bus terminals) and services (shuttles, bus lines, flights) serving a given #Place which is interesting to the #Tourist.

name: Tourist
description: Individual or group using the #Transit infrastructure of a #Place.

name: Place
description: Geographic space visited by the #Tourist, which is served by the #Transit infrastructure.

name: Purpose
description: Some specific action made possible by the #Transit infrastructure.

name: Type
description: The kind of transit service, defined in regards of coverage (local, interstate or international), mode of operation (local, express, non-stop), or to the schedule (daily, nocturne) and so on.

name: Rider
description: The #Rider is being transported by a #Vehicle.

name: Vehicle
description: The #Vehicle carries the #Rider.

name: Trap
description: The #Trap is a device, strategy, or system designed to mislead and cause harm to a #Victim.

name: Deceiver
description: The #Trap is orchestrated by a #Deceiver.

name: Victim
description: The #Deceiver intends to mislead and cause harm to the #Victim by means of the #Trap.

name: Descriptor
description: A description of the #Trap.

name: Area
description: This is the #Area in which the traveling takes place. This frame element describes the enclosed area inside which travelling, of unspecified #Source, #Path or #Goal takes place.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is the location where the travelers end up.

name: Path
description: The #Path is the route along which the travel takes place.

name: Traveler
description: This is the living being which travels. Normally, the #Traveler is expressed as an external argument.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the starting point of the trip.

name: Mode_of_transportation
description: The #Mode_of_transportation expresses how the motion of the #Traveler is effected, by their body or by a vehicle which holds and conveys the #Traveler. Vehicles can move in any way and in any medium. They are usually expressed obliquely with in  or  by .

name: Direction
description: The direction in which the #Traveler goes.

name: Distance
description: This FE dientifies the #Distance traveled.

name: Duration
description: This FE identifies the #Duration of  time during which the trip occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the traveling takes place.

name: Means
description: The action done by the #Traveler by which the traveling is accomplished.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which the travel takes place.

name: Time
description: When the traveling occurs.

name: Baggage
description: The #Baggage are the items necessary for travel that accompany the #Traveler.

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the #Purpose for which the #Traveler travels, i.e. the future state of affairs that will hopefully come about.

name: Place
description: The #Place is the location of the motion. It describes the area in which motion (with a specified #Source, #Path or #Goal) takes place.

name: Theme
description: This is the object which moves. In many sentences this FE will be expressed as something which moves under its own power. However, this FE is not required to be an animate mover, so it is different from Self_mover.

name: Source
description: Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion expresses the frame element #Source. In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion. In particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

name: Path
description: Any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal expresses the frame element #Path, including directional expressions:

name: Goal
description: Any expression which tells where the #Theme ends up as a result of the motion expresses the frame element Goal.

name: Distance
description: Any expression which characterizes the extent of motion expresses the frame element #Distance.

name: Area
description: This frame element is used for expressions which describe a general area in which motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular and not to consist of a single linear path.

name: Path_shape
description: The configuration formed by the entire #Path of the #Theme, taken simultaneously.

name: Direction
description: The direction in which the #Theme goes.

name: Manner
description: Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Means
description: An event involving the #Theme that results in the #Theme moving in the specified way.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which the #Theme moves.

name: Place
description: The #Place is where the motion (which is specified by a #Source, #Path or #Goal) is located.

name: Time
description: The time at which the motion takes place.

name: Duration
description: The length of time that the #Theme spends in motion.

name: Agent
description: This FE marks expressions that denote the person whose conduct is being evaluated.

name: Manner
description: This FE marks expressions that characterize the way that the #Agent behaves toward the #Affected_Party. In the case of mistreat.v, this FE is incorporated.

name: Affected_party
description: The person to whom behavior is directed by the #Agent.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Agent behaves in a certain way.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Agent exhibits their behavior.

name: Means
description: The way in which the treating or mistreating is done.

name: Domain
description: The #Domain of human behavior in which the #Agent acts in a certain #Manner.

name: Standard
description: An explicit point to which the conduct of the #Agent is compared.

name: Behavior
description: The #Behavior which is trendy.

name: Evaluee
description: The #Evaluee is judged to conform to some degree with popular fashion with respect to his or her behavior.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the degree of trendiness from the norm or from the value for another #Behavior.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment of trendiness.

name: Charges
description: The legal label for the crime that the #Defendant is accused of.

name: Court
description: The specific room where the participants in a Trial meet.

name: Defense
description: The individual or group which is responsible for promoting the welfare of the  #Defendant during a Trial, usually involving the contention that the #Defendant is innocent of the #Charges.

name: Jury
description: The group of individuals who observe the Trial and ultimately attempt to come to a verdict.

name: Prosecution
description: The individual or group responsible for promoting the interests of the state in the Trial, prototypically including presenting arguments for the guilt of the the #Defendant.

name: Defendant
description: The person charged with an offence.

name: Judge
description: The official who directs and presides over the Trial.

name: Case
description: The #Case which a Trial is convened to decide.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the place where the trial occurs.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the Time when the trial occurs.

name: Cause
description: The #Cause interacts with the #System such that conditions are met for the #System to operate.

name: System
description: The #System interacts with or detects the #Cause and activates.

name: Actor
description: An entity which participates in a #Cause, perhaps volitionally and perhaps not.

name: Means
description: The #Means is a subevent which the #Cause or #Actor participates in which results in triggering the #System .  <ex>You must have <t>set off</t> the alarm <fex name="mea">by stepping near this sensor</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any holistic description of the event, including overall depictions (the same way) and descriptions pertaining to the Actor's or Cause's influence on the character of the event (eagerly, quietly).

name: Place
description: Where the triggering takes place.

name: Time
description: The time when the triggering takes place.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose of the #Actor in setting off the #System.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer is the person who has an opinion about the reliability of a #Information_source or the #Information from the #Information_source.

name: Expressor
description: An object or action associated with the #Cognizer which is so affected by the #Cognizer's belief that it reveals the #Cognizer's state.

name: Information_source
description: The individual that gives Information to the #Cognizer.

name: Information
description: The text or speech which the #Cognizer has heard and evaluates the truth of.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is the entity that a #Cognizer trusts information about.

name: Content
description: The #Content denotes the mental content that the #Cognizer is certain or uncertain about.

name: Degree
description: It indicates the #Degree to which the #Cognizer trusts the Source.

name: Manner
description: A description of an aspect of the #Cognizer that also affects the nature of the trusting, or a general comparison of the state-of-affairs to others.

name: Evaluator
description: The person (or metonymic manifestation thereof) that participates in the #Experience.

name: Experience
description: The activity or event that the #Evaluator participates in.

name: Entity
description: #Entity is something that the #Evaluator uses to try an #Experience, and metonymically stands in for the #Experience.

name: Purpose
description: A more explicit description of what the #Evaluator seeks to learn by having the #Experience.

name: Manner
description: A description of how the #Evaluator acts in having the #Experience.

name: Means
description: A description of what the #Evaluator does in order to participate in the #Experience.

name: Time
description: The temporal location during which the #Experience occurs.

name: Place
description: The physical location in which the #Experience occurs.

name: Judge
description: The Judge heads the court where the case is tried.  An expression referring to the court may also stand in for the Judge.

name: Defendant
description: The #Defendant is being tried for the #Charges in #Court.

name: Jury
description: This FE identifies the people who are charged by the Court to listen to the testimony, evidence, and arguments, and come to a consensus about the guilt or innocence of the Defendant.

name: Charges
description: This FE identifies the #Charges brought against the Defendant.

name: Governing_authority
description: The #Defendant is tried under the laws of the #Governing_authority.

name: Court
description: This FE identifies the #Court in which a case is tried.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the Time when the case is tried.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the place where the case is tried.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner of the trial of the #Defendant.

name: Utterer
description: The #Utterer participates in a communicative interaction and produces a statement directed to the #Comprehender.

name: Communicators
description: The #Communicators who participate in the communicative interaction.

name: Comprehender
description: The #Comprehender participates in the communicative interaction with the #Utterer. This is the person (or people) to whom the utterance is addressed.

name: State_of_affairs
description: The state of affairs that a cognizer realizes.

name: Time
description: The time at which the State_of_affairs is realized.

name: Utterer
description: The #Utterer participates in a communicative interaction and produces a statement directed to the #Comprehender(s).

name: Comprehender
description: The #Comprehender participates in the communicative interaction with the #Utterer. This is the person (or people) to whom the utterance is addressed.

name: Communicators
description: The #Communicators who participate in the communicative interaction.

description: The #Utterer participates in a communicative interaction and produces a statement directed to the #Comprehender(s).

description: The #Comprehender participates in the communicative interaction with the #Utterer. This is the person (or people) to whom the utterance is addressed.

name: Subtype
description: The entity which denotes a subtype of the more general #Category.

name: Category
description: The more general type that the target denotes a subtype of. This FE is obligatory and should be labeled DNI when not present.

name: Type_property
description: A property of the #Subtype itself rather than the members of the #Category.

name: Item_property
description: A property of the members of the #Category that helps identify (directly or indirectly) the particular set of members that are referred to by the #Subtype.

name: State_of_affairs
description: The state of affairs which is evaluated with regard to whether it exhibits the essential characteristics of a Comparison_set.

name: Feature
description: A property of the #State_of_affairs wherein it differs or is similar to members of a #Comparison_set.

name: Degree
description: The extent to which the #Entity varies from other members of the #Comparison_set.

name: Comparison_set
description: The set of indviduals, which are of similar kind to the #Entity, and to which the #Entity is compared.

name: Reported_fact
description: An assertion of a state, event, property or existence or the assignment to a category that the speaker attributes to unnamed others.

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the #Reported_fact was reported.

description: The thing which is affected by the Event.

name: Entity
description:
The concrete or abstract entity that undergoes a change.


<ex>How pleasing to see that <fex name="ent">Martha</fex> has <t>changed</t> now.</ex>

name: Final_category
description: The type of #Entity that results from the change.

name: Initial_category
description:
The category that the #Entity belongs to before it undergoes the change.

<ex>The viccar <t>changed</t> <fex name="inic">from a professional clergyman</fex> into an anti-ecclesiastical activist.</ex>

name: Initial_quality
description:
<def-root>The value of the <fen>Attribute</fen> before the change takes place.

<ex>At that time, my asthma <t>changed</t> <fex name="iniq">from very mild</fex> to severe.</ex>
</def-root>

name: Final_quality
description:
<def-root>The quality of the <fen>Attribute</fen> that results from the change.


<ex>Its color <t>changed</t> from red <fex name="finq">to blue</fex>.</ex></def-root>

name: Attribute
description:
A characteristic of the #Entity for which a value can be assigned or determined by calculation, measurement , or observation. 


<ex>Test to check if <fex name="att">the color</fex> <t>changes</t> when you place your mouse over the JavaScript image</ex>

name: Value_range
description:
The #Initial_value and #Final_value taken together as the range through which the #Entity changes.

The main faith of the church has <t>changed</t> <fex name="val">between Orthodox, Protestant and Greek Catholic</fex> several times.

name: Final_situation
description:
The #Entity's situation that results from the change. 

<ex>Tests <t>went</t> from taking three hours <fex name="Final_situation">to needing less than one</fex> .</ex>

name: Initial_situation
description:
The situation that the #Entity began in.

<ex>She slowly <t>shifted</t> <fex name="Initial_situation">from giving him makework</fex> to actually finding he had some skills .</ex>

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Entity undergoes the transformation.  <ex><fex name="tim">Then</fex> she <t>turned</t> into a lizard.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the Change event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). 

<ex>He also identified all of the places where cancer rates or pollution levels <t>changed</t> <fex name="man">quickly</fex> over short periods of time.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The extent to which the initial and final values or categories differ from each other.

<ex>Industrial economics has <t>changed</t> <fex name="deg">a lot</fex> during the last two decades</ex>

name: Cause
description:
An event or state that causes the change to take place.

<ex>Doctor?s practices have <t>changed</t> <fex name="cau">due to concerns over medical litigation</fex>.</ex>

name: fe_place_undergo_change
description: fe_place_undergo_change

name: Place
description: The location that the change takes place.

name: Entity
description:
the concrete or abstract entity that undergoes a change.

<ex>how pleasing to see that <fex name="ent">scranton</fex> has <t>metamorphosed</t> .</ex>

name: Final_category
description:
the type of #entity that results from the change.

<ex>his smile <t>transformed</t> <fex name="final_category">into a frown</fex> .</ex>

name: Initial_category
description:
the category that the #entity belongs to before it undergoes the change.

<ex>the viccar <t>converted</t> <fex name="inic">from a professional clergyman</fex> into an anti-ecclesiastical activist.</ex>

name: Time
description:
the time at which the #entity undergoes the transformation.  

<ex><fex name="tim">then</fex> she <t>turned</t> into a lizard.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
any description of the transformation event which is not covered by more specific fes, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). 

<ex>dublin is experiencing the <fex name="manner">same</fex> <t>transformation</t> .</ex>

name: Degree
description:
the extent to which the initial and final categories differ from each other.

<ex>the formula had not yet <t>transformed</t> <fex name="degree">completely</fex> .</ex>

name: Cause
description:
an event or state that causes the change to take place.

<ex>doctors' practices have undergone a <t>metamorphosis</t> <fex name="cau">due to concerns over medical litigation</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description: the location that the change takes place.

name: Wearer
description: The individual who begins the action wearing the #Clothing and ends the action without it.

name: Clothing
description: The item that the #Wearer is initially wearing but then removes.

name: Body_location
description: The initial location of the #Clothing on the body, before it changes location.  Quite often, the location is not overtly specified and is implicitly supplied by the location on the body that the #Clothing is prototypically associated with.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the clothing removal which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events. In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of a #Wearer that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Means
description: The #Means is an act whereby the #Wearer achieves the removal.

name: Degree
description: Degree to which event occurs.

name: Place
description: The location at which the #Wearer undresses an item of #Clothing.

name: Time
description: The time at which a #Wearer undresses.

name: Purpose
description: The purpose for which a #Wearer undresses.

name: Individuals
description: The group of people whose employment status is considered.

name: Employment
description: The property of a group of #Individuals describing how many of them are employed or unemployed.

name: Value
description: The count or percentage of people among the group of #Individuals that are of the specified employment status.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Value from the norm.

name: Furniture
description: The object that is used for a specific purpose in a public area.

name: Creator
description: An individual or group of individuals who bring the #Furniture into being.

name: Material
description: Any indication of what the #Furniture is composed of.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to the #Furniture.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time when the #Furniture came into being.

name: Type
description: An indication of the subtype of the #Furniture.

name: Use
description: The use to which the #Furniture is designed.

name: Resource
description: The #Resource is a physical entity or an ability to perform work that was used in an earlier process, typically in pursuit of a goal.

name: Degree
description: A measure of the amount of the #Resource that is gone, or of the degree to which its quality is reduced.

name: Entity
description: The item which is useful for some purpose.

name: Purpose
description: The kind of task which is promoted by the use or presence of the #Entity.

name: Degree
description: The amount that the presence of the #Entity aids in the completion of the (desirable) #Purpose.

name: Time
description: When the #Entity is useful for a #Purpose.

name: Agent
description: The self-directed entity that uses and activates the #Firearm.

name: Firearm
description: This FE identifies the #Firearm that an #Agent activates so that it rapidly propels a projectile.

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the means by which an #Agent uses the #Firearm.

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the manner in which an #Agent uses the #Firearm.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the place where the Agent intentionally affects the Patient.

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the purpose for which an #Agent uses the firearm.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the #Agent fires the #Firearm.

name: Goal
description: Goal is the location the Theme ends up in, or is intended to end up in.

name: Path
description: This is the path along which the projectiles travel.

name: Source
description: The #Source is the location of the #Firearm from which projectiles originate.

name: Area
description: #Area is the setting in which the projectile s movement takes place.

name: Theme
description: The #Theme is the entity which moves by means of the #Vehicle.

name: Vehicle
description: The #Vehicle is the means of conveyance of the #Theme. It is usually expressed in a PP-complement or the direct object.

name: Source
description: Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion expresses the frame element #Source.

name: Path
description: The #Path describes the trajectory of the motion.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is the endpoint of the trajectory of motion.

name: Area
description: The Area is the location where the motion takes place.

name: Driver
description: The individual that directs the motion of the #Vehicle.

name: Manner
description: The Manner describes a property of the motion not related to its trajectory.

name: Distance
description: The #Distance is the extent of the motion.

name: Duration
description: The Duration is the amount of time the motion takes.

name: Speed
description: The #Speed is the rate at which the motion occurs.

name: Road
description: The Road is the thoroughfare on which the #Vehicle travels.

name: Route
description: The Route is the usual path that the #Vehicle travles.

name: Time
description: When the riding takes place.

name: Agent
description: The Agent uses the Instrument to achieve their Purpose.

name: Purpose
description: This FE identifies the purpose for which an Agent uses the Instrument.

name: Instrument
description: An entity directed by the #Agent that serves to bring about the #Purpose of the #Agent.

name: Role
description: An #Instrument that has a function associated with it.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the place where the Agent uses the Instrument.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the time when the #Agent uses the #Instrument.

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the Means by which an Agent uses the Instrument.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action ( deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Agent
description: The person who depletes a Resource to achieve some Goal

name: Resource
description: The exhaustible commodity that the #Agent has access to.

name: Purpose
description: What the #Agent is attempting to achieve by using the #Resource.

name: Portion
description: The amount of the #Resource that the #Agent uses to achieve the #Purpose.

name: Means
description: A more specific description of how the #Purpose is achieved by spending the #Resource.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (<ment> deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Place
description: The physical location where the #Resource is used.

name: Time
description: The time at which the #Resource is used.

name: Utensil
description: It indicates a utensil made for a specific #Use.

name: Constituent_parts
description: Salient parts that make up the #Utensil.

name: Creator
description: An individual or individuals that bring the #Utensil into existence.

name: Description
description: Specific features of a #Utensil.

name: Material
description: Any indication of what makes up the #Utensil, including components, ingredients, etc.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to a #Utensil.

name: Origin
description: It is the place where the #Utensil came from.

name: Place
description: It is where the #Utensil is located.

name: Quantity
description: It is the amount of utensils.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which a #Utensil comes into existence.

name: Type
description: An indication of the subtype of a #Utensil.

name: Use
description: The #Use for which the #Utensil was intended.

name: Vehicle
description: Vehicle is the transportation device that the human beings use to travel.This FE is incorporated into each LU in this frame.

name: Descriptor
description:
This FE identifies a characteristic or description of the Vehicle. 
<ex>Kim drove a <fex name="Desc"> used</fex> <t>car</t>.</ex>

name: Possessor
description: It denotes the #Possessor of the #Vehicle.

name: Itinerary
description:
The frame element tells about the time and route of the service of the transportation device.
<ex>You must take the <fex name="Itinerary">midnight</fex> <t>train</t> to get there by tomorrow noon.</ex>

name: Use
description: The task which the #Vehicle is put to.  Normally, this includes the transportation of some kind.

name: Vehicle
description: The vehicle which moves into position for typical operation.

name: Source
description: Any expression which describes the location that the #Vehicle has been stationed at.

name: Intended_goal
description: The location that the #Vehicle is bound for.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the preparation for motion which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Vehicle that affect the action (<ment>presumptuously</ment>, <ment>coldly</ment>, <ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>, <ment>carefully</ment>).   <ex>The airship <fex name="Manr">slowly</fex> <t>lifted off</t> and rotated to face the center of the city.</ex>

name: Means
description: An event in which the #Vehicle participates which causes or enables it to travel.

name: Place
description: The #Place describes the location where the #Vehicle prepares for motion.

name: Duration_of_final_state
description: The length  of the time that the #Vehicle remains in the state of readiness.

name: Time
description: The #Time when the #Vehicle gets ready for motion.

name: Vehicle
description: The #Vehicle comes to the ground, usually (but not necessarily) under the control of an operator.

name: Goal
description: #Goal is any expression that tells where the #Vehicle ends up, or would end up, as a result of the motion.

name: Source
description: #Source is any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion. While #Source expressions are possible in this frame, they are relatively infrequent.

name: Path
description: #Path is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal.  In this frame, #Path expressions almost always have a via-sense.

name: Manner
description: A #Manner expression describes a property of landing which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion.  Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the #Means by which a #Vehicle lands.

name: Mode_of_transportation
description: The #Mode_of_transportation expresses how the motion of the #Vehicle is effected, by its body or by a vehicle which holds and conveys the #Vehicle.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the aircraft lands.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the landing occurs.

name: Part
description: Some Part of the larger vehicle, the Whole.

name: Whole
description: A vehicle (the Whole) which includes the Part.

name: Function
description: The function of the part within the vehicule as a whole.

name: Orientation
description: This property of the part that situates the part within the whole.

name: Descriptor
description: A property relating to the part.

name: Judge
description: The #Judge (which may be the jury, judge, magistrate or court) decides on the #Finding.

name: Finding
description: This FE identifies the outcome of the #Judge s deliberation or consideration. Many LUs in this frame incorporate this FE.

name: Defendant
description: The person who stands accused of a crime and is subject to the verdict.

name: Charges
description: This FE refers to the #Charges with respect to which the verdict is being given.

name: Case
description: The #Case on which the verdict is being given.

name: Time
description: When the event occurs.

name: Place
description: Where the event takes place.

name: Legal_basis
description:
This FE indicates the basis in law of a verdict.
<ex>He was found <t>guilty</t> <fex name="LBasis">under section 28 article 5</fex>.</ex>

name: Manner
description: This FE identifies the #Manner in which the #Judge acts.

name: Purpose
description:
This FE identifies the purpose for which the #Judge returns a particular verdict.
<ex>Did you <t>acquit</t> him <fex name="Purp">just to get the publicity</fex>?</ex>

name: Means
description: This FE identifies an action that the #Judge performs in order to return the verdict.

name: Inspector
description:
The individual or individuals that ascertain that the #Unconfirmed_content is true.

<ex><fex name="ins">His</fex> later <t>verification</t> of the facts is certainly beyond reproach.</ex>

name: Unconfirmed_content
description:
An open proposition that the #Inspector decides by examining evidence.  It is usually a propostion put forward which some parties would disbelieve or contest.

<ex>It is extremely difficult to <t>confirm</t> <fex name="unc">the absence of something</fex>.</ex>

name: Medium
description:
The #Medium is the piece of text or work in which the #Inspector verifies the #Unconfirmed_content: 
<ex><fex name="Medium">Chapter four</fex> <t>confirms</t> the reader  s suspicions completely.</ex>

name: Manner
description: Any description of the verification which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (<ment>probably, presumably, mysteriously</ment>), force (<ment>hard, softly</ment>), secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Inspector that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>).

name: Means
description:
An action performed by the #Inspector by which the #Inspector manages to establish the truth of the #Unconfirmed_content.

<ex>We <t>confirmed</t> our results <fex name="mea">by repeating the experiment and measuring the output with a mass spec</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
The amount of certainty which the #Inspector achieves after the process of verification.

<ex>His involvement in the action has subsequently been <fex name="deg">completely</fex> <t>confirmed</t>.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
The state of affairs that the #Inspector hopes to bring about by going through the verification.

<ex>I spent a few minutes <t>confirming</t> his visa number <fex name="pur">just to make him sweat</fex>.</ex>

name: Instrument
description: A tool or instrument used by the #Inspector in the verification process.

name: Time
description: This FE describes the #Time at which the verification event takes place.

name: Place
description: This FE describes where the verificiation event takes place.

name: Item
description: The #Item is one version among several versions (which may or may not yet exist), progressively getting closer to a final version.

name: Degree
description:
The degree of the distance the #Item is from the final version.

<ex>I warn you, this is a <fex name="deg">very rough</fex> <t>draft</t>.</ex>

name: Bomb
description: The explosive device which activates when set off by the victim.

name: Victim
description: The #Victim inadvertantly causes the #Bomb to denotate.

name: Use
description: The type of activity that the #Bomb is generally involved in.  Often this can be considered a kind of #Type specification also.

name: Type
description: This FE indicates what subtype the #Bomb belongs to.

name: Material
description: The substance that makes up the #Bomb.

name: Bomber
description: The person who sets the bomb.

name: Part
description: This FE identifies a part of the #Bomb.  This includes permanent, obligatory parts and mere attachments.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to a #Bomb.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which the #Bomb comes into existence.

name: Creator
description: The individual or group responsible for the creation of the #Bomb.

name: Descriptor
description: A description or characteristic of the #Bomb.

name: Aggressor
description:
The #Aggressor is the person causing the #Victim s injury.

<ex><fex name="agr">Your</fex> <t>brutality</t> <fex name="vic">on your enemies</fex> seems to know no boundaries.</ex>

name: Victim
description:
The #Victim is the being or entity that is injured.

<ex>Increasing <t>violence</t> <fex name="Vic">against supporters of government reform</fex> have attracted international attention.</ex>

name: Cause
description:
The #Cause marks expressions that indicate some non-intentional, typically non-human, force that inflicts harm on the #Victim

<ex><fex name="Cause">The storm s</fex> <t>violence</t> left many lives in shambles.</ex>

name: Aggressors
description:
The #Aggressors commit acts of violence upon each other.

<ex>Hope for a peaceful resoliton is gone as <t>violence</t> <fex name="ags">between the two sides</fex> reignites.</ex>

name: Degree
description:
#Degree is the degree to which violence is done.

<ex>Our troops are working in conditions of <fex name="Degree">extreme</fex> <t>violence</t>.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
The Manner in which the #Aggressor acts upon the #Victim.

<ex>Acts of <fex name="Manner">wanton</fex> <t>violence</t> unconditionally deserve condemnation.</ex>

name: Means
description: An intentional action performed by the #Aggressor that results in the committing of a violent act.

name: Place
description:
#Place identifies the place where the violence occurs.

<ex>City leaders are troubled by recent surges in <fex name="Place">local</fex> <t>violence</t></ex>

name: Time
description:
#Time identifies the time when the harm-causing event occurs.

<ex><fex name="Time">Last week s</fex> <t>violence</t> resulted in over three hundred injuries.</ex>

name: Instrument
description:
This FE is any object used to cause the injury.

<ex>Instances of <fex name="Instrument">gun</fex> <t>violence</t> will receive top priority from the police.</ex>

name: Agent
description: The sentient entity that is temporarily with the #Entity in order to fulfil some #Purpose.

name: Entity
description: The physical entity that is permanently associated with entities or characteristics that the #Agent wishes to use for some #Purpose.  During the visit, the #Agent matches location with the #Entity.

name: Purpose
description: The activity that is enabled by the #Entity and that the #Agent wishes to achieve.

name: Time
description: The time at which a visit is made.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time that the #Agent spends with the #Entity.

name: Manner
description: Any overall description of the details of the visit, either in terms of how it matches other events (<ment>the same way</ment>) or in terms of states of the #Agent that affect the action.

name: Place
description: A description of the position of the #Agent during the visit.

name: Means
description: An action of the #Agent that enables their visit.

name: Normal_location
description: The location that the #Agent normally resides in or is (permanently) associated with.

name: Goal

name: Normal_location
description: The #Normal_location is any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion. While #Normal_location expressions are possible in this frame, they are relatively infrequent. If present, they often express a general direction from which a #Agent moves, rather than a landmark away from which it moves.

name: Path

name: Manner
description: A #Manner expression  describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion. Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

description: The #Mode_of_transportation expresses how the motion of the #Agent is effected, by its body or by a vehicle which holds and conveys the #Agent.   Vehicles can move in any way and in any medium.
