description: This FE identifies the #Purpose for which the #Visitor departs from the #Source.

name: Visitor
description: The sentient entity that is temporarily with the #Host in order to fulfil some #Purpose.

name: Host
description: The #Host welcomes the #Visitor to his/her location, with which he/she is permanently associated. The #Host allows the #Visitor use of resources to accomplish a #Purpose.  During the visit, the #Visitor matches location with the #Host.

name: Host_location
description: The Host_location is the location permanently associated with the #Host, and which the #Visitor stays at temporarily for the acheiving of some #Purpose.

name: Purpose
description: The activity that is enabled by the #Host and that the #Visitor wishes to achieve.

name: Time
description: The time at which a visit is made.

name: Duration
description: The amount of time that the #Visitor spends with the #Host.

name: Manner
description: Any overall description of the details of the visit, either in terms of how it matches other events (<ment>the same way</ment>) or in terms of states of the #Visitor that affect the action.

name: Place
description: A description of the position of the #Visitor during the visit.

name: Means
description: An action of the #Visitor that enables their visit.

name: fe_Sinais_vitais_Sinal_Vital
description: fe_Sinais_vitais_Sinal_Vital

name: Pacient
description: Pacient

name: fe_Sinais_vitais_Descritor
description: fe_Sinais_vitais_Descritor

name: fe_Sinais_vitais_Grau
description: fe_Sinais_vitais_Grau

name: Sound_source
description:
An entity that is construed as a single point source emitting sound.

<ex>He woke up because of the <t>cries</t> <fex name="Sound_source">of the crows outside</fex>.</ex>

name: Location_of_sound_source
description:
The place from which the sound emanates.

<ex>There followed a small silence that was interrupted by a distant <t>cries</t> of caged birds <fex name="Location_of_sound_source">from the interior</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
The location at which sound is produced. This FE differs from #Location_of_sound_source in that it does not highlight the sound s spreading from its source to the perceiver s location, which is usually indicated by the preposition "from".

<ex>The <t>hiss</t> of snakes <fex name="Place">outside the tent</fex> was a constant source of worry.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
Certain properties of the sound relating to its production, loudness, etc  may be of lexicographic interest if they describe properties of a sounds as such: loudly, shrilly, etc.

<ex>The Brigadier had heard the <fex name="Manner">faint</fex> <t>squeak</t> of rats.</ex>

name: Degree
description: Expressions that indicate the loudness of the sound.

name: Path
description:
The #Path along which the sound travels away from the #Sound_source.

<ex>The books he wrote later tell how he never forgot the <t>howl</t> of the wolf <fex name="Path">across the icy field of Otsego</fex> on cold winter nights.</ex>

name: Speaker
description:
This is the person who is characterized as talkative, reticent etc.  It is usually the External Argument: 
<ex><fex name="Spkr">Pat</fex> has been <t>silent</t> on this issue.</ex>

name: Text
description:
#Text is rarely expressed because the quantity of information given is the focus of the frame, rather than the information content. Texts can occur as NP objects, but cannot be either direct quotes or complement clauses.

<ex>Kim gave a hesitant, <t>reticent</t> <fex name="Text">account</fex>.</ex>

name: Topic
description:
This FE is the #Topic on which much or little information is communicated. #Topic is far more frequent than Message in this frame. 
<ex>Kim is very <t>talkative</t> <fex name="Top">about her family and childhood</fex>.</ex>

name: Company
description:
The #Company in which the #Speaker exhibits a certain communicative behavior.  In this frame, #Company occurs in PP Complements headed by <ment>with</ment>: 
<ex>Kim was <t>reticent</t> <fex name="Company">with me</fex> about her family.</ex>

name: Medium
description:
#Medium is the physical entity or channel used to communicate,  as in other Communication frames.  It is usually a PP Complement headed by <ment>in</ment> or <ment>on</ment>.

<ex>Kim is <t>talkative</t> <fex name="Medium">on the phone</fex>.</ex>

name: Degree
description: Degree to which the #Speaker withholds or does not withhold information and conversation.

name: Manner
description: Manner in which the speaker is reticent or voluble.

name: Judge
description: The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

name: Gambler
description: The person who wages the #Asset on a certain #Outcome.

name: Asset
description: Something desirable possessed by or directly associated with the #Gambler which is lost if the #Gambler loses the wager.

name: Outcome
description: The #Gambler predicts that a certain #Outcome will hold.

name: Uncertain_situation
description: The #Gambler predicts how an #Uncertain_situation will resolve.

name: Place
description: The place where the #Gambler makes the wager.

name: Time
description: The time when the #Gambler makes the wager.

name: Nature
description: Nature

name: Protagonist
description: The sentient being who cannot proceed with their planned activities until a #Salient_entity has arrived or an #Expected_event has occurred.

name: Salient_entity
description: A concrete or abstract entity that the #Protagonist expects to participate in an #Expected_event, typically that of arriving at the #Place of the #Protagonist.

name: Expected_event
description: The #Expected_event is an event that needs to take place or a state that needs to begin to hold before the #Protagonist can proceed with their planned activities.

name: Time
description: The #Time period during which the #Protagonist is waiting.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Protagonist is waiting.

name: Duration
description: It denotes the length of time from the beginning of the waiting to its end.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the waiting event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including general descriptions comparing events and salient characteristics of the #Protagonist that also affect the action.

name: End_point
description: The point in time, defined either as a clock time or in terms of an event that takes place, at which the #Protagonist ends the waiting.

name: Purpose
description: An action that the #Protagonist intends to accomplish by waiting.

name: Sleeper
description: It identifies the sleeping entity.

name: Sleep_state
description: This describes the state out of which the #Sleeper awakens.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the event occurs.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the event occurs.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Sleeper awakens.

name: Suspect
description: The #Suspect is suspected of having committed a crime by the authorities who want the #Suspect to enter the criminal process.

name: Speaker
description: The #Speaker produces the #Message to alert the #Addressee as to possible danger.

name: Addressee
description: The #Addressee receives the warning from the #Speaker.

name: Message
description: The #Message is the communication produced by the #Speaker.

name: Topic
description: The #Topic is a general description of the content of the #Message.

name: Medium
description: It is the #Medium in which the #Message is expressed.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner describes the way in which the #Speaker delivers the warning.

name: Means
description: The #Means describes the way the #Speaker accomplishes the task of warning the #Addressee.

name: Time
description: The time period during which the #Speaker warns the #Addressee.

name: Place
description: The location in which the #Speaker warns #Addressee.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer is the person who repeatedly changes their mind about which of the #Options to choose.

name: Options
description: The #Options are the alternative courses of action or the alternative physical or concrete entities that the #Cognizer can choose from.

name: Issue
description: The #Issue is a question about a course of action or a choice between items.

name: Option_1
description: When there is an explicitly separate construal of the #Options, #Option_1 is the first-mentioned alternative, typically in the form of a from-PP. When it is clear that  the #Cognizer actually acted on their choice, #Option_1 is the alternative they embraced first before pursuing #Option_2.

name: Option_2
description: When there is an explicitly separate construal of the #Options, #Option_2 is the second-mentioned alternative, typically in the form of a to-PP. When it is clear that  the #Cognizer actually acted on their choice, #Option_2 is the alternative they embraced after abandoning #Option_1.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the #Cognizer keeps changing their mind between the #Options that present themselves.

name: Time
description: It denotes the #Time interval during which the #Cognizer keeps changing their mind about which of the #Options to select.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the selecting event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including general descriptions comparing events (the same way) and salient characteristics of the #Cognizer that also affect the action.

name: Duration
description: In the cases where the #Cognizer does not act on their choice, the #Duration denotes the length of time from the beginning of the #Cognizer s deliberations to the end. In situations where the #Cognizer does act on the #Options, the #Duration denotes the length of the interval during which the #Cognizer repeatly changes from one option to the other.

name: Person
description: The individual or individuals whose wealthiness is being described.

name: Institution
description: A group which has or lacks possession of some resource.

name: Degree
description: The degree of wealthiness or poverty of the #Person or #Institution.

name: Type_of_possession
description: A characterization of the entity, usually money, that the #Person or the #Institution possesses.

name: Weapon
description: An entity prototypically used by a #Wielder to cause damage.

name: Use
description: The type of activity that the #Weapon is generally involved in.  Often this can be considered a kind of #Type specification also.

name: Type
description: It indicates what subtype of the general category the #Weapon belongs to.

name: Material
description: The substance that makes up the #Weapon.

name: Wielder
description: The person (or other sentient entity) that is using the #Weapon.

name: Part
description: It identifies a part of the #Weapon. This includes permanent, obligatory parts and mere attachments.

name: Name
description: The term used to refer to an #Weapon.

name: Time_of_creation
description: The time at which a #Weapon comes into existence.

name: Creator
description: The individual or group responsible for the creation of the #Weapon.

name: Descriptor
description: A description or characteristic of the #Weapon.

name: Wearer
description: The person whose clothing is under discussion.

name: Clothing
description: It identifies the piece of #Clothing that the #Wearer wears.

name: Body_part
description: The body part of the #Wearer which is covered by the #Clothing.

name: Degree
description: A characterization of how completely the clothing status holds.

name: Manner
description: A characterization of the impression given by the #Wearer s clothing status.

name: Time
description: The time at or during which the #Wearer has the #Clothing on.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Wearer wishes to bring about.

name: Relative_location
description: The location relative to the body of the #Wearer that the #Clothing occupies.  Note that in many cases, the location is defined relative to other clothing.

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the weather occurs.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the weather occurs.

name: Specification
description: This FE identifies a further #Specification of the weather conditions.

name: Whole
description: The #Whole is the larger entity that includes the #Part.

name: Part
description: The #Part is either a subset or a constituent part of the #Whole.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the inclusion event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).

name: Time
description: The #Time at which the inclusion relation holds.

name: Place
description: The location at which the inclusion relation holds.

name: Cognizer
description: The #Cognizer is the individual that is willing to engage in the #Activity.

name: Activity
description: The #Activity is what the #Cognizer would do under certain circumstances.

name: Place
description: It identifies the #Place where the #Cognizer is willing to engage in the #Activity.

name: Time
description: It identifies the #Time when the #Cognizer is willing to engage in the #Activity.

name: Degree
description: A modifier expressing  the deviation of the willingness from the norm or from the value for another #Cognizer.

name: Athlete
description: The individual or team who scores the point.

name: Point
description: Outcome of the successful move played by the #Athlete.

name: Purpose
description: The goal of the #Athlete while performing the move.

name: Place
description: Where in the field, court, pool or track, the move is played.

name: Manner
description: Some aspect regarding how the move is played not included in the #Technique.

name: Technique
description: Some specific manner of performing the move.

name: Time
description: When the winning move takes place.

name: Opponent
description: Individual or team who suffers the winning move.

name: Equipment
description: Any objects used in sport, with which the #Athlete interacts.

name: Competitor
description: The individual or individuals involved in the #Competition.

name: Prize
description: A socially and/or monetarily significant entity which is given to a #Competitor according to #Score or #Rank.

name: Score
description: A quantity whereby progress is measured during the game, and #Rank and #Prizes are awarded to the #Competitor afterward.

name: Margin
description: The amount by which the #Competitor's and #Scores differ.

name: Rank
description: The rank (according to #Score) that a #Competitor achieves.

name: Means
description: An action of the #Competitor that results in the outcome of the #Competition.

name: Manner
description: Any description of the #Competitor which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of a #Competitor that also affect their action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

name: Time
description: When the #Competition takes place.

name: Place
description: The location where the #Competition takes place.

name: Competition
description: The event in which the #Competitor competes.

name: Opponent
description: The individual that the #Competitor has been competing against.

name: Venue
description: This FE is for the named venue of a competition, particularly when the place has been built for the purpose of a #Competition.

name: Participant
description:
The individual or individuals that are engaged or are scheduled to be engaged in an #Activity.

<ex>Instead, <fex name="par">he</fex> was challenged by Neil Gaudry, and <t>withdrew</t> from the race when it appeared that he would not be victorious.</ex>

name: Activity
description:
The event that the Participant is engaged in or was scheduled to be engaged in.


<ex> In any event , in mid-April he <t>withdrew</t> <fex name="act">from the contest</fex>. </ex>

name: Organization
description:
The #Organization is an intentionally formed human social group with some definite structure to which the #Participant belongs.


<ex>This led to the decision to <t>withdraw</t> <fex name="org">from IMF agreements</fex> in May 1987 .</ex>

name: Place
description: This FE identifies the #Place where the Participant ends the participation in the Activity.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the Participant ends their participation in the Activity.

name: Purpose
description: The state-of-affairs that the #Participant hopes to bring about by withdrawing

name: Means
description: The act done by the #Participant that accomplishes their withdrawal.

name: Medium
description:
The document that the #Participant uses to communicate their withdrawal.

<ex><fex name="med">In a memorandum dated May 6</fex>, they withdrew from the NPT.</ex>

name: Manner
description:
A description of the attitude of the #Participant which also affects the character of the withdrawal.

<ex>After that, she <fex name="man">gladly</fex> <t>withdrew</t> from the match.</ex>

name: Ground
description: The #Ground serves as a basis for describing the location of the #Figure, as inside a region measured outward from the #Ground and of a width specified by #Distance.

name: Figure
description: The #Figure is perceived as located relative to a certain #Ground location.

name: Distance
description: It identifies the  #Distance between the #Ground and the borders of the region within which the #Figure is located.

name: Sign_1
description:
FN: a linguistic unit that carries semantic, phonological or syntactic information.
<ex> In one sense, <fex name="Sign_1">dog</fex> is a <t>hyponym</t> of itself.</ex>

name: Sign_2
description:
FN: a linguistic unit

<ex>In one sense, dog is a <t>hyponym</t> of <fex name="Sign_2">itself</fex>.</ex>

name: Signs
description:
FN: Linguistic units
<ex> <fex name="Signs">Happy and sad</fex> are <t>antonyms</t>.</ex>

name: Agent
description: The #Agent puts effort into reaching #Goal.

name: Goal
description: The #Goal is what the #Agent expends effort to achieve.

name: Salient_entity
description: An entity that is centrally involved in the #Goal that the #Agent is attempting to acheive.

name: Outcome
description: The #Outcome is the failure or success of an attempt to achieve a #Goal.

name: Means
description: This FE identifies the #Means by which the effort is done.

name: Degree
description: This FE identifies the #Degree to which an attempt occurs.

name: Time
description: This FE identifies the #Time when the effort occurs.

name: Place
description: The place where the work is done.

name: Manner
description: The #Manner in which the #Agent puts in effort in acheiving the #Goal.

name: Purpose
description: The reason for which the #Agent puts effort into achieving the #Goal.

name: Agent
description: The #Agent is assigned to a #Post to perform a task involving a #Salient_entity.

name: Post
description:
The #Post is a location or station assigned to the #Agent where a task or tasks are to be performed.

<ex>Sue was <t>staffing</t> <fex name="pos">the entrance</fex> when everything started to go wrong.</ex>

name: Salient_entity
description:
The #Salient_entity is centrally involved in the task the #Agent is assigned to perform. It is normally located at the #Post.

<ex>You ll be <t>working</t> <fex name="sal">the phones</fex>.</ex>

name: Place
description:
This FE identifies the place where the #Agent staffs the #Post.

<ex><t>Working</t> the front desk <fex name="Place">at a real estate office</fex> is not as fulfilling as it might seem.</ex>

name: Purpose
description:
This FE identifies the purpose for which the #Agent works at the #Post.

<ex>We will be <t>staffing</t> a booth <fex name="Purpose">to let everyone know about our upcoming events.</fex></ex>

name: Time
description:
This FE identifies the time when the #Agent works at the #Post.

<ex>Police manned the border <fex name="Time">from 3 to 5pm</fex>.</ex>

name: Means
description:
This FE identifies the Means by which the #Agent works at the Post.

<ex>Jason <t>manned</t> the booth <fex name="Means">by handing out brochures and greeting visitors.</fex></ex>

name: Manner
description:
Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>). 

<ex>Thanks to our volunteers for <fex name="Manner">tirelessly</fex> <t>manning</t> the entrance all night.</ex>

name: Experiencer
description: It indicates the one who is actively expressing emotion over the #Topic.

name: Topic
description: The Experiencer's emotion generally is about something.

name: Degree
description: It indicates the degree to which the #Experiencer expresses the emotion.

name: Manner
description: It indicates the manner in which the active emotion is expressed.

name: Means
description: An action performed by the #Experiencer which brings about the active emotion.
